```sql
  flow.owner_type,
  flow.owner_id,
  flow.state AS flow_state,
  flow.verify_fee_amount,
  flow.verify_fee_payment_order_id,
  flow.updated_at AS flow_updated_at,
  po.id AS payment_order_id,
  po.status AS payment_status,
  po.amount AS payment_amount,
  po.prepay_id,
  po.out_trade_no,
  po.paid_at,
  po.processed_at,
  po.expires_at,
  po.created_at AS payment_created_at
FROM baofu_account_opening_flows flow
JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = flow.verify_fee_payment_order_id
WHERE flow.state IN ('verify_fee_pending', 'verify_fee_processing')
  AND po.business_type = 'baofu_account_verify_fee'
  AND (
    po.status IN ('closed', 'failed')
    OR (po.status = 'pending' AND po.prepay_id IS NULL)
    OR (po.status = 'pending' AND po.expires_at < now())
  )
ORDER BY flow.updated_at DESC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F09-3: 核验费 paid+processed，但 opening flow 没有推进到 opening/ready 等后续状态。
SELECT
  po.id AS payment_order_id,
  po.out_trade_no,
  po.status AS payment_status,
  po.paid_at,
  po.processed_at,
  po.amount,
  flow.id AS flow_id,
  flow.owner_type,
  flow.owner_id,
  flow.state AS flow_state,
  flow.verify_fee_payment_order_id,
  flow.updated_at AS flow_updated_at,
  epfa.id AS application_id,
  epfa.status AS application_status,
  epfa.last_error,
  epfa.next_retry_at,
  epf.id AS fact_id,
  epf.fact_source,
  epf.terminal_status
FROM payment_orders po
LEFT JOIN baofu_account_opening_flows flow
  ON flow.verify_fee_payment_order_id = po.id
LEFT JOIN external_payment_facts epf
  ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
 AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
 AND epf.capability = 'direct_jsapi_payment'
LEFT JOIN external_payment_fact_applications epfa
  ON epfa.fact_id = epf.id
 AND epfa.consumer = 'baofu_account_verify_fee_domain'
WHERE po.business_type = 'baofu_account_verify_fee'
  AND po.payment_channel = 'direct'
  AND po.status = 'paid'
  AND po.processed_at IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    flow.id IS NULL
    OR flow.state IN ('profile_pending', 'verify_fee_pending', 'verify_fee_processing')
    OR epfa.status IN ('pending', 'failed', 'processing')
  )
ORDER BY po.processed_at DESC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F09-4: 旧核验费 terminal failure fact 后到，flow 当前指针已不是该 payment_order。
WITH old_verify_fee_payment AS (
  SELECT
    po.*,
    substring(po.attach from 'owner_type:([^;]+)') AS attach_owner_type,
    CASE
      WHEN substring(po.attach from 'owner_id:([0-9]+)') IS NOT NULL
      THEN substring(po.attach from 'owner_id:([0-9]+)')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS attach_owner_id
  FROM payment_orders po
  WHERE po.business_type = 'baofu_account_verify_fee'
)
SELECT
  epf.id AS fact_id,
  epf.external_object_key AS out_trade_no,
  epf.terminal_status,
  epf.observed_at,
  epfa.id AS application_id,
  epfa.status AS application_status,
  epfa.last_error,
  old_po.id AS old_payment_order_id,
  old_po.status AS old_payment_status,
  flow.id AS flow_id,
  flow.state AS flow_state,
  flow.verify_fee_payment_order_id AS current_flow_payment_order_id,
  current_po.status AS current_payment_status,
  current_po.out_trade_no AS current_out_trade_no
FROM external_payment_facts epf
JOIN old_verify_fee_payment old_po
  ON old_po.id = epf.business_object_id
LEFT JOIN baofu_account_opening_flows flow
  ON flow.owner_type = old_po.attach_owner_type
 AND flow.owner_id = old_po.attach_owner_id
LEFT JOIN payment_orders current_po
  ON current_po.id = flow.verify_fee_payment_order_id
LEFT JOIN external_payment_fact_applications epfa
  ON epfa.fact_id = epf.id
 AND epfa.consumer = 'baofu_account_verify_fee_domain'
WHERE epf.capability = 'direct_jsapi_payment'
  AND epf.terminal_status IN ('closed', 'failed', 'expired')
  AND flow.verify_fee_payment_order_id IS NOT NULL
  AND flow.verify_fee_payment_order_id <> old_po.id
  AND epf.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY epf.created_at DESC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F09-5: direct query/manual fact applied，但 rider_deposit/claim_recovery payment_order 仍不是 paid。
SELECT
  po.id AS payment_order_id,
  po.business_type,
  po.status AS payment_status,
  po.processed_at,
  po.amount AS payment_amount,
  po.out_trade_no,
  epf.id AS fact_id,
  epf.fact_source,
  epf.terminal_status,
  epf.amount AS fact_amount,
  epf.observed_at,
  epfa.id AS application_id,
  epfa.consumer,
  epfa.status AS application_status,
  epfa.applied_at
FROM payment_orders po
JOIN external_payment_facts epf
  ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
 AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
JOIN external_payment_fact_applications epfa
  ON epfa.fact_id = epf.id
WHERE po.payment_channel = 'direct'
  AND po.business_type IN ('rider_deposit', 'claim_recovery')
  AND epf.terminal_status = 'success'
  AND epf.fact_source IN ('query', 'manual_reconciliation')
  AND epfa.status = 'applied'
  AND po.status <> 'paid'
ORDER BY epfa.applied_at DESC NULLS LAST, epf.observed_at DESC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F09-6: rider_deposit paid/processed 或 applied fact 后缺 deposit ledger/credit。
SELECT
  po.id AS payment_order_id,
  po.user_id,
  po.out_trade_no,
  po.status AS payment_status,
  po.amount,
  po.paid_at,
  po.processed_at,
  COUNT(DISTINCT rd.id) AS deposit_log_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT rdc.id) AS deposit_credit_count,
  MAX(epfa.status) AS latest_application_status
FROM payment_orders po
LEFT JOIN rider_deposits rd
  ON rd.payment_order_id = po.id
 AND rd.type = 'deposit'
LEFT JOIN rider_deposit_credits rdc
  ON rdc.payment_order_id = po.id
LEFT JOIN external_payment_facts epf
  ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
 AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
 AND epf.capability = 'direct_jsapi_payment'
LEFT JOIN external_payment_fact_applications epfa
  ON epfa.fact_id = epf.id
 AND epfa.consumer = 'rider_deposit_domain'
WHERE po.business_type = 'rider_deposit'
  AND po.payment_channel = 'direct'
  AND (
    po.status = 'paid'
    OR epfa.status = 'applied'
  )
GROUP BY po.id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT rd.id) = 0
    OR COUNT(DISTINCT rdc.id) = 0
ORDER BY po.paid_at DESC NULLS LAST, po.created_at DESC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F09-7: claim_recovery payment_order 已 paid/processed/applied，但 recovery 未 paid 或缺 release action。
WITH claim_payment AS (
  SELECT
    po.*,
    CASE
      WHEN substring(po.attach from '"recovery_id"\s*:\s*"?([0-9]+)"?') IS NOT NULL
      THEN substring(po.attach from '"recovery_id"\s*:\s*"?([0-9]+)"?')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS recovery_id_from_attach
  FROM payment_orders po
  WHERE po.business_type = 'claim_recovery'
    AND po.payment_channel = 'direct'
),
release_actions AS (
  SELECT
    ba.*,
    CASE
      WHEN trim(ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN (ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS recovery_id_from_detail
  FROM behavior_actions ba
  WHERE ba.action_type = 'release'
)
SELECT
  cp.id AS payment_order_id,
  cp.out_trade_no,
  cp.status AS payment_status,
  cp.paid_at,
  cp.processed_at,
  cp.amount AS payment_amount,
  cr.id AS recovery_id,
  cr.claim_id,
  cr.recovery_target,
  cr.recovery_amount,
  cr.status AS recovery_status,
  epfa.id AS application_id,
  epfa.status AS application_status,
  epfa.applied_at,
  ba.id AS release_action_id,
  ba.status AS release_action_status
FROM claim_payment cp
LEFT JOIN claim_recoveries cr
  ON cr.id = cp.recovery_id_from_attach
LEFT JOIN external_payment_facts epf
  ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
 AND epf.business_object_id = cp.id
 AND epf.capability = 'direct_jsapi_payment'
LEFT JOIN external_payment_fact_applications epfa
  ON epfa.fact_id = epf.id
 AND epfa.consumer = 'claim_recovery_domain'
LEFT JOIN release_actions ba
  ON ba.recovery_id_from_detail = cr.id
WHERE cp.status = 'paid'
  AND (
    cp.processed_at IS NOT NULL
    OR epfa.status = 'applied'
  )
  AND (
    cr.id IS NULL
    OR cr.status <> 'paid'
    OR ba.id IS NULL
  )
ORDER BY cp.paid_at DESC NULLS LAST, cp.created_at DESC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F09-8: retained direct success fact 金额与 payment_order 金额不一致。
SELECT
  po.id AS payment_order_id,
  po.business_type,
  po.out_trade_no,
  po.status AS payment_status,
  po.amount AS payment_amount,
  epf.id AS fact_id,
  epf.fact_source,
  epf.external_secondary_key AS transaction_id,
  epf.amount AS fact_amount,
  epf.terminal_status,
  epfa.id AS application_id,
  epfa.consumer,
  epfa.status AS application_status,
  epfa.last_error
FROM payment_orders po
JOIN external_payment_facts epf
  ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
 AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
JOIN external_payment_fact_applications epfa
  ON epfa.fact_id = epf.id
WHERE po.payment_channel = 'direct'
  AND po.business_type IN ('baofu_account_verify_fee', 'claim_recovery', 'rider_deposit')
  AND epf.terminal_status = 'success'
  AND epf.amount IS NOT NULL
  AND epf.amount <> po.amount
  AND epf.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY epf.created_at DESC;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 查 `failed to update prepay_id, record will lack prepay_id for audit`、`update claim recovery prepay id`、`failed to close claim recovery payment order after create rejection`、`failed to close baofu verify fee payment after empty prepay id`，按 P0-F09-1 对齐坏占位。
  - 查 `closed expired payment orders` 时间窗后立刻跑 P0-F09-2；若 flow 仍指向 closed 核验费单，说明 DataCleanup 绕过 terminal failure consumer。
  - 查 `baofu verify fee query success amount mismatch; skip local paid transition` 和 P0-F09-8；核验费已有 query guard，rider/claim 若命中说明需要统一 amount guard。
  - 查 `continue baofu account opening after verify fee paid`、`enqueue baofu account opening`、`baofu verify fee payment terminal failure reset opening flow to retryable pending`，按 flow_id/payment_order_id 对齐 P0-F09-3/4。
  - 查 `record direct payment query fact`、`apply direct payment query fact`、`payment fact application applied`，过滤 `consumer in (rider_deposit_domain, claim_recovery_domain)` 并对齐 P0-F09-5。
  - 查 `claim recovery payment succeeded but recovery status is no longer payable`，命中即需要人工核对是否应退款、是否应把 recovery 重新 paid 或是否应异常入账。
  - 查 `enqueue recovered direct payment fact application failed`、`record recovered direct payment fact failed`，确认 PaymentRecoveryScheduler 是否真的覆盖 paid/unprocessed retained direct。
- 最小复现/测试补齐：
  - 核验费 prepay 写回失败：CreatePaymentOrder 成功、微信返回 prepay_id、`UpdatePaymentOrderPrepayId` 失败；再次调用继续开户，断言当前复用 pending/no-prepay 且无 pay_params。
  - rider deposit prepay 写回失败：创建支付成功但 prepay_id 未写；本次返回 pay_params，后续同金额充值复用 pending/no-prepay 并再次外呼同 out_trade_no，断言当前行为。
  - claim recovery prepay 写回失败且本地 failed 标记失败：断言 active pending/no-prepay 会卡住同 attach partial unique 或复用逻辑。
  - DataCleanup 核验费关闭：flow `verify_fee_processing` 指向 pending verify fee payment_order，运行 `CloseExpiredPaymentOrders`，断言 flow 仍指向 closed payment_order，不会进入 terminal failure application。
  - 核验费 success 半状态：让 `UpdatePaymentOrderProcessedAt` 成功后，`ContinueAfterVerifyFeePaid` 或 opening task enqueue 失败；断言 payment_order paid+processed，但 flow 未稳定推进。
  - 旧核验费 failure 后到：flow 从 P1 换绑 P2 后，P1 terminal failed fact application 到达；断言当前可在 `verify_fee_processing` 状态下清空 flow payment pointer。
  - rider_deposit query success：payment_order pending，仅通过 `QueryPaymentOrder` 记录 success fact/application；断言 current application 可 applied 但 payment_order 未 paid、押金 ledger/credit 未写。
  - claim_recovery query success：同上，断言 recovery 未 paid/release action 未创建但 application 可 applied。
  - claim recovery non-payable：创建支付单后把 recovery 改 disputed/waived，再注入 callback success；断言 payment_order processed/application applied，但 recovery 不 paid、不退款、不出 anomaly fact。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 P0-F09-1 命中多，优先统一 retained direct payment intent：本地 pending、provider prepay、command outcome、timeout task 应在同一个可恢复状态机里；prepay 写回失败不能只靠日志和用户重试。
  - 若 P0-F09-2 命中，DataCleanup 对 `baofu_account_verify_fee` 不应直接 bulk close；应改为 provider-aware query/close 并走 baofu verify fee terminal failure consumer，或者至少在 close 后以 application/fact 补偿 flow pointer。
  - 若 P0-F09-3 命中，核验费 success application 应把 payment_order processed 和 opening flow/task 续链做成可重入阶段；运营判断不能只看 `processed_at`。
  - 若 P0-F09-4 命中，flow 更新必须带 expected current `verify_fee_payment_order_id` 或 flow version；旧 terminal failure 不能清空新支付单指针。
  - 若 P0-F09-5 命中，direct query success 的 paid 标记顺序要和 callback/timeout 统一；application 不应在 payment_order 未 paid 时 applied。
  - 若 P0-F09-6 命中，先通过 recovery fact/application 重放补押金 ledger/credit；若 application 已 applied，需人工对账后补偿，不能单靠再次调度。
  - 若 P0-F09-7 命中，产品/财务必须先定 non-payable recovery 收款策略：自动退款、转人工异常账、还是恢复追偿为 paid。未定策略前不要只把 recovery 宽写 paid。
  - 若 P0-F09-8 命中，retained direct consumer 层补统一 amount guard；历史命中按实际微信入账金额、payment_order 预期金额和业务入账结果逐笔核对。

#### P0-F10. claim recovery / payout / behavior money actions

- 原始编号：`183/228/229/283/NP-278-NP-282/NP-285-NP-287/NP-308`，与退款和直连支付族交叉。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed` for payment success no-op and action 状态写入弱 guard，`C2-needs-business-decision` for non-payable recovery 收款后是退款、告警还是人工处理。
- 证据闭口：`283` claim recovery 支付成功后若 recovery 已非 payable，会 mark payment processed/application applied 但不退款不告警；`228/229` payout running/out_bill_no 与外呼/lease 分段；`NP-280/NP-282` action terminal write 缺 expected guard 或 recovery 不扫 running。
- 生产验证：查 claim_recovery payment_order paid+processed 但 recovery 非 paid 且无 refund_order/release action；查 payout action running 超阈值；查 behavior action running 超阈值。
- 最小复现/测试：创建追偿支付单后把 recovery 改 disputed/waived，再完成支付；payout action 标 running 后模拟外呼前崩溃。
- 修复类型：non-payable paid 进入 anomaly/refund intent；payout/action 增加 durable lease 和 running recovery；terminal 写入 expected-status。
- 下一步：先确定产品语义：追偿已争议/豁免后用户付款，应自动退款还是进入人工账务。

##### P0-F10 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：本族只处理 claim payout、claim recovery paid 后 release、post-payout recovery/block/notify action、recovery overdue block、recovery dispute approved/rejected 后的 payout/release/resume 等后续资金/行为动作链。retained direct claim_recovery 支付单创建、prepay、query/callback success 归 `P0-F09`；骑手押金退款归 `P0-F11`；资金异常通知 best-effort 归 `P0-F12`。
- 分支复核：
  - 已有保护：创建 claim recovery 支付前，`CreateMerchantClaimRecoveryPayment/CreateRiderClaimRecoveryPayment` 会校验追偿属于当前商户/骑手、target 匹配、平台赔付 `claim.paid_at` 已完成，且 recovery 只能是 `pending/overdue`；`paid/disputed/waived` 等状态不能新建支付意图。
  - 已有保护：claim recovery 成功 application 进入 `ProcessPaymentSuccessTx`，事务内先 `GetPaymentOrderForUpdate`，仅 `payment_order.status='paid'` 且 `processed_at IS NULL` 才处理；attach 会校验 claim_id/recovery_id/recovery_target 与 recovery 记录一致。
  - 已有保护：`MarkClaimRecoveryPaid` SQL 只允许 `pending/overdue -> paid`；paid event、release action 与 `payment_order.processed_at` 在同一事务内写入。已 paid recovery 会幂等跳过，不重复创建 release action。
  - 已有保护：release action 执行不是盲目解除限制；`ReleaseClaimRecoverySuspensionIfClear` 会先查同一 merchant/rider 是否仍有 `overdue` 或到期 `disputed` 的 blocking recovery，只有没有 blocking recovery 才 unsuspend。
  - 已有保护：支付 fact application worker 在 claim recovery 成功后若拿到 release action，会入队 `TaskClaimBehaviorAction`；入队失败会记录错误，`ClaimBehaviorActionRecoveryScheduler` 仍会扫 `created/failed` 的 release/block/recovery/notify action 重新入队。
  - 已有保护：claim payout action 以 `behavior_actions(action_type='payout', target_entity='user')` 作为 durable outbox；provider `out_bill_no` 使用 `claimpayout{actionID}`，重试不会换外部幂等号。
  - 已有保护：claim payout 外呼前会把 action detail 写入 `running` 并持久化 `out_bill_no`；若 provider 已受理或 duplicate，后续通过 `QueryTransferByOutBillNo` 或 merchant-transfer callback 收敛，不把 `requestMerchantTransfer:ok` 当作赔付成功。
  - 已有保护：`ClaimPayoutRecoveryScheduler` 每 5 分钟扫描 payout action 的 `created/failed/running`；非 terminal failed 会重试，running 且有 `out_bill_no` 会先 query provider，不直接二次 create transfer。
  - 已有保护：claim payout success 后先 `MarkClaimPaid`，再 `FinalizeClaimCompensationAfterPayoutTx` 在事务内补建 recovery/restriction/notification action；post-payout action 入队失败只 warn，但 created action 可被 recovery scheduler 补扫。
  - 已有保护：claim recovery overdue scanner 使用 `MarkClaimRecoveryOverdueWithActionTx`，事务内 `pending -> overdue`、写 overdue event、创建 block action；SQL guard 避免把非 pending recovery 再次 overdue。
  - 已有保护：recovery dispute approved path 会在事务内把 disputed recovery waive，并创建 release action；异步 result task 要求有 release action id，若缺失但 recovery 存在会报错而不是静默跳过 release。
  - 已有保护：recovery dispute rejected path 会通过 `ResumeClaimRecoveryAfterDispute` 把 disputed recovery 恢复为 pending/overdue，并写 resumed event；非 disputed recovery 不会被宽写。
  - 仍是问题：claim recovery 支付成功后如果 recovery 已经不是 `pending/overdue/paid`，`ProcessPaymentSuccessTx` 只打一条 `claim recovery payment succeeded but recovery status is no longer payable` error log，然后继续 `UpdatePaymentOrderProcessedAt`。这会让 payment fact application applied，但既没有 `MarkClaimRecoveryPaid`、release action，也没有 refund/anomaly/manual-review durable fact。
  - 仍是问题：claim payout action 标 `running` 没有 expected-status CAS；`updateClaimPayoutAction` 对 running/success/failed 都是按 id 宽写。若 callback/query/worker 多路并发，后到的 running 或 failed 写入理论上可覆盖更晚的 terminal detail/status，缺少 first-terminal-wins guard。
  - 仍是问题：payout action 在写 `running + out_bill_no` 后外呼 provider；这是比原始 finding 更好的 durable lease，但没有 claim lease owner/lease_expires_at。多个 worker/手工触发可同时进入同一个 action，依赖 provider 幂等和后续 query 收敛，而不是本地互斥。
  - 仍是问题：claim payout create transfer 的 command 只记录 accepted/duplicate；provider create 返回异常时 action failed 可恢复，但没有 rejected/unknown command 事实。若网络超时实际已被 provider 受理，本地只能靠 action detail 的 out_bill_no 和 recovery query 推断，command ledger 不能完整表达“已提交但结果未知”。
  - 仍是问题：merchant-transfer callback 直接由 `out_bill_no=claimpayout{actionID}` 解析 action；handler 验 mchid/signature/decrypt，但 action 更新仍是按 id 宽写。若收到 late terminal failure after success，当前 `HandleClaimPayoutTransferNotification` 只有 action.Status == success 时 no-op；若 query 正在写 success 而 callback 先写 failed/后写 success，缺少 DB 层 expected terminal guard。
  - 仍是问题：`markClaimPayoutOutcome` 先执行业务结果，再把 action 更新为 success。若 `MarkClaimPaid/FinalizeClaimCompensationAfterPayoutTx/MarkRecoveryDisputeCompensated` 成功后，`UpdateBehaviorActionExecution(success)` 失败，scheduler 会重试；主 claim payout 可由 `MarkClaimPaid` 幂等收敛，但 recovery dispute compensation 的 `MarkRecoveryDisputeCompensated` 是否幂等、是否会重复外呼 provider，需要专项测试锁住。
  - 仍是问题：普通 claim behavior action 的 `markClaimBehaviorActionSuccess/Failure/reset` 也都是按 id 宽写，没有 expected current status。running claim 已用 `UpdateBehaviorActionExecutionIfCurrent` 做 CAS，但 terminal 写入未带 expected `running`，并发 task 或后到 reset 可覆盖状态。
  - 仍是问题：`ClaimBehaviorActionRecoveryScheduler` 只扫 `created/failed`，不扫 `running`。block/recovery/release/notify action 如果在标 running 后、执行外部/本地副作用前崩溃，后续没有周期性 re-enqueue；只有 asynq 原 task 仍在 retry 时才会继续。
  - 仍是问题：recovery open action 只确保 created/payable events，不重新创建或修正 `claim_recoveries` 本体。若 `FinalizeClaimCompensationAfterPayoutTx` 创建 recovery 后、post-payout action 执行前发生数据漂移，open action 会 terminal failed，不会进入可恢复状态机。
  - 仍是问题：release action 的业务副作用和 action success 不是同一事务。`ReleaseClaimRecoverySuspensionIfClear` 解除限制成功后，如果 closed event 或 action success 写失败，重试通常幂等，但 closed event/action 状态可能长期 failed/running，运营侧会看到未闭合。
  - 需要业务决策：non-payable recovery 收款后，系统应自动退款、转人工异常账、还是恢复/新建追偿为 paid。当前代码没有 durable 决策载体，不能仅靠 error log 作为财务处置依据。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed` for non-payable recovery 收款 no-op、payout/action terminal 宽写、behavior action running 不补扫；`C2-needs-business-decision` for non-payable recovery 收款后的退款/异常账/恢复追偿策略。原 `228/229` 中“running/out_bill_no 分段后 provider 订单完全丢失”的范围收窄：payout action 已有 out_bill_no 和 running recovery，风险主要剩本地 lease/CAS 与 command outcome 可观测性。
- 生产 SQL 模板：先查近 30 天；running action 可按 30 分钟/2 小时分层。命中后按 `payment_order_id/recovery_id/action_id/out_bill_no/claim_id/recovery_dispute_id` 对齐微信商家转账后台、direct payment fact、asynq retry/dead 队列和业务操作日志。

```sql
-- P0-F10-1: claim_recovery 支付已处理，但 recovery 未 paid 或缺 release action。
WITH claim_payment AS (
  SELECT
    po.*,
    CASE
      WHEN substring(po.attach from '"recovery_id"\s*:\s*"?([0-9]+)"?') IS NOT NULL
      THEN substring(po.attach from '"recovery_id"\s*:\s*"?([0-9]+)"?')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS recovery_id_from_attach,
    CASE
      WHEN substring(po.attach from '"claim_id"\s*:\s*"?([0-9]+)"?') IS NOT NULL
      THEN substring(po.attach from '"claim_id"\s*:\s*"?([0-9]+)"?')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS claim_id_from_attach
  FROM payment_orders po
  WHERE po.business_type = 'claim_recovery'
    AND po.payment_channel = 'direct'
    AND po.status = 'paid'
    AND po.processed_at IS NOT NULL
    AND po.paid_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
),
release_actions AS (
  SELECT
    ba.*,
    CASE
      WHEN trim(ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN (ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS recovery_id_from_detail
  FROM behavior_actions ba
  WHERE ba.action_type = 'release'
)
SELECT
  cp.id AS payment_order_id,
  cp.out_trade_no,
  cp.amount AS payment_amount,
  cp.paid_at,
  cp.processed_at,
  cp.claim_id_from_attach,
  cr.id AS recovery_id,
  cr.claim_id,
  cr.recovery_target,
  cr.recovery_amount,
  cr.status AS recovery_status,
  cr.updated_at AS recovery_updated_at,
  ba.id AS release_action_id,
  ba.status AS release_action_status,
  ba.created_at AS release_action_created_at,
  ba.executed_at AS release_action_executed_at
FROM claim_payment cp
LEFT JOIN claim_recoveries cr
  ON cr.id = cp.recovery_id_from_attach
LEFT JOIN release_actions ba
  ON ba.target_entity = cr.recovery_target
 AND ba.recovery_id_from_detail = cr.id
WHERE cr.id IS NULL
   OR cr.status <> 'paid'
   OR ba.id IS NULL
ORDER BY cp.processed_at DESC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F10-2: claim_recovery 已 paid，但 release action 未成功或缺 closed event。
WITH release_actions AS (
  SELECT
    ba.*,
    CASE
      WHEN trim(ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN (ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS recovery_id_from_detail
  FROM behavior_actions ba
  WHERE ba.action_type = 'release'
)
SELECT
  cr.id AS recovery_id,
  cr.claim_id,
  cr.order_id,
  cr.recovery_target,
  cr.status AS recovery_status,
  cr.updated_at AS recovery_updated_at,
  ba.id AS release_action_id,
  ba.status AS release_action_status,
  ba.created_at AS release_action_created_at,
  ba.executed_at AS release_action_executed_at,
  ba.detail ->> 'last_error' AS release_last_error,
  cre.id AS closed_event_id,
  cre.created_at AS closed_event_created_at
FROM claim_recoveries cr
LEFT JOIN release_actions ba
  ON ba.target_entity = cr.recovery_target
 AND ba.recovery_id_from_detail = cr.id
LEFT JOIN claim_recovery_events cre
  ON cre.recovery_id = cr.id
 AND cre.event_type = 'closed'
WHERE cr.status = 'paid'
  AND cr.updated_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND (
    ba.id IS NULL
    OR ba.status <> 'success'
    OR cre.id IS NULL
  )
ORDER BY cr.updated_at DESC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F10-3: claim payout action 长时间 running，按 out_bill_no 对齐微信商家转账后台/query。
SELECT
  ba.id AS action_id,
  ba.status,
  ba.created_at,
  ba.executed_at,
  ba.detail ->> 'claim_id' AS claim_id,
  ba.detail ->> 'recovery_dispute_id' AS recovery_dispute_id,
  ba.detail ->> 'user_id' AS user_id,
  ba.detail ->> 'amount' AS amount,
  ba.detail ->> 'out_bill_no' AS out_bill_no,
  ba.detail ->> 'transfer_bill_no' AS transfer_bill_no,
  ba.detail ->> 'transfer_state' AS transfer_state,
  ba.detail ->> 'last_error' AS last_error,
  ba.detail ->> 'last_queried_at' AS last_queried_at,
  epc.id AS command_id,
  epc.command_status,
  epc.external_secondary_key AS command_transfer_bill_no,
  epc.updated_at AS command_updated_at
FROM behavior_actions ba
LEFT JOIN external_payment_commands epc
  ON epc.business_object_type = 'behavior_action'
 AND epc.business_object_id = ba.id
 AND epc.capability = 'merchant_transfer'
WHERE ba.action_type = 'payout'
  AND ba.target_entity = 'user'
  AND ba.status = 'running'
  AND ba.created_at < now() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
ORDER BY ba.created_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F10-4: claim payout 已 success，但 claim/recovery_dispute 业务结果未落地。
WITH payout_actions AS (
  SELECT
    ba.*,
    CASE
      WHEN trim(ba.detail ->> 'claim_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN (ba.detail ->> 'claim_id')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS claim_id_from_detail,
    CASE
      WHEN trim(ba.detail ->> 'recovery_dispute_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN (ba.detail ->> 'recovery_dispute_id')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS recovery_dispute_id_from_detail
  FROM behavior_actions ba
  WHERE ba.action_type = 'payout'
    AND ba.target_entity = 'user'
    AND ba.status = 'success'
    AND ba.executed_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
)
SELECT
  ba.id AS action_id,
  ba.created_at,
  ba.executed_at,
  ba.detail ->> 'claim_id' AS claim_id_text,
  ba.detail ->> 'recovery_dispute_id' AS recovery_dispute_id_text,
  ba.detail ->> 'out_bill_no' AS out_bill_no,
  ba.detail ->> 'transfer_state' AS transfer_state,
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.status AS claim_status,
  c.paid_at AS claim_paid_at,
  rd.id AS recovery_dispute_id,
  rd.status AS recovery_dispute_status,
  rd.compensated_at AS recovery_dispute_compensated_at
FROM payout_actions ba
LEFT JOIN claims c
  ON c.id = ba.claim_id_from_detail
 AND ba.recovery_dispute_id_from_detail IS NULL
LEFT JOIN recovery_disputes rd
  ON rd.id = ba.recovery_dispute_id_from_detail
WHERE (ba.recovery_dispute_id_from_detail IS NULL AND (c.id IS NULL OR c.paid_at IS NULL))
   OR (ba.recovery_dispute_id_from_detail IS NOT NULL AND (rd.id IS NULL OR rd.compensated_at IS NULL))
ORDER BY ba.executed_at DESC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F10-5: 非 payout 的 claim behavior action 长时间 running；当前 recovery scheduler 不补扫 running。
SELECT
  ba.id AS action_id,
  ba.decision_id,
  ba.action_type,
  ba.target_entity,
  ba.status,
  ba.created_at,
  ba.executed_at,
  ba.detail ->> 'claim_id' AS claim_id,
  ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id' AS recovery_id,
  ba.detail ->> 'last_error' AS last_error,
  ba.detail ->> 'terminal_failure' AS terminal_failure
FROM behavior_actions ba
WHERE ba.action_type IN ('block', 'recovery', 'release', 'notify')
  AND ba.status = 'running'
  AND ba.created_at < now() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
ORDER BY ba.created_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F10-6: post-payout recovery 应创建但缺 recovery/action，或 action 未成功。
WITH latest_decision AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (bd.claim_id)
    bd.*
  FROM behavior_decisions bd
  WHERE bd.claim_id IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY bd.claim_id, bd.created_at DESC, bd.id DESC
),
decision_fact AS (
  SELECT
    ld.id AS decision_id,
    ld.claim_id,
    ld.fact_snapshot,
    ld.fact_snapshot ->> 'recovery_target' AS recovery_target,
    CASE
      WHEN trim(ld.fact_snapshot ->> 'recovery_amount') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN (ld.fact_snapshot ->> 'recovery_amount')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS recovery_amount
  FROM latest_decision ld
)
SELECT
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.status AS claim_status,
  c.paid_at,
  df.decision_id,
  df.recovery_target,
  df.recovery_amount,
  cr.id AS recovery_id,
  cr.status AS recovery_status,
  ba.id AS recovery_action_id,
  ba.status AS recovery_action_status,
  ba.created_at AS recovery_action_created_at,
  ba.detail ->> 'last_error' AS recovery_action_last_error
FROM claims c
JOIN decision_fact df ON df.claim_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN claim_recoveries cr
  ON cr.claim_id = c.id
 AND cr.recovery_target = df.recovery_target
LEFT JOIN behavior_actions ba
  ON ba.decision_id = df.decision_id
 AND ba.action_type = 'recovery'
 AND ba.target_entity = df.recovery_target
WHERE c.paid_at IS NOT NULL
  AND df.recovery_target IN ('merchant', 'rider')
  AND COALESCE(df.recovery_amount, 0) > 0
  AND (
    cr.id IS NULL
    OR ba.id IS NULL
    OR ba.status <> 'success'
  )
ORDER BY c.paid_at DESC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F10-7: overdue recovery 已 overdue，但 block action 缺失或未成功。
WITH block_actions AS (
  SELECT
    ba.*,
    CASE
      WHEN trim(ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN (ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS recovery_id_from_detail
  FROM behavior_actions ba
  WHERE ba.action_type = 'block'
)
SELECT
  cr.id AS recovery_id,
  cr.claim_id,
  cr.order_id,
  cr.recovery_target,
  cr.due_at,
  cr.updated_at AS recovery_updated_at,
  ba.id AS block_action_id,
  ba.status AS block_action_status,
  ba.created_at AS block_action_created_at,
  ba.executed_at AS block_action_executed_at,
  ba.detail ->> 'last_error' AS block_last_error
FROM claim_recoveries cr
LEFT JOIN block_actions ba
  ON ba.target_entity = cr.recovery_target
 AND ba.recovery_id_from_detail = cr.id
WHERE cr.status = 'overdue'
  AND cr.updated_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND (
    ba.id IS NULL
    OR ba.status <> 'success'
  )
ORDER BY cr.due_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P0-F10-8: recovery dispute approved/rejected 后，release/resume/compensation 结果未闭口。
WITH release_actions AS (
  SELECT
    ba.*,
    CASE
      WHEN trim(ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN (ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS recovery_id_from_detail
  FROM behavior_actions ba
  WHERE ba.action_type = 'release'
),
payout_actions AS (
  SELECT
    ba.*,
    CASE
      WHEN trim(ba.detail ->> 'recovery_dispute_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      THEN (ba.detail ->> 'recovery_dispute_id')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END AS recovery_dispute_id_from_detail
  FROM behavior_actions ba
  WHERE ba.action_type = 'payout'
)
SELECT
  rd.id AS recovery_dispute_id,
  rd.claim_id,
  rd.appellant_type,
  rd.appellant_id,
  rd.status AS dispute_status,
  rd.reviewed_at,
  rd.compensation_amount,
  rd.compensated_at,
  cr.id AS recovery_id,
  cr.status AS recovery_status,
  release_action.id AS release_action_id,
  release_action.status AS release_action_status,
  payout_action.id AS compensation_action_id,
  payout_action.status AS compensation_action_status,
  payout_action.detail ->> 'out_bill_no' AS compensation_out_bill_no,
  payout_action.detail ->> 'transfer_state' AS compensation_transfer_state,
  payout_action.detail ->> 'last_error' AS compensation_last_error
FROM recovery_disputes rd
LEFT JOIN claim_recoveries cr
  ON cr.claim_id = rd.claim_id
 AND cr.recovery_target = rd.appellant_type
LEFT JOIN release_actions release_action
  ON release_action.recovery_id_from_detail = cr.id
LEFT JOIN payout_actions payout_action
  ON payout_action.recovery_dispute_id_from_detail = rd.id
WHERE rd.reviewed_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND (
    (rd.status = 'approved' AND cr.id IS NOT NULL AND (cr.status <> 'waived' OR release_action.id IS NULL OR release_action.status <> 'success'))
    OR
    (rd.status = 'approved' AND rd.compensation_amount > 0 AND (payout_action.id IS NULL OR payout_action.status <> 'success' OR rd.compensated_at IS NULL))
    OR
    (rd.status = 'rejected' AND cr.id IS NOT NULL AND cr.status = 'disputed')
  )
ORDER BY rd.reviewed_at DESC;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 查 `claim recovery payment succeeded but recovery status is no longer payable`，命中后用 P0-F10-1/P0-F09-7 对齐 payment_order、recovery、fact application；这是本族最明确的“收款已处理、追偿未落账”信号。
  - 查 `payment fact application applied` 且 `consumer=claim_recovery_domain`，随后查 `enqueue claim recovery release action failed; recovery scheduler will retry`、`claim recovery release action created but task distributor is not configured`，确认 release action 是否进入补扫面。
  - 查 `claim payout recovery scheduler started`、`recover claim payout action failed`、`query claim payout transfer`、`persist running claim payout transfer`、`mark behavior action success`，按 action_id/out_bill_no 对齐 P0-F10-3。
  - 查 merchant-transfer callback 日志：`apply merchant transfer notification failed`、`resolve claim payout action from merchant transfer notification`、`merchant transfer notify mchid mismatch`，判断 callback 是否被签名/商户号/归属校验拦截。
  - 查 `record claim payout transfer command accepted failed`，若伴随 P0-F10-3 命中，说明 provider create 受理事实没有进入 command ledger，只剩 action detail 可观测。
  - 查 `enqueue claim recovery action`、`enqueue claim restriction action`、`enqueue claim notification action`、`enqueue claim post-payout actions failed; recovery scheduler will retry`，验证 post-payout action 是否仅入库未入队。
  - 查 `claim behavior action recovery started`、`re-enqueue claim behavior action failed`；注意该 scheduler 当前只补 `created/failed`，P0-F10-5 的 running 命中不能靠该日志自然恢复。
  - 查 `mark claim recovery overdue with block action failed`、`enqueue claim recovery block action failed`，按 P0-F10-7 对齐 overdue recovery 的 block 是否创建/执行。
  - 查 recovery dispute task：`processing recovery dispute result`、`execute claim recovery release action for recovery dispute`、`execute recovery dispute compensation action`、`resume claim recovery after rejected recovery dispute`，按 P0-F10-8 对齐 approved/rejected 后续动作。
- 最小复现/测试补齐：
  - non-payable 收款：创建 claim_recovery 支付单并由 callback/query 标 paid，然后在 application 前把 recovery 改 `disputed/waived`；断言当前 payment_order processed/application applied，但 recovery 非 paid、无 release action、无 refund/anomaly durable fact。
  - release 补扫：让 claim recovery paid transaction 创建 release action 后，模拟入队失败；断言 `ClaimBehaviorActionRecoveryScheduler` 会重新入队 `created release`，执行后只在无 blocking recovery 时解除 suspension。
  - release running 崩溃：让 release action `created -> running` 后在 `ReleaseClaimRecoverySuspensionIfClear` 前崩溃；断言当前 recovery scheduler 不扫 running，action 长期停 running。
  - behavior terminal 宽写：并发两个同 action task，一个写 failed、一个写 success，断言当前 `UpdateBehaviorActionExecution` 没有 expected running guard，后写者覆盖前写者。
  - payout create 超时实际受理：`CreateTransfer` 返回 timeout，但微信后台 later query by out_bill_no 为 SUCCESS；断言 action 可通过 recovery query 收敛，但 `external_payment_commands` 没有 unknown/rejected 事实可审计。
  - payout callback/query 并发：query 线程成功执行 `markClaimPayoutOutcome`，callback 同时收到 FAIL/CANCEL 或反向时序；断言当前 action terminal 写入依赖后写顺序，DB 层不保证 first-terminal-wins。
  - payout outcome 已落地但 action success 写失败：让 `MarkClaimPaid/FinalizeClaimCompensationAfterPayoutTx` 成功、`UpdateBehaviorActionExecution(success)` 失败；断言重试不会重复 create transfer，且 claim/post-payout action 最终可幂等补齐。
  - recovery dispute compensation：approved + compensation_amount > 0，模拟 `MarkRecoveryDisputeCompensated` 成功但 payout action success 写失败；断言重试是否幂等、是否可能重复 provider query/create。
  - post-payout action 入队失败：`FinalizeClaimCompensationAfterPayoutTx` 成功创建 recovery/block/notify action，但 distributor 返回错误；断言 created action 可被 behavior recovery scheduler 补入队。
  - recovery open 数据漂移：Finalize 后手工改 recovery amount/target，再执行 recovery action；断言 action terminal failed 且不会重建或修正 recovery，需要人工/修复流程处理。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 P0-F10-1 命中，不能简单重跑 payment application；必须先定 non-payable 收款策略。若决定自动退款，应创建 refund intent/fact；若决定人工账，应创建 anomaly ledger/alert；若决定恢复追偿为 paid，需要明确 disputed/waived 状态如何反向。
  - 若 P0-F10-2 命中但 release action 未成功，先检查是否仍有其他 blocking recovery。若有，未解除是正确行为；若没有，则按 action 状态重放 release，必要时补 closed event。
  - 若 P0-F10-3 命中且微信后台已 SUCCESS，优先执行 query/reconcile 并检查 claim/recovery_dispute 业务结果；若微信为 WAIT_USER_CONFIRM，需要确认 Mini Program confirmation 链路和 package_info 是否仍可用；若长期 NOT_FOUND，再决定是否允许重建/取消 action。
  - 若 P0-F10-4 命中，按 action detail 的 `claim_id/recovery_dispute_id/out_bill_no` 对账后补业务结果；不要重新 create transfer。
  - 若 P0-F10-5 命中，需要补 running lease/recovery 或把 running 重新入队前先判断副作用是否已经发生；release/block/notify/recovery 的判定标准不同，不能一刀切重置 created。
  - 若 P0-F10-6/P0-F10-7 命中，优先修补 post-payout/overdue action 的 created/running 恢复，再考虑业务状态本身；否则 paid claim 或 overdue recovery 会缺后续限制/通知。
  - 若 P0-F10-8 命中，approved missing release/compensation 与 rejected still disputed 分开处理；approved compensation 已 provider success 时只补 `compensated_at/action success`，不得二次转账。
  - 代码修复形态建议：payout/action terminal 写入统一改 expected-status/first-terminal-wins；behavior action 增加 `lease_owner/lease_expires_at` 或 `running_since`；non-payable recovery 收款新增 durable anomaly/refund intent；merchant transfer command 增加 unknown/rejected 记录以便对账。

#### P0-F11. rider deposit refund / membership balance / user balance 边界

- 原始编号：`230-234/359/NP-133/NP-180/NP-330`。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed` for rider deposit refund projection 分段，`N-non-problem/NP` for membership balance 主账本并发错账。会员余额已有行锁、事务和幂等保护，本轮不作为 P0 修复主线。
- 证据闭口：`231-234/359` 是押金退款 processing、callback 降级、amount_mismatch owner、payment_order.refunded 投影和 late success 扣错冻结押金风险；`NP-330` 明确会员余额账本写入有行锁、事务和幂等保护。
- 生产验证：查 rider_deposit refund_order failed/closed 后 provider success fact；查 `payment_order.refunded` 未写但 refund_order success；查 membership ledger 不纳入本轮问题，只保留抽样审计。
- 最小复现/测试：押金退款本地 failed 后 provider SUCCESS；success 后 `UpdatePaymentOrderToRefunded` 失败。
- 修复类型：押金退款 fact application 强校验 owner/amount/frozen record；success 投影补扫；membership 暂不修。
- 下一步：归并到 `P0-F05/P0-F06` 的退款批次，不单独先修 membership。

##### P0-F11 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：本族只处理 retained direct 微信骑手押金退款提现链路，以及 membership/user balance 是否仍应作为 P0 资金错账候选的边界确认；不重开宝付主退款、普通 order/reservation refund、claim payout，也不把 membership 主账本误并入第一修复批次。
- 代码边界复核：
  - 已有保护：`PrepareRiderDepositRefundTx` 先 `GetRiderForUpdate` 锁骑手，校验 `user_id` owner、idempotency key/request hash、骑手状态、冻结押金和 active delivery，再按 `rider_deposit_credits` 分段创建 `refund_orders`、冻结流水和 `riders.frozen_deposit`；同一 idempotency key 会回放原 refund plans。
  - 已有保护：退款提交使用源支付单 `out_trade_no` + 本地 `out_refund_no`，并把 create refund 的 accepted/rejected/unknown 写入 `external_payment_commands`；已明确失败的 create 会走 `ResolveRefund(...FAILED)` 释放冻结，`already fully refunded` 分支会以 success + `DrainRemainingCredit` 做本地 stale credit 对账。
  - 已有保护：直连退款 callback 会按 `out_refund_no` 反查本地 `refund_orders` 和 `payment_orders`，只在 `paymentOrder.BusinessType == rider_deposit` 时记录 rider deposit direct refund fact/application；query recovery 对 stuck processing direct refund 也会记录同类 fact/application，application worker/scheduler 负责异步应用。
  - 已有保护：`validateRiderDepositRefundFactApplication` 校验 terminal fact、provider=`wechat`、channel=`direct`、capability=`direct_refund`、external object=`refund`、business owner=`rider_deposit`、business object=`refund_order` 和 application object id 一致；`ResolveRiderDepositRefundTx` 事务内锁 refund_order/rider，success/failed/closed 都会更新 rider 押金余额/冻结和押金流水。
  - 已有保护：membership 主账本 `RechargeTx`、`ConsumeTx`、`RefundTx`、`AdjustMemberBalanceTx` 都先 `GetMembershipForUpdate` 后在同一事务写余额与 membership_transactions；`merchant_memberships` 有 `(merchant_id,user_id)` unique，充值/调整有 partial unique idempotency，`payment_order_id` 也有唯一索引。user balance SQL 是单行原子增减/冻结/解冻/确认提现，带余额/冻结余额条件。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - `pending + unknown` 恢复洞：`SubmitWithdrawal` 在直连 refund create 超时/不确定时记录 `ExternalPaymentCommandStatusUnknown`，但 refund_order 保持 `pending`；当前 `RefundRecoveryScheduler.recoverStuckProcessingRefunds` 只扫 `ro.status = 'processing'`，未见 rider_deposit pending query recovery。若 provider 实际受理且 callback 丢失，本地会长期停在 pending、骑手押金 frozen、credit 已 consumed。
  - `success-after-failed/closed` 状态错位：`ResolveRiderDepositRefundTx` 的 SUCCESS 分支只有 `pending/processing -> success`，如果本地已 `failed/closed` 后收到 provider SUCCESS，它不会把 refund_order 改回 success，但仍会继续扣 `deposit_amount`、扣 `frozen_deposit`、写 withdraw log；若此前 failed/closed 已 unfreeze，通常会因 `frozen_deposit < refund_amount` 报错并让 application failed/backlog。两种形态都说明 late success 没有被建模成可审计的反向终态。
  - `payment_order.refunded` 投影分段：押金退款 success 事务结束后才调用 `maybeMarkPaymentOrderRefunded`；该函数先汇总 success refund，再调用 `UpdatePaymentOrderToRefunded`，失败只记录日志，不回滚押金退款成功事务。结果是 refund_order/rider ledger 已 success，但 payment_order 仍可能停 `paid`。
  - amount 强校验不足：callback/query 记录 fact 时保存 `Amount`，但 `applyRiderDepositRefundFact` 只按 application/refund_order 找本地对象并把 `fact.UpstreamState` 交给 `ResolveRefund`；apply 阶段未再次比较 `fact.Amount == refund_order.refund_amount`、refund fact 的 external key 与当前 refund_order out_refund_no、或 provider total/refund amount。现有 owner/object 校验降低串单风险，但金额漂移仍应进入最小复现。
  - `UpdatePaymentOrderToRefunded` 是无 expected status 宽写，当前主要是成功后投影补写；若被误用于非 paid/refunded 状态，会直接覆盖 payment_order status。此点不单独升级为新 P0 编号，但应在押金退款投影修复时一起收口。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed`，语义收窄为“骑手押金退款链路存在 pending unknown 无 query、late success 未建模、success 投影分段和 amount apply 校验不足”；membership balance 主账本并发错账维持 `N-non-problem/NP`，user balance 仅保留低优先级账实抽样，不纳入 P0 第一修复主线。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下只读模板先按近 30 天执行，命中后再扩大窗口；字段名按线上 migration 版本核对。

```sql
-- P0-F11-1: provider create 不确定但本地仍 pending 的骑手押金退款，当前 processing recovery 不会扫到。
SELECT
  ro.id AS refund_order_id,
  ro.payment_order_id,
  ro.out_refund_no,
  ro.refund_amount,
  ro.status AS refund_status,
  ro.created_at,
  po.user_id,
  po.out_trade_no,
  po.status AS payment_status,
  epc.id AS command_id,
  epc.command_status,
  epc.last_error_code,
  epc.updated_at AS command_updated_at
FROM refund_orders ro
JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = ro.payment_order_id
LEFT JOIN external_payment_commands epc
  ON epc.business_object_type = 'refund_order'
 AND epc.business_object_id = ro.id
 AND epc.external_object_key = ro.out_refund_no
WHERE po.business_type = 'rider_deposit'
  AND po.payment_channel = 'direct'
  AND ro.refund_type = 'rider_deposit'
  AND ro.status = 'pending'
  AND ro.created_at < now() - interval '30 minutes'
  AND (epc.command_status = 'unknown' OR epc.id IS NULL)
ORDER BY ro.created_at ASC;

-- P0-F11-2: 已有 terminal SUCCESS fact/application，但本地 refund_order 仍 failed/closed/pending/processing。
SELECT
  ro.id AS refund_order_id,
  ro.out_refund_no,
  ro.status AS refund_status,
  ro.refund_amount,
  po.id AS payment_order_id,
  po.status AS payment_status,
  f.id AS fact_id,
  f.upstream_state,
  f.terminal_status,
  f.amount AS fact_amount,
  a.id AS application_id,
  a.status AS application_status,
  a.last_error
FROM refund_orders ro
JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = ro.payment_order_id
JOIN external_payment_facts f
  ON f.external_object_type = 'refund'
 AND f.external_object_key = ro.out_refund_no
LEFT JOIN external_payment_fact_applications a ON a.fact_id = f.id
WHERE po.business_type = 'rider_deposit'
  AND ro.refund_type = 'rider_deposit'
  AND f.provider = 'wechat'
  AND f.channel = 'direct'
  AND f.capability = 'direct_refund'
  AND f.terminal_status = 'success'
  AND ro.status <> 'success'
ORDER BY f.created_at DESC;

-- P0-F11-3: 押金退款已 success，但 payment_order 仍未投影为 refunded。
SELECT
  po.id AS payment_order_id,
  po.user_id,
  po.amount AS payment_amount,
  po.status AS payment_status,
  COALESCE(SUM(ro.refund_amount) FILTER (WHERE ro.status = 'success'), 0) AS success_refund_amount,
  ARRAY_AGG(ro.id ORDER BY ro.created_at) FILTER (WHERE ro.status = 'success') AS success_refund_order_ids,
  MAX(ro.refunded_at) AS last_refunded_at
FROM payment_orders po
JOIN refund_orders ro ON ro.payment_order_id = po.id
WHERE po.business_type = 'rider_deposit'
  AND po.payment_channel = 'direct'
  AND ro.refund_type = 'rider_deposit'
GROUP BY po.id, po.user_id, po.amount, po.status
HAVING COALESCE(SUM(ro.refund_amount) FILTER (WHERE ro.status = 'success'), 0) >= po.amount
   AND po.status <> 'refunded'
ORDER BY MAX(ro.refunded_at) DESC NULLS LAST;

-- P0-F11-4: fact amount 与本地 refund_order amount 不一致。
SELECT
  ro.id AS refund_order_id,
  ro.out_refund_no,
  ro.refund_amount,
  f.id AS fact_id,
  f.amount AS fact_amount,
  f.source_event_type,
  f.fact_source,
  f.created_at AS fact_created_at,
  a.status AS application_status
FROM refund_orders ro
JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = ro.payment_order_id
JOIN external_payment_facts f
  ON f.external_object_type = 'refund'
 AND f.external_object_key = ro.out_refund_no
LEFT JOIN external_payment_fact_applications a ON a.fact_id = f.id
WHERE po.business_type = 'rider_deposit'
  AND ro.refund_type = 'rider_deposit'
  AND f.provider = 'wechat'
  AND f.channel = 'direct'
  AND f.capability = 'direct_refund'
  AND f.amount IS NOT NULL
  AND f.amount <> ro.refund_amount
ORDER BY f.created_at DESC;

-- P0-F11-5: 骑手押金可用/冻结/credit/refund 形状抽样，定位 pending/frozen 长尾。
SELECT
  r.id AS rider_id,
  r.user_id,
  r.deposit_amount,
  r.frozen_deposit,
  COALESCE(SUM(ro.refund_amount) FILTER (WHERE ro.status IN ('pending','processing')), 0) AS active_refund_amount,
  COALESCE(SUM(rdc.refundable_amount), 0) AS remaining_credit_amount,
  COUNT(ro.id) FILTER (WHERE ro.status IN ('pending','processing')) AS active_refund_count
FROM riders r
LEFT JOIN payment_orders po ON po.user_id = r.user_id AND po.business_type = 'rider_deposit'
LEFT JOIN refund_orders ro ON ro.payment_order_id = po.id AND ro.refund_type = 'rider_deposit'
LEFT JOIN rider_deposit_credits rdc ON rdc.rider_id = r.id
GROUP BY r.id, r.user_id, r.deposit_amount, r.frozen_deposit
HAVING r.frozen_deposit > 0
    OR COALESCE(SUM(ro.refund_amount) FILTER (WHERE ro.status IN ('pending','processing')), 0) > 0
ORDER BY active_refund_amount DESC, r.frozen_deposit DESC;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 退款提交侧：搜索 `rider deposit refund create result is uncertain, keeping refund pending for query/retry`、`record rider deposit refund command unknown failed`、`rider deposit refund request failed, compensation applied`。
  - callback/fact 侧：搜索 `record rider deposit direct refund fact failed`、`enqueue rider deposit refund payment fact application from callback failed; scheduler will retry`、`apply rider deposit refund fact`、`failed to mark payment order as refunded`。
  - recovery 侧：搜索 `stuck rider deposit refund fact application enqueued`、`query stuck processing refund status failed`，并与 P0-F11-1 的 pending unknown 列表对比；若日志只有 pending unknown、无 stuck processing query，说明恢复洞成立。
  - membership/user balance 侧只做抽样：查 `membership_transactions` 是否存在同一 idempotency key 冲突、同一 payment_order_id 重复；user balance 查 `user_balance_logs.related_type/related_id/type` 重复，不作为 P0 修复阻塞项。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - `pending unknown lost callback`：mock direct refund create 返回 timeout/unknown，断言 refund_order 保持 pending、command unknown、rider frozen/credit consumed；推进 recovery scheduler，断言当前不会 query 该 pending rider_deposit refund。
  - `late success after failed/closed`：先让 create 明确失败并执行 `ResolveRefund(...FAILED)`，随后注入 SUCCESS fact/application；断言当前要么 application 因 frozen 不足失败，要么出现 rider ledger 已扣但 refund_order 仍 failed/closed 的不一致形态。
  - `success projection split`：让 `ResolveRiderDepositRefundTx` 成功后模拟 `UpdatePaymentOrderToRefunded` 返回错误；断言 refund_order/rider ledger 已 success，但 payment_order 仍 paid，并需要补扫。
  - `amount mismatch fact`：构造 `fact.amount != refund_order.refund_amount` 的 rider deposit direct refund terminal SUCCESS fact；断言当前 apply 不因金额差异拒绝，修复后应 fail-closed 或落 anomaly。
  - `membership NP guard`：并发 `ConsumeTx`/`RefundTx`/`AdjustMemberBalanceTx` 命中同一 membership，断言 `FOR UPDATE` 串行化后余额/流水一致；重复商户调整 idempotency key 同参幂等、异参 409。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 P0-F11-1 命中，优先补 rider_deposit pending unknown query recovery，且 query 前必须沿用原 `out_refund_no`，不能重建退款单或更换 provider idempotency key。
  - 若 P0-F11-2 命中，先以 provider 后台和 `external_payment_facts` 为准决定是否承认 late success；承认时需要把 failed/closed -> success 建模为专门的 reconcile transition，同时避免重复 unfreeze/withdraw/deduct。
  - 若 P0-F11-3 命中，补 `payment_order.refunded` 投影扫描即可；不要回滚已经成功的 rider deposit ledger。
  - 若 P0-F11-4 命中，先冻结自动应用策略：金额不一致的 SUCCESS fact 应进入 anomaly/人工核对，不应直接按本地 refund_order amount 扣押金。
  - membership/user balance 只有在生产 SQL 证明余额和流水长期不一致、或绕过 `tx_membership.go` 的写入口真实存在时，才重新升级；否则维持 NP/P3 抽样。

#### P0-F12. 资金相关告警、通知和人工介入信号 best-effort

- 原始编号：`185/187/190-192/281/345/354/357/358/362/363/367/370/NP-150/NP-171/NP-238/NP-300`。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed` for best-effort/at-least-once 语义；影响多为人工介入漏报或重复通知，不直接等同资金错账，但会掩盖 P0 主问题。
- 证据闭口：`192/354/363` 告警发布失败不阻断 published 或任务成功；`281/367` outbox 重放可重复通知/告警；`357/358` 退款结果缺主动通知或用户进度锚点；`370` application 级失败不进入宝付每日对账异常计数。
- 生产验证：查 payment/refund/profit-sharing failed/abnormal 事件与 platform_alert_events、notification/outbox published 的差异；查重复同 related_id 通知。
- 最小复现/测试：告警持久化失败、pubsub 失败、notification 入队失败、outbox mark published 失败。
- 修复类型：资金异常告警 outbox 独立持久化；通知业务幂等键；对账聚合纳入 application/outbox backlog。
- 下一步：不作为第一代码修复点，但作为所有 P0 修复上线前的观测闸门。

##### P0-F12 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：本族只处理资金异常告警、通知和人工介入信号的可靠性；不把每个通知失败上升为资金错账，也不替代 `P0-F03` fact/application/outbox 主链修复。这里的核心风险是“真实资金异常发生后，运营/用户看不到或看到重复信号”。
- 代码边界复核：
  - 已有保护：`platform_alert_events` 已有持久化表和 `SavePlatformAlertEvent`，用于离线回看与控制台恢复；refund recovery、支付 callback、开户回调等异常路径已调用该表或 helper。
  - 已有保护：`payment_domain_outbox` 有 `pending/failed/processing/published` 状态、`next_retry_at`、`attempt_count`、`last_error` 和 `(event_type, aggregate_type, aggregate_id)` unique；scheduler 每分钟按事件类型扫描 pending/failed 并入队，worker claim 后 dispatch，失败会 `MarkPaymentDomainOutboxFailed` 并 5 分钟后重试。
  - 已有保护：payment fact application 在 domain apply 后创建 payment-domain outbox；如果创建 outbox 或 terminalize/application applied 失败，会把 application 标 failed，后续由 fact application scheduler 补扫。
  - 已有保护：`notification:send` task 会持久化 `notifications`，持久化失败返回错误可由 asynq 重试；WebSocket/Redis 推送失败只打日志，不影响已落库通知。
  - 已有保护：order refund success / order refund abnormal / reservation refund abnormal / rider deposit refund abnormal / profit sharing result ready 已有 payment-domain outbox 分发入口；rider deposit/reservation/order refund abnormal 会触发 `publishAlert`。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - 告警发布 best-effort：`publishAlert` 调用 `SavePlatformAlertEvent` 失败只 log warn，pubsub publisher 缺失、marshal 失败或 Redis publish 失败也只 log 后 return；调用方 `dispatch*RefundAbnormalOutbox` 仍返回 nil，`ProcessTaskPaymentDomainOutbox` 随后会把 outbox 标 `published`。因此资金异常告警可能既未持久化也未实时推送，但 outbox 不再重试。
  - 告警重复缺业务幂等：`platform_alert_events` 没有 `(alert_type, related_type, related_id, fingerprint)` 唯一键；如果 outbox mark published 失败后重试，或同一异常从 callback/query/manual reconciliation 多入口触发，可能生成多条相同人工介入告警。
  - 用户通知重复缺业务幂等：`notifications` 只有普通索引，没有 related/type/user 级唯一；`dispatchOrderRefundSucceededOutbox` 入队 `notification:send` 未使用 `asynq.Unique`，outbox dispatch 成功但 `MarkPaymentDomainOutboxPublished` 失败时会重试并可能创建重复“退款成功”通知。
  - 对账聚合缺观测闭环：payment fact application failed、payment_domain_outbox failed、alert persistence failed、notification task failed 分散在不同日志和表；当前没有统一日级资金异常漏报/重复报聚合。`P0-F03` 的 application/outbox backlog 若存在，可能同时造成业务应用滞后和人工提醒缺口。
  - 通知偏好语义会影响部分资金通知：`notification:send` 默认会读用户偏好，除非 `IgnorePreferences`；部分资金结果通知未统一设置关键通知 bypass。退款成功/分账到账这类通知若被偏好关闭不是资金错账，但会影响用户感知和客服排查。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed` for best-effort/at-least-once；影响归类为“观测/人工介入可靠性缺口”，不是直接资金错账。修复优先级应作为所有 P0 资金修复上线前的观测闸门，而不是第一批修改资金状态机的入口。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下只读模板用于确认漏报、重复报和 backlog；默认看近 7 天，再按异常量扩大。

```sql
-- P0-F12-1: payment-domain outbox 长期 pending/failed，表示资金副作用/通知/告警未发出。
SELECT
  event_type,
  aggregate_type,
  status,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  MIN(created_at) AS oldest_created_at,
  MAX(updated_at) AS newest_updated_at,
  MAX(attempt_count) AS max_attempts
FROM payment_domain_outbox
WHERE status IN ('pending','failed','processing')
  AND created_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY event_type, aggregate_type, status
ORDER BY cnt DESC, oldest_created_at ASC;

-- P0-F12-2: outbox 已 published，但找不到对应平台告警的退款异常。
SELECT
  pdo.id AS outbox_id,
  pdo.event_type,
  pdo.aggregate_id AS refund_order_id,
  pdo.status,
  pdo.updated_at AS outbox_updated_at,
  ro.out_refund_no,
  ro.status AS refund_status,
  pae.id AS alert_event_id,
  pae.emitted_at AS alert_emitted_at
FROM payment_domain_outbox pdo
JOIN refund_orders ro ON ro.id = pdo.aggregate_id
LEFT JOIN platform_alert_events pae
  ON pae.related_type = 'refund_order'
 AND pae.related_id = pdo.aggregate_id
 AND pae.alert_type = 'REFUND_FAILED'
WHERE pdo.event_type IN ('order_refund_abnormal','reservation_refund_abnormal','rider_deposit_refund_abnormal')
  AND pdo.status = 'published'
  AND pdo.updated_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
  AND pae.id IS NULL
ORDER BY pdo.updated_at DESC;

-- P0-F12-3: 同一资金对象重复平台告警。
SELECT
  alert_type,
  related_type,
  related_id,
  COUNT(*) AS alert_count,
  MIN(emitted_at) AS first_emitted_at,
  MAX(emitted_at) AS last_emitted_at,
  ARRAY_AGG(id ORDER BY emitted_at, id) AS alert_ids
FROM platform_alert_events
WHERE emitted_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
  AND alert_type IN ('REFUND_FAILED','PROFIT_SHARING_FAILED','WITHDRAW_FAILED','PAYMENT_TIMEOUT','BILL_MISMATCH','SYSTEM_ERROR')
GROUP BY alert_type, related_type, related_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY alert_count DESC, last_emitted_at DESC;

-- P0-F12-4: 同一退款对象重复用户通知。
SELECT
  user_id,
  type,
  related_type,
  related_id,
  COUNT(*) AS notification_count,
  MIN(created_at) AS first_created_at,
  MAX(created_at) AS last_created_at,
  ARRAY_AGG(id ORDER BY created_at, id) AS notification_ids
FROM notifications
WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
  AND related_type IN ('refund','payment','profit_sharing')
GROUP BY user_id, type, related_type, related_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY notification_count DESC, last_created_at DESC;

-- P0-F12-5: fact/application backlog 与人工告警缺口联查。
SELECT
  a.consumer,
  a.business_object_type,
  a.status AS application_status,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt,
  MIN(a.created_at) AS oldest_created_at,
  MAX(a.last_error) AS sample_last_error
FROM external_payment_fact_applications a
JOIN external_payment_facts f ON f.id = a.fact_id
WHERE a.status IN ('pending','failed','processing')
  AND a.created_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY a.consumer, a.business_object_type, a.status
ORDER BY cnt DESC, oldest_created_at ASC;

-- P0-F12-6: notification task 成功落库但未推送，只作为用户感知抽样，不等同资金错账。
SELECT
  type,
  related_type,
  COUNT(*) AS unpushed_count,
  MIN(created_at) AS oldest_created_at,
  MAX(created_at) AS newest_created_at
FROM notifications
WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
  AND is_pushed = false
  AND type IN ('payment','refund','finance','system')
GROUP BY type, related_type
ORDER BY unpushed_count DESC;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 告警链路：搜索 `persist platform alert event failed before pubsub publish`、`pubsub publisher not configured, cannot publish alert`、`failed to publish alert to redis`、`alert published to Redis`。
  - outbox 链路：搜索 `payment domain outbox dispatch failed; scheduled retry`、`payment domain outbox published`、`enqueue payment domain outbox task failed`、`payment domain outbox already claimed or not retryable`。
  - notification 链路：搜索 `create notification`、`notification created successfully`、`WebSocket push failed (non-critical)`、`send refund success notification failed`、`enqueue profit sharing success notification`。
  - fact application 链路：与 `P0-F03` 联动看 `external_payment_fact_applications.status in ('failed','processing')` 的 last_error；如果 outbox create 失败导致 application failed，资金主状态可能已应用但通知/告警未出。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - 告警持久化失败：mock `CreatePlatformAlertEvent` 返回错误，再处理 `order_refund_abnormal` outbox；断言当前 outbox 仍会 marked published，且没有可重试告警事实。
  - pubsub 失败/缺失：mock `pubSubPublisher.Publish` 失败或 nil；断言当前 `publishAlert` 不返回错误，outbox published。
  - mark published 失败：让 refund success notification 入队成功，但 `MarkPaymentDomainOutboxPublished` 失败；再次运行 outbox worker，断言当前可能重复创建 notification。
  - notification 持久化失败：让 `CreateNotification` 失败，断言 `notification:send` task 返回错误可重试；同时确认 outbox dispatch 是否已经因为入队成功而 published，避免误以为用户通知已落库。
  - application/outbox 创建失败：让 domain apply 成功后 `CreatePaymentDomainOutboxOnce` 失败；断言 application failed 并可被 scheduler 重试，且重试不会重复资金主状态副作用。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 P0-F12-1 命中，优先恢复 outbox scheduler/worker 或处理 last_error，不要只补发通知；因为它可能也承载支付成功后续打印/分账结果提醒。
  - 若 P0-F12-2 命中，应按 outbox payload 补建 platform_alert_events 或重放 alert outbox；不要把 outbox `published` 当作人工已收到。
  - 若 P0-F12-3/P0-F12-4 命中，需要增加业务幂等键或唯一约束，至少覆盖资金异常告警 `(alert_type, related_type, related_id)` 和用户资金通知 `(user_id,type,related_type,related_id,业务结果)`。
  - 若 P0-F12-5 命中，先回到 `P0-F03` 判断业务 fact application 是否已真正 applied；未 applied 时不能只修通知。
  - 代码修复形态建议：把关键资金告警从 `publishAlert` best-effort 调用改为 durable alert outbox 或让 `publishAlert` 返回可重试错误；notification payload 增加 idempotency key；日级对账聚合纳入 application/outbox/alert/notification 四张表。

### P0 第一修复批次建议（暂不执行）

1. `P0-F03`：先补只读 SQL/监控，覆盖 fact application/outbox backlog、fact-without-application、processing stale 和对账缺口。
2. `P0-F02/P0-F04`：把 order/reservation/payment timeout、DataCleanup、late success 放同一批设计，避免只修单入口。
3. `P0-F05/P0-F06`：统一退款 owner、金额异常、success-after-failed/closed 和主动 query guard。
4. `P0-F08/P0-F09`：提现与 retained direct 量级较小但资金风险高，适合在主支付退款批次之后做专项修复。

### P0 覆盖说明

- 已归并：支付创建、支付超时、payment fact/application/outbox、订单/预约 late success、退款、分账/退分账、提现、retained direct 核验费/追偿/押金、claim payout/action、押金退款、资金告警/通知。
- 已明确降级或移出 P0 主线：会员余额主账本并发错账按 `NP-330` 暂不作为问题；商户拒单 pending refund 按 `NP-153` 不重复并入 `371`；已创建 pending reservation refund 按 `NP-154` 不作为漏扫问题；普通 completed order 分账恢复按 `NP-155/NP-156` 不作为永久丢任务问题，但分账 command/fact/outbox 仍归 `P0-F07`。
- P1/P2/P3 已在下方完成第一版风险族归并；不要把 P0 的修复批次建议误读为全库唯一优先级。

### P1 主业务状态机风险族总览

#### P1-F01. 预约主状态、库存、timeout/no-show 和 reservation_addon 交叉

- 原始编号：`6-8/70-77/195/198/255/261-276/329/330/361/365/376-382/384/NP-49-NP-55/NP-98/NP-161-NP-167/NP-203/NP-212/NP-217`。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed`。预约 allowed-from 多处停在事务外快照或宽 SQL，timeout/no-show/支付成功/关台/改菜/库存释放之间存在多入口弱顺序；其中资金出口归 P0，主业务状态和库存归本族。
- 证据闭口：`261-266` 确认人工状态入口、table 指针、timeout、强制释放、开台、关台的最终事务缺 expected-state；`267/384` 是预约 timeout 交付缺口；`271-276/376-382` 是改菜/adjustment 与支付/关闭/补偿链路。
- 生产验证：查 pending 过期预约、cancelled/no_show 后又 paid/checked_in/completed 的更新时间序列、reservation/table current 指针不一致、active adjustment 长期滞留、库存 hold 与 reservation 状态不一致。
- 最小复现/测试：并发支付成功与 reservation timeout/cancel/no_show；并发开台/关台与取消；改菜正差支付创建失败/远端关单失败；旧 no-show task 对改期预约执行。
- 修复类型：统一 reservation 状态迁移事务；SQL expected-old-status；timeout 未到期重排和兜底 scanner；reservation/table/inventory 同事务或 durable repair；adjustment owner/version guard。
- 下一步：P1 首批建议先做 reservation 状态迁移矩阵和只读异常 SQL。

##### P1-F01 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：本族只处理预约主业务状态、桌台 current_reservation 投影、库存 hold/release、payment timeout/no-show 和 reservation_addon 改菜补差的业务时序；支付 fact/application/outbox、退款资金出口仍归 `P0-F02/P0-F03/P0-F05/P0-F06/P0-F12`，这里只标注交叉边界。
- 已有保护/非问题：
  - 创建和修改预约已有较强桌台互斥：`CreateReservationTx`/`CreateMerchantReservationTx` 在事务内 `GetTableForUpdate` 锁桌台，锁后复查同桌同日预约冲突；`UpdateReservationTx` 锁 reservation，目标桌台/日期/时间/人数变化时锁新桌台并复查冲突，且拒绝 completed/cancelled/expired 修改。
  - 取消预约已把主取消和库存释放放进 `CancelReservationTx` 同一事务，且事务内 `ensureNoActiveReservationAdjustmentWithQueries` 会锁 reservation 并拒绝 active adjustment；这部分不能再按旧账泛化成“取消一定释放库存分段”。
  - 改菜负差/零差的 `ReplaceReservationItemsTx`、`ReplaceReservationItemsWithRefundOrdersTx` 会锁 reservation、检查 active adjustment、校验 `ExpectedCurrentAmount`，并在事务内同步 `reservation_inventory` 与 `daily_inventory.reserved_quantity`。
  - 改菜正差创建支付单路径 `CreateReservationPositiveAdjustmentPaymentTx` 会锁 reservation，校验 owner、merchant、payment_mode、状态只允许 paid/confirmed/checked_in，校验未起菜、金额快照和单 active adjustment，并创建 adjustment/items/holds/payment_order。
  - reservation_addon 支付成功若有关联 adjustment，`ApplyPaidReservationAdjustmentTx` 会锁 payment_order、adjustment、reservation；只允许 reservation paid/confirmed/checked_in 且 cooking 未开始；应用时创建 addon payment、累加 prepaid_amount、替换 items、转换 holds、同步库存、mark adjustment applied、mark payment_order processed。
  - reservation_addon timeout/remote closed/failed 已有 `CloseReservationAdjustmentForPaymentTx`，能释放 adjustment holds 并把 adjustment terminalize；这部分是已有恢复设计，不应重复算成“active adjustment 永久必然滞留”。
  - no-show alert worker 只做提醒，不写主状态；它只在 paid/confirmed 且到提醒时间后推送，旧任务误改状态的问题不在该 alert 分支成立。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - 预约主状态 SQL 仍是宽写：`UpdateReservationStatus`、`UpdateReservationToPaid`、`UpdateReservationToConfirmed`、`UpdateReservationToCompleted`、`UpdateReservationToCancelled`、`UpdateReservationToExpired`、`UpdateReservationToNoShow`、`UpdateReservationToCheckedIn` 最终条件基本都是 `WHERE id = $1`。logic 层虽有 allowed-from 检查，但不变量没有沉到最终 SQL/CAS。
  - 主预约支付成功会直接 `UpdateReservationStatus(..., 'paid')`，没有锁 reservation 或校验当前仍 pending；若 timeout/cancel/no_show/checkin/complete 先写入，late payment success 仍可能把 terminal/后续状态覆盖为 paid，并重新触发库存同步。
  - `ProcessTaskReservationPaymentTimeout` 先读 reservation，确认 pending 且 deadline 已过，再宽写 cancelled，之后单独 `ReleaseReservationInventoryTx`；如果支付成功 fact/application、人工取消或其它状态推进在读写窗口交错，依赖外层时序而非 DB 条件。
  - `ConfirmReservationTx`、`CompleteReservationTx`、`CancelReservationTx`、`MarkNoShowTx` 的最终状态写入缺 expected-current-status；外层 `GetTableReservationForUpdate` 在当前调用栈里有帮助，但事务 helper 本身可被其它入口调用，且 payment success/timeout 等路径不共享同一状态迁移事务。
  - 桌台 current_reservation 清理使用调用前读到的 `table.CurrentReservationID`，事务里没有重新 `GetTableForUpdate` 后复核；`UpdateTableStatus` 也是按 table id 宽写。若桌台被开台、换台、清台或新预约占用，旧快照可能清掉或漏清桌台投影。
  - `MarkReservationNoShow` 在 `MarkNoShowTx` 提交后再单独调用 `ReleaseReservationInventoryTx`；如果库存释放失败，会出现 reservation 已 no_show 但库存仍被占用。`CancelReservationTx` 已修到同事务，no-show 分支仍是分段。
  - `ReleaseReservationInventoryTx` 本身不锁 reservation，也不校验 reservation 已 terminal；它只按 reservation 当前 items/inventory entries 释放。如果和改菜/支付成功库存同步交错，仍存在 release/sync 覆盖顺序风险。
  - `CheckInReservation` 外层检查 paid/confirmed 和签到窗口后直接调用 `UpdateReservationToCheckedIn`；SQL 不带 old status，也没有 active adjustment guard。若 cancel/no_show/timeout 或 addon applying 并发，状态可被 late check-in 覆盖。
  - `StartCookingReservation` 有 `NOT EXISTS active adjustment` guard，且外层校验 confirmed/checked_in；但 SQL 不校验 reservation status。若状态在外层校验后变化，仍可能给 terminal reservation 写 `cooking_started_at`。
  - reservation_addon late success 在 reservation 已 cancelled/no_show/completed 或已起菜后会被 `ApplyPaidReservationAdjustmentTx` 拒绝，形成 payment fact application failed/backlog；这不是本族直接库存覆盖，但属于 P1-F01 与 `P0-F03` 的业务状态交叉，需要在生产验证中联查。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed`。本族不是“完全无保护”，而是“保护散在调用方和部分事务里，最终状态写入缺统一 CAS；库存和桌台投影有部分同事务修复，但 no-show、payment success、timeout、table pointer 仍有可达弱顺序窗口”。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下只读模板用于先确认脏形状，默认看近 30 天；命中后再回放日志时间线。

```sql
-- P1-F01-1: 预约出现互斥时间戳组合，重点看 late payment success 或 late terminal 覆盖。
SELECT
  id,
  merchant_id,
  table_id,
  status,
  payment_mode,
  payment_deadline,
  paid_at,
  confirmed_at,
  checked_in_at,
  completed_at,
  cancelled_at,
  cancel_reason,
  updated_at
FROM table_reservations
WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND (
    (status = 'paid' AND cancelled_at IS NOT NULL)
    OR (status = 'paid' AND completed_at IS NOT NULL)
    OR (status = 'checked_in' AND cancelled_at IS NOT NULL)
    OR (status = 'completed' AND cancelled_at IS NOT NULL)
    OR (status IN ('cancelled','no_show','expired') AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND updated_at > paid_at)
  )
ORDER BY updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F01-2: 已过支付截止但仍 pending，确认 timeout task 漏执行或被跳过。
SELECT
  id,
  merchant_id,
  table_id,
  payment_deadline,
  status,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM table_reservations
WHERE status = 'pending'
  AND payment_deadline < now()
ORDER BY payment_deadline ASC;

-- P1-F01-3: payment_order 已 paid/processed，但预约不是 paid/confirmed/checked_in/completed。
SELECT
  po.id AS payment_order_id,
  po.business_type,
  po.status AS payment_status,
  po.processed_at,
  po.reservation_id,
  tr.status AS reservation_status,
  tr.updated_at AS reservation_updated_at,
  COALESCE(po.processed_at, po.paid_at, po.created_at) AS payment_signal_at
FROM payment_orders po
JOIN table_reservations tr ON tr.id = po.reservation_id
WHERE po.business_type IN ('reservation','reservation_addon')
  AND po.status = 'paid'
  AND po.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND tr.status IN ('pending','cancelled','expired','no_show')
ORDER BY COALESCE(po.processed_at, po.paid_at, po.created_at) DESC;

-- P1-F01-4: 预约终态仍占用库存 hold。
SELECT
  tr.id AS reservation_id,
  tr.status,
  tr.merchant_id,
  tr.reservation_date,
  ri.dish_id,
  ri.quantity,
  tr.updated_at AS reservation_updated_at,
  ri.updated_at AS inventory_updated_at
FROM table_reservations tr
JOIN reservation_inventory ri ON ri.reservation_id = tr.id
WHERE tr.status IN ('cancelled','expired','no_show','completed')
  AND ri.quantity > 0
ORDER BY tr.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F01-5: reservation_inventory 汇总与 daily_inventory reserved_quantity 不一致。
WITH reservation_reserved AS (
  SELECT
    tr.merchant_id,
    ri.dish_id,
    tr.reservation_date AS date,
    SUM(ri.quantity)::bigint AS reservation_hold_qty
  FROM reservation_inventory ri
  JOIN table_reservations tr ON tr.id = ri.reservation_id
  WHERE tr.status IN ('pending','paid','confirmed','checked_in')
  GROUP BY tr.merchant_id, ri.dish_id, tr.reservation_date
)
SELECT
  rr.merchant_id,
  rr.dish_id,
  rr.date,
  rr.reservation_hold_qty,
  di.reserved_quantity
FROM reservation_reserved rr
JOIN daily_inventory di
  ON di.merchant_id = rr.merchant_id
 AND di.dish_id = rr.dish_id
 AND di.date = rr.date
WHERE rr.reservation_hold_qty <> di.reserved_quantity
ORDER BY rr.date DESC, rr.merchant_id, rr.dish_id;

-- P1-F01-6: 桌台 current_reservation 指向非活跃或不存在预约。
SELECT
  tb.id AS table_id,
  tb.merchant_id,
  tb.status AS table_status,
  tb.current_reservation_id,
  tr.status AS reservation_status,
  tr.reservation_date,
  tr.updated_at AS reservation_updated_at,
  tb.updated_at AS table_updated_at
FROM tables tb
LEFT JOIN table_reservations tr ON tr.id = tb.current_reservation_id
WHERE tb.current_reservation_id IS NOT NULL
  AND (tr.id IS NULL OR tr.status IN ('cancelled','expired','no_show','completed'))
ORDER BY tb.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F01-7: 活跃预约已 checked_in/confirmed，但桌台未指向它，用于发现漏占用/漏投影。
SELECT
  tr.id AS reservation_id,
  tr.table_id,
  tr.status AS reservation_status,
  tb.status AS table_status,
  tb.current_reservation_id,
  tr.updated_at AS reservation_updated_at,
  tb.updated_at AS table_updated_at
FROM table_reservations tr
JOIN tables tb ON tb.id = tr.table_id
WHERE tr.status IN ('checked_in','confirmed')
  AND (tb.current_reservation_id IS NULL OR tb.current_reservation_id <> tr.id)
  AND tr.reservation_date >= current_date - interval '1 day'
ORDER BY tr.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F01-8: active adjustment 长期滞留，或 reservation 已终态仍有 active adjustment。
SELECT
  ra.id AS adjustment_id,
  ra.reservation_id,
  ra.status AS adjustment_status,
  ra.payment_order_id,
  po.status AS payment_status,
  tr.status AS reservation_status,
  ra.created_at,
  ra.updated_at
FROM reservation_adjustments ra
JOIN table_reservations tr ON tr.id = ra.reservation_id
LEFT JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = ra.payment_order_id
WHERE ra.status IN ('creating_payment','pending_payment','applying')
  AND (
    ra.created_at < now() - interval '2 hours'
    OR tr.status IN ('cancelled','expired','no_show','completed')
  )
ORDER BY ra.created_at ASC;

-- P1-F01-9: reservation_addon fact/application backlog，属于本族与 P0-F03 的交叉验证。
SELECT
  a.id AS application_id,
  a.status AS application_status,
  a.business_object_id AS payment_order_id,
  po.reservation_id,
  po.status AS payment_status,
  tr.status AS reservation_status,
  ra.status AS adjustment_status,
  a.last_error,
  a.updated_at
FROM external_payment_fact_applications a
JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = a.business_object_id
LEFT JOIN table_reservations tr ON tr.id = po.reservation_id
LEFT JOIN reservation_adjustments ra ON ra.payment_order_id = po.id
WHERE po.business_type = 'reservation_addon'
  AND a.status IN ('pending','failed','processing')
  AND a.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
ORDER BY a.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F01-10: adjustment holds 已过期但仍 held，确认 timeout/close 是否漏释放。
SELECT
  h.id AS hold_id,
  h.adjustment_id,
  h.dish_id,
  h.quantity,
  h.status AS hold_status,
  h.expires_at,
  ra.status AS adjustment_status,
  ra.payment_order_id
FROM reservation_adjustment_inventory_holds h
JOIN reservation_adjustments ra ON ra.id = h.adjustment_id
WHERE h.status = 'held'
  AND h.expires_at < now()
ORDER BY h.expires_at ASC;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - reservation timeout：搜索 `processing reservation payment timeout task`、`reservation is not pending payment, skip timeout processing`、`reservation payment not expired yet`、`reservation payment timeout processed successfully`、`update reservation status`、`release reservation inventory`。
  - payment fact/application：搜索 `process reservation payment success`、`payment timeout query found remote paid baofu order; local close skipped`、`enqueue baofu payment timeout query fact application`、`payment fact application failed`，并按 `payment_order_id/reservation_id` 串时间线。
  - reservation_addon close/apply：搜索 `expire reservation adjustment after payment timeout`、`close reservation adjustment after terminal payment fact`、`mark reservation adjustment pending payment`、`reservation cooking already started, cannot apply paid adjustment`、`cannot apply paid adjustment`。
  - 改菜退款交叉：搜索 `reservation dish change refund task scheduler not configured; relying on recovery scheduler`、`schedule reservation dish change refund task failed`；资金追踪回到 P0 refund 族。
  - 桌台/库存异常：目前主链日志信号较少，生产侧优先依赖上面的 SQL 与 application/outbox backlog；若后续修复，应补 reservation transition metric 和 inventory repair metric。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - 主预约支付成功 vs reservation timeout：构造 pending reservation/payment_order，timeout 读到 pending 后让 payment fact application 成功，再让 timeout 宽写 cancelled；或反向让 timeout cancelled 后 payment success 宽写 paid，断言当前可出现终态覆盖或库存重复同步。
  - 主预约支付成功 vs 人工取消/no_show/complete/checkin：并发调用 `ProcessPaymentSuccessTx` 与 `CancelReservationTx`/`MarkNoShowTx`/`CompleteReservationTx`/`UpdateReservationToCheckedIn`，检查最终 status、paid_at/cancelled_at/completed_at、reservation_inventory。
  - no_show 状态写入后库存释放失败：让 `MarkNoShowTx` 成功，再注入 `ReleaseReservationInventoryTx` 失败，断言 reservation no_show 但 inventory hold 仍在。
  - table current pointer 旧快照：外层读取 table.current_reservation_id 后，另一路把 table 指向新 reservation，再执行旧 reservation cancel/complete/no_show，断言 `UpdateTableStatus` 是否会错误清空或漏清。
  - addon late success after terminal：创建 reservation_addon active adjustment/payment_order，先取消或完成 reservation，再应用 success fact；断言 application failed/backlog、holds 是否释放、payment_order processed_at 是否停留未处理。
  - start cooking/checkin 与 active adjustment/terminal 并发：外层校验通过后让 adjustment 进入 active 或 reservation terminal，再执行最终 SQL，断言是否写入 `checked_in_at/cooking_started_at`。
  - 库存 sync/release 交错：并发 `ReleaseReservationInventoryTx` 与 `ReplaceReservationItemsTx`/reservation payment success sync，检查 `reservation_inventory` 和 `daily_inventory.reserved_quantity` 是否一致。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 P1-F01-1/2/3 命中，应优先增加 reservation 状态迁移 CAS：`pending -> paid/cancelled`、`paid/confirmed -> checked_in/no_show/cancelled`、`confirmed/checked_in -> completed` 等都要在 SQL 或统一事务里表达 expected-old-status；并把 `ProcessPaymentSuccessTx` 的 reservation 分支改为锁 reservation 后条件迁移。
  - 若 P1-F01-4/5 命中，应补库存 durable repair，并把 no_show 库存释放并入同一事务或引入可重试 outbox/repair ledger；不要只手工清 `reservation_inventory`。
  - 若 P1-F01-6/7 命中，应让 table current pointer 的清理/占用在事务内 `GetTableForUpdate` 后复核，或增加 `WHERE current_reservation_id = expected` 的条件更新。
  - 若 P1-F01-8/10 命中，应优先确认 payment timeout worker 和 terminal-fact close 路径是否在线；修复形态是 adjustment lease/expiry recovery，而不是放宽改菜入口。
  - 若 P1-F01-9 命中，先按 P0-F03 判断 fact/application 是否需要重放；业务修复应定义 terminal reservation 上 addon late success 的明确策略：自动退款、关闭 adjustment 并告警、或人工介入，而不是让 application 无限失败。
  - 代码修复形态建议：建立 reservation 状态迁移矩阵和单一 helper/tx；所有入口传 expected status；弱顺序输掉方映射为幂等成功或 409；库存/table 投影要么同事务，要么有可观测 repair。

#### P1-F02. 堂食 session、桌台、账单组和 active_order 投影

- 原始编号：`20/74-76/316-341/374/377/382/NP-48/NP-87-NP-100/NP-155-NP-158`。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed`。open/close/transfer、billing group、active_order、table status、reservation 指针之间存在多写入口和投影不同步；部分分账/支付后果已归 P0。
- 证据闭口：`316-322` 是转台/关台/下单/账单组的事务外快照；`323-330` 是桌台状态和预约/堂食语义分叉；`331-336` 是结账/支付/active_order 恢复边界；`337-341` 是全款预约替换订单和 pay_params/active_order 问题。
- 生产验证：查 open session 下 table 已 available、closed session 下新 billing group/member/order、active_order 指向 cancelled/pending/旧订单、reservation completed 但 order 未 completed 的混合形状。
- 最小复现/测试：关台与下单/建账单组并发；转台与新订单并发；支付成功后关台再支付 application 后到；同用户扫码自动关旧台。
- 修复类型：session/table/order/reservation owner resolver；active_order 版本化；关台事务 expected-open guard；读路径禁止补写 closed session；支付成功与 session 状态双向校验。
- 下一步：先定义堂食 session 的单一事实源：table status、session status、active_order 和 reservation status 哪个主导。

##### P1-F02 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：本族只处理堂食 `dining_sessions`、`tables`、`billing_groups`/`billing_group_orders`、`active_order_id` 与关联 reservation/order 的业务状态投影。支付 fact/application/outbox、分账、退款资金口径只在这里标交叉，主归属仍回 `P0` 或相邻预约/订单族。
- 已有保护/非问题：
  - 同桌/同预约重复开台有 DB 级保护：`dining_sessions_table_open_idx`、`dining_sessions_reservation_open_idx` 和后续 `unique_active_dining_session` 限制同一 table/reservation 同时只有一条 open session；因此本族不再按“双 open session 落库”重复追踪。
  - 转台目标桌有较强事务保护：`TransferDiningSessionTableTx` 会 `FOR UPDATE` 锁 session、from table、to table，检查 session open、目标桌 disabled/reserved、目标桌已有 active session 和当前时段冲突 reservation；目标桌并发占用不作为问题，剩余风险在 linked reservation 状态和并发下单 table_id 快照。
  - 顾客自助结账与 paid checkout recovery 有 paid active-order gate：顾客 checkout 要求 active order 属于 session、`order_type='dine_in'` 且 `status='paid'`；`DineInCheckoutRecoveryScheduler` 只扫 open session + active paid dine-in order，不会按 pending/无订单误关台。12 小时 stale cleanup 是另一个宽入口。
  - `ResolveDiningSessionMenu`、billing group 列表、billing group orders 列表是纯读，不会补建默认组或 member；`GetOrCreateDefaultBillingGroup` 的补写风险不要扩张到这些只读 API。
  - 账单金额聚合不依赖 `billing_group_orders.status`，而是 join `orders` 并排除 cancelled/replaced order；取消订单未同步 `billing_group_orders.status` 不直接等于账单金额误算。
  - `CreateOrderTx` 已有 request idempotency 绑定，`billing_group_orders` 有 `(billing_group_id, order_id)` unique，同一幂等键/同一订单重复挂同一账单组不是本族问题。
  - 旧 replace 事务会锁旧订单，要求旧单仍 paid 且未 replaced；同一旧预约订单不会被两次成功替换成两张新单。负差退款 pending 单也有 reservation refund recovery 覆盖；这些边界按 `NP-95/NP-96` 保持非问题。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - 关台缺 expected-open 写边界：`CloseDiningSessionTx` 先普通读 session，再 `CloseDiningSession` 宽写 `WHERE id=$1`；并发商户关台、顾客结账、paid recovery、stale cleanup 可能重复刷新 `closed_at` 并重复执行部分清桌/推送副作用。
  - 12 小时 stale cleanup 只按 open 时长强制关台，不看 active order、billing group 金额或支付状态；它会绕过顾客 checkout/paid recovery 的 paid gate，把异常老会话当商户强制清台处理。
  - `CloseDiningSessionTx` 会把 session.reservation_id 或 table.current_reservation_id 对应 reservation 以 `status != 'completed'` 宽条件改 completed；这会覆盖 cancelled/no_show/expired/pending/paid/confirmed 等状态，并绕过普通预约完成入口的 active adjustment guard。
  - 开台会在事务内创建 session/default group/cart/order activation/table occupied，但 `UpdateReservationToCheckedIn` 和 `UpdateTableStatus` 都无 expected-state；若 reservation/table 状态在外层校验和开台事务之间变化，仍可能 late checked_in/occupied。
  - 下单只在事务前校验 active session、billing group 和 member；`CreateOrderTx` 内不会锁/复核 dining session 或 billing group 当前仍 open。关台并发后，新订单和 `billing_group_orders` 仍可能落到 closed session/group。
  - 下单成功后 `BindDiningSessionActiveOrder` 和 `ClearDiningOrderCart` 都是事务后 best-effort，错误被忽略；active order 可能缺失、指向旧单、指向 cancelled/pending/replaced order，paid checkout recovery 和用户自助结账都只看这个单槽投影。
  - 转台只迁移事务当时已存在的 `billing_group_orders` 对应订单 table_id；若下单在转台扫描之后才落库，新订单可能仍保留旧 table_id，KDS/厨房按订单 table 展示会漂移。
  - 账单组创建/加入和 `GetOrCreateDefaultBillingGroup` 补写都没有锁 session/group 后复核 open 状态；关台并发时可在 closed session 下留下 open billing group/member。
  - 同用户再次扫码会把“同用户且 active_order_id 为空”的 open session 当空会话 best-effort 关闭。若此前已成功下单但 active_order 绑定失败，旧会话的账单组/订单可能被关台释放。
  - 订单取消/timeout 不清理 session active_order；open session 可长期指向 cancelled active order，用户自助 checkout 和 paid recovery 都无法收敛，只能继续下单覆盖或等 12 小时 stale cleanup/商户手工清台。
  - 旧 `/orders/:id/replace` 维护了订单链和 billing group link，但不迁移 `dining_sessions.active_order_id`；顾客结账/paid recovery 仍看旧 cancelled/replaced reservation order，无法按新 paid dine-in order 收敛。
  - 旧 replace 正向补差有三段风险：新单 total_amount 是整单金额而通用订单支付会按 remaining 重算，可能不是 delta；替换事务先提交、后置支付创建失败会留下旧单作废+新 pending 单；响应只返回 payment_order_id，不返回当次 pay_params。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed`。本族不是“堂食完全无锁”，而是“开台/转台/创建订单各自有局部保护，但 session/table/billing/order/reservation/active_order 的事实源不统一；多个入口用不同投影判断是否可关台、可下单、可结账、可恢复”。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下只读模板用于确认堂食投影漂移，默认看近 30 天；资金后果命中后再回到 P0 分账/退款台账。

```sql
-- P1-F02-1: open session 但 table 不再 occupied 或 table 指针不一致。
SELECT
  ds.id AS session_id,
  ds.merchant_id,
  ds.table_id,
  ds.reservation_id,
  ds.active_order_id,
  ds.status AS session_status,
  tb.status AS table_status,
  tb.current_reservation_id,
  ds.opened_at,
  ds.updated_at AS session_updated_at,
  tb.updated_at AS table_updated_at
FROM dining_sessions ds
JOIN tables tb ON tb.id = ds.table_id
WHERE ds.status = 'open'
  AND (
    tb.status <> 'occupied'
    OR (ds.reservation_id IS NOT NULL AND tb.current_reservation_id IS DISTINCT FROM ds.reservation_id)
  )
ORDER BY ds.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F02-2: closed session 下仍有 open billing group 或 active member。
SELECT
  ds.id AS session_id,
  ds.closed_at,
  bg.id AS billing_group_id,
  bg.status AS billing_group_status,
  COUNT(bgm.id) FILTER (WHERE bgm.left_at IS NULL) AS active_members
FROM dining_sessions ds
JOIN billing_groups bg ON bg.dining_session_id = ds.id
LEFT JOIN billing_group_members bgm ON bgm.billing_group_id = bg.id
WHERE ds.status = 'closed'
  AND (bg.status <> 'closed' OR bgm.left_at IS NULL)
GROUP BY ds.id, ds.closed_at, bg.id, bg.status
ORDER BY ds.closed_at DESC;

-- P1-F02-3: closed session 下仍有关联 pending/paid/active 订单。
SELECT
  ds.id AS session_id,
  ds.closed_at,
  bg.id AS billing_group_id,
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.order_type,
  o.status AS order_status,
  o.table_id AS order_table_id,
  o.reservation_id,
  o.updated_at AS order_updated_at
FROM dining_sessions ds
JOIN billing_groups bg ON bg.dining_session_id = ds.id
JOIN billing_group_orders bgo ON bgo.billing_group_id = bg.id
JOIN orders o ON o.id = bgo.order_id
WHERE ds.status = 'closed'
  AND o.status IN ('pending','paid','preparing','ready')
  AND o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
ORDER BY ds.closed_at DESC, o.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F02-4: open session 的 active_order 指向 cancelled/replaced/非 dine-in/不匹配订单。
SELECT
  ds.id AS session_id,
  ds.table_id AS session_table_id,
  ds.user_id AS session_user_id,
  ds.merchant_id AS session_merchant_id,
  ds.active_order_id,
  o.order_type,
  o.status AS order_status,
  o.table_id AS order_table_id,
  o.user_id AS order_user_id,
  o.merchant_id AS order_merchant_id,
  o.replaced_by_order_id,
  o.updated_at AS order_updated_at
FROM dining_sessions ds
JOIN orders o ON o.id = ds.active_order_id
WHERE ds.status = 'open'
  AND (
    o.status IN ('cancelled','refunded')
    OR o.replaced_by_order_id IS NOT NULL
    OR o.order_type <> 'dine_in'
    OR o.table_id IS DISTINCT FROM ds.table_id
    OR o.user_id <> ds.user_id
    OR o.merchant_id <> ds.merchant_id
  )
ORDER BY ds.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F02-5: open session 无 active_order，但已有账单组订单。
SELECT
  ds.id AS session_id,
  ds.table_id,
  ds.reservation_id,
  ds.opened_at,
  COUNT(o.id) AS linked_order_count,
  ARRAY_AGG(o.id ORDER BY o.created_at, o.id) AS order_ids,
  MAX(o.created_at) AS latest_order_created_at
FROM dining_sessions ds
JOIN billing_groups bg ON bg.dining_session_id = ds.id
JOIN billing_group_orders bgo ON bgo.billing_group_id = bg.id
JOIN orders o ON o.id = bgo.order_id
WHERE ds.status = 'open'
  AND ds.active_order_id IS NULL
  AND o.status <> 'cancelled'
GROUP BY ds.id, ds.table_id, ds.reservation_id, ds.opened_at
ORDER BY latest_order_created_at DESC;

-- P1-F02-6: billing group 订单 table_id 与当前 session table_id 不一致，定位转台/下单并发。
SELECT
  ds.id AS session_id,
  ds.table_id AS session_table_id,
  bg.id AS billing_group_id,
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.table_id AS order_table_id,
  o.status AS order_status,
  o.created_at AS order_created_at,
  ds.updated_at AS session_updated_at
FROM dining_sessions ds
JOIN billing_groups bg ON bg.dining_session_id = ds.id
JOIN billing_group_orders bgo ON bgo.billing_group_id = bg.id
JOIN orders o ON o.id = bgo.order_id
WHERE ds.status = 'open'
  AND o.table_id IS DISTINCT FROM ds.table_id
  AND o.status <> 'cancelled'
ORDER BY GREATEST(o.updated_at, ds.updated_at) DESC;

-- P1-F02-7: reservation completed 但关联 active/session order 仍未 completed。
SELECT
  tr.id AS reservation_id,
  tr.status AS reservation_status,
  tr.completed_at,
  ds.id AS session_id,
  ds.status AS session_status,
  ds.active_order_id,
  o.status AS active_order_status,
  o.order_type,
  o.replaced_by_order_id
FROM table_reservations tr
LEFT JOIN dining_sessions ds ON ds.reservation_id = tr.id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = ds.active_order_id
WHERE tr.status = 'completed'
  AND ds.id IS NOT NULL
  AND (ds.status <> 'closed' OR o.status IS DISTINCT FROM 'completed')
ORDER BY tr.completed_at DESC NULLS LAST;

-- P1-F02-8: 旧 replace 后 active_order 仍指向被替换旧单。
SELECT
  ds.id AS session_id,
  ds.active_order_id AS old_active_order_id,
  old_o.replaced_by_order_id AS replacement_order_id,
  old_o.status AS old_order_status,
  new_o.status AS replacement_status,
  new_o.order_type AS replacement_type,
  old_o.reservation_id,
  ds.updated_at AS session_updated_at,
  old_o.updated_at AS old_order_updated_at
FROM dining_sessions ds
JOIN orders old_o ON old_o.id = ds.active_order_id
JOIN orders new_o ON new_o.id = old_o.replaced_by_order_id
WHERE ds.status = 'open'
  AND old_o.replaced_by_order_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY old_o.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F02-9: closed session 后仍可支付的 pending dine-in order。
SELECT
  ds.id AS session_id,
  ds.closed_at,
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.status AS order_status,
  po.id AS payment_order_id,
  po.status AS payment_status,
  po.expires_at
FROM dining_sessions ds
JOIN billing_groups bg ON bg.dining_session_id = ds.id
JOIN billing_group_orders bgo ON bgo.billing_group_id = bg.id
JOIN orders o ON o.id = bgo.order_id
LEFT JOIN payment_orders po ON po.order_id = o.id AND po.business_type = 'order'
WHERE ds.status = 'closed'
  AND o.order_type = 'dine_in'
  AND o.status = 'pending'
```
