```sql
  AND o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
ORDER BY ds.closed_at DESC;

-- P1-F02-10: session 关闭事件高频重复，粗筛 close 并发/重复刷新。
SELECT
  id AS session_id,
  merchant_id,
  table_id,
  reservation_id,
  opened_at,
  closed_at,
  updated_at,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated_at - closed_at)) AS updated_after_closed_seconds
FROM dining_sessions
WHERE status = 'closed'
  AND closed_at IS NOT NULL
  AND updated_at IS NOT NULL
  AND updated_at > closed_at + interval '5 seconds'
ORDER BY updated_at DESC;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 关台/恢复：搜索 `dine-in checkout recovery scan finished`、`failed to recover paid dine-in checkout`、`found stale open dining sessions to close`、`closed stale dining sessions`、`failed to close stale dining session`。
  - 转台：搜索 `transfer dining session table`、`insert transfer log` 相关错误；同时用 `table_transfer_logs` 反查转台前后订单 table_id 漂移。
  - 下单/active order：搜索 `CreateOrderTx` 失败、`订单请求状态已变化，请刷新后重试`、`UpdateDiningSessionActiveOrder` 错误日志缺失；当前绑定错误被忽略，生产排查主要依赖 SQL。
  - replace/order 支付：搜索 `schedule replace-order payment timeout failed`、`replace_order_baofu_payment`、`missing_client_ip`、`baofu payment facade not configured`、`mark old order replaced`。
  - 观测缺口：active_order 绑定和 cart 清理没有结构化错误日志；若修复，应补 `dining_session_active_order_bind_failed`、`dining_order_cart_clear_failed`、`stale_dining_session_forced_closed_unpaid` 指标。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - 关台并发：两个 `CloseDiningSessionTx` 同时读到 open，再分别提交；断言当前第二个事务是否刷新 closed_at/重复执行 table/reservation/billing group 副作用，修复后应只有一个成功 writer。
  - 下单 vs 关台：`ValidateOrderSessionAndBilling` 读到 open group 后让 `CloseDiningSessionTx` 提交，再执行 `CreateOrderTx`；断言当前可在 closed session 下产生 order/billing_group_order。
  - 转台 vs 下单：下单前置拿旧 table_id 后让转台提交，再创建订单；断言订单 table_id 与 session table_id 漂移。
  - `GetOrCreateDefaultBillingGroup` vs 关台：读到 open session 且默认组缺失，让关台完成，再调用 helper；断言 closed session 下出现 open default group/member。
  - active_order 绑定失败：让 `CreateOrderTx` 成功后 `UpdateDiningSessionActiveOrder` 失败；断言 open session 无 active_order 但有账单组订单，paid recovery 扫不到。
  - active_order cancelled：创建堂食 pending order 并绑定 active_order，再取消/timeout 订单；断言顾客 checkout 409、paid recovery 不处理、再次扫码不会自动关台。
  - replace 旧路由：全款预约开台后调用 `/orders/:id/replace`，断言新订单进入 billing group 但 session active_order 仍指向旧 replaced/cancelled order；正向差额断言 payment amount 是否为整单 remaining 而非 delta，响应是否缺 pay_params。
  - stale cleanup：构造 open session + pending active order 或无 active_order + 未结账 billing group，打开时间超过 12 小时，运行 cleanup；断言当前会被强制 close，并记录这是否为产品接受的强清台语义。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 P1-F02-1/2/3 命中，先定义 session/table/billing/order 的主事实源；再决定是禁止 closed session 下新写入，还是允许商户强制清台并把未结账订单转入异常队列。
  - 若 P1-F02-4/5/8 命中，应把 `active_order_id` 改成可重算投影或版本化单槽：订单创建/取消/替换/支付成功/结账都必须维护；paid checkout recovery 不能只相信一个可失败字段。
  - 若 P1-F02-6 命中，应让下单事务锁 dining session 并使用锁内 table_id，或转台后用 session/billing group 关系做可重试修复扫描。
  - 若 P1-F02-9 命中，堂食支付创建要校验 session/billing group 仍 open，或关台时同步取消/冻结未支付 dine-in order。
  - 关台修复形态：`CloseDiningSessionTx` 应 `SELECT ... FOR UPDATE` 或 conditional update `WHERE id=$1 AND status='open'`，输掉方返回幂等已关闭；reservation completed 只允许 checked_in/confirmed 等明确来源，且要复用 active adjustment guard。
  - 账单组修复形态：创建/加入/默认组补写应进入事务 helper，锁 session/group 并在锁内确认 open；纯读入口继续保持无补写。
  - replace 旧路由决策：若仍支持 `/orders/:id/replace`，需要同步迁移 active_order、持久化补差 delta/旧款抵扣、返回 pay_params 或废弃该路由并强制走新版 reservation adjustment 链路。

#### P1-F03. 外卖/订单取消、完成、食安 pause 和售后投影

- 原始编号：`16-19/26/33/49/54-56/96-120/167-168/279/310-315/348-350/NP-80-NP-85/NP-266-NP-277/NP-301-NP-304`。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed`。订单/配送主状态有不少 SQL guard，但取消、完成、食安 pause、cancel_requested、日志/通知/分账副作用仍存在事务外或弱一致窗口；资金分支归 P0。
- 证据闭口：`96/108/109/311` 是取消事务锁后复核和错误映射；`114-120/NP-275/NP-276` 是食安 pause 与主状态双事实源；`54/55/310` 是确认收货/自动完成并发输掉方和日志；`348-350` 是支付成功 outbox 后到业务状态变化。
- 生产验证：查 paused/cancel_requested 订单已 completed/rider_delivered、状态日志缺失或 from_status 与实际不一致、取消接口 500/重试、已完成订单仍有 pending payment/outbox 重试。
- 最小复现/测试：用户确认收货与自动完成并发；食安 pause 后骑手确认送达；用户晚取消与完成/索赔创建并发；order timeout 与支付成功/取消事务并发。
- 修复类型：订单状态机 expected-state 收口；异常投影参与完成/配送 gate；状态日志 outbox 或补偿；弱顺序输掉方统一业务化 409/幂等响应。
- 下一步：优先把 `CancelOrderTx`、确认收货/自动完成、食安 pause 做同一状态矩阵。

##### P1-F03 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：本族只处理外卖/订单主状态取消与完成、`food_safety_paused`、`cancel_requested`、状态日志和食安暂停通知投影。配送池过期、抢单、ETA、地理围栏和位置事件归 `P1-F04`；索赔/追偿主状态归 `P1-F05`；支付 fact/application/outbox、退款和分账资金后果仍回 `P0`。
- 已有保护/非问题：
  - 普通 pending/paid 取消不是宽写：用户取消先读 `GetOrderForUpdate`，`CancelOrderTx` 通过 `UpdateOrderToCancelled(expected_status)` 迁移主订单，并在同一事务内写状态日志、移除 delivery pool、回滚优惠券/会员余额/库存；因此“pending/paid 取消主状态无 expected old status”不成立。
  - `CancelOrderTx` 对已进入 picked/delivering/delivered/completed 的配送有阻断分支；它不是任意配送状态都直接取消。剩余问题在读取 delivery 后再锁 delivery 时缺少“锁后状态复核”和 `UpdateDeliveryToCancelled` SQL 本身 `WHERE id=$1`，这部分与配送族 `P1-F04` 交叉。
  - 商户接单/出餐等多数正向订单状态变更走 `UpdateOrderStatusTx` 或厨房专用 SQL，带 expected-status 或明确前置状态，不把 `UpdateOrderToCompleted` 的宽条件泛化成所有商户推进问题。
  - `CompleteTakeoutOrderByUser` 和 `AutoCompleteTakeoutOrder` 至少限定 `order_type='takeout'` 且 status 只能是 `rider_delivered/user_delivered`，不会把任意 paid/preparing 订单直接 completed；并发输掉方会因为 SQL 条件不匹配而不更新。
  - 自动完成 scheduler 在调用 `AutoCompleteTakeoutOrder` 前会查同订单是否已有 claim；这能挡住“扫描时已存在 claim”的正常分支。剩余问题是扫描后到的 claim、`exception_state/claim_channel` 投影，以及状态日志/分账调度的事务外副作用。
  - 食安案件调查和结案本身有 case 行锁、resolved guard 和 region 复核；不把运营食安案件重复调查/重复结案作为本族新增问题。
  - 食安 pause 写入和 pause 日志在 `ReportFoodSafetyIncidentTx` 内同事务执行；暂停事实不是完全 best-effort。best-effort 的是事务后 follow-up 通知和预约提醒。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - 用户晚期取消 `preparing/ready/courier_accepted/picked/delivering/rider_delivered` 不走 `CancelOrderTx`，而是写 `exception_state='cancel_requested'` 和状态日志；两次调用都用 `_, _ =` 吞错，随后返回“已记录取消诉求”。DB 更新失败或日志失败时，用户看到的结果与持久化事实可能相反。
  - `UpdateOrderExceptionState` 只按 order id 更新，没有 expected status；晚期取消诉求可以覆盖已有 `food_safety_paused`/其它 claim channel，也可能在订单刚 completed/cancelled 后仍写入旧诉求。
  - 食安熔断先按活跃订单快照 `paid/preparing/ready/courier_accepted/picked/delivering` 取样，再逐个 `UpdateOrderFoodSafetyPauseState(id)`；最终 SQL 不复核订单仍处在活跃集合，因此快照后到的 completed/cancelled/rider_delivered 仍可能被打上 pause 投影。
  - 食安结案清理只覆盖 `paid/preparing/ready/courier_accepted/picked/delivering`，不清 `rider_delivered/user_delivered/completed/cancelled`。一旦暂停订单继续推进到终态，pause/status_hint/claim_channel 会长期残留。
  - 食安履约 gate 依赖 merchant profile 的当前 `is_takeout_suspended/takeout_suspend_reason`，不直接读取订单自己的 `exception_state='food_safety_paused'`；商户暂停原因被覆盖、提前解除或清理不完整时，gate 与订单投影会分叉。
  - 抢单/开始取餐/确认取餐/开始配送有食安 gate，但 `CompleteDeliveryTx` 没有调用该 gate；已经 delivering 的暂停订单仍可被骑手确认送达，订单进入 `rider_delivered`，并同步解冻押金、更新骑手统计。
  - 用户确认收货和自动完成只看 `rider_delivered/user_delivered`，不看 `exception_state`、`claim_channel`、`status_hint`；`food_safety_paused` 或 `cancel_requested` 订单仍可 completed，且不会主动清理异常投影。
  - 用户确认收货和自动完成的 completed 状态日志是事务后 best-effort，错误被忽略；订单已经 completed 时可能没有对应 `order_status_logs`，审计时间线断裂。
  - 自动完成“无索赔”只在完成前扫描 claims；如果 `AutoCompleteTakeoutOrder` 成功后分账调度前后有 claim/food safety incident 后到，当前没有版本化完成条件或 outbox 一起决定“能否完成/能否分账”。资金后果回 `P0/P1-F05`，本族保留订单完成 gate 问题。
  - 食安暂停 follow-up 通知在 `ReportFoodSafetyIncidentTx` 提交之后入队，taskDistributor nil、取 merchant/rider 失败、通知入队失败都只记录日志或直接返回；暂停事实可提交但用户/骑手/商户未收到提醒。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed`。本族不是“订单主状态完全没有 guard”，而是“主状态、异常投影、食安 gate、状态日志和通知/分账副作用分属多个事实源；局部 SQL guard 不能保证跨入口的一致完成/取消语义”。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下只读模板用于确认异常投影与主状态漂移，默认先看近 30 天；若命中支付/退款/分账后果，再回 `P0` 对应风险族深挖。

```sql
-- P1-F03-1: takeout 终态订单仍带 cancel_requested/food_safety_paused 投影。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.user_id,
  o.merchant_id,
  o.status,
  o.exception_state,
  o.claim_channel,
  o.status_hint,
  o.rider_delivered_at,
  o.user_delivered_at,
  o.auto_user_delivered_at,
  o.completed_at,
  o.cancelled_at,
  o.updated_at
FROM orders o
WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
  AND o.exception_state IN ('cancel_requested','food_safety_paused')
  AND o.status IN ('rider_delivered','user_delivered','completed','cancelled')
  AND o.updated_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
ORDER BY o.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F03-2: food_safety_paused 订单对应商户已非食安外卖暂停，定位 gate 与投影分叉。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.status,
  o.exception_state,
  o.claim_channel,
  o.status_hint,
  mp.is_takeout_suspended,
  mp.takeout_suspend_reason,
  mp.takeout_suspended_at,
  mp.takeout_suspend_until,
  o.updated_at AS order_updated_at
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN merchant_profiles mp ON mp.merchant_id = o.merchant_id
WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
  AND o.exception_state = 'food_safety_paused'
  AND (
    mp.merchant_id IS NULL
    OR mp.is_takeout_suspended = false
    OR mp.takeout_suspend_reason IS NULL
    OR mp.takeout_suspend_reason NOT LIKE '同商户1小时内多名顾客食安举报触发熔断%'
  )
ORDER BY o.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F03-3: food_safety_paused 订单仍被配送送达/完成，确认 CompleteDeliveryTx 末端 gate 缺口。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.status AS order_status,
  o.exception_state,
  o.claim_channel,
  d.id AS delivery_id,
  d.status AS delivery_status,
  d.rider_id,
  d.rider_delivered_at,
  d.delivered_at,
  d.completed_at,
  o.updated_at AS order_updated_at
FROM orders o
JOIN deliveries d ON d.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
  AND o.exception_state = 'food_safety_paused'
  AND (
    o.status IN ('rider_delivered','user_delivered','completed')
    OR d.status IN ('delivered','completed')
  )
ORDER BY GREATEST(COALESCE(d.delivered_at, d.created_at), COALESCE(o.updated_at, o.created_at)) DESC;

-- P1-F03-4: completed takeout 缺 completed 状态日志，定位确认收货/自动完成日志 best-effort 漏记。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.status,
  o.completed_at,
  o.auto_user_delivered_at,
  o.updated_at
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN order_status_logs osl
  ON osl.order_id = o.id
 AND osl.to_status = 'completed'
WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
  AND o.status = 'completed'
  AND o.completed_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND osl.id IS NULL
ORDER BY o.completed_at DESC;

-- P1-F03-5: cancel_requested 投影缺少对应状态日志，确认晚期取消吞错/漏日志。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.status,
  o.exception_state,
  o.claim_channel,
  o.updated_at
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN order_status_logs osl
  ON osl.order_id = o.id
 AND osl.notes LIKE '%用户申请取消%'
WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
  AND o.exception_state = 'cancel_requested'
  AND o.updated_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND osl.id IS NULL
ORDER BY o.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F03-6: 状态日志存在“用户申请取消”，但订单没有 cancel_requested 投影。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.status,
  o.exception_state,
  o.claim_channel,
  osl.id AS status_log_id,
  osl.created_at AS log_created_at,
  osl.notes
FROM order_status_logs osl
JOIN orders o ON o.id = osl.order_id
WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
  AND osl.notes LIKE '%用户申请取消%'
  AND osl.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND (o.exception_state IS DISTINCT FROM 'cancel_requested' OR o.claim_channel IS DISTINCT FROM 'user')
ORDER BY osl.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F03-7: 自动完成后仍出现同订单 claim，定位扫描后到 claim 与完成 gate 分叉。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.user_id,
  o.status AS order_status,
  o.auto_user_delivered_at,
  o.completed_at,
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.status AS claim_status,
  c.claim_type,
  c.created_at AS claim_created_at
FROM orders o
JOIN claims c ON c.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
  AND o.status = 'completed'
  AND o.auto_user_delivered_at IS NOT NULL
  AND o.completed_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
ORDER BY o.completed_at DESC, c.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F03-8: food_safety incident/case 已 resolved，但订单仍保留 food_safety_paused。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.status AS order_status,
  o.exception_state,
  o.claim_channel,
  fsi.id AS incident_id,
  fsi.status AS incident_status,
  fsi.resolved_at AS incident_resolved_at,
  fsc.id AS case_id,
  fsc.status AS case_status,
  fsc.resolved_at AS case_resolved_at,
  o.updated_at AS order_updated_at
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN food_safety_incidents fsi ON fsi.order_id = o.id
LEFT JOIN food_safety_cases fsc ON fsc.id = fsi.case_id
WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
  AND o.exception_state = 'food_safety_paused'
  AND (
    fsi.status = 'resolved'
    OR fsc.status = 'resolved'
    OR fsi.resolved_at IS NOT NULL
    OR fsc.resolved_at IS NOT NULL
  )
ORDER BY COALESCE(fsc.resolved_at, fsi.resolved_at, o.updated_at) DESC;

-- P1-F03-9: 完成/取消日志时间线与订单终态不一致，辅助排查并发输掉方和补偿脚本。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.status AS current_status,
  o.completed_at,
  o.cancelled_at,
  osl.id AS log_id,
  osl.from_status,
  osl.to_status,
  osl.operator_type,
  osl.created_at AS log_created_at,
  osl.notes
FROM order_status_logs osl
JOIN orders o ON o.id = osl.order_id
WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
  AND osl.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND osl.to_status IN ('completed','cancelled','rider_delivered','user_delivered')
  AND (
    (osl.to_status = 'completed' AND o.status <> 'completed')
    OR (osl.to_status = 'cancelled' AND o.status <> 'cancelled')
    OR (osl.to_status IN ('rider_delivered','user_delivered') AND o.status IN ('cancelled','completed'))
  )
ORDER BY osl.created_at DESC;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 晚期取消诉求：当前 `CancelOrder` 对 `UpdateOrderExceptionState` 和 `CreateOrderStatusLog` 错误没有日志，生产侧只能用上面 `P1-F03-5/6` SQL 和 HTTP 4xx 访问日志交叉定位；若修复，应增加 `order_cancel_request_projection_failed`、`order_cancel_request_log_failed`。
  - 自动完成：搜索 `failed to list takeout orders for auto completion`、`failed to check claims, skip auto complete`、`auto complete takeout order failed`、`takeout auto-complete scan finished`、`skip auto-complete baofu profit sharing scheduling`、`enqueue auto-complete baofu profit sharing failed`。
  - 用户确认收货：当前状态日志失败被忽略；若修复，应补 `takeout_confirm_status_log_failed`，并在 API/logic 层明确 completed 后通知/分账调度失败是否进入 recovery。
  - 食安暂停事务：搜索 `pause active takeout order for food safety`、`create food safety pause order log`、`clear paused takeout orders after food safety resolution`、`resolve food safety case` 相关错误，按 `case_id/order_id` 串时间线。
  - 食安 follow-up：搜索 `get merchant for food safety follow-up failed`、`enqueue food safety notification failed`、`enqueue reservation food safety alert failed`、`get rider for food safety pause notification failed`。
  - 配送末端交叉：搜索骑手确认送达 API/logic 中 `CompleteDeliveryTx` 返回的 `ErrDeliveryStateTransitionConflict`、`update delivery to delivered`、`update order to rider_delivered`；缺少食安 gate 命中日志是观测缺口。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - 晚期取消吞错：mock `UpdateOrderExceptionState` 返回 DB error，确认当前仍返回“已记录取消诉求”；再 mock `CreateOrderStatusLog` 失败，断言 projection 有/日志无。修复后应返回真实失败或进入 durable outbox。
  - cancel_requested 覆盖 food_safety_paused：构造 `food_safety_paused` 的 delivering 订单，调用用户晚期取消；断言当前会覆盖为 `cancel_requested/user`，修复后应有优先级或拒绝策略。
  - 食安 pause 快照后订单终态：`ReportFoodSafetyIncidentTx` 列出 active order 后，让另一路把订单推进 completed/cancelled，再执行 `UpdateOrderFoodSafetyPauseState`；断言当前可在终态订单上写 pause。
  - 食安结案清理遗漏：构造 `food_safety_paused + rider_delivered/completed/cancelled`，调用 `ResolveFoodSafetyCaseTx`；断言当前 `ClearMerchantFoodSafetyPausedOrders` 不清这些终态。
  - 暂停中骑手确认送达：商户食安暂停且订单 delivering/`food_safety_paused`，调用 `CompleteDeliveryTx`；断言当前会 delivered/rider_delivered 并解冻押金。
  - 暂停中用户确认收货：`food_safety_paused` 或 `cancel_requested` 的 rider_delivered 订单调用 `ConfirmTakeoutOrder`；断言当前可 completed 且异常投影残留。
  - 自动完成 vs claim 后到：scheduler 查 claims 返回空后，让 claim/food safety incident 创建，再执行 `AutoCompleteTakeoutOrder`；断言当前可 completed 并调度分账。
  - 完成日志失败：`CompleteTakeoutOrderByUser` 或 `AutoCompleteTakeoutOrder` 成功后让 `CreateOrderStatusLog` 失败；断言当前订单 completed 但日志缺失。
  - 食安 follow-up 入队失败：`ReportFoodSafetyIncidentTx` 成功后让 taskDistributor nil 或入队失败；断言暂停事实提交但通知缺失，仅有日志。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 `P1-F03-1/2/3/8` 命中，应先定义异常投影与主状态的单一决策规则：暂停/取消诉求是否阻止送达、确认收货、自动完成、分账；以及终态是否必须清理投影。
  - 若 `P1-F03-5/6` 命中，应把晚期取消诉求改成事务内 durable 写入，错误不可吞；如果产品仍要求用户一定收到“已记录”，至少要有 outbox/retry ledger 和可观测失败状态。
  - 若 `P1-F03-4/9` 命中，应把关键状态日志纳入同事务或 outbox/repair，不再把 completed/cancelled 审计链当 best-effort 附属物。
  - 若 `P1-F03-7` 命中，应让自动完成使用订单版本或 conditional SQL 直接过滤 `exception_state/claim_channel`，并把 claims/food safety 创建与完成 gate 的优先级写成明确矩阵。
  - 食安修复形态建议：`UpdateOrderFoodSafetyPauseState` 应带 expected active statuses 和 case_id/version；`ClearMerchantFoodSafetyPausedOrders` 应明确覆盖终态清理策略；`CompleteDeliveryTx`、`CompleteTakeoutOrderByUser`、`AutoCompleteTakeoutOrder` 应统一读取同一异常 gate。
  - 通知修复形态建议：食安暂停通知若是履约安全必达，应从事务后 best-effort 改成 outbox；若允许丢失，应有 operator repair SQL/指标，不要只依赖应用日志。

#### P1-F04. 配送池、抢单、地理围栏、位置和 ETA/告警

- 原始编号：`17/97-113/150-166/312-314/NP-81-NP-86/NP-266-NP-274/NP-297-NP-301`。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed`。配送池过期口径、抢单锁后复核、围栏事件占位、位置多 active delivery、ETA/delayed/通知等均有代码证据；多数影响是配送状态、SLA、体验和运营提醒。
- 证据闭口：`104/110/111/NP-267` 是 pool list/count/grab 过期口径；`150-152/NP-272` 是 dwell event 占位后自动推进不重试；`154-156/313/314` 是位置链路分段和多 active delivery 假设；`158-161/312` 是 delayed/operator alert ledger 和 per-recipient 幂等。
- 生产验证：查过期 pool 项仍可见/被抢、delivery location 绑定到非当前配送、多 active delivery 骑手、dwell event 已存在但状态未推进、delayed=true 但无通知记录。
- 最小复现/测试：pool 过期与抢单并发；dwell event 创建后让状态推进失败再重试位置；骑手两条 active delivery 上报位置；ETA 慢写后订单取消。
- 修复类型：pool 过期语义统一；geofence event 增加 status/window 维度或推进失败可重试；位置上报显式 delivery 绑定；delayed/alert 拆 ledger delivered/skipped/failed。
- 下一步：先确认产品是否允许顺路多单；该决定会影响位置和围栏修复形态。

##### P1-F04 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：本族只处理配送池、抢单、配送主状态推进、地理围栏自动推进、骑手位置绑定、ETA 与配送告警/通知投影。食安 pause 对配送送达的 gate 缺口已在 `P1-F03` 记录；退款/分账资金后果回 `P0`；通用通知幂等与 WebSocket 可靠性回 `P2-F04`，这里只保留配送状态触发的通知缺口。
- 已有保护/非问题：
  - 抢单主事务不是裸写：`GrabOrderTx` 会锁 order、rider、delivery_pool，并把 assign delivery、移除 pool、冻结押金、更新订单为 `courier_accepted`、写抢单状态日志放在同一事务；`delivery_pool(order_id)` 唯一索引也挡住同一订单重复入池。
  - 抢单前置会检查骑手在线/active/未暂停/宝付结算 ready、pool 存在、pool 未过期、距离限制、delivery 存在、order 状态可抢、押金余额；事务内还会重新锁 rider 并检查资格、锁 pool 仍存在。剩余问题是事务内不复核 `expires_at` 和 order 可抢状态矩阵。
  - 正向配送状态推进已有较完整 SQL guard：`UpdateDeliveryToPickup/Picked/Delivering/Delivered` 都要求当前 delivery 状态和 rider 匹配；事务层把 delivery/order 更新放在一起，并把 `ErrRecordNotFound` 映射为 `ErrDeliveryStateTransitionConflict`，API/logic 会转成 409。旧账不能再泛化成“手动正向推进并发输掉方都会 500”。
  - 抢单、开始取餐、确认取餐、开始配送有食安 gate；这组不再重复计入 `P1-F04`，末端确认送达缺 gate 已归 `P1-F03`。
  - 位置上报进入围栏处理时使用 `UpdateRiderLocation` 返回的 `updatedRider`，不是更新前旧 rider 快照；旧候选“自动送达一定使用旧位置快照”已收窄为非问题。真实残余在 `location_updated_at=now()` 的时间语义和分段提交。
  - `delivery_pool.expires_at` 不是 20/60 分钟未接单 SLA 本身；20 分钟 delayed 和 60 分钟 stale cancel 由 `DataCleanupScheduler` 按 deliveries.created_at 处理。过期字段问题保留为 list/count/grab/recommend 语义不一致，而不是直接等同于自动取消 SLA。
  - `UpdateDeliveryDamage` 当前只看到 SQL 形状，未确认有同等级生产 writer；不把 damage 字段升级为已运行问题。若后续风控/索赔/餐损入口接入该 SQL，应按 terminal 后到写入重新复核。
  - 配送状态通知、ETA 和大厅广播不影响主抢单互斥：即使这些 best-effort 副作用失败，也不会让另一骑手成功抢同一 `delivery_pool` 项。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - `ListDeliveryPool` 和 `ListDeliveryPoolNearby` 不过滤 `expires_at`，`CountDeliveryPoolNearby` 过滤 `expires_at >= now()`；推荐列表、列表数量和可抢校验口径不一致。外层抢单虽检查过期，但 `GrabOrderTx` 锁住 pool 后不复核 `expires_at`，存在 read-check-write 窗口。
  - 抢单事务锁住 order 后没有重新执行 `IsOrderStatusAllowedForDeliveryAction(..., "grab")` 的业务矩阵，最终依赖 `UpdateOrderToCourierAccepted` 的 SQL allowed-from：`preparing/ready/courier_accepted`。若产品只允许 ready 后抢单，事务内条件比外层业务校验更宽；当前代码对 preparing 的错误文案与 SQL 允许集合也需产品确认。
  - `CancelOrderTx` 先读取 delivery 状态决定是否阻断取消，随后才锁 delivery；锁后没有复核 `lockedDelivery.Status`，最终 `UpdateDeliveryToCancelled` 只按 id 宽写。取消与骑手状态推进/送达交错时，delivery 可被后到取消覆盖，押金解冻也可能按锁后状态与初始判断不一致执行。
  - stale delivery 60 分钟取消链路是多段提交：扫描 pending delivery、读 order、`CancelOrderTx`、再单独 `UpdateDeliveryToCancelled`、再广播/查支付/入队退款。它与抢单、状态推进和支付/退款恢复都有弱顺序窗口；其中退款 status `"success"` 口径已是资金族交叉风险。
  - 手动 `ConfirmPickup`、`StartDelivery`、`ConfirmDelivery` 的主状态事务成功后，状态日志在事务外 `_, _ = CreateOrderStatusLog`，失败会缺少 order_status_logs；围栏自动推进也同样 best-effort 写日志。
  - 围栏 dwell event 先以 `(delivery_id,event_type)` 唯一键落库，再触发自动推进；自动推进因状态冲突、食安暂停、位置半径、新鲜度、DB 错误、押金解冻失败等失败后，后续同类 dwell 上报 `ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING`，不会再触发自动推进。
  - `dwell_pickup` 在 assigned 状态下会调用 `maybeAutoAdvancePickup` 和 `maybeAutoConfirmPickup`，但两个函数都使用进入处理时的同一个 delivery 快照；第一次把 assigned 推到 picking 后，第二个函数仍看到旧快照而跳过。后续位置上报又因 `dwell_pickup` 已存在而不再自动确认取餐。
  - delivery_location_events 唯一键只按 `delivery_id,event_type`，不绑定 rider/status/window/位置批次；早期低质量但通过 accuracy/radius 的事件、改派前事件或乱序位置可能占用后续合法触发机会。
  - 位置上报是多段提交：批量插入 rider_locations、更新 rider current location、同步当前 region、处理围栏事件和自动状态推进分开执行；任一步失败都会留下“部分事实已提交、后续副作用没发生”的半状态。
  - `UpdateRiderLocation` 用服务端 `now()` 写 `location_updated_at`，而位置上报允许 1 小时内历史 `recorded_at`；手动/自动确认送达的新鲜度校验基于服务端接收时间，不是设备采集时间，离线缓存位置恢复上报可能被视为新鲜。
  - 位置上报只取 `ListRiderActiveDeliveries` 的第一条 active delivery。推荐/抢单侧看起来支持顺路多单或至少未禁止多 active delivery；显式传第二条 delivery_id 会被 `ErrRiderActiveOrderOnly` 拒绝，未显式传时轨迹和围栏会错绑第一条 active delivery。
  - active delivery 读取失败时，位置上报会静默当作没有 active delivery：轨迹和 current location 仍成功写入，接口返回成功，但 delivery_id 绑定和围栏处理跳过，客户端通常不会重放该批点。
  - 抢单后 ETA 更新在主事务之后执行，且可能等待地图服务；最终 `UpdateDeliveryEstimatedTime` 只按 delivery id 写，不校验 delivery 仍 assigned/active。慢地图响应可后到覆盖 cancelled/delivered/completed delivery 的 ETA 展示。
  - 抢单成功后的商户通知、状态通知和附近骑手 order-gone 广播都是 best-effort：`sendDeliveryStatusNotification` 忽略 `SendNotification` 错误，`BroadcastOrderGone` 返回值也被丢弃；客户端成功响应不代表周边投影齐全。
  - 20 分钟 delayed 告警先 `UpdateDeliveryDelayed(id)`，再查订单/商户老板/入队通知；后续任一步失败只 log。下一轮扫描因 `is_delayed=true` 跳过，商户可能永远收不到告警。
  - 20 分钟 delayed 最终 SQL 只按 id 更新，不复核 delivery 仍 pending；扫描到 pending 后，若抢单/取消先提交，后到 delayed 标记仍可写入 assigned/cancelled 等状态。
  - operator pending dispatch alert 先写 `delivery_timeout_alerts` ledger，再入队 worker；入队失败会尝试删除 ledger，但删除失败会永久抑制后续同 key。worker 侧如果 delivery 已非 pending、order/merchant/recipient 缺失，会 skip 并保留 ledger；多 recipient 串行发送，部分成功后失败会让任务重试并重复通知前面 recipient。
- 外部审计补核：`GrabOrderTx` / `CompleteDeliveryTx` 存在 `orders`/`riders` 锁顺序反转气味，但暂不按已确认死锁升级。
  - 代码证据：`GrabOrderTx` 实际顺序是先 `GetOrderForUpdate(order_id)`，再 `GetRiderForUpdate(rider_id)`，再锁 `delivery_pool`，随后分配 delivery、移除 pool、冻结押金、`UpdateOrderToCourierAccepted`；函数头注释仍写“先锁 rider”，注释已落后于实现。`CompleteDeliveryTx` 则先 `GetRiderForUpdate(rider_id)`，再 `UpdateDeliveryToDelivered`，随后 `UpdateOrderToRiderDelivered(order_id)`，该 `UPDATE orders ... WHERE id=$1 ... RETURNING *` 会隐式申请同一 order 行锁。
  - 强度判断：这是清晰的 lock-order inversion 证据；但 Gemini 示例中的“同一订单同时抢单与确认送达”需要同一 order 既满足抢单窗口 `preparing/ready` 或 SQL 的 `preparing/ready/courier_accepted`，又满足送达窗口 `delivering/rider_delivered`，正常状态机下不可同时成立。若只是同一 rider 的不同 order 并发，T1 等 rider、T2 等另一个 order，不能自然形成同一资源环。因此当前标为 `C2-needs-repro`，需要事务暂停点或数据库锁观测验证是否存在真实可达的同 row 环。
  - 已有缓冲：`execTx` 对 PostgreSQL `40P01` deadlock 有最多 3 次重试和日志；这能降低偶发用户可见失败，但不能替代统一锁顺序。如果生产日志出现 `tx deadlock retry exhausted` 或同一链路持续重试，应把本条从 `C2` 升级。
  - 补充取证：查应用日志 `tx deadlock detected, retrying`、`tx deadlock retry exhausted`、`get order for update`、`get rider for update`、`update order to rider_delivered`、`update order to courier_accepted`；有数据库权限时查 `pg_stat_database.deadlocks` 的增量。复现测试应使用本地测试库和事务暂停 hook 构造 order/rider 锁等待图，而不是仅凭静态锁顺序直接定性。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed`。本族不是“配送主状态完全无保护”，而是“抢单/正向推进的主状态已经局部收敛，但 pool、取消、围栏、位置、ETA、告警、通知这些外围事实源没有统一版本/状态窗口，导致可见投影、自动推进和提醒链路弱一致”。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下只读模板用于确认配送链路漂移，默认先看近 30 天；退款和分账命中后回 `P0` 族深挖。

```sql
-- P1-F04-1: delivery_pool 已过期但仍存在，且订单/配送还不是终态。
SELECT
  dp.id AS pool_id,
  dp.order_id,
  dp.merchant_id,
  dp.expires_at,
  dp.created_at AS pool_created_at,
  o.status AS order_status,
  d.id AS delivery_id,
  d.status AS delivery_status,
  d.rider_id,
  d.created_at AS delivery_created_at
FROM delivery_pool dp
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = dp.order_id
LEFT JOIN deliveries d ON d.order_id = dp.order_id
WHERE dp.expires_at < now()
  AND (o.id IS NULL OR o.status NOT IN ('cancelled','completed'))
  AND (d.id IS NULL OR d.status NOT IN ('cancelled','delivered','completed'))
ORDER BY dp.expires_at ASC;

-- P1-F04-2: pool 附近列表会看到但 CountDeliveryPoolNearby 会过滤的过期项，用于确认 list/count 口径差。
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS expired_pool_count,
  MIN(expires_at) AS oldest_expired_at,
  MAX(expires_at) AS newest_expired_at
FROM delivery_pool
WHERE expires_at < now();

-- P1-F04-3: delivery 与 order 主状态不兼容，粗筛取消/推进/送达交错。
SELECT
  d.id AS delivery_id,
  d.order_id,
  d.rider_id,
  d.status AS delivery_status,
  o.status AS order_status,
  o.fulfillment_status,
  d.assigned_at,
  d.picked_at,
  d.delivered_at,
  d.completed_at,
  o.updated_at AS order_updated_at
FROM deliveries d
JOIN orders o ON o.id = d.order_id
WHERE d.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND (
    (d.status IN ('assigned','picking','picked','delivering') AND o.status IN ('cancelled','completed'))
    OR (d.status = 'pending' AND o.status NOT IN ('ready','preparing'))
    OR (d.status IN ('delivered','completed') AND o.status NOT IN ('rider_delivered','user_delivered','completed'))
    OR (d.status = 'cancelled' AND o.status IN ('courier_accepted','picked','delivering','rider_delivered'))
  )
ORDER BY GREATEST(COALESCE(o.updated_at, o.created_at), d.created_at) DESC;

-- P1-F04-4: 同一骑手多条 active delivery，确认位置/围栏单 active 假设是否被真实业务打破。
SELECT
  rider_id,
  COUNT(*) AS active_delivery_count,
  ARRAY_AGG(id ORDER BY created_at, id) AS delivery_ids,
  ARRAY_AGG(status ORDER BY created_at, id) AS statuses,
  MIN(created_at) AS first_active_created_at,
  MAX(created_at) AS latest_active_created_at
FROM deliveries
WHERE rider_id IS NOT NULL
  AND status IN ('assigned','picking','picked','delivering')
GROUP BY rider_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY active_delivery_count DESC, latest_active_created_at DESC;

-- P1-F04-5: rider location 绑定到非当前骑手或终态 delivery，定位错绑/后到轨迹。
SELECT
  rl.id AS location_id,
  rl.rider_id AS location_rider_id,
  rl.delivery_id,
  rl.recorded_at,
  d.rider_id AS delivery_rider_id,
  d.status AS delivery_status,
  d.order_id
FROM rider_locations rl
JOIN deliveries d ON d.id = rl.delivery_id
WHERE rl.recorded_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND (
    d.rider_id IS DISTINCT FROM rl.rider_id
    OR d.status IN ('cancelled','delivered','completed')
  )
ORDER BY rl.recorded_at DESC;

-- P1-F04-6: 有 active delivery 的骑手近期位置未绑定 delivery_id，可能是 active delivery 读取失败或客户端未显式上报。
WITH active_riders AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT rider_id
  FROM deliveries
  WHERE rider_id IS NOT NULL
    AND status IN ('assigned','picking','picked','delivering')
)
SELECT
  rl.rider_id,
  COUNT(*) AS unbound_location_count,
  MAX(rl.recorded_at) AS latest_unbound_at
FROM rider_locations rl
JOIN active_riders ar ON ar.rider_id = rl.rider_id
WHERE rl.delivery_id IS NULL
  AND rl.recorded_at >= now() - interval '24 hours'
GROUP BY rl.rider_id
ORDER BY latest_unbound_at DESC;

-- P1-F04-7: dwell event 已占位但 delivery 仍停在该推进窗口，确认自动推进失败后不可重试。
SELECT
  e.id AS event_id,
  e.delivery_id,
  e.event_type,
  e.recorded_at AS event_recorded_at,
  e.created_at AS event_created_at,
  d.status AS delivery_status,
  d.order_id,
  d.rider_id
FROM delivery_location_events e
JOIN deliveries d ON d.id = e.delivery_id
WHERE e.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND (
    (e.event_type = 'dwell_pickup' AND d.status IN ('assigned','picking'))
    OR (e.event_type = 'dwell_dropoff' AND d.status = 'delivering')
  )
  AND e.created_at < now() - interval '5 minutes'
ORDER BY e.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F04-8: delivered/completed/cancelled 后仍有未来 ETA，筛查后到 ETA 覆盖终态展示。
SELECT
  d.id AS delivery_id,
  d.order_id,
  d.status,
  d.estimated_delivery_at,
  d.delivered_at,
  d.completed_at,
  o.status AS order_status
FROM deliveries d
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = d.order_id
WHERE d.status IN ('cancelled','delivered','completed')
  AND d.estimated_delivery_at IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    (d.delivered_at IS NOT NULL AND d.estimated_delivery_at > d.delivered_at + interval '5 minutes')
    OR (d.completed_at IS NOT NULL AND d.estimated_delivery_at > d.completed_at + interval '5 minutes')
    OR (d.status = 'cancelled' AND d.estimated_delivery_at > now())
  )
ORDER BY COALESCE(d.completed_at, d.delivered_at, d.created_at) DESC;

-- P1-F04-9: delayed=true 但没有对应商户 delayed 通知记录。
SELECT
  d.id AS delivery_id,
  d.order_id,
  d.status,
  d.is_delayed,
  d.created_at,
  o.merchant_id,
  COUNT(n.id) AS notification_count
FROM deliveries d
JOIN orders o ON o.id = d.order_id
LEFT JOIN notifications n
  ON n.related_type = 'delivery'
 AND n.related_id = d.id
 AND n.type = 'delivery'
 AND n.title = '代取超时告警'
WHERE d.is_delayed = true
  AND d.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY d.id, d.order_id, d.status, d.is_delayed, d.created_at, o.merchant_id
HAVING COUNT(n.id) = 0
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F04-10: operator timeout alert ledger 已存在，但未看到对应 operator 通知记录。
SELECT
  a.delivery_id,
  a.alert_key,
  a.created_at AS alert_created_at,
  d.status AS delivery_status,
  d.order_id,
  COUNT(n.id) AS notification_count
FROM delivery_timeout_alerts a
JOIN deliveries d ON d.id = a.delivery_id
LEFT JOIN notifications n
  ON n.related_type = 'delivery'
 AND n.related_id = a.delivery_id
 AND n.type = 'delivery'
 AND n.extra_data->>'alert_key' = a.alert_key
WHERE a.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY a.delivery_id, a.alert_key, a.created_at, d.status, d.order_id
HAVING COUNT(n.id) = 0
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 抢单与 pool：搜索 `订单已过期`、`手慢了，订单已被抢走`、`lock delivery pool`、`remove from delivery pool`、`update order to courier_accepted`、`ErrRiderDeliveryEligibilityChanged`、`ErrBaofuProfitSharingBillNotPending`。
  - 正向状态推进：搜索 `代取状态已变化，请刷新后重试`、`update delivery to picking/picked/delivering/delivered`、`update order to picked/delivering/rider_delivered`；状态日志失败目前被忽略，应以 SQL 查缺。
  - stale delivery：搜索 `found stale deliveries to cancel`、`failed to cancel stale delivery`、`cancelled stale deliveries`、`failed to enqueue refund task for stale delivery`、`enqueued refund task for stale delivery cancellation`、`skip stale delivery pool gone broadcast`。
  - 围栏自动推进：搜索 `failed to create geofence arrive event`、`failed to create geofence dwell event`、`failed to auto advance delivery to picking`、`failed to auto confirm pickup`、`failed geofence delivery confirm validation`、`failed to auto confirm delivery`。
  - 位置上报：搜索 `failed to list delivery locations for dwell`、`geofence delivery rider mismatch`、`failed to load delivery for geofence`；active delivery 读取失败当前没有日志，是观测缺口。
  - ETA/通知/广播：搜索 `failed to update estimated delivery time`、`failed to get distance matrix from LBS`、`updated delivery estimated time after rider accepted`；`sendDeliveryStatusNotification` 忽略错误，需查 `notifications` 表或通用通知 worker 日志。
  - delayed/operator alert：搜索 `failed to mark delivery as delayed`、`failed to get order for stale delivery alert`、`merchant boss not found, skipping user notification`、`failed to enqueue notification task`、`processed delivery delay alerts`、`failed to create delivery timeout alert ledger`、`failed to enqueue operator pending dispatch alert task`、`failed to rollback delivery timeout alert ledger after enqueue failure`、`skip operator pending dispatch alert`、`processed operator pending dispatch alert`。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - pool 过期与抢单并发：`GrabDeliveryOrder` 外层读到未过期后暂停，让时间跨过 `expires_at` 或另一路清理过期 pool，再进入 `GrabOrderTx`；断言当前事务内不复核 expires_at/语义。
  - 抢单 vs 订单状态变化：外层读 order ready 后让订单取消/完成/回退，再执行 `GrabOrderTx`；断言 SQL allowed-from 是否仍会把 order 改 courier_accepted，或返回何种错误。
  - `CancelOrderTx` vs `CompleteDeliveryTx`：取消外层读到 delivery 可取消后，让骑手确认送达提交，再让取消事务锁 delivery 并 `UpdateDeliveryToCancelled`；断言 delivery/order/押金流水最终形状。
  - stale cleanup 分段：扫描到 pending delivery 后让骑手抢单，再执行 stale cancel；断言 CancelOrderTx/UpdateDeliveryToCancelled/退款入队各自表现；另测 `taskDistributor` 入队退款失败后的可观测性。
  - 状态日志失败：让 `ConfirmPickup`/`StartDelivery`/`ConfirmDelivery` 主事务成功后 `CreateOrderStatusLog` 失败；断言状态已推进但日志缺失。
  - dwell event 占位后推进失败：先成功创建 `dwell_pickup`/`dwell_dropoff`，注入自动推进失败；再次上报满足 dwell 的点，断言 `created=false` 不再重试。
  - assigned -> picking -> picked 双阶段：构造 assigned delivery 并打开 auto advance/auto pickup；一次 dwell 后断言只进入 picking，后续同类 dwell 因唯一键不再自动 picked。
  - 位置多 active：同一骑手两条 active delivery，显式上报第二条 delivery_id 断言被拒；不显式传 delivery_id 断言绑定第一条 active。
  - 旧 recorded_at 新鲜度：上报 30-60 分钟前但在半径内的位置，断言 `location_updated_at=now()` 后手动/自动确认送达可通过新鲜度校验。
  - ETA 后到：抢单成功后让地图调用阻塞，期间取消/完成 delivery，再返回 ETA 写入；断言 terminal delivery 的 `estimated_delivery_at` 被更新。
  - delayed 通知失败：20 分钟扫描中 `UpdateDeliveryDelayed` 成功后，让 `GetMerchantBoss` 或通知入队失败；断言下一轮不再发送同一 delayed 通知。
  - operator alert recipient 部分成功：多个 operator recipient，第一个通知成功、第二个失败并重试；断言第一个收到重复通知，ledger 不表达 per-recipient delivered/skipped/failed。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 `P1-F04-1/2` 命中，应先定义 `delivery_pool.expires_at` 产品语义：若过期不可抢，list/listNearby/count/grab/tx 都要统一过滤；若过期仍可见，则 count 与推荐文案应改口径，避免“可见不可抢”。
  - 若 `P1-F04-3` 命中，应把 delivery/order 兼容矩阵下沉到最终事务或统一 transition helper；取消入口锁 delivery 后必须复核 locked status，再决定是否取消、是否解冻押金、是否返回 409/幂等。
  - 若 `P1-F04-4/5/6` 命中，必须先确认是否允许顺路多单。允许多单时，位置上报应以显式 delivery_id 为主，校验该 delivery 属于当前 rider 且 active；不允许多单时，抢单事务或 DB partial unique 需要阻止第二条 active delivery。
  - 若 `P1-F04-7` 命中，围栏 event 不能只用 `(delivery_id,event_type)` 表达“已成功推进”；应增加 status window、trigger_result、retryable failure 或 processed_at，自动推进失败后可重试。
  - 若 `P1-F04-8` 命中，ETA 写入应带 expected delivery status/version，或把 ETA 当只读计算而不是持久覆盖 terminal delivery。
  - 若 `P1-F04-9/10` 命中，应拆分“事实已发生”和“通知已投递”：`is_delayed`、`delivery_timeout_alerts` 不应同时充当通知成功去重；operator alert 需要 per-recipient ledger 或通知业务幂等键。
  - 配送状态日志若被运营/客服视为审计证据，应纳入事务/outbox/repair；若只是辅助展示，应在产品和排查手册中明确“日志可能缺失，DB 主状态为准”。
  - 抢单后通知/广播若影响大厅实时性，应给 order-gone broadcast 或通知表增加可重放 anchor；否则需接受客户端重新拉取作为最终收敛。

#### P1-F05. 索赔、追偿争议、行为 action 和暂停/解除暂停

- 原始编号：`121-149/140-148/414/NP-278-NP-296/NP-308`，资金动作已在 `P0-F10` 单独归并。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed`。索赔创建资格、争议 submit/review/result-effect、behavior action running/terminal 写入、block/release owner guard、claim recovery events 幂等等都有确认风险。
- 证据闭口：`121/NP-278` 是 claim 创建事务内资格复核；`123/141/142/NP-280/NP-282` 是 action terminal/running；`136/139/143/NP-283/NP-284` 是 pause/release 无 owner guard；`129-135/NP-291-NP-295` 是 result effects 重放和反查 action 漂移。
- 生产验证：查 running action 超阈值、dispute approved 但 recovery 未 release、release 后仍有其它暂停 reason 被清理、claim recovery events 重复、自动裁决重复处罚。
- 最小复现/测试：索赔创建与订单状态变化并发；result task 重放；release action 与其它暂停 reason 交错；worker 在 action running 后崩溃。
- 修复类型：claim/dispute/recovery 统一 expected-state；pause owner/reason guard；action lease + running recovery；result effects 幂等键和 processed outbox。
- 下一步：需要产品确认多来源暂停的优先级和叠加模型。

##### P1-F05 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：本族只处理 `claims`、`claim_recoveries`、`recovery_disputes`、`behavior_actions`、claim recovery 触发的商户/骑手暂停与解除暂停、争议结果通知/处罚投影。真实打款、退款、payout action 资金状态、payment_order 续链回 `P0-F10/P0-F09`；这里只记录与索赔/追偿状态顺序交叉的锚点。
- 已有保护/非问题：
  - 同一订单重复索赔不是裸奔：`claims(order_id)` 有唯一约束，API 对 duplicate order claim 会映射为冲突。剩余问题不是“双 claim”，而是创建事务内没有复核订单仍 `completed`、仍属于该用户、仍未被替换。
  - 追偿争议同一 claim/发起方有唯一保护：`recovery_disputes(claim_id, appellant_type)` 唯一索引存在；商户路径遇到唯一冲突返回 conflict，骑手路径会按同一 rider 返回已有争议或冲突。
  - `CreateRecoveryDisputeWithRecoveryTx` 不是“争议一定会创建但 recovery 不变”：如果 recovery 行存在但状态已不允许 `MarkClaimRecoveryDisputed`，事务会返回错误并回滚已创建的 dispute。旧候选需收窄为：外层资格/窗口/归属快照没有在最终事务里锁定并整体复核；若 recovery 行缺失或数据迁移缺口，当前事务会保留 dispute。
  - 争议审核主写有状态 guard：`ReviewRecoveryDispute` 只允许 `submitted -> approved/rejected`，不是任意覆盖已审核 dispute。
  - overdue 主写有 pending guard，`MarkClaimRecoveryOverdueWithActionTx` 把 recovery 标记 overdue、写 overdue event、创建 block action 放在同一事务；普通 `pending -> overdue` 并非无保护。
  - behavior action 抢执行有 CAS：`claimBehaviorActionMarkRunning` 使用 `UpdateBehaviorActionExecutionIfCurrent` 从当前状态切到 `running`，多个 worker 不会都 claim 同一个 created/failed action。剩余问题是 success/failure/reset 宽写和普通 recovery scheduler 不扫 `running`。
  - 普通 claim behavior action recovery scheduler 会扫 `created/failed` 的 block/recovery/release/notify；payout action 另有资金族 recovery 路径，不能把 payout running 洞泛化到本族所有 action。
  - approved dispute result 如果 payload 没有 release action id 但当前仍查得到 recovery，`ExecuteRecoveryDisputeResultEffects` 会返回错误，不是完全静默跳过。剩余问题是 review tx 本身允许 approved 与非 disputed recovery 脱节，可能根本不创建 release action。
  - 当前代码里已有 reason-owned 解除暂停 SQL：`ReleaseMerchantTakeoutSuspensionIfOwned`、`ReleaseRiderSuspensionIfOwned`。本族问题不是“系统完全不能 owner guard”，而是 claim recovery release helper 没有使用这些带 owner 的释放语义。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - `SubmitClaim` 在 API 层校验订单存在、用户归属、状态 completed、未被 block、未有 claim、金额不超过订单总额；但 `CreateClaimWithBehaviorTx` 事务内只 `GetOrder`，没有复核 order status/user/replaced_by_order_id/金额边界。订单完成、取消、替换、用户归属异常或数据修复与 claim 创建交错时，claim 可基于过期资格快照落库。
  - recovery dispute submit 的 eligibility/window/existing-dispute 检查在事务外，最终事务只创建 dispute 并尝试把 recovery 标记 disputed；它没有锁定并复核“当前 recovery 仍属于该 appellant、仍处于 pending/overdue、仍在窗口期、claim/order/rider/merchant 归属未变”。状态变化导致的 rollback 有保护，但归属/窗口/缺 recovery 行仍是弱点。
  - approved dispute review 先把 dispute 改 approved，再读取 post-process/recovery；只有当前 recovery 状态为 `disputed` 才 waive recovery 并创建 release action。若 recovery 已 pending/overdue/paid/waived 或缺失，dispute 可以 approved，但 recovery/release/暂停解除语义不一定随之收敛。
  - rejected dispute review/result 只对当前 `disputed` recovery 做 resume；若 recovery 已 pending/overdue 则 no-op，若 paid/waived 则 warn/no-op。作为幂等收敛可接受，但如果原因是时序漂移，争议结果和 recovery 当前态会分叉，需要生产 SQL 判断命中规模。
  - `HasBlockingClaimRecoveryForMerchant/Rider` 把 `disputed AND due_at <= now()` 也视为 blocking，但 overdue scanner `ListDueClaimRecoveries` 只扫描 `pending`。处于 disputed 且过期的 recovery 会阻止 release，却不会自动创建 block action，直到争议被 rejected/resumed 或人工处理。
  - claim recovery block action 直接调用 `SuspendMerchantTakeout`/`SuspendRider`，会覆盖其它来源的 suspension reason；release helper 在“无 blocking recovery”时直接 `UnsuspendMerchantTakeout`/`UnsuspendRider`，不校验当前暂停是否由本 recovery 拥有，可能清掉食安、资质、运营等其它暂停。
  - release action 执行只校验 recovery id/claim/order/target，不要求 recovery 当前是 paid/waived/closed；pending/overdue/disputed recovery 上的 release action 仍可尝试释放暂停并写 closed event。
  - open/recovery action 已校验 recovery id、target、amount、basis、due_at，并只补 created/payable event；但它不要求 recovery 当前仍 pending/payable。后到的 open action 可在 paid/waived/disputed 等状态上补事件并标 success。
  - `claim_recovery_events` 没有 `(recovery_id,event_type)` 唯一约束；`WriteClaimRecoveryClosedEventIfAbsent` 和 open event 补写都是读后写，两个 worker/重放并发可重复写 closed/created/payable。
  - behavior action `success`、`failed`、`reset to created` 都调用按 id 宽写的 `UpdateBehaviorActionExecution`，没有 expected current status。后到失败可覆盖已成功 action，或 reset 覆盖并发终态；`running` action 也不会被普通 recovery scheduler 重新入队。
  - approved dispute result 的 claimant penalty 只查 active blocklist；如果旧 block 已过期或被清理，result task 重放可再次创建 blocklist 并递增 warning。缺少按 `recovery_dispute_id` 的 processed ledger/幂等键。
  - recovery dispute result 通知在效果执行后 best-effort 入队：`sendAppellantNotification`、`sendClaimantNotification` 失败只 log，任务仍返回成功；用户/商户/骑手可看到账务/暂停状态变化但没有结果通知。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed`。本族不是“所有 claim/recovery 写入都无 guard”，而是“唯一约束、CAS、部分 SQL guard 已挡住重复创建和部分并发输家，但资格快照、争议结果、action terminal、暂停 owner、事件幂等等关键收敛点仍缺 expected-state/owner/processed 约束”。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下只读模板默认先看近 30 天；JSON 字段查询依赖 `behavior_actions.detail` 中现有 action payload，命中后再回代码路径确认具体来源。

```sql
-- P1-F05-1: claim 建在非 completed、用户不一致或已被替换订单上，确认创建资格快照漂移。
SELECT
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.order_id,
  c.user_id AS claim_user_id,
  o.user_id AS order_user_id,
  c.status AS claim_status,
  o.status AS order_status,
  o.replaced_by_order_id,
  c.claim_amount,
  o.total_amount,
  c.created_at AS claim_created_at,
  o.updated_at AS order_updated_at
FROM claims c
JOIN orders o ON o.id = c.order_id
WHERE c.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND (
    o.status <> 'completed'
    OR o.user_id <> c.user_id
    OR o.replaced_by_order_id IS NOT NULL
    OR c.claim_amount > o.total_amount
  )
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F05-2: submitted dispute 与 latest recovery 未保持 disputed，用于确认 submit/recovery 分叉。
SELECT
  rd.id AS recovery_dispute_id,
  rd.claim_id,
  rd.appellant_type,
  rd.appellant_id,
  rd.status AS dispute_status,
  rd.created_at AS dispute_created_at,
  cr.id AS recovery_id,
  cr.status AS recovery_status,
  cr.due_at
FROM recovery_disputes rd
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT *
  FROM claim_recoveries cr
  WHERE cr.claim_id = rd.claim_id
    AND cr.recovery_target = rd.appellant_type
  ORDER BY cr.id DESC
  LIMIT 1
) cr ON TRUE
WHERE rd.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND rd.status = 'submitted'
  AND (cr.id IS NULL OR cr.status <> 'disputed')
ORDER BY rd.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F05-3: approved dispute 但 recovery 未 waived 或 release action 未成功。
SELECT
  rd.id AS recovery_dispute_id,
  rd.claim_id,
  rd.appellant_type,
  rd.reviewed_at,
  cr.id AS recovery_id,
  cr.status AS recovery_status,
  rel.id AS release_action_id,
  rel.status AS release_action_status,
  rel.created_at AS release_action_created_at
FROM recovery_disputes rd
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT *
  FROM claim_recoveries cr
  WHERE cr.claim_id = rd.claim_id
    AND cr.recovery_target = rd.appellant_type
  ORDER BY cr.id DESC
  LIMIT 1
) cr ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN behavior_actions rel
  ON rel.action_type = 'release'
 AND rel.target_entity = rd.appellant_type
 AND rel.detail->>'recovery_id' = cr.id::text
WHERE rd.status = 'approved'
  AND COALESCE(rd.reviewed_at, rd.created_at) >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND (cr.id IS NULL OR cr.status <> 'waived' OR rel.id IS NULL OR rel.status <> 'success')
ORDER BY COALESCE(rd.reviewed_at, rd.created_at) DESC;

-- P1-F05-4: blocking recovery 没有成功 block action，特别关注 disputed 且 due_at 已过。
SELECT
  cr.id AS recovery_id,
  cr.claim_id,
  cr.order_id,
  cr.recovery_target,
  cr.status AS recovery_status,
  cr.due_at,
  ba.id AS block_action_id,
  ba.status AS block_action_status
FROM claim_recoveries cr
LEFT JOIN behavior_actions ba
  ON ba.action_type = 'block'
 AND ba.target_entity = cr.recovery_target
 AND ba.detail->>'recovery_id' = cr.id::text
 AND ba.status = 'success'
WHERE cr.created_at >= now() - interval '60 days'
  AND (
    cr.status = 'overdue'
    OR (cr.status = 'disputed' AND cr.due_at <= now())
  )
  AND ba.id IS NULL
ORDER BY cr.due_at ASC;

-- P1-F05-5: claim recovery reason 的暂停已存在，但当前没有 blocking recovery，确认 release/repair 漂移。
SELECT
  'merchant' AS entity_type,
  mp.merchant_id AS entity_id,
  mp.takeout_suspend_reason AS suspend_reason,
  mp.takeout_suspended_at AS suspended_at,
  mp.takeout_suspend_until AS suspend_until
FROM merchant_profiles mp
WHERE mp.is_takeout_suspended = true
  AND mp.takeout_suspend_reason LIKE 'claim recovery overdue:%'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM claim_recoveries cr
    JOIN orders o ON o.id = cr.order_id
    WHERE o.merchant_id = mp.merchant_id
      AND cr.recovery_target = 'merchant'
      AND (cr.status = 'overdue' OR (cr.status = 'disputed' AND cr.due_at <= now()))
  )
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'rider' AS entity_type,
  rp.rider_id AS entity_id,
  rp.suspend_reason,
  rp.suspended_at,
  rp.suspend_until
FROM rider_profiles rp
WHERE rp.is_suspended = true
  AND rp.suspend_reason LIKE 'claim recovery overdue:%'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM claim_recoveries cr
    JOIN deliveries d ON d.order_id = cr.order_id
    WHERE d.rider_id = rp.rider_id
      AND cr.recovery_target = 'rider'
      AND (cr.status = 'overdue' OR (cr.status = 'disputed' AND cr.due_at <= now()))
  )
ORDER BY suspended_at DESC NULLS LAST;

-- P1-F05-6: release action 已成功，但 recovery 仍不是 paid/waived，确认提前释放/closed event 漂移。
SELECT
  ba.id AS release_action_id,
  ba.status AS action_status,
  ba.created_at AS action_created_at,
  ba.executed_at,
  cr.id AS recovery_id,
  cr.claim_id,
  cr.recovery_target,
  cr.status AS recovery_status,
  cr.due_at
FROM behavior_actions ba
JOIN claim_recoveries cr ON cr.id::text = ba.detail->>'recovery_id'
WHERE ba.action_type = 'release'
  AND ba.status = 'success'
  AND ba.created_at >= now() - interval '60 days'
  AND cr.status NOT IN ('paid', 'waived')
ORDER BY ba.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F05-7: recovery/open action 已成功，但 recovery 当前不再 pending/overdue。
SELECT
  ba.id AS recovery_action_id,
  ba.status AS action_status,
  ba.created_at AS action_created_at,
  ba.executed_at,
  cr.id AS recovery_id,
  cr.claim_id,
  cr.recovery_target,
  cr.status AS recovery_status,
  cr.due_at
FROM behavior_actions ba
JOIN claim_recoveries cr ON cr.id::text = ba.detail->>'recovery_id'
WHERE ba.action_type = 'recovery'
  AND ba.status = 'success'
  AND ba.created_at >= now() - interval '60 days'
  AND cr.status NOT IN ('pending', 'overdue')
ORDER BY ba.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F05-8: claim_recovery_events 同一 recovery/event_type 重复。
SELECT
  recovery_id,
  event_type,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count,
  ARRAY_AGG(id ORDER BY created_at, id) AS event_ids,
  MIN(created_at) AS first_created_at,
  MAX(created_at) AS last_created_at
FROM claim_recovery_events
GROUP BY recovery_id, event_type
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY event_count DESC, last_created_at DESC;

-- P1-F05-9: 普通 claim behavior action 卡在 running，当前 recovery scheduler 不会扫描。
SELECT
  id AS behavior_action_id,
  action_type,
  target_entity,
  status,
  created_at,
  executed_at,
  detail->>'claim_id' AS claim_id,
  detail->>'recovery_id' AS recovery_id,
  detail->>'last_error' AS last_error
FROM behavior_actions
WHERE status = 'running'
  AND action_type IN ('block','recovery','release','notify')
  AND created_at < now() - interval '15 minutes'
ORDER BY created_at ASC;

-- P1-F05-10: action success 但 detail 仍带 last_error，筛查宽写/重试后终态污染。
SELECT
  id AS behavior_action_id,
  action_type,
  target_entity,
  status,
  created_at,
  executed_at,
  detail->>'claim_id' AS claim_id,
  detail->>'recovery_id' AS recovery_id,
  detail->>'last_error' AS last_error
FROM behavior_actions
WHERE status = 'success'
  AND action_type IN ('block','recovery','release','notify')
  AND COALESCE(detail->>'last_error', '') <> ''
ORDER BY COALESCE(executed_at, created_at) DESC;

-- P1-F05-11: recovery dispute result 通知缺失，效果已处理但用户/责任方可能未收到。
SELECT
  rd.id AS recovery_dispute_id,
  rd.claim_id,
  rd.appellant_type,
  rd.appellant_id,
  rd.status,
  rd.reviewed_at,
  COUNT(n.id) AS notification_count
FROM recovery_disputes rd
LEFT JOIN notifications n
  ON n.related_type = 'recovery_dispute'
 AND n.related_id = rd.id
 AND n.type = 'recovery_dispute'
WHERE rd.status IN ('approved','rejected')
  AND COALESCE(rd.reviewed_at, rd.created_at) >= now() - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY rd.id, rd.claim_id, rd.appellant_type, rd.appellant_id, rd.status, rd.reviewed_at
HAVING COUNT(n.id) = 0
ORDER BY rd.reviewed_at DESC NULLS LAST;

-- P1-F05-12: 同一用户多次 recovery dispute 恶意索赔处罚，确认 result 重放/过期后重复处罚。
SELECT
  entity_id AS user_id,
  reason_code,
  COUNT(*) AS block_count,
  ARRAY_AGG(id ORDER BY created_at) AS blocklist_ids,
  MIN(created_at) AS first_blocked_at,
  MAX(created_at) AS last_blocked_at
FROM behavior_blocklist
WHERE entity_type = 'user'
  AND reason_code IN ('malicious-claim', 'malicious-claims')
GROUP BY entity_id, reason_code
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY block_count DESC, last_blocked_at DESC;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - claim 创建：搜索 `create claim with decision`、`ErrOrderAlreadyHasClaim`、`user_claim_submitted`；资格漂移主要靠 SQL，事务内没有独立日志。
  - recovery dispute submit/review：搜索 `recovery dispute was created but automatic resolution did not fully complete`、`failed to enqueue automatic recovery dispute resolution retry task`、`failed to reload persisted recovery dispute after automatic resolution error`、`create recovery dispute`、`mark claim recovery disputed`、`review recovery dispute`、`waive claim recovery after approved recovery dispute`、`resume claim recovery after rejected recovery dispute`。
  - overdue/block/release：搜索 `claim behavior action recovery scheduler started`、`re-enqueue claim behavior action failed`、`failed to execute claim behavior action`、`mark behavior action running`、`suspend merchant for claim recovery`、`suspend rider for claim recovery`、`release claim recovery suspension`、`write claim recovery closed event`。
  - result effects：搜索 `processing recovery dispute result`、`execute claim recovery release action for recovery dispute`、`approved recovery dispute result missing release action id`、`resume claim recovery after rejected recovery dispute`、`failed to create recovery dispute claimant warning`、`failed to increment recovery dispute claimant warning`。
  - 通知：搜索 `failed to send appellant notification`、`failed to send claimant notification`、`recovery dispute result processed successfully`；若效果成功但通知失败，当前 task 仍会成功结束。
  - 资金交叉：搜索 `claim recovery payment succeeded but recovery status is no longer payable`、`execute recovery dispute compensation action`，命中后跳回 `P0-F10` 做 payout/payment_order 闭口。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - claim 创建资格漂移：API 层完成订单校验后暂停，另一事务把订单取消/替换/改用户或金额，再放行 `CreateClaimWithBehaviorTx`；断言当前仍可能创建 claim/decision/recovery action。
  - dispute submit 状态漂移：外层 `GetClaimRecoveryContextByClaimIDAndTarget` 读到 pending/overdue 后，让 recovery 变 paid/waived，再执行 `CreateRecoveryDisputeWithRecoveryTx`；断言事务 rollback/错误映射。另构造缺 recovery 数据，验证 dispute 是否会保留。
  - approved dispute 与 recovery 分叉：创建 submitted dispute 后让 recovery 先变 pending/overdue/paid/waived，再 review approved；断言 dispute approved、recovery 未 waived、release action 缺失或 result task 报 missing release。
  - disputed overdue 不建 block：把 recovery 标 disputed 且 due_at 早于 now，运行 overdue scanner；断言 `ListDueClaimRecoveries` 不捞它，release helper 仍把它当 blocking。
  - block 覆盖其它暂停：先给商户/骑手设置食安/资质/运营暂停 reason，再执行 claim recovery block action；断言 reason 被覆盖为 claim recovery。
  - release 清其它暂停：claim recovery 无 blocking 后，先把同一商户/骑手设置其它 reason 暂停，再执行 release action；断言 `Unsuspend*` 清空非本 recovery 暂停。
  - action running 洞：worker 把 action CAS 到 running 后进程崩溃，运行 ordinary `ClaimBehaviorActionRecoveryScheduler`；断言 created/failed 会重入队，running 不会。
  - terminal 宽写：一个 worker 成功执行 action 后，另一个后到失败/重置路径调用 `UpdateBehaviorActionExecution`；断言 status/detail 可被按 id 覆盖。
  - release/open terminal gate：对 pending/overdue/disputed/paid/waived recovery 分别执行 release/open action；断言当前只校验 id/target/amount/due_at，不校验“是否仍应释放/是否仍 payable”。
  - events 幂等：并发两个 release action 或 result replay 同时进入 `WriteClaimRecoveryClosedEventIfAbsent`；断言同一 recovery 可出现重复 closed event。
  - result replay 处罚：approved dispute result 成功处罚后，把 active block 过期或置非 active，再重放 result task；断言可再次创建 blocklist/递增 warning。
  - result 通知失败：效果执行成功后让 notification distributor 失败；断言 task 仍返回成功，后续不会自动补发 appellant/claimant 通知。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 `P1-F05-1` 命中，应把 claim eligibility 下沉到最终事务：按 order id 锁行并复核 status/user/replaced/amount，失败返回 409/业务冲突；必要时把 decision fact snapshot 标记为 stale。
  - 若 `P1-F05-2/3` 命中，应把 recovery dispute submit/review 与 recovery expected-state 绑定：submit 只允许当前 pending/overdue 且归属一致；approved 只允许 disputed recovery 被同事务 waived 并创建 release action，否则业务冲突或进入人工修复队列。
  - 若 `P1-F05-4/5` 命中，需要明确 claim recovery 的 blocked/suspended 模型：disputed overdue 要么由 scanner 建 block action，要么不应在 release gate 中视为 blocking；两者口径必须统一。
  - 若 `P1-F05-5/6` 命中，应用 owner/reason guard：block 使用 `Claim*SuspensionIfAvailable` 或多来源 suspension ledger；release 使用 `Release*SuspensionIfOwned` 或按 suspension owner 引用释放。
  - 若 `P1-F05-6/7/8/9/10` 命中，应把 behavior action 改成 lease/attempt 模型：running 有超时恢复，terminal 写入带 expected current status，事件表增加 `(recovery_id,event_type)` 唯一或 outbox 幂等键。
  - 若 `P1-F05-11/12` 命中，应给 dispute result effects 增加 `processed_at`/effect ledger/notification outbox。处罚、release、compensation、通知都应按 `recovery_dispute_id + effect_type + recipient` 幂等，而不是靠当前 active blocklist 或 best-effort log 收敛。
  - 任何涉及 compensation/payout 的命中先跳回 `P0-F10`，不要在本族直接修资金状态；本族只负责 dispute/action 状态与资金动作的触发边界。

#### P1-F06. 入驻审核、资质治理、运营商/员工/登录权限状态

- 原始编号：`21/45/46a/46b/90-95/217-218/225-227/389/394/396/405/409/NP-257-NP-265/NP-319/NP-320/NP-335/NP-348/NP-349/NP-354/NP-356`。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed` for 部分状态链；`N/NP` for 多个已守住的查询/主状态路径。核心风险是审批/restore/credential/suspension/role 状态分段和区域/邀请码/登录 CAS 输掉方。
- 证据闭口：`90-95/NP-257-NP-262` 是 review run 与 summary/credential/通知分段；`225-227/389/405` 是资质过期/恢复/押金门槛批量同步；`45` 是运营商区域独占缺 DB 级约束；`46a/46b` 是邀请码撤销短窗和 Web 登录 CAS 错误映射。
- 生产验证：查 queued/processing review run 超阈值、approved application 缺 summary/ledger、restore 后仍 suspended、同区域多个 active operator、旧邀请码撤销后绑定、web_login 500 日志。
- 最小复现/测试：review tx 成功后 run complete 失败；credential restore 通知失败重试；运营商同区并发审批；login confirm/consume 并发。
- 修复类型：review run 单调版本；credential repair scanner；operator region unique/serializable lock；token consume/revoke 在最终事务复核；CAS no-row 映射为业务冲突。
- 下一步：运营商区域独占和 Web 登录 500 可作为低成本确认修复候选。

##### P1-F06 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：本族只闭口入驻自动审核 run、application review summary、credential ledger/资质过期暂停与恢复、运营商区域审批、merchant_staff/员工邀请码、App 绑定码、Web 扫码登录会话。宝付开户/报备归 `P1-F08`，菜单/营业/下单快照归 `P1-F07`，资金动作回 `P0` 风险族。
- 已有保护/非问题：
  - `onboarding_review_runs` 主状态不是裸写：`MarkOnboardingReviewRunProcessing` 只允许 `queued`，`CompleteOnboardingReviewRun` 和 `CancelOnboardingReviewRun` 只允许 `queued/processing`，终态不会被这些主写反复覆盖。
  - 商户审核通过主事务有保护：`ApproveMerchantApplicationTx` 把 application approved、merchant 创建/更新、subject profile、system labels、merchant_staff owner、user role 放在同一 DB tx。旧候选需收窄为“review run/summary/credential/restore 后置分段”，不是“商户 approved 主状态本身分段裸写”。
  - 商户 approved 后存在 repair 面：已有 `repairApprovedMerchantApplication`，worker 对已 completed 的 merchant run 不直接跳过，能在部分已批准但后置 run/credential/restore 缺失时补写。剩余问题是 repair 依赖 existing run/context，不覆盖所有失败窗口。
  - 骑手审核通过在 credential governance service 正常启用时保护较强：`ApproveRiderApplicationWithReviewTx` 在同一 DB tx 内完成 review run、application approved、review_summary、credential ledger activation。旧账中“骑手通过一定分段”的判断需要收窄到 nil service/配置降级和 rejected 路径。
  - active credential ledger 有 DB 级唯一保护：`idx_credential_ledgers_unique_active_merchant_document` 和 `idx_credential_ledgers_unique_active_rider_document` 限制同一主体/证照类型只有一个 active ledger；activation tx 会先 deactivate old active，再 create new active。
  - credential restore 使用 owner guard：`RestoreMerchantCredentialGovernanceTx`/`RestoreRiderCredentialGovernanceTx` 调用 `ReleaseMerchantTakeoutSuspensionIfOwned`/`ReleaseRiderSuspensionIfOwned`，release 与 active ledger `resumed_at` 标记在同一 tx；它不会清掉食安、追偿、运营等其它 reason 暂停。
  - 运营商审批存在事务形态：当前 SQLStore 路径下，`ApproveOperatorApplicationTx` 把 operator application approved、operator 创建、初始 operator_region、operator user role 放在同一 tx；`ApproveOperatorRegionApplicationTx` 把区域扩展申请 approved 与 `AddOperatorRegion` 放在同一 tx。
  - `operator_region_applications` 有 `(operator_id, region_id)` 唯一约束，可挡同一运营商重复申请同一区域；但它不挡不同运营商申请/审批同一区域。
  - merchant_staff 关系有 `(merchant_id,user_id)` 唯一约束；`AddMerchantStaffTx` 会 `FOR UPDATE` 锁已有员工行，disabled 才允许重新激活，active/pending 都返回冲突；`AssignMerchantStaffRoleTx`/`RemoveMerchantStaffTx` 会锁 staff 行并禁止 owner mutation。
  - 商户员工邀请码生成/轮换不是完全无约束：`merchants_active_bind_code_uidx` 限制 active bind_code 唯一，`CreateMerchantBindCodeWhenInactive` 只在当前无有效码时生成，轮换/碰撞有 unique retry。剩余问题是 bind 消费时没有在最终事务内复核“这个码仍是当前有效码”。
  - App 绑定码主路径已被 Redis 脚本保护：生成复用、code/user index 双写、消费删除、session 创建失败后的 restore 都由 Lua 脚本约束；verify 还会二次校验用户仍有对应 merchant role。当前没有把 App 绑定码升为确认 bug，残余只保留为 Redis/role 变更后的通用登录会话边界。
  - Web 登录会话 SQL 有 CAS：`ConfirmWebLoginSession` 只允许 `pending`，`ConsumeWebLoginSession` 只允许 `confirmed`。本族问题不是“双确认/双消费必然成功”，而是 CAS 输掉方的 no-row 没有被 handler 重新映射为业务冲突/已使用/未确认。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - application `review_summary` 与 review run 终态分离，`UpdateMerchantApplicationReviewSummary`/`UpdateRiderApplicationReviewSummary` 只按 application id 宽写，没有 `run_id` 单调 guard。旧 run summary 后到可以覆盖新 run summary。
  - 商户审核通过路径仍是 application/merchant 主事务先提交，再完成或修复 review run、summary、credential activation、restore 通知。repair 存在但不是一个全局 recovery scanner；如果没有 existingRunID、worker 不再触发、或 repair 中途失败，approved application 可能长期缺 summary/credential/restore 投影。
  - 骑手 rejected 路径会先 `ReturnRiderApplicationToDraft`，再完成/记录 review run 和 summary；如果 run complete/summary 失败，重试时 application 已不是 submitted，可能留下 draft application + queued/processing run。
  - rider submit 只允许 draft；若提交后 queued run 入队失败且 fallback sync 也失败，当前只看到 `ListQueuedOnboardingReviewRuns` SQL/mock/test 引用，未见生产 scheduler 补扫或 submitted retry 复用 active run。
  - 骑手 approved 的 nil credential governance 分支会只 `ApproveRiderApplicationTx`，没有 review run/summary/credential ledger。生产默认 wiring 应该非 nil，因此标为配置/降级风险，不按主链必现处理。
  - credential expired scanner 先批量读取 active expired ledger，再逐条 claim suspension/mark ledger；处理单条时不重新读取或锁定 ledger。若扫描读到旧 ledger 后，用户复审激活新 ledger 并 restore，再让旧扫描继续，旧 inactive ledger 仍可能 claim `document_expired` 暂停并 `MarkCredentialLedgerSuspended`。
  - `MarkCredentialLedgerSuspended` 只按 ledger id 更新，不要求 `active=true`、`deactivated_at IS NULL`、`resumed_at IS NULL`；这是 stale ledger 后到暂停的核心持久化缺口。
  - credential reminder 先发送通知再 `MarkCredentialLedgerReminderSent`，mark 失败会重复提醒；expired suspension 是 claim suspension -> mark ledger suspended -> notification 分段，通知失败只记录日志，restore 通知也可能因第一次 release 后重试时 `RestoreReleased=false` 而不再补发。
  - 运营商区域独占仍只在 API 层事务外 precheck：`approveOperatorApplicationAdmin` 和 `approveRegionApplicationAdmin` 都先 `GetActiveOperatorByRegion`，再进入 tx；`operator_regions` 只有 `(operator_id, region_id)` 唯一，没有 active `region_id` 独占约束。并发审批不同 operator 的同一区域时可产生多个 active operator，`GetActiveOperatorByRegion LIMIT 1` 后续会非确定。
  - operator admin 仍保留非事务 fallback：如果 store 不实现 `operatorApprovalTxStore`，会走 application approved -> CreateOperator -> AddOperatorRegion -> user role 的分段路径。当前 SQLStore 有 tx，fallback 主要是测试/替代 store/未来 wiring 风险。
  - 员工邀请码绑定存在短窗：`bindMerchant` 先 `GetMerchantByBindCode` 读到商户，再单独检查过期，最后进入 `AddMerchantStaffTx`；事务内没有锁 merchant 或复核 `bind_code` 仍等于请求码、仍未过期、仍未被 rotate/revoke。旧码在撤销/轮换后极短窗口内仍可能绑定成功。
  - Web 登录 confirm/consume 先读状态再 CAS 更新；并发输掉方会收到 `ErrRecordNotFound`/no rows，但 handler 直接 `internalError`，没有重读当前状态并映射为 409/400。因此 `46b` 是错误映射确认问题，不是 SQL CAS 缺失。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed`，但拆成三类：`N/NP` 为已有 SQL guard/tx/unique/Redis script 守住的主路径；`C0` 为 review summary 单调性、credential stale suspension、operator region 独占、员工邀请码 revoke/rotate 短窗、Web login CAS no-row 映射；`C2/config` 为 rider credential governance nil 分支和 operator fallback store 分支。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下为只读模板，默认先看近 30-90 天；JSON 字段依赖现有 `review_summary.run_id` 和通知 `extra_data.credential_ledger_id/source`。

```sql
-- P1-F06-1: 最新 completed review run 与 application review_summary.run_id 不一致。
SELECT *
FROM (
  SELECT
    'merchant' AS application_type,
    ma.id AS application_id,
    ma.status AS application_status,
    ma.review_summary->>'run_id' AS summary_run_id,
    r.id::text AS latest_completed_run_id,
    r.outcome,
    r.finished_at,
    r.created_at AS run_created_at
  FROM merchant_applications ma
  JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT *
    FROM onboarding_review_runs r
    WHERE r.application_type = 'merchant'
      AND r.merchant_application_id = ma.id
      AND r.run_status = 'completed'
    ORDER BY r.finished_at DESC NULLS LAST, r.id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) r ON TRUE
  WHERE COALESCE(r.finished_at, r.created_at) >= now() - interval '90 days'
    AND (ma.review_summary->>'run_id') IS DISTINCT FROM r.id::text
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'rider' AS application_type,
    ra.id AS application_id,
    ra.status AS application_status,
    ra.review_summary->>'run_id' AS summary_run_id,
    r.id::text AS latest_completed_run_id,
    r.outcome,
    r.finished_at,
    r.created_at AS run_created_at
  FROM rider_applications ra
  JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT *
    FROM onboarding_review_runs r
    WHERE r.application_type = 'rider'
      AND r.rider_application_id = ra.id
      AND r.run_status = 'completed'
    ORDER BY r.finished_at DESC NULLS LAST, r.id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) r ON TRUE
  WHERE COALESCE(r.finished_at, r.created_at) >= now() - interval '90 days'
    AND (ra.review_summary->>'run_id') IS DISTINCT FROM r.id::text
) drift
ORDER BY run_created_at DESC;

-- P1-F06-2: queued/processing onboarding review run 超阈值。
SELECT
  id,
  application_type,
  merchant_application_id,
  rider_application_id,
  run_status,
  stage,
  queued_at,
  started_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM onboarding_review_runs
WHERE run_status IN ('queued', 'processing')
  AND COALESCE(started_at, queued_at, created_at) < now() - interval '15 minutes'
ORDER BY COALESCE(started_at, queued_at, created_at) ASC;

-- P1-F06-3: approved 商户申请缺 active credential ledger。
SELECT
  ma.id AS merchant_application_id,
  ma.user_id,
  ma.status,
  ma.reviewed_at,
  ma.review_summary->>'run_id' AS summary_run_id,
  COUNT(cl.id) FILTER (WHERE cl.active = true) AS active_credential_count
FROM merchant_applications ma
LEFT JOIN credential_ledgers cl
  ON cl.subject_type = 'merchant'
 AND cl.merchant_application_id = ma.id
WHERE ma.status = 'approved'
  AND COALESCE(ma.reviewed_at, ma.updated_at, ma.created_at) >= now() - interval '90 days'
GROUP BY ma.id, ma.user_id, ma.status, ma.reviewed_at, ma.review_summary
HAVING COUNT(cl.id) FILTER (WHERE cl.active = true) = 0
ORDER BY ma.reviewed_at DESC NULLS LAST;

-- P1-F06-4: approved 骑手申请缺 completed approved run 或 active health_cert ledger。
SELECT
  ra.id AS rider_application_id,
  ra.user_id,
  ra.status,
  ra.reviewed_at,
  ra.review_summary->>'run_id' AS summary_run_id,
  COUNT(r.id) FILTER (WHERE r.run_status = 'completed' AND r.outcome = 'approved') AS approved_run_count,
  COUNT(cl.id) FILTER (WHERE cl.active = true AND cl.document_type = 'health_cert') AS active_health_cert_count
FROM rider_applications ra
LEFT JOIN onboarding_review_runs r
  ON r.application_type = 'rider'
 AND r.rider_application_id = ra.id
LEFT JOIN credential_ledgers cl
  ON cl.subject_type = 'rider'
 AND cl.rider_application_id = ra.id
WHERE ra.status = 'approved'
  AND COALESCE(ra.reviewed_at, ra.updated_at, ra.created_at) >= now() - interval '90 days'
GROUP BY ra.id, ra.user_id, ra.status, ra.reviewed_at, ra.review_summary
HAVING COUNT(r.id) FILTER (WHERE r.run_status = 'completed' AND r.outcome = 'approved') = 0
    OR COUNT(cl.id) FILTER (WHERE cl.active = true AND cl.document_type = 'health_cert') = 0
ORDER BY ra.reviewed_at DESC NULLS LAST;

-- P1-F06-5: rider 已回 draft/rejected，但仍有 active review run。
SELECT
  ra.id AS rider_application_id,
  ra.user_id,
  ra.status AS application_status,
  ra.reject_reason,
  r.id AS run_id,
  r.run_status,
  r.stage,
  r.queued_at,
  r.started_at,
  r.created_at AS run_created_at
FROM rider_applications ra
JOIN onboarding_review_runs r
  ON r.application_type = 'rider'
 AND r.rider_application_id = ra.id
WHERE ra.status IN ('draft', 'rejected')
  AND r.run_status IN ('queued', 'processing')
  AND COALESCE(r.started_at, r.queued_at, r.created_at) < now() - interval '15 minutes'
ORDER BY COALESCE(r.started_at, r.queued_at, r.created_at) ASC;

-- P1-F06-6: document_expired 暂停仍在，但当前没有 active expired credential，确认 stale suspension/restore 漂移。
SELECT
  'merchant' AS subject_type,
  mp.merchant_id AS subject_id,
  mp.takeout_suspend_reason AS suspend_reason,
  mp.takeout_suspended_at AS suspended_at,
  COUNT(cl.id) FILTER (WHERE cl.active = true AND cl.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND cl.expires_at <= now()) AS active_expired_count
FROM merchant_profiles mp
LEFT JOIN credential_ledgers cl
  ON cl.subject_type = 'merchant'
 AND cl.merchant_id = mp.merchant_id
WHERE mp.is_takeout_suspended = true
  AND mp.takeout_suspend_reason = 'document_expired'
GROUP BY mp.merchant_id, mp.takeout_suspend_reason, mp.takeout_suspended_at
HAVING COUNT(cl.id) FILTER (WHERE cl.active = true AND cl.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND cl.expires_at <= now()) = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'rider' AS subject_type,
  rp.rider_id AS subject_id,
  rp.suspend_reason,
  rp.suspended_at,
  COUNT(cl.id) FILTER (WHERE cl.active = true AND cl.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND cl.expires_at <= now()) AS active_expired_count
FROM rider_profiles rp
LEFT JOIN credential_ledgers cl
  ON cl.subject_type = 'rider'
 AND cl.rider_id = rp.rider_id
WHERE rp.is_suspended = true
  AND rp.suspend_reason = 'document_expired'
GROUP BY rp.rider_id, rp.suspend_reason, rp.suspended_at
HAVING COUNT(cl.id) FILTER (WHERE cl.active = true AND cl.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND cl.expires_at <= now()) = 0
ORDER BY suspended_at DESC NULLS LAST;

-- P1-F06-7: inactive/deactivated ledger 被后到标记 suspended。
SELECT
  id AS credential_ledger_id,
  subject_type,
  merchant_id,
  rider_id,
  document_type,
  active,
  expires_at,
  deactivated_at,
  suspended_at,
  resumed_at,
  suspension_reason_code,
  updated_at
FROM credential_ledgers
WHERE active = false
  AND suspended_at IS NOT NULL
  AND (deactivated_at IS NULL OR suspended_at >= deactivated_at OR resumed_at IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY suspended_at DESC;

-- P1-F06-8: 同一 credential ledger/source 重复通知。
SELECT
  extra_data->>'credential_ledger_id' AS credential_ledger_id,
  extra_data->>'source' AS source,
  COUNT(*) AS notification_count,
  ARRAY_AGG(id ORDER BY created_at, id) AS notification_ids,
  MIN(created_at) AS first_created_at,
  MAX(created_at) AS last_created_at
FROM notifications
WHERE extra_data ? 'credential_ledger_id'
GROUP BY extra_data->>'credential_ledger_id', extra_data->>'source'
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY notification_count DESC, last_created_at DESC;

-- P1-F06-9: 同一区域多个 active operator。
SELECT
  or_t.region_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT or_t.operator_id) AS active_operator_count,
  ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT or_t.operator_id ORDER BY or_t.operator_id) AS operator_ids
FROM operator_regions or_t
JOIN operators o ON o.id = or_t.operator_id
WHERE or_t.status = 'active'
  AND o.status = 'active'
GROUP BY or_t.region_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT or_t.operator_id) > 1
ORDER BY active_operator_count DESC, or_t.region_id;

-- P1-F06-10: approved operator application 缺 operator / initial region / user role。
SELECT
  oa.id AS operator_application_id,
  oa.user_id,
  oa.region_id,
  oa.reviewed_at,
  o.id AS operator_id,
  or_t.id AS operator_region_id,
  ur.id AS user_role_id,
  ur.status AS user_role_status
FROM operator_applications oa
LEFT JOIN operators o
  ON o.user_id = oa.user_id
 AND o.status = 'active'
LEFT JOIN operator_regions or_t
  ON or_t.operator_id = o.id
 AND or_t.region_id = oa.region_id
 AND or_t.status = 'active'
LEFT JOIN user_roles ur
  ON ur.user_id = oa.user_id
 AND ur.role = 'operator'
 AND ur.status = 'active'
WHERE oa.status = 'approved'
  AND COALESCE(oa.reviewed_at, oa.updated_at, oa.created_at) >= now() - interval '90 days'
  AND (o.id IS NULL OR or_t.id IS NULL OR ur.id IS NULL)
ORDER BY oa.reviewed_at DESC NULLS LAST;

-- P1-F06-11: approved operator region application 缺 active operator_region。
SELECT
  ora.id AS operator_region_application_id,
  ora.operator_id,
  ora.region_id,
  ora.updated_at,
  or_t.id AS operator_region_id,
  or_t.status AS operator_region_status
FROM operator_region_applications ora
LEFT JOIN operator_regions or_t
  ON or_t.operator_id = ora.operator_id
 AND or_t.region_id = ora.region_id
 AND or_t.status = 'active'
WHERE ora.status = 'approved'
  AND COALESCE(ora.updated_at, ora.created_at) >= now() - interval '90 days'
  AND or_t.id IS NULL
ORDER BY COALESCE(ora.updated_at, ora.created_at) DESC;

-- P1-F06-12: 员工邀请码绑定弱信号；现表没有保存 used invite code，只能筛当前码为空/过期后仍出现 pending 绑定的样本再回查 API 日志。
SELECT
  ms.id AS merchant_staff_id,
  ms.merchant_id,
  ms.user_id,
  ms.role,
  ms.status,
  ms.created_at AS staff_created_at,
  m.bind_code,
  m.bind_code_expires_at,
  m.updated_at AS merchant_updated_at
FROM merchant_staff ms
JOIN merchants m ON m.id = ms.merchant_id
WHERE ms.role = 'pending'
  AND ms.status = 'active'
  AND ms.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND (
    m.bind_code IS NULL
    OR m.bind_code = ''
    OR m.bind_code_expires_at IS NULL
    OR m.bind_code_expires_at <= ms.created_at
  )
ORDER BY ms.created_at DESC;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - onboarding review：搜索 `process merchant onboarding review`、`persist merchant onboarding review run`、`activate merchant credentials`、`restore merchant credential governance`、`process rider onboarding review`、`approve rider application with review tx`、`persist rider onboarding review run`。
  - credential scheduler：搜索 `failed to list expiring credentials for reminder window`、`failed to send credential reminder notification`、`failed to mark credential reminder sent`、`failed to list expired active credential ledgers`、`failed to claim merchant credential suspension`、`failed to claim rider credential suspension`、`skip credential expiry suspension because suspension slot is owned by another flow`、`failed to mark credential ledger suspended`、`failed to send expired credential suspension notification`。
  - credential restore 通知：搜索 `distribute merchant credential restore notification`、`distribute rider credential restore notification`；若首次 release 成功但通知入队失败，重试时可能不再补发。
  - operator：搜索 `approve operator application`、`add initial operator region`、`approve operator region application`、`add operator region`，并结合 API 409/500 统计看同区并发审批。
  - staff invite/app bind：搜索 `invite code revoked`、`failed to generate distinct invite code`、`app bind code generated`、`app bind code verify rejected`、`app bind code verified, session created`、`restore app bind code after session creation failure failed`。
  - Web login：按接口日志/API 500 搜索 `ConfirmWebLoginSession`、`ConsumeWebLoginSession`、`ExpireWebLoginSession`、`ErrRecordNotFound`、`no rows in result set`；SQL 本身只能看到状态，无法证明 CAS 输掉方被映射成 500。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - summary 单调性：创建两个同一 application 的 review run，让新 run 先完成并写 summary，再让旧 run 后完成或仅后写 summary；断言当前按 id 宽写会覆盖 summary。
  - 商户 approved 后置分段：让 `ApproveMerchantApplicationTx` 成功后，注入 `CompleteOnboardingReviewRun`/summary/credential activation/restore 任一失败；断言 approved application 与 merchant 已存在，但 run/summary/ledger/restore 不完整，再验证 repair 是否覆盖该失败形态。
  - rider rejected 分段：`ReturnRiderApplicationToDraft` 成功后注入 review run complete 或 summary 失败；重试 worker，断言 application 已非 submitted，active run 可能遗留。
  - rider queued run 补偿：提交骑手申请后让入队/fallback sync 失败，运行当前 schedulers；断言是否有生产 scheduler 会捞 `ListQueuedOnboardingReviewRuns`。
  - credential stale suspension：expired scanner 读出旧 active ledger 后暂停；另一路复审激活新 ledger 并 restore；再让 scanner 继续处理旧 ledger，断言旧 ledger 能否 `MarkCredentialLedgerSuspended` 并重新 claim `document_expired` 暂停。
  - reminder/restore 通知：让 reminder 通知成功但 mark sent 失败，断言下一轮重复提醒；让 restore release 成功但通知入队失败，断言重试不补发或仅 best-effort log。
  - operator 同区并发：两条 submitted operator application 或 region application 指向同一区域，两个 admin 同时通过 API precheck 后分别进入 tx；断言 `operator_regions` 可出现多个 active operator。
  - operator fallback 分段：用不实现 `operatorApprovalTxStore` 的 store 或注入 fallback，令 application approved 后 `CreateOperator`/`AddOperatorRegion`/role 任一步失败；断言半状态。
  - 员工邀请码 revoke/rotate 短窗：`bindMerchant` 读到旧 code 对应 merchant 后暂停；另一路 revoke 或 rotate；再放行 `AddMerchantStaffTx`，断言当前仍可创建 pending staff。
  - App 绑定码：并发两次 verify 同一 code，断言只有一个 consume/session 成功；注入 session 创建失败，断言 restore 不覆盖新 user code 且 TTL<=0 时不恢复。
  - Web login confirm/consume：两个确认请求或两个消费请求同时读到旧状态，再竞争 CAS；断言输掉方当前走 500/internal，而不是 409 already used/conflict 或 400 expired/not confirmed。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 `P1-F06-1/2/3/4/5` 命中，应先做 review run 与 application summary 的单调版本：summary 写入带 `WHERE review_summary->>'run_id' IS NULL OR run_id < new_run_id`，并补 active run recovery scanner；merchant repair 要能从 approved application 反向补 summary/credential/restore。
  - 若 `P1-F06-6/7/8` 命中，应把 credential expired 处理改成 per-ledger claim/lock：标记 suspended 时复核 `active=true AND deactivated_at IS NULL AND resumed_at IS NULL`，并把 notification outbox 与 ledger mark/restore result 绑定到可重放 ledger。
  - 若 `P1-F06-9/10/11` 命中，应在 DB 层表达区域独占：例如 active `region_id` partial unique、或审批事务内锁 region/serializable guard；同时删除或隔离非事务 fallback。
  - 若 `P1-F06-12` 或 API 日志证明旧码绑定，应把邀请码 consume/revoke/rotate 下沉到最终事务：绑定 tx 锁 merchant 并复核 `bind_code=request_code AND bind_code_expires_at>now()`，必要时记录 `merchant_staff_invite_uses` ledger。
  - Web login 修复优先级低于区域独占和资质暂停，但成本低：CAS no-row 后重读 session，把 confirm/consume 输掉方映射为 already confirmed/consumed/conflict/expired/not confirmed，而不是 500。
  - App bind 当前先不修主状态机；只有当生产出现 restore 失败或 Redis script 异常导致有效 code 丢失，才单独加 bind-code usage ledger 或 session 创建前后 outbox。

#### P1-F07. 商户营业、菜单、库存、优惠、包装/定制和下单快照

- 原始编号：`390-393/400-403/407-413/NP-313-NP-315/NP-321/NP-326-NP-341/NP-344/NP-350/NP-353`。
- 当前判断：`C1-likely`。多为“事务外读取配置/商品/库存/优惠，订单事务内不绑定版本或复核”的运行态窗口；是否构成 bug 取决于产品对下单快照的容忍度。
- 证据闭口：`390-393` 是营业/商品/满减/配送费读后写；`408/411/413` 是代金券、包装、定制条款漂移；`410` 是管理端库存宽写可能覆盖扣减/预占；`400/401/402` 是默认地址、标签、评价图片等投影一致性。
- 生产验证：查订单创建时商品已下架/改价、优惠规则已停用但订单使用、库存 committed quantity 异常、包装/定制选项已删除但订单快照引用。
- 最小复现/测试：下单计算后并发停用商品/规则/包装；库存管理宽写与下单扣减并发；代金券删除与领取/下单并发。
- 修复类型：下单事务内版本校验；配置快照 version；库存管理 CAS；优惠/券使用 durable evaluation snapshot。
- 下一步：先按交易影响排序，商品/库存/价格高于地址/标签/评价图片。

##### P1-F07 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：本族只闭口商户营业/暂停、菜单商品/套餐、定制项、包装、商户满减、代金券、会员/余额资格、外卖地址/配送费、库存与低优先投影。预约席位/预占库存归 `P1-F01`，支付与资金归 `P0`，规则引擎发布版本归 `P3-F01`，云打印/通知归 `P2`。
- 已有保护/非问题：
  - 订单创建主入口不是完全裸写：`CreateOrder` 先做 `ValidateMerchantForOrder`、外卖暂停检查、桌台/预约/billing 校验、商品/套餐/定制/包装/地址/优惠/券/会员资格计算，再进入 `CreateOrderTx`；事务内有订单创建幂等绑定，重复请求会按 `operation_scope + actor_user_id + idempotency_key` 锁定并回放已绑定订单。
  - 预约押金模式的单 active order 已有事务级保护：`CreateOrderTx` 会锁 `table_reservations` 并检查 latest reservation order；不要把本族泛化成预约订单互斥缺失。
  - 代金券 claim/use 不是重复使用问题：`ClaimVoucherTx`/`UseVoucherTx` 与 `CreateOrderTx` 使用 `GetUserVoucherForUpdate`、`MarkUserVoucherAsUsed WHERE status='unused'`，并在使用时 `lockUsableVoucherTemplate` 复核模板未删除/启用/有效期；本族剩余问题是券金额、门槛、适用订单类型等“事务外快照参数”是否与锁后模板字段再比对，而不是同一 `user_voucher` 可被双花。
  - 余额支付主账本有行锁和事务流水：`CreateOrderTx` 锁 `merchant_memberships`，余额不足回滚，余额扣减和 membership transaction 在同一 tx。剩余问题是会员支付配置/资格在事务外读取，`BalancePaid` 可按旧资格进入 tx，不是余额并发错账。
  - 订单支付应用不是宽终态覆盖：`processOrderPaymentWithQueries` 先 `GetOrderForUpdate`，已 paid 直接幂等返回，非 pending 拒绝继续；库存扣减和 `UpdateOrderToPaid` 在同一 tx。
  - 日库存扣减主路径有保护：支付应用时按 dish_id 排序锁 `daily_inventory` 行，检查 `sold_quantity + reserved_quantity + quantity <= total_quantity`，再 `CheckAndDecrementInventory` 条件更新；不应把本族写成“下单支付必然超卖”。真正残留在管理端 `UpdateDailyInventory` 的读旧值校验和宽写。
  - 包装选项管理有事务保护默认项：`UpsertMerchantPackagingSettingsTx`、`UpdateMerchantPackagingOptionTx`、`SoftDeleteMerchantPackagingOptionTx` 会校验默认包装选项可用或清理默认项；`order_packaging_items` 是订单包装快照，历史订单引用已删除包装本身不一定是 bug。
  - 定制项 normalizer 会按当前 `dish_customization_groups/options` 重新解析用户选择，补齐 required 校验并累加当前 extra price；问题窗口是 normalizer 与最终 `CreateOrderTx` 之间缺版本/锁，不是“完全不校验定制项”。
  - 默认地址设置已有 `SetDefaultAddressTx`，先清当前用户默认地址再设置指定地址；创建默认地址也走 `CreateUserAddressTx`。该路径可能有短暂读一致性或缺 partial unique 的数据质量边界，但不是订单金额/履约主时序问题。
  - 商户标签整组替换已有 `SetMerchantTagsTx` 并锁 merchant；问题主要是 tag 当前 status/type 未在关联表层表达，以及清空再插在同 tx 内失败会回滚，不应升为主交易风险。
  - 评价更新图片已有 `UpdateReviewTx` 删除旧图再插新图；评价创建路径仍是 review 先创建再逐张 `AddReviewImage`，所以只保留创建分段风险，不把 update 分支误报。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - 商户营业/状态/外卖暂停是事务外检查：`ValidateMerchantForOrder` 和 `GetTakeoutSuspension` 在 `CreateOrderTx` 之前完成，事务内不锁 merchant/profile，也不复核 `status='active'`、`is_open=true`、`is_takeout_suspended=false`。商户关闭、暂停外卖或状态变更在校验后到达时，订单仍可按旧可售状态创建。
  - 商品/套餐可售性和价格是事务外快照：`CalculateOrderItems` 读取 `GetDish`/`GetComboSet`，校验 online/available/deleted/merchant ownership 并取当前 price；`CreateOrderTx` 只写 order_items snapshot，不重新读取或锁 `dishes`/`combo_sets`。下架、改价、删除、套餐子菜不可售后到时，订单可按旧价/旧可售性落库。
  - 定制项存在版本漂移：normalizer 当前会重新读定制组/选项并校验 required/option，但随后管理端 `SetDishCustomizationsTx` 可整体删除重建 groups/options；订单事务内只写 normalized JSON 和 extra price，不复核 group/option 仍存在、required 规则未变、extra_price 未变。
  - 包装选择/价格存在快照漂移：`resolveOrderCreatePackaging` 读取包装设置、购物车 selection version 和选项当前 enabled/price 后形成 `order_packaging_items`；最终事务内不锁 `merchant_packaging_settings/options`，也不复核 selected option 仍 enabled、price/required/applicable_order_types 未变。
  - 商户满减规则没有绑定 rule_id/version：`ResolveMerchantDiscount` 事务外读取 `ListActiveDiscountRules` 并只把 `discount_amount` 写到 order；订单表没有记录应用了哪些 `discount_rules`、规则版本、stacking group 或 rule snapshot。规则停用/改门槛/改金额后到时，订单可按旧规则成交，生产只能用当前规则做弱信号盘点。
  - 代金券模板只复核启用/有效期，不复核业务字段一致：`CreateOrderTx` 锁模板后未把当前 `amount/min_order_amount/allowed_order_types/merchant_id` 与事务外 `ValidateVoucher` 的结果再比对。若模板金额、门槛或适用订单类型在验证和 tx 之间变更，可能按旧抵扣金额和旧适用范围创建订单。
  - 配送费/地址快照有业务容忍边界：外卖地址、距离、配送费、配送费优惠在事务外计算，订单保存 delivery snapshot；如果用户/商户地址、区域配送配置、天气/暂停规则在计算后到达，订单按旧 quote 创建。若产品定义“提交瞬间 quote 可接受”，这是 C1；若要求支付/创建瞬间真值，则为真实问题。
  - 管理端库存更新存在 TOCTOU：`updateDailyInventory` 先 `GetDailyInventory` 读旧 `sold/reserved`，API 层校验新 total 不低于旧 sold+reserved，再 `UpdateDailyInventory` 宽写 total/sold；中间若支付扣减或预留增加，可能写出 `total_quantity < sold_quantity + reserved_quantity` 或把 sold 回写到旧值。订单扣减有保护，管理端改库存分支仍成立。
  - 地址默认缺 DB partial unique：`SetDefaultAddressTx` 是事务分段更新，正常 API 下最终应只有一个默认地址；但表层没有 `WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND is_default=true` 的唯一约束，脚本/旧数据/并发边界仍要盘点。对下单主链来说，订单已保存地址 snapshot，属于低优先数据质量而非 P1 交易金额问题。
  - 商户标签和 tag 状态/type 是投影一致性：`ListMerchantTags` 当前没有过滤 `t.status='active'` 或 `t.type='merchant'`，关联 inactive/wrong-type tag 会影响展示/搜索分类；这是 `C2/data-quality`，不是订单状态时序主问题。
  - 评价创建图片是分段写：`createReview` 先 `CreateReview`，再循环 `AddReviewImage`；任一图片插入失败会返回 500，但 review 已存在。由于 `reviews.order_id` 唯一，用户重试可能被“已评价”挡住并留下缺图评价；这是确认的低优先投影分段。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C1-likely`，但拆为四类：`C1/high` 为商户营业/商品/套餐/定制/包装/优惠/券/配送 quote 的“事务外真值与订单快照漂移”；`C0` 为管理端库存宽写和评价创建图片分段；`N/NP` 为券双花、支付库存扣减、余额并发错账、预约单 active 互斥、包装管理默认项事务保护；`C2/data-quality` 为默认地址、商户标签、历史快照引用当前已删除配置。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下为只读模板，默认先看近 30 天；涉及 current-state 的查询只能作为弱信号，因为订单本来保留交易快照，命中后要结合日志/用户投诉/产品规则判断是否真实违规。

```sql
-- P1-F07-1: 订单创建后商户当前已非 active/open 或外卖暂停；current-state 弱信号。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.merchant_id,
  o.order_type,
  o.status AS order_status,
  o.created_at AS order_created_at,
  m.status AS merchant_status,
  m.is_open,
  m.updated_at AS merchant_updated_at,
  mp.is_takeout_suspended,
  mp.takeout_suspended_at,
  mp.updated_at AS profile_updated_at
FROM orders o
JOIN merchants m ON m.id = o.merchant_id
LEFT JOIN merchant_profiles mp ON mp.merchant_id = o.merchant_id
WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND o.status <> 'cancelled'
  AND (
    m.status <> 'active'
    OR m.is_open IS DISTINCT FROM true
    OR (o.order_type = 'takeout' AND COALESCE(mp.is_takeout_suspended, false) = true)
  )
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F07-2: 菜品订单项与当前菜品可售性/价格不一致；历史快照允许存在，按投诉/变更时间二次确认。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.created_at AS order_created_at,
  oi.id AS order_item_id,
  oi.dish_id,
  oi.name AS item_name_snapshot,
  oi.unit_price AS item_unit_price_snapshot,
  d.name AS current_dish_name,
  d.price AS current_dish_price,
  d.is_online,
  d.is_available,
  d.deleted_at,
  d.updated_at AS dish_updated_at
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN dishes d ON d.id = oi.dish_id
WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND oi.dish_id IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    d.deleted_at IS NOT NULL
    OR d.is_online IS DISTINCT FROM true
    OR d.is_available IS DISTINCT FROM true
    OR d.price <> oi.unit_price
  )
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F07-3: 套餐订单项与当前套餐可售性/价格不一致；同样是 current-state 弱信号。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.created_at AS order_created_at,
  oi.id AS order_item_id,
  oi.combo_id,
  oi.name AS item_name_snapshot,
  oi.unit_price AS item_unit_price_snapshot,
  cs.name AS current_combo_name,
  cs.combo_price AS current_combo_price,
  cs.is_online,
  cs.deleted_at,
  cs.updated_at AS combo_updated_at
FROM order_items oi
JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN combo_sets cs ON cs.id = oi.combo_id
WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND oi.combo_id IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    cs.deleted_at IS NOT NULL
    OR cs.is_online IS DISTINCT FROM true
    OR cs.combo_price <> oi.unit_price
  )
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F07-4: 定制项 JSON 指向当前不存在的 group/option；依赖 normalizer 当前格式 {"<group_id>": option_id, "meta_specs": "..."}。
WITH customization_pairs AS (
  SELECT
    o.id AS order_id,
    o.order_no,
    o.created_at,
    oi.id AS order_item_id,
    oi.dish_id,
    kv.key AS group_id_text,
    kv.value AS option_id_json
  FROM orders o
  JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each(CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof(oi.customizations::jsonb) = 'object' THEN oi.customizations::jsonb ELSE '{}'::jsonb END) AS kv(key, value)
  WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND oi.dish_id IS NOT NULL
    AND oi.customizations IS NOT NULL
    AND jsonb_typeof(oi.customizations::jsonb) = 'object'
    AND kv.key <> 'meta_specs'
    AND kv.key ~ '^[0-9]+$'
    AND kv.value::text ~ '^"?[0-9]+"?$'
)
SELECT
  cp.*,
  dcg.id AS current_group_id,
  dcg.is_required,
  dco.id AS current_option_id,
  dco.extra_price AS current_extra_price
FROM customization_pairs cp
LEFT JOIN dish_customization_groups dcg
  ON dcg.id = cp.group_id_text::bigint
 AND dcg.dish_id = cp.dish_id
LEFT JOIN dish_customization_options dco
  ON dco.id = trim(both '"' FROM cp.option_id_json::text)::bigint
 AND dco.group_id = dcg.id
WHERE dcg.id IS NULL OR dco.id IS NULL
ORDER BY cp.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F07-5: 菜品当前存在 required 定制组，但订单 customizations 未包含该 group；仅作为旧订单/规则变更弱信号。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.created_at,
  oi.id AS order_item_id,
  oi.dish_id,
  dcg.id AS required_group_id,
  dcg.name AS required_group_name
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
JOIN dish_customization_groups dcg ON dcg.dish_id = oi.dish_id AND dcg.is_required = true
WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND oi.dish_id IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT COALESCE((oi.customizations::jsonb ? dcg.id::text), false)
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;
```
