```sql
-- P1-F07-6: 包装订单项与当前包装选项状态/价格不一致；历史快照弱信号。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.created_at,
  o.packaging_fee,
  opi.id AS packaging_item_id,
  opi.packaging_option_id,
  opi.name AS packaging_name_snapshot,
  opi.unit_price AS packaging_price_snapshot,
  mpo.name AS current_packaging_name,
  mpo.price AS current_packaging_price,
  mpo.is_enabled,
  mpo.deleted_at,
  mpo.updated_at AS packaging_updated_at
FROM order_packaging_items opi
JOIN orders o ON o.id = opi.order_id
LEFT JOIN merchant_packaging_options mpo ON mpo.id = opi.packaging_option_id
WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND (
    mpo.id IS NULL
    OR mpo.deleted_at IS NOT NULL
    OR mpo.is_enabled IS DISTINCT FROM true
    OR mpo.price <> opi.unit_price
  )
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F07-7: 订单收了包装费，但当前包装设置不再适用/不再启用；用于识别配置变更后到。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.order_type,
  o.created_at,
  o.packaging_fee,
  mps.enabled,
  mps.required,
  mps.applicable_order_types,
  mps.updated_at AS packaging_settings_updated_at
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN merchant_packaging_settings mps ON mps.merchant_id = o.merchant_id
WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND o.packaging_fee > 0
  AND (
    mps.id IS NULL
    OR mps.enabled IS DISTINCT FROM true
    OR NOT (o.order_type = ANY(mps.applicable_order_types))
  )
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F07-8: 使用商户满减的订单，按当前规则找不到足以解释 discount_amount 的 active 规则组合；弱信号。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.merchant_id,
  o.order_type,
  o.subtotal,
  o.discount_amount,
  o.created_at,
  COALESCE(SUM(dr.discount_amount), 0) AS current_matching_discount_sum
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN discount_rules dr
  ON dr.merchant_id = o.merchant_id
 AND dr.deleted_at IS NULL
 AND dr.is_active = true
 AND dr.valid_from <= now()
 AND dr.valid_until >= now()
 AND dr.min_order_amount <= o.subtotal
WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND o.discount_amount > 0
GROUP BY o.id, o.order_no, o.merchant_id, o.order_type, o.subtotal, o.discount_amount, o.created_at
HAVING COALESCE(SUM(dr.discount_amount), 0) < o.discount_amount
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F07-9: 代金券订单与当前券模板金额/门槛/类型不一致；金额字段命中更值得关注。
SELECT
  o.id AS order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.created_at,
  o.order_type,
  o.subtotal,
  o.user_voucher_id,
  o.voucher_amount AS order_voucher_amount,
  uv.status AS user_voucher_status,
  v.id AS voucher_id,
  v.amount AS current_voucher_amount,
  v.min_order_amount AS current_min_order_amount,
  v.allowed_order_types,
  v.is_active,
  v.valid_from,
  v.valid_until,
  v.deleted_at
FROM orders o
JOIN user_vouchers uv ON uv.id = o.user_voucher_id
JOIN vouchers v ON v.id = uv.voucher_id
WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  AND o.user_voucher_id IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    o.voucher_amount <> v.amount
    OR o.subtotal < v.min_order_amount
    OR NOT (o.order_type = ANY(v.allowed_order_types))
    OR v.deleted_at IS NOT NULL
    OR v.is_active IS DISTINCT FROM true
    OR now() NOT BETWEEN v.valid_from AND v.valid_until
  )
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;

-- P1-F07-10: 管理端库存宽写/并发扣减造成 committed quantity 异常的直接数据证据。
SELECT
  di.id AS daily_inventory_id,
  di.merchant_id,
  di.dish_id,
  di.date,
  di.total_quantity,
  di.sold_quantity,
  di.reserved_quantity,
  di.updated_at,
  d.name AS dish_name
FROM daily_inventory di
JOIN dishes d ON d.id = di.dish_id
WHERE di.total_quantity <> -1
  AND di.sold_quantity + di.reserved_quantity > di.total_quantity
ORDER BY di.updated_at DESC NULLS LAST, di.date DESC;

-- P1-F07-11: 近 30 天支付订单的订单项数量与日库存 sold_quantity 差异；用于辅助定位库存手工覆盖或补偿缺口。
WITH paid_item_qty AS (
  SELECT
    o.merchant_id,
    oi.dish_id,
    CASE
      WHEN o.order_type = 'reservation' AND tr.reservation_date IS NOT NULL THEN tr.reservation_date::date
      ELSE o.paid_at::date
    END AS inventory_date,
    SUM(oi.quantity)::int AS paid_quantity
  FROM orders o
  JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
  LEFT JOIN table_reservations tr ON tr.id = o.reservation_id
  WHERE o.paid_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND o.status IN ('paid','preparing','ready','courier_accepted','picked','delivering','completed','user_delivered')
    AND oi.dish_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY o.merchant_id, oi.dish_id, inventory_date
)
SELECT
  piq.*,
  di.sold_quantity,
  di.reserved_quantity,
  di.total_quantity,
  di.updated_at AS inventory_updated_at
FROM paid_item_qty piq
LEFT JOIN daily_inventory di
  ON di.merchant_id = piq.merchant_id
 AND di.dish_id = piq.dish_id
 AND di.date = piq.inventory_date
WHERE di.id IS NOT NULL
  AND di.sold_quantity < piq.paid_quantity
ORDER BY piq.inventory_date DESC;

-- P1-F07-12: 默认地址数据质量异常；下单已有地址快照，命中不直接等于订单错。
SELECT
  user_id,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_default = true AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS active_default_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_default = true AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL) AS deleted_default_count,
  ARRAY_AGG(id ORDER BY created_at DESC) FILTER (WHERE is_default = true) AS default_address_ids
FROM user_addresses
GROUP BY user_id
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_default = true AND deleted_at IS NULL) > 1
    OR COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_default = true AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL) > 0
ORDER BY active_default_count DESC, deleted_default_count DESC;

-- P1-F07-13: 商户关联 inactive 或非 merchant 类型 tag；展示/搜索分类投影数据质量。
SELECT
  mt.merchant_id,
  mt.tag_id,
  t.name,
  t.type,
  t.status,
  t.created_at
FROM merchant_tags mt
JOIN tags t ON t.id = mt.tag_id
WHERE t.status <> 'active'
   OR t.type <> 'merchant'
ORDER BY mt.merchant_id, t.type, t.name;

-- P1-F07-14: 评价有图片请求失败的持久化迹象；review 已创建但没有图片，需要结合接口日志确认是否用户原请求带图。
SELECT
  r.id AS review_id,
  r.order_id,
  r.user_id,
  r.merchant_id,
  r.created_at,
  COUNT(ri.id) AS image_count
FROM reviews r
LEFT JOIN review_images ri ON ri.review_id = r.id
WHERE r.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY r.id, r.order_id, r.user_id, r.merchant_id, r.created_at
HAVING COUNT(ri.id) = 0
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 下单创建：搜索 `create order`、`order idempotency`、`订单请求状态已变化，请刷新后重试`、`merchant takeout ordering is suspended`、`商户已打烊`、`dish ... is offline`、`dish ... is not available today`、`包装方式不可用`、`当前活动不可与所选优惠券叠加`、`优惠券已停用或已失效`。
  - 库存与支付应用：搜索 `process atomic balance payment`、`process order payment`、`insufficient inventory for dish`、`decrement inventory for dish`、`inventory_updated`；重点比对库存异常 SQL 命中前后是否有商户手工 `inventory_updated`。
  - 配送 quote：搜索地图/配送费 calculator 错误、天气/暂停规则更新、`delivery fee calculator`、`delivery quote` 相关日志；若订单创建和配置更新时间相邻，按产品 quote 有效期判断。
  - 评价图片：搜索 `insert review image failed`、`invalid review image asset`、`failed to resolve review image URL`；若同一 order 后续出现 `idx_reviews_order_id` 冲突或用户投诉缺图，升级为真实体验问题。
  - 低优先投影：默认地址查 API `PATCH /addresses/:id/default` 500/重试，标签查 merchant tag 管理操作和分类页展示异常；没有业务投诉时只作为数据质量清理。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - 商户营业状态：在 `ValidateMerchantForOrder` 返回后暂停，另一事务把 merchant `is_open=false` 或 profile `is_takeout_suspended=true`，再放行 `CreateOrderTx`；断言当前仍可能创建 pending order。
  - 菜品/套餐：`CalculateOrderItems` 读到 online/available/price 后暂停，另一事务下架/删除/改价 dish 或 combo，再放行订单 tx；断言 order_items 按旧 snapshot 落库。
  - 定制项：normalizer 读到 required group/option/extra_price 后暂停，另一事务 `SetDishCustomizationsTx` 删除或改价，再放行订单 tx；断言 order_items customizations/price 仍按旧规则。
  - 包装：读取 cart packaging selection 和 option price 后暂停，另一事务禁用/删除 option 或关闭 packaging settings，再放行订单 tx；断言 order_packaging_items 仍创建。
  - 商户满减/代金券：读取 active discount/voucher 字段后暂停，另一事务停用/改金额/改门槛/改 allowed_order_types，再放行 `CreateOrderTx`；断言 discount/voucher amount 是否按旧值成交。
  - 库存管理宽写：`updateDailyInventory` 读旧 sold/reserved 后暂停，支付事务扣减库存，再让管理端按旧 sold/reserved 执行 `UpdateDailyInventory`；断言是否可写出 committed quantity 异常或回退 sold。
  - 评价创建图片：`CreateReview` 成功后让第一张 `AddReviewImage` 返回错误；断言 review 已存在、review_images 缺失、同 order 重试因 unique review 被挡。
  - 默认地址/标签：并发两个默认地址设置与脚本绕过；商户 tag 关联 inactive/wrong-type tag；断言数据异常只影响展示/检索，不影响已创建订单金额。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 `P1-F07-1/2/3/4/5/6/7/8/9` 命中且对应订单创建时间在配置 `updated_at` 之后，说明不是普通历史快照，应优先给下单事务增加 expected-version/updated_at guard：merchant/profile、dish/combo、customization group/options、packaging settings/options、discount/voucher template 都应在 `CreateOrderTx` 内复核。
  - 若产品接受“预览/提交瞬间 quote 锁价”，应显式增加 quote/version/expire_at snapshot，而不是继续用当前表弱推断；若不接受锁价，则支付前也要复核 merchant open、takeout suspension、库存和价格。
  - 若 `P1-F07-10/11` 命中，优先修库存管理端：`UpdateDailyInventory` 改为单条条件更新或事务内 `GetDailyInventoryForUpdate`，禁止把 sold/reserved 按旧值回写；必要时为 `total_quantity=-1 OR sold+reserved<=total` 加 check/repair job。
  - 若评价缺图有投诉或日志命中，应新增 `CreateReviewTx` 把 review 和 review_images 放同一事务，或把 review 创建成 pending_media 状态，图片全部写入后再 visible。
  - 默认地址可低成本加 partial unique `(user_id) WHERE is_default=true AND deleted_at IS NULL`，但要先清历史数据；商户 tag 应在 `SetMerchantTagsTx` 校验 tag active/type，或查询侧过滤 inactive/wrong-type。两者不与下单快照修复混批。
  - 当前不要先修 SQL 模板命中的历史快照引用：订单天然保存商品/包装/地址/券快照，只有“配置更新时间早于订单创建且产品不允许旧配置成交”或“当前状态异常导致用户/商家投诉”才升级为 P1 修复。

#### P1-F08. Baofu 开户/报备/授权/商户激活状态机

- 原始编号：`25/34/36-44/68/204/219-223/284/304-305/360/385-386/406/NP-1-NP-8/NP-39-NP-41/NP-72-NP-74/NP-245-NP-246/NP-343`，核验费资金部分另归 `P0-F09`。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed`。开户/报备/授权有多 scheduler、多 profile/report/flow 表和 provider 回调，状态分段与旧回调/旧资料后到风险已确认；部分 provider 幂等需沙箱/生产样本确认。
- 证据闭口：`36-44/219-223` 是 flow/report/binding/recovery 分段；`304/305` 是旧 report_no 和 app auth 终态覆盖；`406` 是开户任务执行时重读 profile 行；`NP-1-NP-8/NP-72-NP-74` 收窄了部分非问题和恢复面。
- 生产验证：查 flow/report/binding/payment_config/merchant activation 不一致、opening_processing 长期无任务、report terminal 但 flow 未 ready、同 owner 多 active/failed/ready flow 交错、provider request snapshot 与 profile 当前值不一致。
- 最小复现/测试：profile 提交后编辑再让 worker 后到；report 并发提交；callback 缺 out_request_no fallback 到 latest flow；opening_processing 双 worker。
- 修复类型：profile immutable snapshot；flow/report command state machine；provider callback 精确 owner/version guard；per-owner claim；ready 聚合事务/repair。
- 下一步：与 P0 核验费一起做专项，不要只修支付不修开户续链。

##### P1-F08 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：本族只闭口宝付账户开户、开户回调、商户报备、`bind_sub_config(APPLET)` 授权、商户 `payment_config` 和 merchant activation 的状态时序。宝付核验费支付单/事实应用归 `P0-F09`，普通宝付支付/退款/分账/提现归 `P0`，入驻审核资质治理归 `P1-F06`。
- 已有保护/非问题：
  - 同 owner active flow 有 DB 级约束：`baofu_account_opening_flows_active_owner_uidx` 只允许 `profile_pending/verify_fee_pending/verify_fee_processing/opening_processing/merchant_report_processing/applet_auth_pending` 中同 owner 一条 active flow；`open_trans_serial_no` 也有唯一索引。不要把本族写成“正常 API 可随意创建多个 active 开户流程”。
  - 核验费 success application 不直接外呼开户 provider：`PrepareOpeningAfterVerifyFeePaid` 只把 flow 推到 `opening_processing` 并让 worker 入队；单次入队失败会让 payment fact application failed，后续 scheduler 可重试。核验费 late failed/closed 也只能把 `profile_pending/verify_fee_pending/verify_fee_processing` 拉回待支付，不会回退 `opening_processing/merchant_report_processing/applet_auth_pending/ready`。
  - 开户 callback 不是落库失败仍 ACK：`handleBaofuAccountOpenNotify` 先解析/验 collect identity，再 `CreateExternalPaymentFact` 并同步 `ApplyAccountOpenCallbackResult`；任一错误返回 `FAIL`，成功才返回宝付 account ACK `OK`。如果 fact 已落但 apply 失败，provider 重投时会按 dedupe 回读既有 fact 再尝试应用。
  - 带 `out_request_no` 的开户结果有精确 guard：callback 会先按 `open_trans_serial_no` 找 flow，找不到就告警并 FAIL；应用 active 结果时还会校验 result `OutRequestNo` 与 flow、`contract_no` 已绑定 owner/account_type/opening_mode 是否一致，不一致会创建 critical alert 并阻断本地绑定更新。
  - duplicate account failure 有恢复面：`BF00060/EXISTED_LOGIN_NO` 会触发 query reconcile；`MarkBaofuAccountOpeningFlowReady` 允许 duplicate-failed flow 恢复 ready，不能把所有 duplicate failure 都当终态失败。
  - flow ready 不是三张表分段提交：商户 ready 落点走 `MarkMerchantBaofuAccountOpeningReadyTx`，在一个事务内 upsert `merchant_payment_configs`、`MarkBaofuAccountOpeningFlowReady`、`ActivateApprovedMerchant`；因此“flow ready 已写但 payment_config 或 merchant active 因同事务错误没写”不是主问题，除非生产 SQL 命中历史/手工/迁移异常。
  - `bind_sub_config` 的 `BIND_REPEAT_ERROR` 被当作幂等成功，这条不作为重复授权失败问题；需要审的是并发 success/failed 后到是否互相覆盖。
  - `MarkBaofuAccountOpeningFlowFailed` 不覆盖 `ready/voided`，普通 late failed 不会把已 ready flow 回退 failed；旧账里“失败覆盖成功”的描述应收窄到 report/app auth row 或 active flow 中间态。
  - `baofu_account_bindings` 有 owner 级 upsert 和 `contract_no/sharing_mer_id` 唯一约束；旧账 `NP-343` 维持为由 opening flow 和 contract guard 收住，不另开“同 owner 多 binding active”问题。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - profile 是 owner 级可变行，flow 只保存 `profile_id`：`UpsertBaofuAccountOpeningProfile` 在 `(owner_type, owner_id)` 冲突时覆盖原行；`prepareFlowForOpen` 会把当时请求写入 `provider_request_snapshot`，但 `ExecutePreparedOpening` 后续重新读取同一 profile 并重新 build provider request。若资料在 prepare 后、worker 外呼前被编辑，实际开户请求可能与 flow snapshot 不一致。
  - 商户报备也重读当前 profile/merchant：`buildMerchantReportInput` 在 `merchant_report_processing` 后重新读取 `baofu_account_opening_profiles`、`merchants.application_data/address/phone/name` 和 region chain；开户通过后到报备前的资料/商户信息编辑，会改变 provider 报备资料，不一定等同开户时 snapshot。
  - `opening_processing` 外呼前缺持久 claim：`ExecutePreparedOpening` 只 `GetBaofuAccountOpeningFlow` 检查 state 后直接 `OpenAccount`；asynq `Unique(30m)` 只是队列层去重，不是数据库 dispatch lease。若重复任务、手工入队、锁过期重试或多执行者同时进来，代码层没有 `claim opening_processing -> opening_dispatching` 的 CAS 防线；是否会造成 provider 双开户取决于 asynq 时序和宝付 `outRequestNo` 幂等语义，需用沙箱/生产样本确认。
  - 缺 `out_request_no` 的开户 callback 仍会走 `contract_no -> binding -> latest flow` fallback。它能防跨 owner 的 contract mismatch，但无法证明该 callback 属于 latest flow 的 `open_trans_serial_no`；旧 provider 结果可能推动同 owner 最新 flow 的报备续链，属于 `C1/C2` 的 provider 边界风险。
  - 报备提交缺 per-owner/report claim：`RecoverMerchantReportFlow` 在找不到 report 时直接 `submitMerchantReport`；callback continuation、account-opening recovery 或手工恢复并发时，两个执行者可各自生成 `report_no`，分别创建 command，并由 `UpsertBaofuMerchantReportProcessing` 在 owner/type 冲突时把当前 row 的 `report_no` 重置为后写值。
  - report terminal 写缺 expected `report_no` guard：`syncReportResult` 只按 report row id 调 `MarkBaofuMerchantReportSucceeded/Failed`，SQL 不校验当前 `report_no` 是否等于 provider result 里的 `reportNo`。旧 `report_no` 的 success/failed 后到可以覆盖当前 row 的 `report_state/sub_mch_id/failure/raw_snapshot`。
  - applet auth 终态写缺 first-terminal guard：`MarkBaofuMerchantReportAppletAuthSucceeded/Failed` 都只按 id 更新，没有 `applet_auth_state='pending'` 或 expected sub_mch/report_no 条件；并发 bind 或 late failed/success 会后写覆盖先写。
  - standalone `BaofuMerchantReportRecoveryScheduler` 只更新 `baofu_merchant_reports`，不会直接推进 opening flow、`merchant_payment_configs` 和 merchant activation；需要 `BaofuAccountOpeningRecoveryScheduler` 后续按 flow 再收敛。该分层本身可接受，但会形成 report terminal 已完成、flow/config/merchant 尚未 ready 的中间态，读路径不能把 `binding.active` 或 `report.succeeded` 当作可收款。
  - `CreateExternalPaymentCommand` 在报备 submit 前落 `submitted` command，随后 `UpsertBaofuMerchantReportProcessing` 失败时 provider 尚未外呼，只留下命令审计残留；这不是业务双提交，但会污染生产排查，应在 SQL 里单独标注为审计残留。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed`，但拆分如下：`C0` 为 profile/merchant 当前资料重读、merchant report `report_no` 覆盖、report terminal/app auth terminal 无 expected guard、standalone recovery 与 ready 聚合分段；`C1` 为缺 `out_request_no` fallback 到 latest flow 的错续链；`C2/provider` 为 `opening_processing` 双外呼是否被 asynq/provider `outRequestNo` 幂等完全收住；`N/NP` 为核验费 direct 外呼、ready 三表半提交、带 `out_request_no` 错流覆盖、duplicate failure 无恢复、`BIND_REPEAT_ERROR` 重复授权失败。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下为只读模板。命中不等同立即修数据，先按时间线核对 provider 日志、callback 原文、worker 日志和是否有手工/迁移操作。

```sql
-- P1-F08-1: active flow 卡在 provider/recovery 中间态。
SELECT
  f.id AS flow_id,
  f.owner_type,
  f.owner_id,
  f.state,
  f.opening_mode,
  f.open_trans_serial_no,
  f.account_binding_id,
  f.merchant_report_id,
  f.updated_at,
  now() - f.updated_at AS age
FROM baofu_account_opening_flows f
WHERE f.state IN ('opening_processing','merchant_report_processing','applet_auth_pending')
  AND f.updated_at < now() - interval '30 minutes'
ORDER BY f.updated_at ASC;

-- P1-F08-2: ready flow 但商户收款配置或商户 active 不一致；正常 ready tx 不应命中。
SELECT
  f.id AS flow_id,
  f.owner_id AS merchant_id,
  f.state,
  f.merchant_report_id,
  m.status AS merchant_status,
  mpc.id AS payment_config_id,
  mpc.status AS payment_config_status,
  mpc.sub_mch_id,
  f.updated_at AS flow_updated_at,
  mpc.updated_at AS payment_config_updated_at
FROM baofu_account_opening_flows f
JOIN merchants m ON m.id = f.owner_id
LEFT JOIN merchant_payment_configs mpc ON mpc.merchant_id = f.owner_id
WHERE f.owner_type = 'merchant'
  AND f.state = 'ready'
  AND (
    m.status <> 'active'
    OR mpc.id IS NULL
    OR mpc.status <> 'active'
  )
ORDER BY f.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F08-3: report + applet 均成功，但 flow/config/merchant 未收敛。
SELECT
  r.id AS report_id,
  r.owner_id AS merchant_id,
  r.report_no,
  r.sub_mch_id,
  r.report_state,
  r.applet_auth_state,
  f.id AS flow_id,
  f.state AS flow_state,
  f.merchant_report_id,
  m.status AS merchant_status,
  mpc.sub_mch_id AS config_sub_mch_id,
  mpc.status AS config_status,
  r.updated_at AS report_updated_at,
  f.updated_at AS flow_updated_at
FROM baofu_merchant_reports r
LEFT JOIN baofu_account_opening_flows f
  ON f.owner_type = r.owner_type
 AND f.owner_id = r.owner_id
 AND (f.merchant_report_id = r.id OR f.state IN ('merchant_report_processing','applet_auth_pending','ready'))
LEFT JOIN merchants m ON m.id = r.owner_id
LEFT JOIN merchant_payment_configs mpc ON mpc.merchant_id = r.owner_id
WHERE r.report_state = 'succeeded'
  AND r.applet_auth_state = 'succeeded'
  AND (
    f.id IS NULL
    OR f.state <> 'ready'
    OR m.status <> 'active'
    OR mpc.id IS NULL
    OR mpc.status <> 'active'
    OR mpc.sub_mch_id IS DISTINCT FROM r.sub_mch_id
  )
ORDER BY r.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F08-4: binding active 但商户报备/ready/config 尚未完成；这是中间态，不应被读路径当作可收款。
WITH latest_flow AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (owner_type, owner_id)
    id, owner_type, owner_id, state, merchant_report_id, account_binding_id, updated_at
  FROM baofu_account_opening_flows
  ORDER BY owner_type, owner_id, created_at DESC, id DESC
)
SELECT
  b.id AS binding_id,
  b.owner_type,
  b.owner_id,
  b.open_state,
  b.contract_no,
  b.sharing_mer_id,
  lf.id AS latest_flow_id,
  lf.state AS latest_flow_state,
  r.report_state,
  r.applet_auth_state,
  mpc.status AS payment_config_status,
  mpc.sub_mch_id
FROM baofu_account_bindings b
LEFT JOIN latest_flow lf ON lf.owner_type = b.owner_type AND lf.owner_id = b.owner_id
LEFT JOIN baofu_merchant_reports r
  ON r.owner_type = b.owner_type
 AND r.owner_id = b.owner_id
 AND r.report_type = 'WECHAT'
LEFT JOIN merchant_payment_configs mpc
  ON b.owner_type = 'merchant'
 AND mpc.merchant_id = b.owner_id
WHERE b.owner_type = 'merchant'
  AND b.open_state = 'active'
  AND (
    lf.state IS DISTINCT FROM 'ready'
    OR r.report_state IS DISTINCT FROM 'succeeded'
    OR r.applet_auth_state IS DISTINCT FROM 'succeeded'
    OR mpc.status IS DISTINCT FROM 'active'
  )
ORDER BY b.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F08-5: flow 准备后 profile 又被更新；弱信号，用于定位实际外呼可能重读新资料。
SELECT
  f.id AS flow_id,
  f.owner_type,
  f.owner_id,
  f.state,
  f.profile_id,
  f.open_trans_serial_no,
  f.updated_at AS flow_updated_at,
  p.updated_at AS profile_updated_at,
  f.provider_request_snapshot
FROM baofu_account_opening_flows f
JOIN baofu_account_opening_profiles p ON p.id = f.profile_id
WHERE f.provider_request_snapshot <> '{}'::jsonb
  AND p.updated_at > f.updated_at
ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F08-6: report raw_snapshot 的 provider reportNo 与当前 row.report_no 不一致，指向旧结果覆盖/并发提交。
SELECT
  id AS report_id,
  owner_id AS merchant_id,
  report_no AS current_report_no,
  raw_snapshot->>'reportNo' AS snapshot_report_no,
  report_state,
  applet_auth_state,
  sub_mch_id,
  updated_at
FROM baofu_merchant_reports
WHERE raw_snapshot ? 'reportNo'
  AND NULLIF(raw_snapshot->>'reportNo', '') IS NOT NULL
  AND raw_snapshot->>'reportNo' <> report_no
ORDER BY updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F08-7: 同一商户短时间内多个 merchant_report submit command；重点核对是否 provider 都收到。
SELECT
  business_object_id AS merchant_id,
  COUNT(*) AS command_count,
  ARRAY_AGG(external_object_key ORDER BY submitted_at) AS report_nos,
  MIN(submitted_at) AS first_submitted_at,
  MAX(submitted_at) AS last_submitted_at
FROM external_payment_commands
WHERE provider = 'baofu'
  AND channel = 'baofu_aggregate'
  AND capability = 'baofu_merchant_report'
  AND command_type = 'baofu_merchant_report'
  AND external_object_type = 'baofu_merchant_report'
  AND submitted_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY business_object_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY last_submitted_at DESC;

-- P1-F08-8: report submit command 已记录但没有对应 report row；多为 upsert 前失败的审计残留。
SELECT
  c.id AS command_id,
  c.business_object_id AS merchant_id,
  c.external_object_key AS report_no,
  c.command_status,
  c.submitted_at,
  c.updated_at
FROM external_payment_commands c
LEFT JOIN baofu_merchant_reports r ON r.report_no = c.external_object_key
WHERE c.provider = 'baofu'
  AND c.channel = 'baofu_aggregate'
  AND c.capability = 'baofu_merchant_report'
  AND c.command_type = 'baofu_merchant_report'
  AND r.id IS NULL
ORDER BY c.submitted_at DESC;

-- P1-F08-9: account callback 缺 out_request_no 的 fallback 样本；需要回看 raw_resource/provider 行为。
SELECT
  fact.id AS fact_id,
  fact.business_object_id AS flow_id,
  fact.external_object_key AS callback_object_key,
  fact.external_secondary_key AS callback_contract_no,
  fact.upstream_state,
  fact.terminal_status,
  fact.observed_at,
  f.owner_type,
  f.owner_id,
  f.open_trans_serial_no,
  f.state AS flow_state
FROM external_payment_facts fact
JOIN baofu_account_opening_flows f ON f.id = fact.business_object_id
WHERE fact.provider = 'baofu'
  AND fact.channel = 'baofu_aggregate'
  AND fact.capability = 'baofu_account'
  AND fact.fact_source = 'callback'
  AND fact.external_secondary_key IS NOT NULL
  AND fact.external_object_key = fact.external_secondary_key
ORDER BY fact.observed_at DESC;

-- P1-F08-10: applet auth failed 但 flow/config/merchant 已 ready/active，说明 late failed 或人工覆盖需核查。
SELECT
  r.id AS report_id,
  r.owner_id AS merchant_id,
  r.report_no,
  r.report_state,
  r.applet_auth_state,
  r.failure_code,
  r.failure_message,
  f.id AS flow_id,
  f.state AS flow_state,
  m.status AS merchant_status,
  mpc.status AS payment_config_status,
  r.updated_at AS report_updated_at
FROM baofu_merchant_reports r
LEFT JOIN baofu_account_opening_flows f
  ON f.owner_type = r.owner_type
 AND f.owner_id = r.owner_id
 AND (f.merchant_report_id = r.id OR f.state = 'ready')
LEFT JOIN merchants m ON m.id = r.owner_id
LEFT JOIN merchant_payment_configs mpc ON mpc.merchant_id = r.owner_id
WHERE r.applet_auth_state = 'failed'
  AND (
    f.state = 'ready'
    OR m.status = 'active'
    OR mpc.status = 'active'
  )
ORDER BY r.updated_at DESC;

-- P1-F08-11: 同 owner 多条 flow 交错；active 唯一索引外的 failed/ready/voided 历史需要按 callback 时间线复核。
SELECT
  owner_type,
  owner_id,
  COUNT(*) AS flow_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('profile_pending','verify_fee_pending','verify_fee_processing','opening_processing','merchant_report_processing','applet_auth_pending')) AS active_flow_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'ready') AS ready_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'failed') AS failed_count,
  ARRAY_AGG(id || ':' || state || ':' || COALESCE(open_trans_serial_no, '') ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC) AS flows
FROM baofu_account_opening_flows
GROUP BY owner_type, owner_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY active_flow_count DESC, ready_count DESC, failed_count DESC;

-- P1-F08-12: 宝付开户/报备 critical alert，用来关联错流水、contract mismatch、unmatched callback。
SELECT
  id,
  alert_type,
  level,
  title,
  related_id AS flow_id,
  related_type,
  extra,
  emitted_at
FROM platform_alert_events
WHERE related_type = 'baofu_account_opening_flow'
  AND title LIKE '宝付%'
ORDER BY emitted_at DESC, id DESC;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 开户任务：搜索 `enqueued baofu account opening task`、`duplicate baofu account opening task enqueue suppressed`、`baofu account opening flow marked failed`、`baofu account duplicate opening response triggers query reconciliation`，按 `flow_id/open_trans_serial_no` 串 provider `OpenAccount` 请求。
  - 开户 callback：搜索 `baofu account callback fact persisted`、`persist baofu account callback fact failed`、`宝付开户回调未匹配本地流程`、`宝付开户结果流水号不一致`、`宝付开户结果合约号归属冲突`；缺 `out_request_no` 的样本必须回看 raw callback。
  - account opening recovery：搜索 `baofu_account_opening_recovery`、`baofu_account_query`、`recover baofu account opening flow failed`，确认 query recovery 是否只查询而未二次 open。
  - merchant report：搜索 `baofu_merchant_report_recover`、`merchant_report_query`、`bind_sub_config`、`baofu bind_sub_config repeat accepted as idempotent success`、`baofu account callback merchant report continuation failed; recovery will retry`。
  - 运营观测：报备/授权成功到 `flow.ready` 的延迟、`merchant_report_processing/applet_auth_pending` 超阈值数量、report raw `reportNo` 与 row `report_no` 不一致数量、同商户多 report command 数量。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - profile 漂移：`PrepareOpeningAfterVerifyFeePaid` 把 flow 推到 `opening_processing` 后暂停 worker，更新同 owner profile，再执行 `ExecutePreparedOpening`；断言 fake provider 收到的是新 profile 字段，而 `provider_request_snapshot` 仍是旧字段。
  - merchant report 漂移：账户 active 后、`RecoverMerchantReportFlow` 构造 input 前更新 merchant/profile/application_data；断言 provider report request 使用了后到资料。
  - opening_processing 双执行：两个 goroutine 同时让 `ExecutePreparedOpening` 读到同一 `opening_processing` flow，在 fake provider 处阻塞并计数；当前没有 DB claim，期望能暴露两次 `OpenAccount` 调用或证明 asynq 层已完全串行。
  - report 并发提交：让两个 `RecoverMerchantReportFlow` 都在 `GetBaofuMerchantReportByOwner` 返回 not found 后继续；断言生成两个 `report_no` command，`baofu_merchant_reports.report_no` 被后写覆盖。
  - 旧 report result 覆盖：先用 `report_no=A` 创建 row，再 upsert 为 `report_no=B`，随后把 A 的 provider success/failed 传给 `syncReportResult`；断言当前 SQL 会按 row id 更新 B 的 row。
  - applet auth 后到覆盖：两个并发 `bindApplet`，一个 fake success、一个 fake non-success；断言最终 `applet_auth_state` 取决于后写，而不是 first terminal。
  - callback 缺 `out_request_no`：构造只有 `contract_no` 的 account callback，binding 指向同 owner，latest flow 使用不同 `open_trans_serial_no`；断言 fallback 选择 latest flow，并评估是否触发不应有的报备续链。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 `P1-F08-2/3/4/10` 命中真实商户，应先做人工 repair/补偿：以宝付 query/report query/bind_sub_config 查询结果为准，修复 report、flow、payment_config、merchant status 的一致性，再改代码。
  - 若 `P1-F08-6/7` 命中，优先修 report 状态机：新增 per-owner/report durable claim 或 report command ledger，`UpsertBaofuMerchantReportProcessing` 不得在 processing/succeeded row 上无条件覆盖 `report_no`；terminal update 必须带 expected `report_no`。
  - 若缺 `out_request_no` callback 在生产存在，应和宝付确认官方回调字段稳定性；代码侧至少要求 fallback 时 `binding.last_open_trans_serial_no = flow.open_trans_serial_no`，否则只告警不续链。
  - 若 profile/merchant 漂移可复现或有生产样本，应把开户和报备请求改为 immutable snapshot：worker/provider request 从 flow snapshot 或 report command snapshot 构造，不再重读可变 profile/merchant 当前行；资料编辑另开新 flow 或显式 void/reprepare。
  - 若双 `OpenAccount` 复现或 provider 未承诺同 `outRequestNo` 强幂等，新增数据库 claim/lease，例如 `opening_processing -> opening_dispatching` 或 `claimed_at/claim_token`，worker 外呼前 CAS，失败/超时由 recovery query 收敛。
  - applet auth 修复应加 first-terminal guard：success/failed 只允许从 `pending` 更新，并绑定 expected `report_no/sub_mch_id`；late terminal 只写审计/告警，不覆盖已终态。

### P2 副作用、外设和异步投影风险族总览

#### P2-F01. 云打印/小票打印 provider callback、poll、retry 和脚本旁路

- 原始编号：`24/32/46/47/48/214-215/306-307/342-344/421/423/NP-75-NP-77/NP-104-NP-107/NP-318/NP-331`。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed`。飞鹅云 callback 无 pending guard、callback/poll/worker 终态语义不一致、缺 vendor_order_id 恢复锚点、自动接单打印 duplicate 误判、脚本直接插 paid 订单均已落账。
- 证据闭口：`342/343` 是飞鹅云 callback-enabled 但回调丢失/失败不落本地；`306/307` 是外呼不确定和 task_key 占位；`344` 是无 print_log 时 outbox 已发布；`421/423` 是 provider 配置和脚本绕账本。
- 生产验证：查 print_log pending 超阈值、无 vendor_order_id 且 task_key 已占用、outbox published 但无 print_log、飞鹅云失败 callback ACK 后仍 pending、脚本插入 paid order。
- 最小复现/测试：provider 外呼成功但写回失败；callback 先于 vendor_order_id；自动接单打印 enqueue duplicate；飞鹅云失败 callback。
- 修复类型：打印 command/outbox ledger；provider order id durable before/after 外呼补偿；终态 expected-state 统一；脚本禁止直接写业务终态或改走 API/fixture 隔离。
- 下一步：先处理 `423` 脚本旁路和 `344` 漏打，因为它们容易制造真实业务错觉。

##### P2-F01 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：只核查云打印/小票打印 provider callback、status poll、retry、自动接单打印和脚本旁路；不扩张到 OCR/media，也不把 P0-F12 的 payment outbox 全量重审搬到这里。
- 代码证据：
  - `locallife/worker/task_print_attempt.go` 先用 `CreatePrintLog(status='pending', task_key, provider_origin_id)` 写占位，再外呼 provider，再用 `UpdatePrintLogStatus` 写 `vendor_order_id/status`；`UpdatePrintLogStatus` 只按 `id` 更新，没有 `status='pending'` guard。
  - `locallife/api/feieyun_callback.go` 对飞鹅云只处理 `status=1` 成功；非成功状态记录 warn 后返回 HTTP 200 `"SUCCESS"`，不改变 `print_logs`；成功 callback 通过 `GetPrintLogByVendorOrderID` 找行后调用无 guard 的 `UpdatePrintLogStatus(success)`。
  - `locallife/api/yilianyun_callback.go` 有 `push_time` freshness、签名校验、`provider_origin_id` 定位、`vendor_order_id` 匹配；非 pending terminal 会 ACK，terminal 写入使用 `MarkProviderStatusPrintLogTerminal`，SQL 带 `AND status='pending'`。
  - `locallife/api/self_cloud_print_callback.go` 有 HMAC/freshness/app_id/event_id 校验；`ProcessSelfCloudPrintCallbackTx` 先落 `self_cloud_print_callback_events(event_id unique)`，再按 `(id, provider, vendor_order_id)` 或 `(provider, vendor_order_id)` 找 `print_log`，terminal 写入同样走 pending guard。
  - `locallife/worker/cloud_printer_status_poll_scheduler.go` 只轮询 `shangpeng/self_cloud`，且 `ClaimPendingProviderStatusPrintLogs` / `ExpireProviderStatusPrintLogs` 都要求 `status='pending' AND vendor_order_id IS NOT NULL`，terminal 写入也用 pending guard；因此 poll 不是任意终态覆盖入口。
  - `locallife/worker/task_payment_domain_outbox.go` 自动接单后用稳定 `task_key = order:<id>:accepted` 投递打印；`acceptedPrintTaskAlreadyLogged` 只要该 task_key 已有任意 print_log 就跳过，不区分 `pending/failed/no vendor_order_id` 是否可恢复。
  - `locallife/scripts/self_cloudprint_order_print_cycle.sh` 直接 `INSERT INTO orders(status='paid', payment_method='wechat', paid_at=now(), notes='LL self-cloud periodic cycle print')` 和 `order_items`，再调用商户接单 API；这是绕过支付事实、payment_order、payment_domain_outbox 的状态旁路。
  - `locallife/cmd/yilianyun_set_print_callback/main.go` 会校验本地 authorization active、access token 未过期和 callback URL 格式，再远端调用易联云设置 callback；但本地没有 desired callback config ledger，也没有 provider 侧配置漂移巡检。
- 已有保护/非问题：
  - `NP`：易联云 callback 不是“任意 late callback 覆盖终态”。它有 freshness/signature/origin/vendor 匹配，非 pending 直接 ACK，pending guard 能收住 callback 与 poll/重试的终态竞争。
  - `NP`：自有云 callback 不是“重复事件重复改状态”。`event_id` 唯一账本 + 事务内 pending guard 能收住重复投递和 terminal race；不匹配本地 `print_log_id/vendor_order_id` 时返回 409 让 provider retry。
  - `NP`：status poll 不是无条件终态覆盖。它只 claim pending+vendor_id 行，`FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED` 降低并发重复处理，终态写入有 pending guard；真实边界是 pending/no-vendor 行不会被 poll 恢复。
  - `NP`：商户手动 retry 是显式用户动作，handler 要求原 print_log 属于订单、状态为 `failed/cancelled`、且是该订单+打印机最新 log；retry task_key 是唯一新 key，不会被旧失败行直接挡住。
  - `NP`：云打印机 CRUD/soft delete 本身不直接写订单、支付、配送终态；它影响的是后续打印可用性，风险应归到打印任务 eligibility 和 retry 分支。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - `C0`：飞鹅云成功 callback 使用无 pending guard 的 `UpdatePrintLogStatus`，late success 可把已 `failed/cancelled` 的旧 log 改回 `success`。这和易联云/自有云/poll 的 first-terminal 语义不一致，也会改变异常列表的 latest/terminal 视图。
  - `C0`：飞鹅云失败/异常 callback 被 ACK 为 `SUCCESS` 后不落本地失败，provider 可能停止重推；本地 pending 行会长期悬挂，且飞鹅云不在 status poll provider 列表里。
  - `C0`：provider 已受理但本地进程在写回 `vendor_order_id` 前失败时，`print_log` 可能停在 `pending/no vendor_order_id` 或 `failed/no vendor_order_id`；飞鹅云按 vendor id 回调、自有云按 vendor id/event、易联云还要求 vendor id 匹配，poll 也只扫 vendor id，因此这类行缺恢复锚点。
  - `C0`：稳定 `task_key` 的占位行在 provider 外呼前创建；自动接单重试只看 task_key 是否存在，若已有 `pending/no-vendor` 或不可恢复 `failed/no-vendor`，后续 outbox retry 会误判“已打印/已投递”，订单可能已 `preparing/courier_accepted` 但没有有效小票。
  - `C0`：自动接单路径先 `AcceptMerchantOrder`，再 `distributeAutoAcceptedOrderPrint`，若打印投递失败会让 payment_domain_outbox 失败重试；但订单状态已经前进。该问题和 P0-F12 的 outbox 分段有交界，这里只记录打印副作用：订单可见状态与小票投递之间没有 durable print command 补偿。
  - `C0`：`self_cloudprint_order_print_cycle.sh` 直接插入 paid 订单，是明确的业务终态旁路。它可制造“已支付/已接单/已打印”的测试样本，但不会产生真实支付事实、payment_order、支付成功 outbox，也可能污染生产统计或触发真实后续履约。
  - `C1`：`cmd/yilianyun_set_print_callback` 只执行远端设置，没有本地 desired-state/last-applied/last-verified 记录；远端 callback 配置被人工改动、关闭或指向旧地址时，系统只能通过 callback 缺失和 pending 积压间接发现。
  - `C2/provider`：provider 对 409/`FAIL` 的重试策略、飞鹅云非成功 callback 返回 200 后是否停止推送、以及同一 provider order id 是否可能多次 late success，需要结合 provider 文档或线上日志确认。代码侧已暴露不一致语义，但具体影响频率依赖 provider 行为。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed`，但拆分为“飞鹅云 late terminal/失败 ACK/no-vendor 恢复缺口/task_key 占位误判/脚本 paid 旁路”为确认问题；“易联云、自有云、poll 任意覆盖”降为 `NP`；“provider 重试细节、易联云远端配置漂移”标为 `C2/provider-ops`。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下均为只读模板。时间窗口先按近 30 天或业务高峰期收窄，再决定是否全量回溯。

```sql
-- P2-F01-1: callback/status-query provider 的 pending+vendor_id 超阈值，代表 provider terminal 未收敛。
SELECT
  pl.id,
  pl.order_id,
  pl.printer_id,
  cp.printer_type,
  pl.status,
  pl.vendor_order_id,
  pl.provider_origin_id,
  pl.task_key,
  pl.provider_status_check_attempts,
  pl.provider_status_last_error,
  pl.created_at,
  now() - pl.created_at AS age
FROM print_logs pl
JOIN cloud_printers cp ON cp.id = pl.printer_id
WHERE pl.status = 'pending'
  AND pl.vendor_order_id IS NOT NULL
  AND pl.created_at < now() - interval '30 minutes'
ORDER BY pl.created_at ASC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F01-2: pending/no-vendor 行，无法被 provider callback/poll 稳定匹配，是最高优先级卡点。
SELECT
  pl.id,
  pl.order_id,
  pl.printer_id,
  cp.printer_type,
  pl.task_key,
  pl.provider_origin_id,
  pl.error_message,
  pl.created_at,
  now() - pl.created_at AS age
FROM print_logs pl
JOIN cloud_printers cp ON cp.id = pl.printer_id
WHERE pl.status = 'pending'
  AND (pl.vendor_order_id IS NULL OR btrim(pl.vendor_order_id) = '')
  AND pl.created_at < now() - interval '10 minutes'
ORDER BY pl.created_at ASC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F01-3: failed/cancelled 但没有 vendor_order_id，外呼结果可能不确定，且旧 callback 无法匹配。
SELECT
  pl.id,
  pl.order_id,
  pl.printer_id,
  cp.printer_type,
  pl.status,
  pl.task_key,
  pl.provider_origin_id,
  pl.error_message,
  pl.created_at
FROM print_logs pl
JOIN cloud_printers cp ON cp.id = pl.printer_id
WHERE pl.status IN ('failed', 'cancelled')
  AND (pl.vendor_order_id IS NULL OR btrim(pl.vendor_order_id) = '')
  AND pl.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
ORDER BY pl.created_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F01-4: 自动接单稳定 task_key 已被非成功/无 vendor 行占用，outbox retry 会认为已存在打印记录。
SELECT
  pl.id,
  pl.order_id,
  o.order_no,
  o.status AS order_status,
  o.fulfillment_status,
  pl.printer_id,
  cp.printer_type,
  pl.status AS print_status,
  pl.vendor_order_id,
  pl.task_key,
  pl.error_message,
  pl.created_at
FROM print_logs pl
JOIN orders o ON o.id = pl.order_id
JOIN cloud_printers cp ON cp.id = pl.printer_id
WHERE pl.task_key = ('order:' || pl.order_id::text || ':accepted')
  AND (
    pl.status <> 'success'
    OR pl.vendor_order_id IS NULL
    OR btrim(pl.vendor_order_id) = ''
  )
  AND pl.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
ORDER BY pl.created_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F01-5: 订单已自动接单推进，但没有 accepted task_key 的 print_log，疑似投递失败或脚本/旁路造成状态错觉。
SELECT
  o.id,
  o.order_no,
  o.merchant_id,
  o.status,
  o.fulfillment_status,
  o.paid_at,
  o.created_at,
  odc.auto_accept_paid_orders,
  odc.print_trigger_mode,
  COUNT(cp.id) FILTER (WHERE cp.is_active AND cp.deleted_at IS NULL AND cp.printer_type = 'feieyun') AS active_feieyun_printers
FROM orders o
JOIN order_display_configs odc ON odc.merchant_id = o.merchant_id
LEFT JOIN cloud_printers cp ON cp.merchant_id = o.merchant_id
WHERE o.status IN ('preparing', 'courier_accepted')
  AND odc.auto_accept_paid_orders = true
  AND odc.enable_print = true
  AND odc.print_trigger_mode = 'accepted'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM print_logs pl
    WHERE pl.order_id = o.id
      AND pl.task_key = ('order:' || o.id::text || ':accepted')
  )
  AND o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY o.id, o.order_no, o.merchant_id, o.status, o.fulfillment_status, o.paid_at, o.created_at, odc.auto_accept_paid_orders, odc.print_trigger_mode
HAVING COUNT(cp.id) FILTER (WHERE cp.is_active AND cp.deleted_at IS NULL AND cp.printer_type = 'feieyun') > 0
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F01-6: payment outbox 因打印相关错误失败/重试，说明自动接单打印副作用阻塞了后续通知发布。
SELECT
  pdo.id,
  pdo.event_type,
  pdo.aggregate_type,
  pdo.aggregate_id,
  po.order_id,
  pdo.status,
  pdo.attempt_count,
  pdo.next_retry_at,
  pdo.last_error,
  pdo.updated_at
FROM payment_domain_outbox pdo
LEFT JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = pdo.aggregate_id
WHERE pdo.event_type = 'order_payment_succeeded'
  AND pdo.status IN ('pending', 'failed', 'processing')
  AND (
    pdo.last_error ILIKE '%print%'
    OR pdo.last_error ILIKE '%auto accept%'
    OR pdo.last_error ILIKE '%cloud printer%'
  )
ORDER BY pdo.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F01-7: 脚本直接插入的 paid 订单样本；若生产命中，需要和真实支付事实/测试环境隔离核对。
SELECT
  o.id,
  o.order_no,
  o.user_id,
  o.merchant_id,
  o.status,
  o.fulfillment_status,
  o.payment_method,
  o.paid_at,
  o.notes,
  o.created_at
FROM orders o
WHERE o.notes ILIKE '%LL self-cloud periodic cycle print%'
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F01-8: 同一订单+打印机 latest 为失败/挂起但历史有 success，排查 late callback、retry 与异常列表视图漂移。
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT
    pl.*,
    cp.printer_type,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pl.order_id, pl.printer_id ORDER BY pl.created_at DESC, pl.id DESC) AS rn,
    BOOL_OR(pl.status = 'success') OVER (PARTITION BY pl.order_id, pl.printer_id) AS has_success
  FROM print_logs pl
  JOIN cloud_printers cp ON cp.id = pl.printer_id
  WHERE pl.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
)
SELECT
  id,
  order_id,
  printer_id,
  printer_type,
  status AS latest_status,
  vendor_order_id,
  task_key,
  error_message,
  created_at
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
  AND has_success = true
  AND status <> 'success'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F01-9: poll 已判定超时失败的 provider 行，作为 provider 状态查询与本地 maxAge 策略校验样本。
SELECT
  pl.id,
  pl.order_id,
  cp.printer_type,
  pl.vendor_order_id,
  pl.status,
  pl.error_message,
  pl.provider_status_checked_at,
  pl.created_at
FROM print_logs pl
JOIN cloud_printers cp ON cp.id = pl.printer_id
WHERE pl.error_message = 'provider_print_status_expired'
ORDER BY pl.provider_status_checked_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 200;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 查 `feieyun print callback received unsupported status`：若同一 `vendor_order_id` 后续没有本地 terminal，说明失败 callback 被 ACK 后丢失了本地失败事实。
  - 查 `feieyun print callback references unknown vendor order; ask provider to retry`、`yilianyun print callback vendor order id mismatch; ask provider to retry`、`self-cloud print callback print log not found; ask provider to retry`：这些都指向 callback 早于本地 vendor id 写回或本地记录丢失。
  - 查 `cloud printer accepted print job without vendor order id`、`update print log status failed`、`create print log failed`：区分 provider 已受理但本地锚点缺失、和本地根本未创建 print_log。
  - 查 `skip auto accepted order print because task key already has a print log`：结合 `P2-F01-4` 判断是否被 pending/no-vendor 或 failed/no-vendor 占位误伤。
  - 查 `schedule auto accepted order print` 出现在 `payment_domain_outbox.last_error`：确认支付成功 outbox 是否因打印副作用延迟了通知。
  - 查 `yilianyun print callback registration succeeded`，并和 provider 后台配置/回调到达量比对；当前命令没有本地 desired-state 表，不能单靠数据库判断远端配置正确。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - 飞鹅云 late success 覆盖：创建 `print_log(status='failed', vendor_order_id='fy-x')`，调用飞鹅云成功 callback；当前应能复现被改成 `success`，而易联云/自有云同类 late terminal 应被 ACK/guard 收住。
  - 飞鹅云失败 callback 丢失：构造合法签名且 `status != 1` 的 callback，断言 HTTP 200 `"SUCCESS"` 且 `print_logs` 不变化；再确认 provider 是否会停止重推。
  - no-vendor 恢复缺口：fake provider 返回 vendor id 后让 `UpdatePrintLogStatus` 失败，或在 `Print` 返回前后模拟进程退出；断言 pending/no-vendor 行不会被 poll claim，callback 也无法匹配。
  - task_key 占位误判：构造订单为 `preparing` 且已有 `task_key=order:<id>:accepted` 的 pending/no-vendor print_log，再跑 payment_domain_outbox 重试；当前 `acceptedPrintTaskAlreadyLogged` 会跳过重新投递。
  - 自动接单分段：让 `AcceptMerchantOrder` 成功、`DistributeTaskPrintOrder` 返回错误；断言订单状态已推进、outbox failed 待重试、通知发送被延后。
  - 脚本旁路：在隔离库运行 `self_cloudprint_order_print_cycle.sh --dry-run` 和非 dry-run；确认非 dry-run 会直接写 paid order，而不是经过 payment_order/external_payment_fact/payment_domain_outbox。
  - 易联云/自有云保护回归：并发投递同一 callback 或让 callback 与 poll 同时 terminal；断言只有 pending 行被 first terminal 改写，重复投递被 ACK 或 event ledger 去重。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 `P2-F01-2/3/4/5` 命中生产，应优先加 durable print command/outbox：打印意图、provider origin、vendor id、terminal result 分开落库，外呼后写回失败必须有 recovery scanner，而不是靠 `print_logs` 单行兼作 command/result。
  - 飞鹅云 callback 应与其他 provider 统一 first-terminal 语义：terminal update 带 `status='pending'`，非成功状态映射为 failed/cancelled 或至少落 provider callback audit；late success 只写审计/告警，不覆盖已终态。
  - no-vendor 行需要补偿策略：要么 provider 外呼前生成并传递本地 `provider_origin_id` 且 callback 能用它匹配，要么外呼成功后的 vendor id 写入失败可由 provider query/command ledger 恢复；没有恢复锚点时禁止把 task_key 占位当作“已处理”。
  - 自动接单打印应避免“订单状态推进但打印 command 不可恢复”：接单、打印 command、通知 outbox 的分段关系需重新定义，至少保证打印 command 入 durable ledger 后再认为自动接单打印已安排。
  - `self_cloudprint_order_print_cycle.sh` 若只为 E2E，应强制隔离到测试环境/测试商户，并禁止在生产 DB_SOURCE 上直接插 paid 订单；生产巡检必须把这类 notes 命中样本标为人工核销。
  - 易联云 callback 配置命令需要 ops ledger 或 runbook：记录 desired URL/status、last_applied_at、last_verified_at，或由定时检查/告警确认远端配置未漂移。

#### P2-F02. OCR job、owner 投影、stale reset 和多 job 乱序

- 原始编号：`22/78-83/NP-247-NP-251/NP-311`。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed`。OCR job 与 owner pending/result 投影、任务入队、旧 job 写回和 reset scanner 范围不一致均已确认。
- 证据闭口：`78-80/NP-247/NP-248` 是创建/owner pending/入队/终态写回分段；`81/NP-249` 是 rider 同媒体多 job 乱序；`82/NP-250` 是 group draft guard；`83/NP-251` 是 reset 只修 merchant application。
- 生产验证：查 ocr_jobs succeeded/failed 但 owner JSON 仍 pending、owner pending 但无 active job、同 owner/media 多 job 终态时间倒挂、group 非 draft 被 OCR 写回。
- 最小复现/测试：job succeeded 后 owner write fail；同一媒体创建两 job 后旧 job 后到；group 状态从 draft 变 submitted 后 OCR 写回。
- 修复类型：owner projection CAS by job_id/version；OCR owner repair scanner；入队失败 durable retry；统一 owner 类型 reset。
- 下一步：先补只读 SQL，确认是否存在 pending owner 无 job 和 job succeeded 未投影。

##### P2-F02 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：只核查统一 OCR job、owner OCR JSON 投影、media moderation 触发入队、worker 写回 guard、stale reset 范围和同媒体多 job 乱序；不扩张到 `P2-F03` 的 upload session/moderation callback 对象内容漂移，也不把 onboarding review/profile 投影残留搬进本族。
- 代码证据：
  - `locallife/db/migration/000166_create_ocr_jobs.up.sql` 创建 `ocr_jobs`，状态机为 `pending/processing/succeeded/failed/cancelled`，`idempotency_key` 唯一；`locallife/db/query/ocr_job.sql` 中 `MarkOCRJobProcessing` 只 claim `pending` 或 lease 过期的 `processing`，`CompleteOCRJob`/`FailOCRJob` 只允许从 `processing` 更新，终态 job 不能再次被同一 task claim。
  - `locallife/api/ocr.go:createOCRJob` 是三段提交：`UpsertOCRJob` 先落 job；`markOCRPending` 再写 owner JSON 为 `pending + ocr_job_id`；media 已 approved 时再 `enqueueOCRJob`。三步不在一个事务或 durable command ledger 内。
  - `enqueueOCRJob` 失败时只在当前请求内调用 `markOCRJobDispatchFailed`：先 `FailPendingOCRJob`，再 `markOCRFailed` 写 owner；两步任一失败只打日志，可能留下 `ocr_jobs.failed + owner pending` 或 `ocr_jobs.pending + owner pending` 的半状态。
  - `processPendingOCRJobsForMediaModeration` 在 media approved 后只 `ListPendingOCRJobsByMediaAsset` 并逐个入队；入队失败直接返回错误，没有同 `createOCRJob` 一样把 job/owner 标 failed，也没有 pending approved job 的后台补派发 scanner。
  - `locallife/ocr/service.go:ExecuteJob` 先 `MarkOCRJobProcessing`，provider 成功/失败后先把 `ocr_jobs` 更新成 `succeeded/failed`，worker 随后才写 owner JSON。若 owner 写回失败，asynq retry 会重新进入 `ExecuteJob`，但 terminal job 已无法再次 `MarkOCRJobProcessing`，当前没有“读取 terminal job 并重放 owner 投影”的路径。
  - `locallife/worker/ocr_writeback_guard.go` 给 merchant/operator/group worker 加了 job payload、owner draft、media asset binding、owner OCR JSON `ocr_job_id` 的执行前 guard，并在 provider 返回后再查一次 current binding；这能收住大多数旧 job 写回。
  - `locallife/worker/task_rider_application_ocr.go` 只有 media asset binding guard：`riderIDCardAssetStillBound` / `riderHealthCertAssetStillBound` 不检查 owner OCR JSON 当前 `ocr_job_id`；同一 rider application、同一 media asset、同一 document/side 多个 OCR job 乱序完成时，旧 job 仍可覆盖新 job 的 OCR JSON。
  - `locallife/db/query/merchant_application.sql`、`operator_application.sql`、`rider_application.sql` 的 OCR 更新 SQL 均带 `WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'draft'`；`locallife/db/query/group.sql:UpdateGroupApplicationLicense` 只有 `WHERE id = $1`，虽然 worker/API 有 draft guard，但最终 SQL 没有把 read-check-write 窗口收在持久化层。
  - `locallife/scheduler/data_cleanup.go:cleanupStaleOCRTasks` 注释说清理长期 pending/processing OCR 任务，但实际只调用 `ResetStaleMerchantOCRStatus`；该 SQL 只把 `merchant_applications` 的 OCR JSON 状态改为 `failed`，不更新 `ocr_jobs`，也不覆盖 operator/rider/group owner。
- 已有保护/非问题：
  - `NP`：OCR job 表本身不是无 guard 的任意终态覆盖。`MarkOCRJobProcessing` 有 pending/expired-processing lease guard，`CompleteOCRJob`/`FailOCRJob` 只允许 processing，因此同一 job 的 provider 执行不会被普通重复 task 无条件改写。
  - `NP`：merchant/operator/group 的 worker 不是“任意旧任务都能覆盖 owner”。这些 worker 执行前和 provider 返回后都会校验 job payload、owner draft、media asset binding 和当前 OCR JSON 的 `ocr_job_id`，旧 job 多数会被 `skip stale OCR task` 收住。
  - `NP`：merchant/operator/rider 的最终 SQL 不是非 draft 也能写；三类 owner 的 OCR 更新均有 `status='draft'` guard。group 是本族例外。
  - `NP`：`ListOCRDeadLetterJobs` 是运营/管理查询失败或取消 job 的入口，不是恢复器；它不会自动重放 owner 投影，也不改变 job/owner 状态。
  - `NP`：`retryOCRJob`/手动重新创建 OCR job 是显式用户或运营动作，不是后台 repair；它可以生成新 job，但不修复旧 terminal job 已成功而 owner 未投影的半状态。
  - `NP`：`ocr_audit`、`ocr_observability`、readiness/helper 主要写审计、告警或响应派生字段，不直接推进 owner 业务终态；`NP-311` 继续按非问题收口，不在本轮扩张。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - `C0`：job 创建、owner pending、asynq 入队三段提交没有统一事务/command ledger；approved media 下如果入队失败补偿也失败，或者进程在三段之间退出，会留下 pending owner 无可执行 task 或 job/owner 状态不一致。
  - `C0`：media moderation approved 后的 pending job 只靠 callback/request 路径即时入队；没有扫 `approved + pending OCR job` 的后台补派发，因此 callback 入队失败或 callback 处理失败后，job 可长期停在 pending。
  - `C0`：worker 先把 `ocr_jobs` 置 terminal，再写 owner；owner 写失败后的重试无法重新 claim terminal job，缺少 terminal job -> owner projection repair scanner，这是 `succeeded/failed job 但 owner JSON 仍 pending/processing` 的核心来源。
  - `C0`：rider OCR 写回没有 job-id stale guard；同一 media asset 下多 job 乱序时，旧 job 可后到覆盖新 job 的 `id_card_ocr` / `health_cert_ocr`，并可能顺带改 `real_name`。
  - `C0`：group OCR 最终写入 `UpdateGroupApplicationLicense` 不带 `status='draft'`；worker/API 的读前 guard 与 SQL update 之间存在窗口，draft 变 submitted/approved/rejected 后仍可能被 pending/result patch 写入。
  - `C0`：stale cleanup 只修 merchant owner JSON，不修 `ocr_jobs`，也不覆盖 operator/rider/group；它甚至可能把 merchant owner JSON 标 failed，而对应 `ocr_jobs` 仍是 pending/processing/succeeded，制造新的观察不一致。
  - `C2/data-shape`：rider `id_card_ocr` 是正反面合并 JSON，同一字段里没有 side 维度的 `ocr_job_id`；如果前后面同时 OCR 或重复 OCR，SQL 只能粗略盘点同 owner/media/document/side 多 job 和当前 job id 倒挂，不能仅靠 JSON 精准证明每个字段来自哪一侧。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed`，但范围收窄为“入队/投影/retry/repair 缺口、rider 多 job 乱序、group SQL draft guard 缺失、stale reset 覆盖面不一致”为确认问题；merchant/operator/group worker stale guard、merchant/operator/rider SQL draft guard、dead-letter 查询和 OCR 观测辅助降为 `NP/已有保护`。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下均为只读模板。先按近 7/30 天窗口试跑，确认 JSON 字段形态后再扩大范围；`ocr_job_id` 可能是 JSON number 或 string，统一用 `->>'ocr_job_id'` 转 text 比较。

```sql
-- P2-F02-1: approved media 上长期 pending 的 OCR job，疑似 callback/入队失败后无人补派发。
SELECT
  oj.id,
  oj.owner_type,
  oj.owner_id,
  oj.document_type,
  oj.side,
  oj.media_asset_id,
  ma.upload_status,
  ma.moderation_status,
  oj.status,
  oj.created_at,
  now() - oj.created_at AS age
FROM ocr_jobs oj
JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.id = oj.media_asset_id
WHERE oj.status = 'pending'
  AND ma.upload_status = 'confirmed'
  AND ma.moderation_status = 'approved'
  AND oj.created_at < now() - interval '15 minutes'
ORDER BY oj.created_at ASC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F02-2: OCR job 已 terminal，但 merchant owner JSON 仍停在 pending/processing。
WITH merchant_ocr AS (
  SELECT id AS owner_id, 'business_license' AS document_type, '' AS side, business_license_ocr AS payload FROM merchant_applications WHERE business_license_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, 'food_permit', '', food_permit_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE food_permit_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, 'id_card', 'front', id_card_front_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE id_card_front_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, 'id_card', 'back', id_card_back_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE id_card_back_ocr IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  m.owner_id,
  m.document_type,
  m.side,
  m.payload->>'status' AS owner_ocr_status,
  m.payload->>'ocr_job_id' AS owner_ocr_job_id,
  oj.status AS job_status,
  oj.finished_at,
  oj.updated_at
FROM merchant_ocr m
JOIN ocr_jobs oj ON oj.id::text = m.payload->>'ocr_job_id'
WHERE oj.owner_type = 'merchant_application'
  AND oj.owner_id = m.owner_id
  AND oj.document_type = m.document_type
  AND oj.side = m.side
  AND oj.status IN ('succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled')
  AND m.payload->>'status' IN ('pending', 'processing')
ORDER BY oj.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F02-3: OCR job 已 terminal，但 operator owner JSON 仍停在 pending/processing。
WITH operator_ocr AS (
  SELECT id AS owner_id, 'business_license' AS document_type, '' AS side, business_license_ocr AS payload FROM operator_applications WHERE business_license_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, 'id_card', 'front', id_card_front_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE id_card_front_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, 'id_card', 'back', id_card_back_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE id_card_back_ocr IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  o.owner_id,
  o.document_type,
  o.side,
  o.payload->>'status' AS owner_ocr_status,
  o.payload->>'ocr_job_id' AS owner_ocr_job_id,
  oj.status AS job_status,
  oj.finished_at,
  oj.updated_at
FROM operator_ocr o
JOIN ocr_jobs oj ON oj.id::text = o.payload->>'ocr_job_id'
WHERE oj.owner_type = 'operator_application'
  AND oj.owner_id = o.owner_id
  AND oj.document_type = o.document_type
  AND oj.side = o.side
  AND oj.status IN ('succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled')
  AND o.payload->>'status' IN ('pending', 'processing')
ORDER BY oj.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F02-4: OCR job 已 terminal，但 rider owner JSON 仍停在 pending/processing。
WITH rider_ocr AS (
  SELECT id AS owner_id, 'id_card' AS document_type, id_card_ocr AS payload FROM rider_applications WHERE id_card_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, 'health_cert', health_cert_ocr FROM rider_applications WHERE health_cert_ocr IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  r.owner_id,
  r.document_type,
  r.payload->>'status' AS owner_ocr_status,
  r.payload->>'ocr_job_id' AS owner_ocr_job_id,
  oj.side,
  oj.media_asset_id,
  oj.status AS job_status,
  oj.finished_at,
  oj.updated_at
FROM rider_ocr r
JOIN ocr_jobs oj ON oj.id::text = r.payload->>'ocr_job_id'
WHERE oj.owner_type = 'rider_application'
  AND oj.owner_id = r.owner_id
  AND oj.document_type = r.document_type
  AND oj.status IN ('succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled')
  AND r.payload->>'status' IN ('pending', 'processing')
ORDER BY oj.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F02-5: OCR job 已 terminal，但 group application_data OCR JSON 仍停在 pending/processing。
WITH group_ocr AS (
  SELECT id AS owner_id, 'business_license' AS document_type, '' AS side, application_data->'business_license_ocr' AS payload FROM merchant_group_applications WHERE application_data ? 'business_license_ocr'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, 'id_card', 'front', application_data->'id_card_front_ocr' FROM merchant_group_applications WHERE application_data ? 'id_card_front_ocr'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, 'id_card', 'back', application_data->'id_card_back_ocr' FROM merchant_group_applications WHERE application_data ? 'id_card_back_ocr'
)
SELECT
  g.owner_id,
  g.document_type,
  g.side,
  g.payload->>'status' AS owner_ocr_status,
  g.payload->>'ocr_job_id' AS owner_ocr_job_id,
  oj.status AS job_status,
  oj.finished_at,
  oj.updated_at
FROM group_ocr g
JOIN ocr_jobs oj ON oj.id::text = g.payload->>'ocr_job_id'
WHERE oj.owner_type = 'group_application'
  AND oj.owner_id = g.owner_id
  AND oj.document_type = g.document_type
  AND oj.side = g.side
  AND oj.status IN ('succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled')
  AND g.payload->>'status' IN ('pending', 'processing')
ORDER BY oj.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F02-6: owner OCR JSON 引用的 job 不存在，或仍 pending/processing 超阈值。
WITH owner_refs AS (
  SELECT 'merchant_application' AS owner_type, id AS owner_id, 'business_license' AS document_type, '' AS side, business_license_ocr AS payload FROM merchant_applications WHERE business_license_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'merchant_application', id, 'food_permit', '', food_permit_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE food_permit_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'merchant_application', id, 'id_card', 'front', id_card_front_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE id_card_front_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'merchant_application', id, 'id_card', 'back', id_card_back_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE id_card_back_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'operator_application', id, 'business_license', '', business_license_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE business_license_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'operator_application', id, 'id_card', 'front', id_card_front_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE id_card_front_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'operator_application', id, 'id_card', 'back', id_card_back_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE id_card_back_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'rider_application', id, 'id_card', '', id_card_ocr FROM rider_applications WHERE id_card_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'rider_application', id, 'health_cert', '', health_cert_ocr FROM rider_applications WHERE health_cert_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'group_application', id, 'business_license', '', application_data->'business_license_ocr' FROM merchant_group_applications WHERE application_data ? 'business_license_ocr'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'group_application', id, 'id_card', 'front', application_data->'id_card_front_ocr' FROM merchant_group_applications WHERE application_data ? 'id_card_front_ocr'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'group_application', id, 'id_card', 'back', application_data->'id_card_back_ocr' FROM merchant_group_applications WHERE application_data ? 'id_card_back_ocr'
)
SELECT
  r.owner_type,
  r.owner_id,
  r.document_type,
  r.side,
  r.payload->>'status' AS owner_ocr_status,
  r.payload->>'ocr_job_id' AS owner_ocr_job_id,
  oj.status AS job_status,
  oj.created_at AS job_created_at,
  oj.updated_at AS job_updated_at
FROM owner_refs r
LEFT JOIN ocr_jobs oj ON oj.id::text = r.payload->>'ocr_job_id'
WHERE r.payload->>'status' IN ('pending', 'processing')
  AND (
    r.payload->>'ocr_job_id' IS NULL
    OR oj.id IS NULL
    OR (oj.status IN ('pending', 'processing') AND oj.created_at < now() - interval '30 minutes')
  )
ORDER BY r.owner_type, r.owner_id
LIMIT 300;

-- P2-F02-7: rider 同 owner/media/document/side 多 job，旧 job 后到覆盖新 job 的候选样本。
SELECT
  owner_id,
  media_asset_id,
  document_type,
  side,
  COUNT(*) AS job_count,
  array_agg(id ORDER BY created_at, id) AS job_ids,
  array_agg(status ORDER BY created_at, id) AS statuses,
  MIN(created_at) AS first_created_at,
  MAX(created_at) AS last_created_at,
  MAX(finished_at) AS last_finished_at
FROM ocr_jobs
WHERE owner_type = 'rider_application'
  AND created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY owner_id, media_asset_id, document_type, side
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY last_created_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F02-8: rider 当前 owner OCR job id 不是同 owner/media/document/side 最新 job，疑似乱序或旧投影。
WITH latest_rider_job AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (owner_id, media_asset_id, document_type, side)
    id,
    owner_id,
    media_asset_id,
    document_type,
    side,
    status,
    created_at,
    finished_at
  FROM ocr_jobs
  WHERE owner_type = 'rider_application'
    AND status IN ('succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled')
  ORDER BY owner_id, media_asset_id, document_type, side, created_at DESC, id DESC
)
SELECT
  ra.id AS rider_application_id,
  'id_card' AS document_type,
  lj.side,
  lj.media_asset_id,
  ra.id_card_ocr->>'ocr_job_id' AS owner_ocr_job_id,
  lj.id AS latest_job_id,
  lj.status AS latest_job_status,
  lj.finished_at
FROM rider_applications ra
JOIN latest_rider_job lj
  ON lj.owner_id = ra.id
 AND lj.document_type = 'id_card'
 AND (
   (lj.side = 'front' AND ra.id_card_front_media_asset_id = lj.media_asset_id)
   OR (lj.side = 'back' AND ra.id_card_back_media_asset_id = lj.media_asset_id)
 )
WHERE ra.id_card_ocr ? 'ocr_job_id'
  AND ra.id_card_ocr->>'ocr_job_id' <> lj.id::text
UNION ALL
SELECT
  ra.id,
  'health_cert',
  lj.side,
  lj.media_asset_id,
  ra.health_cert_ocr->>'ocr_job_id',
  lj.id,
  lj.status,
  lj.finished_at
FROM rider_applications ra
JOIN latest_rider_job lj
  ON lj.owner_id = ra.id
 AND lj.document_type = 'health_cert'
 AND ra.health_cert_media_asset_id = lj.media_asset_id
WHERE ra.health_cert_ocr ? 'ocr_job_id'
  AND ra.health_cert_ocr->>'ocr_job_id' <> lj.id::text
ORDER BY finished_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F02-9: group 非 draft 申请仍有 OCR JSON，结合 updated_at/finished_at 排查非 draft 写回窗口。
WITH group_ocr AS (
  SELECT id, status, updated_at, 'business_license' AS document_type, '' AS side, application_data->'business_license_ocr' AS payload FROM merchant_group_applications WHERE application_data ? 'business_license_ocr'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, status, updated_at, 'id_card', 'front', application_data->'id_card_front_ocr' FROM merchant_group_applications WHERE application_data ? 'id_card_front_ocr'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT id, status, updated_at, 'id_card', 'back', application_data->'id_card_back_ocr' FROM merchant_group_applications WHERE application_data ? 'id_card_back_ocr'
)
SELECT
  g.id AS group_application_id,
  g.status AS application_status,
  g.document_type,
  g.side,
  g.payload->>'status' AS owner_ocr_status,
  g.payload->>'ocr_job_id' AS owner_ocr_job_id,
  oj.status AS job_status,
  oj.finished_at,
  g.updated_at AS application_updated_at
FROM group_ocr g
LEFT JOIN ocr_jobs oj ON oj.id::text = g.payload->>'ocr_job_id'
WHERE g.status <> 'draft'
ORDER BY g.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F02-10: stale cleanup 造成 owner JSON failed 但 job 仍 pending/processing/succeeded 的 merchant 不一致样本。
WITH merchant_ocr AS (
  SELECT id AS owner_id, 'business_license' AS document_type, '' AS side, business_license_ocr AS payload FROM merchant_applications WHERE business_license_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT id, 'food_permit', '', food_permit_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE food_permit_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT id, 'id_card', 'front', id_card_front_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE id_card_front_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT id, 'id_card', 'back', id_card_back_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE id_card_back_ocr IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  m.owner_id,
  m.document_type,
  m.side,
  m.payload->>'status' AS owner_ocr_status,
  m.payload->>'ocr_job_id' AS owner_ocr_job_id,
  oj.status AS job_status,
  oj.created_at,
  oj.updated_at,
  oj.finished_at
FROM merchant_ocr m
JOIN ocr_jobs oj ON oj.id::text = m.payload->>'ocr_job_id'
WHERE oj.owner_type = 'merchant_application'
  AND m.payload->>'status' = 'failed'
  AND oj.status IN ('pending', 'processing', 'succeeded')
ORDER BY oj.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F02-11: processing lease 超时仍未释放的 OCR job；用于验证 lease recovery 与 worker 重试是否有效。
SELECT
  id,
  owner_type,
  owner_id,
  document_type,
  side,
  media_asset_id,
  status,
  attempt_count,
  max_attempts,
  leased_at,
  lease_owner,
  now() - leased_at AS lease_age,
  updated_at
FROM ocr_jobs
WHERE status = 'processing'
  AND leased_at < now() - interval '20 minutes'
ORDER BY leased_at ASC
LIMIT 200;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 查 `mark unified ocr owner pending failed`：对应 job 已创建但 owner pending 未写入，用户可能拿到 500，但 job 行已存在。
  - 查 `enqueue unified ocr job failed`、`fail pending OCR job after enqueue failure failed`、`mark OCR owner failed after enqueue failure failed`：区分入队失败、job 标 failed 失败、owner 标 failed 失败三类半状态。
  - 查 `enqueued delayed ocr job after media moderation approval` 和 moderation callback 错误日志：若 approved asset 有 pending job 但没有这类日志，说明 OCR 联动未触发；若有错误后没有后续重试，说明缺补派发。
  - 查 `skip stale OCR task` 以及 reason=`job_payload_mismatch` / `media_asset_mismatch` / `ocr_job_id_mismatch` / `current_binding_mismatch`：merchant/operator/group 的旧 job guard 命中属于已有保护证据。
  - 查 `skip stale rider id card OCR success writeback` / `skip stale rider health cert OCR success writeback`：这只证明 media asset 不匹配时能跳过；若 `P2-F02-7/8` 命中同 media 多 job，它不能证明 job-id 乱序已被收住。
  - 查 `update group application license` 相关 worker 错误和 group application 状态变更时间线：用于判断是否发生 draft guard 读后写窗口。
  - 查 `cleanup stale OCR tasks failed` / scheduler 运行日志：验证 stale cleanup 是否实际运行；即便运行，也只说明 merchant owner JSON 被 reset，不代表 ocr_jobs 或其他 owner 收敛。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - 入队失败补偿：让 `UpsertOCRJob` 和 owner pending 成功，mock distributor 返回错误，再让 `FailPendingOCRJob` 或 `markOCRFailed` 失败；断言出现 `job pending/failed + owner pending` 的半状态。
  - approved media pending job 补派发缺口：创建 media approved + pending OCR job，模拟 moderation callback 入队失败或进程退出；等待 scheduler 后断言没有后台扫描把 job 重新入队。
  - terminal job owner 投影失败：让 provider 成功并 `CompleteOCRJob`，随后让 owner update 返回错误；asynq retry 再执行同 task，断言因 terminal job 无法 `MarkOCRJobProcessing` 而不会重放 owner projection。
  - rider 同媒体多 job 乱序：同一 rider application 同一 media asset 同一 side 创建两个 job，让新 job 先成功写 owner，再让旧 job 后成功；断言当前可覆盖 owner `ocr_job_id`/OCR 字段为旧 job。
  - group 非 draft 写回窗口：worker 前置 guard 通过后暂停，把 group application 状态改为 submitted/approved，再恢复 worker 写 `UpdateGroupApplicationLicense`；断言当前 SQL 仍可写入 application_data OCR patch。
  - stale cleanup 覆盖面：构造 merchant/operator/rider/group 各一个 owner pending/processing OCR JSON 和对应 pending/processing job，运行 `cleanupStaleOCRTasks`；断言只有 merchant owner JSON 被置 failed，`ocr_jobs` 与其他 owner 不变。
  - merchant/operator/group stale guard 回归：构造 owner OCR JSON 中 `ocr_job_id` 已变更，再投递旧 task；断言对应 worker 返回 nil 且不改 owner。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 `P2-F02-1/6/11` 命中生产，应先补 OCR dispatch repair：扫描 `approved media + pending job` 和 lease 超时 job，按 job 状态/attempt/next_retry_at 重新入队或标记失败，不能只依赖请求线程和 moderation callback。
  - 若 `P2-F02-2/3/4/5/10` 命中，应新增 owner projection repair scanner：以 `ocr_jobs` terminal 结果为事实源，按 owner_type/document/side/job_id CAS 重放 owner JSON；若 owner 已换 job_id 或非 draft，应只写 audit/alert，不覆盖。
  - rider 修复优先级高于单纯日志：owner JSON 需要 side-aware job_id 或拆分 front/back OCR payload，worker/API failure writeback 都要校验当前 `ocr_job_id`，并在 SQL 层加 expected job_id/version 条件。
  - group 修复应把 `status='draft'` 下沉到 `UpdateGroupApplicationLicense` 或新增 OCR 专用 SQL，避免依赖 worker/API 的读前 guard；非 draft 命中样本需人工核对是否已影响审核资料。
  - stale reset 应从“只改 merchant owner JSON”改成统一 OCR repair/reaper：同时处理 `ocr_jobs`、owner projection、operator/rider/group，并保留 error_code/error_message/finished_at，避免制造 owner/job 双真值。
  - 在补 durable command/outbox 前，`markOCRJobDispatchFailed` 仍应视为 best-effort 补偿；生产巡检要把入队失败日志和 owner/job SQL 结果一起看，不能只看 HTTP 返回。

#### P2-F03. 媒体上传、审核、moderation callback 和对象内容漂移

- 原始编号：`23/84-89/216/387-388/415/422/NP-252-NP-256`。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed`。upload session 完成/过期、asset/session 半状态、审核 trace、callback 终态覆盖、OCR 联动和直传 object_key 重传均有确认风险。
- 证据闭口：`84/387/NP-252` 是过期 pending session 可复用/complete 窗口；`85/NP-253` 是 asset/session 完成分段；`87/NP-254` 是 trace 持久化失败；`88/NP-256` 是 moderation 终态缺 expected-state；`415` 是凭证后续重传导致对象内容和 asset 状态漂移。
- 生产验证：查 expired/pending session、asset 已创建但 session 未 completed、moderation pending 超阈值、trace_id 空但已受理、审核终态时间倒挂、object_key 多次写入。
- 最小复现/测试：complete upload 与 expire 并发；审核受理成功后 trace 写失败；callback success/failed 乱序；确认后用旧直传凭证重传同 key。
- 修复类型：upload session expected-state；asset/session 同事务或 repair；moderation trace durable command；callback first-terminal-wins；object_key 一次性或内容 hash 校验。
- 下一步：先确认 `ExpireStaleUploadSessions` 是否真实调度；若未调度，过期相关优先级降为未来入口防线。

##### P2-F03 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：只核查媒体上传 session、`media_assets`、微信异步审核、审核 callback 到 OCR 联动、以及直传 `object_key` 内容漂移；`422` 桌台新增主图 clear-then-insert 是确认问题，但完整闭口放到 `P2-F06`，本族只保留交叉引用，避免重复展开。
- 代码证据：
  - `locallife/media/registry.go:CreateUploadSession` 复用 pending session 时只按 `uploaded_by/media_category/checksum_sha256/status='pending'` 查询，不检查 `expires_at`，也不刷新 DB 中旧 session 的 `expires_at`；因此过期但仍 pending 的 session 会被重新返回，随后 `CompleteUpload` 又按旧 `expires_at` 拒绝。
  - `locallife/media/registry.go:CompleteUpload` 顺序执行 `CreateMediaAsset`、`ConfirmMediaAssetUploaded`、`CompleteUploadSession`，最后一步错误被 `_, _ =` 忽略；`CompleteUploadSession` SQL 只 `WHERE id=$1`，没有 `status='pending'` / `expires_at >= now()` expected-state。
  - `locallife/api/media.go:completeMediaUpload` 在 `CompleteUpload` 已提交 asset/session 后才调用 `triggerMediaModeration`；审核失败会向客户端返回 502，但 media asset 可能已经 confirmed，session 也可能已 completed。
  - `locallife/api/media_moderation.go:triggerMediaModeration` 对非 review image 类别会 auto-approve；对 review image 且非 development 环境，如果 WeChat client/AppID/AppSecret 缺失，只 warn 后返回 nil，不把 asset 标 failed/quarantined，也不建立补审任务。
  - `triggerMediaModeration` 先外呼 `WechatClient.MediaCheckAsync`，成功后才 `SetMediaAssetModerationTraceID`；`moderation_trace_id` 有非空唯一索引，能防止一个 trace 绑定多个 asset，但外部已受理、本地 trace 写失败时，旧 trace callback 无法关联本地 asset。
  - `handleMiniProgramMediaCheckNotify` 先 `SetMediaAssetModerationStatusByTraceID` 写 `approved/rejected/quarantined`，再调用 `processPendingOCRJobsForMediaModeration`；callback 状态更新 SQL 只按 trace id，不要求当前 `moderation_status='pending'`。
  - `processPendingOCRJobsForMediaModeration` 的 approved 分支只 enqueue pending OCR job；enqueue 失败直接返回错误，没有像 `createOCRJob` 主路径那样调用 `markOCRJobDispatchFailed`，也没有后台扫描 `terminal media + pending OCR job` 的补偿器。
  - `locallife/media/storage_oss.go:CreateDirectUpload` 的 OSS POST policy 限制 key 前缀、content-type 前缀和大小，但不是精确 key，也未绑定 `checksum_sha256`、请求 `ETag`、对象版本或 `Content-MD5`；`CompleteUpload` 只 `StatObject`，不读取对象校验内容摘要。
  - `locallife/media/storage_local.go:DevUploadHandler` 本地直传同样只按表单 `key` 写文件，不校验 upload session 当前状态；开发模式下可重写同一 object key，生产 OSS 是否允许覆盖还需结合 bucket 配置确认。
- 已有保护/非问题：
  - `NP`：当前未读到 `ExpireStaleUploadSessions` 的运行调度注册；`84` 不应表述成“现有 scheduler 正在并发 expire 后被 complete 覆盖”的日常运行问题。它保留为 SQL final guard 缺失、人工/未来 expiry 接入和跨过期时间窗口的防线缺口。
  - `NP`：`CompleteUpload` 已有用户归属校验、请求 `object_key` 与 session `object_key` 一致性校验、过期时间检查、`StatObject` 存在性检查；这些能挡住直接拿别人的 upload_id、错 key complete、未上传即 complete。
  - `NP`：`media_assets.object_key` 唯一索引和 `GetMediaAssetByObjectKey` 幂等回读可以避免重复创建多条同 object_key 的 asset；它不保证 object key 对应内容在确认后不可变。
  - `NP`：`moderation_trace_id` 非空唯一索引和 callback 按 trace id 查 asset，避免了旧 trace 静默错绑到另一条 asset；旧 trace 本地缺失时的问题是无法关联/无法修复，不是错绑。
  - `NP`：微信 callback 返回 500 时 provider 可能重投，同一 trace 重投会再次尝试 OCR 联动；这提供短期 replay 机会，但不是本地 durable backlog 或 repair scanner。
  - `NP`：非 review image 类别当前按设计 auto-approve；不要把所有媒体类别都当作必须走微信审核。`usesWechatMediaModeration` 当前只覆盖 `review`。
  - `M`：`422` 桌台图片新增设主图是确认的投影原子性问题，但它是业务表 `table_images` 主图投影，不是 media upload/session/moderation 本身；第三轮完整闭口放在 `P2-F06`。
- 仍成立的问题：
  - `C0`：过期 pending upload session 被创建接口幂等复用，返回新的直传凭证但 complete 仍用旧 `expires_at` 拒绝，形成“可上传但不可确认”的用户可见时序错误。
  - `C0`：asset 创建/确认和 session completed 分段，且最后一步错误被忽略；可产生 `media_assets.confirmed` 但 session 仍 pending/expired 或 `media_asset_id` 缺失的半状态。
  - `C0`：审核触发是事务后动作；微信请求失败、缺 openid、私有 URL 签发失败、trace 持久化失败或审核配置缺失，都可能让 asset 已 confirmed 但 moderation 长期 pending。
  - `C0`：外部审核已受理但本地 trace 写入失败时，旧 callback 无法关联 asset；用户重试可能产生新 trace，旧 trace 结果只能失败/重投/丢弃，不能自然修复本地 pending asset。
  - `C0`：moderation callback 终态写入没有 first-terminal/expected-state guard；同 trace conflicting callback、人工/其它入口已终态后又收到 callback，都可覆盖 `approved/rejected/quarantined`。
  - `C0`：callback 先写 asset 终态再做 OCR 联动；OCR enqueue/fail/owner 写回失败后，asset 终态与 OCR job/owner 投影会半状态，且本地没有独立 scanner 重放这段联动。
  - `C0`：直传凭证和 object key 没有内容不可变约束；complete 成功、审核/OCR/业务引用之后，同一 object key 的真实对象仍可能被未过期凭证或本地 dev upload 覆盖，导致 DB `checksum_sha256/moderation_status/OCR result` 与实际对象内容漂移。
  - `C2/environment`：生产 OSS bucket 是否启用版本、对象锁、覆盖禁止、CDN 缓存回源策略，决定 `415` 的影响频率和可观测性；代码侧未把这些约束作为应用不变量。
- 当前判断更新：维持 `C0-confirmed`，但拆清楚：`387/85/87/88/89/216/388/415` 是当前代码确认问题；`84` 收窄为未注册 expiry scheduler 下的 SQL/future/manual 防线缺口；`422` 转到 `P2-F06` 完整处理；`NP-252-NP-256` 作为已有保护与边界收口保留。
- 生产 SQL 模板：以下均为只读模板。先用近 7/30 天窗口盘点，再决定是否全量回溯；`media_upload_sessions` 当前有 `updated_at`，但大多数 session 半状态仍优先用 `created_at/expires_at/status/completed_at/media_asset_id` 观察。

```sql
-- P2-F03-1: 已过期但仍 pending 的 upload session，创建接口会复用、complete 会拒绝。
SELECT
  id,
  uploaded_by,
  business_type,
  media_category,
  visibility,
  object_key,
  checksum_sha256,
  status,
  expires_at,
  created_at,
  now() - expires_at AS expired_age
FROM media_upload_sessions
WHERE status = 'pending'
  AND expires_at < now()
ORDER BY expires_at ASC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F03-2: 同幂等键下已过期 pending session 阻塞新 session 的样本。
SELECT
  uploaded_by,
  media_category,
  checksum_sha256,
  COUNT(*) AS pending_count,
  MIN(expires_at) AS earliest_expires_at,
  MAX(expires_at) AS latest_expires_at,
  array_agg(id ORDER BY created_at) AS upload_ids,
  array_agg(object_key ORDER BY created_at) AS object_keys
FROM media_upload_sessions
WHERE status = 'pending'
GROUP BY uploaded_by, media_category, checksum_sha256
HAVING MIN(expires_at) < now()
ORDER BY earliest_expires_at ASC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F03-3: asset 已 confirmed，但 upload session 未 completed 或未记录 media_asset_id。
SELECT
  mus.id AS upload_id,
  mus.uploaded_by,
  mus.media_category,
  mus.status AS session_status,
  mus.media_asset_id AS session_media_asset_id,
  mus.expires_at,
  ma.id AS asset_id,
  ma.upload_status,
  ma.moderation_status,
  ma.object_key,
  ma.created_at AS asset_created_at,
  mus.created_at AS session_created_at
FROM media_upload_sessions mus
JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.object_key = mus.object_key
WHERE ma.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND ma.upload_status = 'confirmed'
  AND (
    mus.status <> 'completed'
    OR mus.media_asset_id IS NULL
    OR mus.media_asset_id <> ma.id
  )
ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F03-4: completed session 指向的 asset 缺失、软删除或未 confirmed。
SELECT
  mus.id AS upload_id,
  mus.uploaded_by,
  mus.media_category,
  mus.status AS session_status,
  mus.media_asset_id,
  mus.object_key AS session_object_key,
  ma.id AS asset_id,
  ma.object_key AS asset_object_key,
  ma.upload_status,
  ma.deleted_at,
  mus.created_at
FROM media_upload_sessions mus
LEFT JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.id = mus.media_asset_id
WHERE mus.status = 'completed'
  AND (
    mus.media_asset_id IS NULL
    OR ma.id IS NULL
    OR ma.deleted_at IS NOT NULL
    OR ma.upload_status <> 'confirmed'
  )
ORDER BY mus.created_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F03-5: review image 长期 moderation pending 且没有 trace，疑似配置缺失、外呼失败或 trace 持久化失败。
SELECT
  id,
  uploaded_by,
  object_key,
  media_category,
  visibility,
  upload_status,
  moderation_status,
  moderation_trace_id,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  now() - updated_at AS pending_age
FROM media_assets
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
  AND upload_status = 'confirmed'
  AND media_category = 'review'
  AND moderation_status = 'pending'
  AND moderation_trace_id IS NULL
  AND updated_at < now() - interval '15 minutes'
ORDER BY updated_at ASC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F03-6: review image 有 trace 但长期 pending，疑似微信 callback 未到、签名/路由失败或 provider 重投耗尽。
SELECT
  id,
  uploaded_by,
  object_key,
  moderation_trace_id,
  moderation_status,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  now() - updated_at AS trace_age
FROM media_assets
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
  AND upload_status = 'confirmed'
  AND media_category = 'review'
  AND moderation_status = 'pending'
  AND moderation_trace_id IS NOT NULL
  AND updated_at < now() - interval '30 minutes'
ORDER BY updated_at ASC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F03-7: public confirmed 但非 approved 的媒体，排查是否被页面引用后不可展示。
SELECT
  id,
  uploaded_by,
  object_key,
  media_category,
  visibility,
  upload_status,
  moderation_status,
  moderation_trace_id,
  created_at,
  updated_at
FROM media_assets
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
  AND visibility = 'public'
  AND upload_status = 'confirmed'
  AND moderation_status <> 'approved'
  AND created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F03-8: asset approved/rejected/quarantined 后仍有 pending OCR job，说明 media->OCR 联动未收敛。
SELECT
  ma.id AS media_asset_id,
  ma.object_key,
  ma.media_category,
  ma.moderation_status,
  ma.updated_at AS media_updated_at,
  oj.id AS ocr_job_id,
  oj.owner_type,
  oj.owner_id,
  oj.document_type,
  oj.side,
  oj.status AS ocr_job_status,
  oj.created_at AS ocr_job_created_at
FROM media_assets ma
JOIN ocr_jobs oj ON oj.media_asset_id = ma.id
WHERE ma.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND ma.upload_status = 'confirmed'
  AND ma.moderation_status IN ('approved', 'rejected', 'quarantined')
  AND oj.status = 'pending'
  AND ma.updated_at < now() - interval '15 minutes'
ORDER BY ma.updated_at ASC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F03-9: asset rejected/quarantined 但 owner OCR JSON 仍 pending/processing，blocked 分支 owner failed 未投影。
WITH owner_refs AS (
  SELECT 'merchant_application' AS owner_type, id AS owner_id, 'business_license' AS document_type, '' AS side, business_license_media_asset_id AS media_asset_id, business_license_ocr AS payload FROM merchant_applications WHERE business_license_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'merchant_application', id, 'food_permit', '', food_permit_media_asset_id, food_permit_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE food_permit_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'merchant_application', id, 'id_card', 'front', id_card_front_media_asset_id, id_card_front_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE id_card_front_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'merchant_application', id, 'id_card', 'back', id_card_back_media_asset_id, id_card_back_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE id_card_back_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'operator_application', id, 'business_license', '', business_license_media_asset_id, business_license_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE business_license_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'operator_application', id, 'id_card', 'front', id_card_front_media_asset_id, id_card_front_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE id_card_front_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'operator_application', id, 'id_card', 'back', id_card_back_media_asset_id, id_card_back_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE id_card_back_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'rider_application', id, 'id_card', '', COALESCE(id_card_front_media_asset_id, id_card_back_media_asset_id), id_card_ocr FROM rider_applications WHERE id_card_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'rider_application', id, 'health_cert', '', health_cert_media_asset_id, health_cert_ocr FROM rider_applications WHERE health_cert_ocr IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  r.owner_type,
  r.owner_id,
  r.document_type,
  r.side,
  r.media_asset_id,
  ma.moderation_status,
  r.payload->>'status' AS owner_ocr_status,
  r.payload->>'ocr_job_id' AS owner_ocr_job_id,
  ma.updated_at AS media_updated_at
FROM owner_refs r
JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.id = r.media_asset_id
WHERE ma.moderation_status IN ('rejected', 'quarantined')
  AND r.payload->>'status' IN ('pending', 'processing')
ORDER BY ma.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F03-10: 上传 session 与 asset 的 checksum/size 声明不一致；不能证明覆盖，但可筛出内容事实漂移候选。
SELECT
  mus.id AS upload_id,
  mus.object_key,
  mus.checksum_sha256 AS session_checksum,
  ma.checksum_sha256 AS asset_checksum,
  mus.content_length AS declared_content_length,
  ma.file_size AS confirmed_file_size,
  ma.upload_status,
  ma.moderation_status,
  ma.created_at AS asset_created_at
FROM media_upload_sessions mus
JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.object_key = mus.object_key
WHERE ma.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND (
    mus.checksum_sha256 <> ma.checksum_sha256
    OR mus.content_length <> ma.file_size
  )
ORDER BY ma.created_at DESC
LIMIT 200;

-- P2-F03-11: 同一 object_key 是否存在异常多 session/asset 关系；object_key unique 正常应最多一 asset。
SELECT
  mus.object_key,
  COUNT(DISTINCT mus.id) AS session_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ma.id) AS asset_count,
  array_agg(DISTINCT mus.status) AS session_statuses,
  array_agg(DISTINCT ma.upload_status) AS asset_upload_statuses,
  MIN(mus.created_at) AS first_session_created_at,
  MAX(ma.created_at) AS last_asset_created_at
FROM media_upload_sessions mus
LEFT JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.object_key = mus.object_key
GROUP BY mus.object_key
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mus.id) > 1 OR COUNT(DISTINCT ma.id) > 1
ORDER BY first_session_created_at DESC
LIMIT 200;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 查 `media: create upload session`、`media: confirm media asset uploaded`、`CompleteUploadSession` 相关 DB 错误：确认是否出现 asset 已 confirmed 但 session 未 completed 的分段失败。
  - 查 `media moderation skipped because wechat moderation is not configured`：非 development 环境出现即对应 `388`，需要和 `P2-F03-5` 对齐。
  - 查 `requesting async media moderation`、`async media moderation request accepted`、`persist media moderation trace id failed`：外呼成功但 trace 写入失败是 `87` 的直接证据。
  - 查 `media moderation callback received` 后紧跟 `update media moderation status by trace id failed`：说明 provider callback 找不到本地 trace，可能是 trace 持久化失败或回调旧 trace。
  - 查 `process pending ocr jobs for media moderation failed`：asset 已写终态，OCR 联动失败，需结合 `P2-F03-8/9` 盘点残留。
  - 查 `media moderation skipped because asset is already processed or queued`：这是已有保护证据，说明重复 complete 没有再次发起新 trace。
  - 对 `415`，单靠 DB 很难证明对象内容被覆盖；需要结合 OSS access log/object versioning/CDN 回源日志、同 object_key 的 PUT/POST 时间与 `media_assets.updated_at` 对比。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - 过期 pending 复用：创建一个 `status='pending'` 且 `expires_at < now()` 的 session，再用同 uploaded_by/category/checksum 创建上传会话；断言返回旧 upload_id，再 complete 返回 410。
  - session 半状态：让 `CreateMediaAsset` 和 `ConfirmMediaAssetUploaded` 成功，`CompleteUploadSession` 返回错误；当前应仍返回成功 asset，DB 留下 session pending/no media_asset_id。
  - future expiry 覆盖：模拟 complete 读到 pending 未过期后暂停，另一路调用 `ExpireUploadSession`，再恢复 `CompleteUploadSession`；当前 SQL 可把 expired 改 completed。
  - 审核配置缺失：非 development 环境、review image、wechatClient/AppID/AppSecret 缺失，complete 成功返回 pending；断言没有补审任务或状态变化。
  - trace 写失败：mock `MediaCheckAsync` 返回 trace，`SetMediaAssetModerationTraceID` 失败；断言外部已受理但本地无 trace，随后 callback trace 返回 not found。
  - callback 终态覆盖：同一 trace 先回调 pass 写 approved，再回调 risky/review；当前 SQL 可把 approved 改成 rejected/quarantined。
  - OCR 联动半状态：callback 先写 approved，然后让 `DistributeTask*OCR` 返回错误；断言 handler 500 且 asset 已 approved、OCR job 仍 pending。
  - 对象覆盖：拿到直传凭证后上传 A，complete 并审核/OCR；在凭证有效期内对同 object_key 上传 B，断言 DB checksum/审核/OCR 仍对应 A，而下载/读取对象变为 B。OSS 生产需用隔离 bucket 或测试 key 验证，不能在真实用户对象上做。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 `P2-F03-1/2` 命中生产，应先修创建端复用策略：过期 pending session 不复用，或复用时原子刷新 `expires_at` 和直传凭证；同时补可审计的 session expiry scanner。
  - 若 `P2-F03-3/4` 命中，应把 asset 创建/确认/session completed 放进事务或补 media session repair：按 object_key/media_asset_id 反向把 session 修成 completed，失败时不能静默返回成功。
  - 若 `P2-F03-5/6/7` 命中，应补 media moderation backlog/retry scanner，并让生产配置缺失 fail-closed 或启动期校验失败；不要把“跳过审核且 pending”当成功完成。
  - 若 `P2-F03-8/9` 命中，应把 media moderation terminal 与 OCR linkage 变成 durable outbox/repair：asset 终态写入后必须有可重放的 OCR linkage command，approved enqueue 失败也要落 dispatch failed 或 retry ledger。
  - callback 写终态应改 first-terminal-wins：`WHERE moderation_trace_id=$1 AND moderation_status='pending'`，late/conflicting callback 写 audit/alert，不覆盖已终态；同时保留 provider payload 以便人工判断微信是否可能出现冲突终态。
  - `415` 修复应从对象不可变入手：精确 key policy、一次性 upload token、complete 后废止凭证、绑定 content checksum/ETag/version id、禁止 overwrite 或启用 bucket version/object lock；没有对象版本时，不应把 `media_assets.checksum_sha256` 当作已验证内容事实。
  - `422` 后续按 `P2-F06` 修复：新增主图与清旧主图必须走同一事务，且 DB 应有 `(table_id) WHERE is_primary` 的唯一约束或等价 CAS。

#### P2-F04. 通知、WebSocket、Pub/Sub、replay 和可靠投递

- 原始编号：`157-164/315/416-419/NP-274/NP-297-NP-301/NP-300/NP-312`，资金告警另归 `P0-F12`。
- 当前判断：`C0-confirmed`。通知默认 at-least-once/best-effort，WebSocket reliable path 只覆盖在线 Hub 后的消息，Pub/Sub/offline/broadcast full 和 replay sequence 存在确认边界。
- 证据闭口：`163/164/NP-300` 是通知无业务幂等和 nil distributor fallback；`416` 是 Redis Pub/Sub 当作 pushed；`417-419` 是 sequence/retry/queue/ack 分散；`315` 是催单成功、限流和通知分离。
- 生产验证：查同 related_id 重复通知、is_pushed=true 但无在线确认、replay zset/list 不一致、WebSocket ack timeout/重连后 last_sequence 断点。
- 最小复现/测试：通知 worker 重试；Pub/Sub 失败或无在线订阅；Hub broadcast 满；可靠消息发送后进程崩溃/重连。
- 修复类型：通知业务幂等键；pushed 与 delivered/acked 分离；WebSocket durable sequence per user/device；offline queue 统一存储和 ack 状态。
- 下一步：对主业务关键通知先分层：必须送达、可重复、可丢弃，别用一套语义吃全场。

##### P2-F04 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：本族只覆盖通知、催单提醒、配送延迟提醒、operator alert、Redis Pub/Sub、WebSocket Hub/replay/queue/ack 的弱顺序问题；不把资金告警 outbox、配送主状态机、前端重复点击或 OCR/媒体审核放进本族。通知/实时投影不是订单、配送、支付等主状态真值，但它们会影响用户/商户/运营可见性、重复提醒和“已推送”字段语义。
- 代码证据：
  - 通用通知 worker 每次处理都会创建新 `notifications` 行：`executeSendNotificationPayload` 在偏好检查后直接 `CreateNotification`，失败时让 asynq 重试；`notification.sql` 的 `CreateNotification` 是普通 insert，`notifications` migration 只有普通索引，没有 `(user_id,type,related_type,related_id,...)` 业务唯一键。因此任务重试、operator alert 部分 recipient 失败重试、重复上游入队都可重复建同一 related 通知。
  - `SendNotification` 在有 task distributor 时只负责入队；无 distributor 且非 test 时启动 goroutine 后立即返回 nil，goroutine 内 `CreateNotification` 失败只 log。配送状态通知 helper 又忽略 `SendNotification` 返回值，因此主状态已提交后，通知持久化失败不会反馈给调用方。
  - 配送 delayed scanner 先 `UpdateDeliveryDelayed`，SQL 只按 `id` 写 `is_delayed=true`，不要求当前仍 `pending`；随后再查订单/商户 boss 并入队商户通知。boss 缺失、taskDistributor nil 或通知入队失败都不会回滚 `is_delayed`，后续扫描会因已 delayed 跳过。
  - operator pending dispatch alert scheduler 入队失败时会删除 `delivery_timeout_alerts` ledger，这是旧账 `160` 的已加强保护；但 worker 处理时遇到 delivery 不存在、已非 pending、阈值未到、订单/商户不存在或无 active recipient 会直接返回 nil，已创建的 `(delivery_id, alert_key)` ledger 保留，后续同 key 不再提醒。
