```sql
SELECT id, merchant_id, region_id, status, investigation_report,
       merchant_rectification_report, resolution, resolved_at, updated_at
FROM food_safety_cases
WHERE status = 'resolved'
ORDER BY resolved_at DESC NULLS LAST, updated_at DESC
LIMIT 100;
```

- 日志/指标排查：
  - 按 `merchant_group_applications.id` 关联用户编辑、提交、OCR pending/done/failed、管理员审核日志；重点看审核后 0-60 秒内是否还有 `UpdateGroupApplicationBasic` 或 `UpdateGroupApplicationLicense` 成功日志。
  - 查管理端创建集团接口的 5xx，同时用 `P3-F05-3/P3-F05-4` 对应时间窗核对是否留下 group/member/audit 半状态。
  - 对想吃榜，按 `normalized_name + region_id` 关联用户投票请求和商户入驻审批通过日志；重点看投票开始早于审批、wanted row 创建晚于 merchant active 的交错。
  - 食安案件只做抽样 sanity check；若出现 resolved 后调查报告被覆盖，应回旧账 `117/NP-275-NP-277` 和本族 `NP-354` 重新评估。
- 最小复现/测试：
  - `394`：请求 A 读取 draft 后暂停在 `UpdateGroupApplicationBasic` 前，请求 B 提交/审核；放行 A，期望当前代码可改 submitted/approved 资料。OCR 版本用 worker guard 读取 draft 后暂停，提交/审核后再放行最终 `UpdateGroupApplicationLicense`。
  - `395`：投票请求先查无真实商户后暂停，审批请求提交 merchant active 并执行 matched 扫描，最后放行投票创建 active wanted；榜单列表应仍显示该 active wanted。
  - `396`：在 `CreateMerchantGroup` 成功后让 `CreateGroupMember` 或 `CreateGroupAuditLog` 返回错误；验证接口 500 且 DB 留下 active group，无 owner member 或 audit 缺失。
  - `NP-320/NP-321/NP-354`：保留并发重复审核/重复投票/重复结案的负向测试，证明这些不是本轮新增问题。
- 修复决策门槛：
  - 若 `P3-F05-2` 或日志证明审核后仍有资料写回，`394` 应改为 SQL expected-state / expected-version guard，并把 no rows 映射成业务冲突；不要只在 API/worker 前置读处补判断。
  - 若 `P3-F05-3/P3-F05-4` 命中，`396` 应优先事务化手工创建集团，必要时加 owner member 不变量和可恢复审计补偿。
  - 若 `P3-F05-5` 命中，`395` 应补入驻/投票共同不变量或 reconciliation：创建 wanted 前在事务内复核 merchant active，或为 merchant active 与 wanted active 建立后台关闭/匹配任务。
  - 本族低频，不建议先做大范围产品重构；先用生产 SQL 判断是否已有脏数据，再决定是否进入修复批次。

#### P3-F06. 明确不作为当前问题的 NP 收口池

- 原始编号：大量 `NP-*`，代表已核实非问题、设计边界、历史/禁用链路或已并入其它族。
- 当前判断：`N-non-problem/NP` 或 `M-merged`。第三轮不再围绕这些条目重复开账，但保留它们作为“不要误报”的护栏。
- 主要收口：合单支付当前 fail-closed `NP-10/NP-59/NP-176`；线上会员充值暂停 `NP-11`；商户代录会员余额事务完整 `NP-12/NP-330`；主支付创建事务级互斥 `NP-146`；当前 production target/outbox 白名单覆盖 `NP-140/NP-141/NP-169/NP-233/NP-236`；云打印手动补打是显式语义 `NP-77/NP-107`；多个只读查询/统计/字典不推进主状态机。
- 使用规则：后续若某 NP 的前提变化，例如合单支付重新启用、direct 主业务恢复、配置运行入口接入，就必须重新开账或升级到对应 P0/P1/P2/P3 风险族。
- 下一步：不做修复，只在相关代码变更时作为回归检查清单。

##### P3-F06 第三轮闭口补记（2026-06-21）

- 本轮定位：`P3-F06` 是第三轮的“不要误报/不要重复开账”收口索引，不是新的代码扫描范围。本轮通过 `rg '^### NP-'` 确认主账本已有 `NP-1` 到 `NP-399` 共 399 条 NP/合并项标题；本补记只做分类、重开条件和后续使用规则，不把 399 条正文复制到此处。
- 口径澄清：
  - `N-non-problem/NP`：当前代码已有事务/CAS/唯一约束/幂等/恢复器，或路径是只读、禁用、历史、未来能力、测试/离线工具，因此不作为当前运行态状态时序问题。
  - `M-merged`：不是独立新问题，但并不代表安全；真实风险已经并入原始编号或 P0/P1/P2/P3 风险族，例如 `NP-234/NP-237/NP-305` 指回 payment fact/application/outbox 公共底座，`NP-250` 指回 group OCR 旧账，`NP-275-NP-296` 指回食安/索赔/追偿旧账。
  - `Boundary/future`：当前无生产 writer 或主入口 fail-closed，但 schema/常量/管理配置仍保留；一旦重新接入运行态，就必须重开审计。
- 覆盖分组：
  - 资金与 provider 链路非新增项：`NP-1-NP-79` 主要覆盖宝付开户/报备/核验费、提现、分账、退款、直连 retained、支付事实应用、云打印和支付 timeout 的非问题或合并边界。典型非问题是 `NP-10/NP-59/NP-176` 合单 fail-closed、`NP-11` 线上会员充值暂停、`NP-12` 代录会员余额事务完整、`NP-17/NP-21/NP-38` callback/ACK 边界已有保护；典型合并项是 `NP-31/NP-70/NP-78` 等历史/retained direct 或旧 worker 路径。
  - 订单、预约、堂食、配送和通知非新增项：`NP-80-NP-177` 覆盖后到索赔资格窗、配送池/围栏/位置、堂食 session/table/billing、订单/预约支付成功 outbox、退款通知和 payment timeout 分派。这里很多不是“无风险”，而是已归入订单/预约/配送/通知旧账，例如 `NP-80/NP-100/NP-151/NP-170/NP-177`。
  - 公共 payment fact/application/outbox 底座：`NP-233-NP-239/NP-305` 是第三轮最重要的合并护栏。当前未发现 production target/event 白名单漏扫，但 `processing` 无 stale reclaim、claim 不检查 `next_retry_at`、domain/outbox/fact/application 多段提交和对账可见性缺口仍分别归 `174-182/184-188/282/370`，不能被 P3-F06 误读为已修复。
  - OCR、媒体、入驻、资质和上传：`NP-247-NP-265/NP-311/NP-382/NP-386/NP-395` 收口 OCR audit/readiness/provider/helper、owner 投影、approved 媒体补派发、subject profile 和入驻资料 helper。这里保留的真实问题仍指向 `78-89/216-218/387-389/415` 等旧账；非问题部分主要是低层解析、readiness、DTO、权限读取或已有 draft guard。
  - 配送、食安、索赔、追偿、通知：`NP-266-NP-304/NP-388/NP-389` 把 delivery cancel/grab/ETA、food safety pause、claim recovery/dispute/action、operator alert、通知 best-effort 和商户 App push 归入已有旧账，不再逐 helper 文件重复开账。
  - 配置、权限、会员、优惠、集团/运营低频状态：`NP-313-NP-379` 收口优惠券领取/使用事务保护、库存容量、App 登录/设备、运营商申请 CAS、集团审核/加入、规则/报表/读侧、员工/权限、会员余额账本、BLE 打印、配置投影、Web 登录、KDS、食安结案、Casbin、代金券、包装/购物车、商户资料/营业时间等。真实残余已拆到 `390-413`、`45/46a/46b`、`394-396` 或 P3-F01 至 P3-F05。
  - 文件级剩余扫描收口：`NP-380-NP-399` 覆盖 API helper、中间件、位置/区域读侧、deprecated 上传、Baofu settlement helper、购物车/订单预览、membership 读侧、支付/error facade、db/sqlc glue、worker helper、provider DTO/client、media/OCR/maps/rules/token/util、WebSocket store、cmd/internal、SQL 源和脚本配置。除已单列的 `414/415/416-419/420/421/422/423` 外，这一批不新增运行态状态时序问题。
- 仍需保留的“非 NP”例外：
  - `414` 手动欺诈检测、`415` 媒体直传对象覆盖、`416-419` WebSocket/通知可靠投递、`420/421` provider 侧运维命令、`422` 桌台图片主图、`423` 自有云打印自检脚本，均不是 P3-F06 非问题；它们是从剩余文件扫描中明确拆出的真实或需处理问题。
  - `390-413` 已被 P3-F01 至 P3-F05 分摊，不因相邻 NP 收口而降级。
  - `45/46a/46b`、`78-89`、`117/121-148`、`174-188`、`216-218`、`282/370` 等旧账仍然有效；P3-F06 只是阻止重复开新号。
- 账本完整性校验命令：

```bash
rg '^### NP-[0-9]+' artifacts/production-risk-audit/state-sequencing-audit-snapshot-2026-06-16.md | wc -l
rg -n '^### (414|415|416|417|418|419|420|421|422|423)\\.' artifacts/production-risk-audit/state-sequencing-audit-snapshot-2026-06-16.md
rg -n '^#### P[0-3]-F[0-9]+\\.' artifacts/production-risk-audit/state-sequencing-audit-snapshot-2026-06-16.md
```

- 重开条件：
  - 禁用/历史链路恢复：合单支付、线上会员充值、direct 主业务、legacy applyment、`profit_sharing_returns`、旧 replace-order 或旧 refund worker 重新接入生产时，必须从对应 NP 回到 P0/P1/P2 风险族重审。
  - 只读/投影变成 writer：统计、报表、规则读侧、推荐、区域、KDS、workbench、membership 读侧、平台可见性、ledger 展示等如果开始写订单、支付、配送、会员、商户或权限主状态，必须重新开账。
  - provider/helper 被直接用于状态推进：Baofu/WeChat/cloudprint/media/OCR/maps/rules/token/util 等低层 helper 如果新增 DB writer、外呼后落库、callback ACK 或恢复器，不能继续沿用本 NP 结论。
  - 当前保护被改弱：事务内锁、expected status、unique partial index、idempotency key、scheduler 白名单、fail-closed guard、draft guard、resolved guard 任一被删除或旁路新增，应回到对应 NP 和风险族复核。
  - 生产数据命中半状态：如果只读 SQL/日志发现 P3/P2/P1/P0 补记中的半状态命中，相关 NP 只能作为“不要重复拆号”的索引，不能作为忽略依据。
- 后续使用规则：
  - 做修复排期时，不要把 `NP-*` 全部列为待修；只修已确认 finding、P0/P1/P2/P3 风险族和明确例外 `414-423`。
  - 做代码 review 时，若改动触及某个 NP 的前提，先在本主账本对应 NP 处更新结论，再决定是否升级到风险族；不要在新文档中另建平行账本。
  - 做生产取证时，优先执行各风险族补记中的 SQL/日志模板；P3-F06 只提供范围护栏和完整性命令，不替代具体风险族的取证。

### 第三轮全局覆盖说明

- P0 已覆盖资金、支付、退款、分账、提现、provider fact/application/outbox、资金告警和 retained direct。
- P1 已覆盖订单、预约、堂食、配送、食安、索赔追偿、入驻资质、运营商/权限、下单快照和 Baofu 开户报备。
- P2 已覆盖打印、OCR、媒体、通知/WebSocket、前端重复触发、二维码/图片和运维 provider 命令。
- P3 已覆盖配置版本、读侧投影、报表对账展示、优惠/会员规则、低频运营管理状态和 NP 收口池。
- 第三轮文档闭口状态：所有风险族均已补生产只读 SQL/日志排查/最小复现或收口规则；这不是修复完成，也不是线上命中确认。
- 下一阶段：按优先级执行生产只读取证、补复现测试、制定修复批次；若上下文压缩或切换，先读文首防漂移协议和本节锚点，再按风险族继续。

## 第四阶段生产只读取证与复现台账（2026-06-21）

### 第四阶段防漂移协议

- source of truth 仍然是本文件；第四阶段不要新建平行账本，不要把生产取证结果散落到临时文档。
- 当前阶段只做三件事：生产只读取证、复现测试规划、修复批次排序。除非用户明确切换到修复阶段，不改业务代码、不改 SQL schema、不跑写入/迁移/补偿脚本。
- 所有生产 SQL 必须只读执行；禁止 `UPDATE/INSERT/DELETE/TRUNCATE/ALTER/DROP/CREATE`，禁止人工补状态，禁止 provider 外呼。
- 生产执行建议使用只读账号，并包裹在只读事务内：

```sql
BEGIN READ ONLY;
SET LOCAL statement_timeout = '30s';
SET LOCAL lock_timeout = '2s';
-- paste one read-only query here
ROLLBACK;
```

- 查询输出必须脱敏后回填本节：只保留业务对象 id、状态、时间、聚合计数和必要 trace key；手机号、姓名、身份证、openid、原始 provider payload、raw_resource、合同号等敏感字段不要贴全文。
- 命中不等于 bug 已生产发生：命中行必须按“业务对象时间线 + 应用日志 + provider 后台/回调/worker 日志”交叉确认。未命中也不等于风险不存在，只说明当前窗口未发现。
- 每个取证包执行后必须写回：执行时间、窗口、查询 id、命中行数、最老/最新样本、样本对象 id、初步判断、下一步。

### 当前进度锚点

- 已完成：第三轮全部 `33` 个风险族闭口；`NP-1..NP-399` 收口；第四阶段防漂移协议已写入。
- 当前进行：`P4-B00 第四阶段生产只读执行总控` + `P4-B01 P0 资金链生产只读取证包` + `P4-B04 P1 主业务生产聚合预检包` + `P4-B05 P2 副作用/外设/异步投影生产聚合预检包` + `P4-B06 P3 观测/报表/治理类生产聚合预检包`。`P4-B01A-1..5`、`P4-B01B-1..5`、第一批引用的 P0 明细 SQL、第二批定向引用的 P0 明细 SQL、`P4-B04-1..8`、`P4-B05-1..7`、`P4-B06-1..5` 已做本地 `EXPLAIN` schema/语法校验，且 `P4-B01C/P4-B04` 已回填生产只读结果；`P4-B01B-1..5` 已在本轮继续核查后回填生产只读结果并补充定性；`P4-B00A` 生产执行操作票索引、`P4-B00B` 内部一致性校验、`P4-B00C` 敏感输出扫描与脱敏收紧已记录；`P4-B02/P4-B03` 复现与修复批次门禁模板已建但未入场；当前可继续按 `P4-B05/P4-B06` 接收生产输出，不要转入代码修复。
- 2026-06-22 继续推进补记：第四阶段现在开始向 `P4-B02/P4-B03` 过渡，已把 `P2-F06`、`P0-F10`、`P0-F11` 作为优先复现/修复骨架写入门禁；后续只在这三条和同级真问题上继续推进，不再扩展无边界扫描。
- 2026-06-22 继续核查补记：这三条的最小复现边界已压实到代码层面。`ClaimBehaviorActionRecoveryScheduler.runOnce()` 只扫 `created/failed`，`executeClaimBehaviorAction()` 只处理已入队任务；`RefundRecoveryScheduler.runOnce()` 只路由 cancelled order/reservation、pending order/reservation 与 `processing` stuck refund，代码树中未检出 rider deposit 的 pending 重扫函数或查询；`SubmitWithdrawal()` 在 create 结果不确定时会保留 `refund_order=pending` 并记录 `external_payment_command=unknown`。因此 `P4-B02-1/2/3` 已足够写成最小复现卡，但仍停在只读取证与修复草案，不进入业务代码。
- 下一步：继续按 `P4-B00` 总控登记剩余执行批次；P0/P1 已有命中结果时，先补同族明细再决定是否进入 `P4-B02 复现测试计划` 或 `P4-B03 修复批次草案`。第四阶段聚合预检包当前已覆盖 P0/P1/P2/P3；出现 `S1/S2` 后再决定修复顺序。`P4-B01B` 中 `P0-F07`、`P0-F10`、`P0-F11` 仍建议优先看恢复链路；`P0-F06` 已确认是 provider 语义冲突，`P0-F09` 仍偏 backlog/数据形状。
- 2026-06-22 代码再核查补记：`payment_fact_application_scheduler` 只是 1 分钟轮询 + 30 秒 unique 的恢复节流，不是新时序问题；`payment_recovery_scheduler` 只补 `paid + unprocessed` 的 direct 业务，不回扫 `pending/no-prepay`，因此不能拿它证明 retained direct 的 pending 占位已自动闭口；`claim_recovery`/`rider_deposit` 的 query success 仍保留“fact/application 可先落、payment_order 可能暂未 paid”的灰区，这一条已在 `P0-F09` 里保留，不升级成新的主业务问题。
- 2026-06-22 继续核查补记：`P4-B01B-2` 的 `create_profit_sharing` 命令、事实和 evidence 绑定都以 `profit_sharing_order.id` 为主键，代码里也没看到 `profit_sharing_orders` 的删除/软删路径，因此生产里若仍出现 `missing_order`，更像历史孤儿/数据形状残留，不像当前活跃写路径的时序缺陷；先按 `S3-data-quality` 观察，不直接升格成新的主业务 bug。
- 2026-06-22 继续核查补记：`P4-B01B-4` 的 claim overdue / recovery / release / notify 不是裸露单点，`ClaimRecoveryScheduler` 会把 overdue recovery 变成 `block` 动作并入队，`ClaimBehaviorActionRecoveryScheduler` 也会回收 `created/failed` 动作，所以 `paid_claim_recovery_release_not_closed`、`overdue_recovery_missing_successful_block` 更像 backlog/恢复队列问题；但 `ClaimBehaviorActionRecoveryScheduler` 不扫描 `running`，因此若真的出现 `running > 30m`，那仍是一个没有专门回收器的 stuck action 候选。
- 2026-06-22 继续核查补记：`P4-B01B-5` 的 rider deposit refund 没有独立的 `pending` 重扫器，`RefundRecoveryScheduler` 只会补 `processing` 的 stuck refund；而 rider deposit 直连退款在“命令结果不确定”时会保持 `pending` 等待 query/retry，所以 `rider_deposit_refund_pending_unknown_over_30m` 仍然是实打实的恢复缺口候选，不是纯数据尾巴。

### P4-B00. 第四阶段生产只读执行总控与回填操作清单

- 目标：把第四阶段后续动作固定为“生产只读取证 -> 脱敏回填 -> 判级闸门 -> 再决定复现/修复草案”，防止上下文压缩、交接或插入问题导致跳错账本、跳过 P0、或把预检命中直接当成修复结论。
- 范围：本总控只覆盖 `P4-B01/P4-B04/P4-B05/P4-B06` 已落账查询；除非用户明确要求，不新增第五套聚合包，不扩散扫描，也不修改业务代码。
- 执行前必填：执行环境、执行人或输出来源、执行时间、生产库/只读副本、查询窗口、`statement_timeout`、`lock_timeout`。这些信息至少写入下方批次记录；单条查询仍要在对应回填矩阵中记录执行时间和窗口。
- 回填落点：
  - P0 资金链结果只写 `P4-B01C`；命中后按 `P4-B01D` 决定是否补同族明细。
  - P1 主业务状态机结果写 `P4-B04` 回填矩阵；涉及 payment/refund/profit sharing/payout 的样本必须回跳 P0。
  - P2 副作用/外设/异步投影结果写 `P4-B05` 回填矩阵；涉及订单/配送/预约主状态回跳 P1，涉及资金回跳 P0。
  - P3 观测/报表/治理结果写 `P4-B06` 回填矩阵；观测盲点可判 `S4-observability`，但资金事实、outbox、application 命中仍回跳 P0。
- 推荐执行顺序：
  1. `P4-B01A-1..5`：P0 第一闸门。每条执行后立即回填 `P4-B01C`；任一 `S1-immediate` 候选出现时，先补同族明细和日志/provider 联查。
  2. `P4-B01B-1..5`：P0 第二闸门。仅在第一闸门 0 命中、只出现 `S3-data-quality`，或业务指定专项抽样时执行；执行理由写入备注。
  3. `P4-B04-1..8`：P1 主状态预检。优先 `P4-B04-1..4`，再 `P4-B04-5..8`；命中只表示需要明细联查，不直接进入修复。
  4. `P4-B05-1..7`：P2 异步/副作用预检。优先 `P4-B05-1..4`，再 `P4-B05-5..7`；命中先判断是 backlog、投影漂移、外设失败还是核心状态回跳。
  5. `P4-B06-1..5`：P3 观测/治理预检。优先 `P4-B06-1` 与 `P4-B06-3`，再执行展示投影、商业规则和低频运营查询。
- 停止/降级规则：
  - 任一查询返回 `S1-immediate` 并经日志/provider/业务时间线交叉确认后，停止扩展低优先级排查，先进入 `P4-B02` 复现设计与 `P4-B03` 修复批次草案。
  - 任一查询 timeout：不要增大超时硬跑；缩小窗口、按 `dimension` 分片，或记录为 `query-timeout` 并写下一步。
  - 任一查询因生产 schema 差异失败：记录为 `query-failed-schema`，只写错误摘要和查询 ID；不要现场运行未落账的临时改写 SQL。
  - 任一结果量过大：只记录总量、时间边界、最新少量样本 id 和下一步分片方案；不得把全量明细贴入账本。
  - 任一输出含敏感字段：先脱敏再回填；raw provider payload、`raw_resource`、openid、手机号、姓名、身份证、合同号不得进入主账本。
- 判级口径：
  - `S1-immediate`：资金成功但业务未应用、业务已终态但 command/fact/application 悬挂、provider success 与本地 failed/closed 冲突、金额/对象不一致、published outbox 未推动 owner。
  - `S2-backlog`：pending/failed/processing 积压、worker/scheduler/asynq 可恢复 backlog，暂未证实业务对象错账。
  - `S3-data-quality`：历史 retained/direct/no-prepay、弱重复 active、人工脚本样本、历史投影漂移，暂不直接修核心事务。
  - `S4-observability`：告警、报表、可见面、审计链缺失或延迟，先补观测和运行手册，不直接定为业务状态 bug。
  - `S0-clean-window`：当前窗口 0 命中，只代表本窗口未发现；不能删除候选风险，也不能改写第三轮闭口结论。
- 最小证据包：每条生产结果必须包含 `执行时间`、`查询 ID`、`时间窗口/阈值`、`命中行数`、`最老样本`、`最新样本`、`样本对象/摘要`、`初步等级`、`下一步`。没有这些字段的输出视为未完成回填。

| 批次 | 执行时间 | 执行环境 | 查询范围 | 输出来源 | 完成状态 | 备注 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 待填 | 待填 | 生产只读/只读副本 | P4-B01A/P4-B01B/P4-B04/P4-B05/P4-B06 | 待填 | 待执行 | 执行后先回填本行，再逐条填对应矩阵 |

#### P4-B00A. 生产执行操作票索引

- 用途：执行或交接生产只读查询时按本表推进；每执行一条，立即回填对应矩阵，不等整批跑完后凭记忆补。
- 查找方式：在本文件内搜索操作票“稳定查找锚点”列里的精确注释，例如 `-- P4-B01A-1:`；不要依赖行号，因为本账本后续还会继续插入内容。
- 执行顺序：以本操作票的 `顺序` 列为准，不以 SQL 模板在文档中的物理先后为准；当前正文中部分 `P4-B01B` 模板位于 `P4-B01A` 前面，但生产执行仍先跑 `P4-B01A-1..5`。
- 执行包装：每条 SQL 单独放入 `BEGIN READ ONLY; SET LOCAL statement_timeout = '30s'; SET LOCAL lock_timeout = '2s'; ... ROLLBACK;`；不要把多条大查询塞进同一个长事务。
- 输出要求：只回填聚合结果和少量脱敏样本 id；若查询输出列含 raw/provider payload、openid、手机号、姓名、身份证、合同号，先删列或脱敏后再落账。
- 失败处理：timeout、schema drift、结果量过大、敏感字段误出，都先写入对应矩阵的“下一步”，不要现场运行未落账的改写版 SQL。

| 顺序 | 查询 ID | 目标闸门 | 稳定查找锚点 | 回填落点 | 当前状态 | 执行备注 |
| ---: | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

#### P4-B00B. 操作票-查询锚点-回填矩阵一致性校验

- 校验时间：2026-06-22。
- 校验目标：确认 `P4-B00A` 的执行操作票、后续 SQL 注释锚点、生产结果回填矩阵三者一一对应，避免生产执行时漏跑、跑错或回填错位置。
- 校验口径：
  - 操作票 ID：匹配 `| 序号 | P4-B... |` 的 30 行。
  - SQL 锚点：匹配 `-- P4-B...:` 的 30 个查询注释锚点。
  - 回填矩阵：匹配 `| 待填 | P4-B... |` 的 30 行。
- 校验结果：`op_count=30`、`anchor_count=30`、`matrix_count=30`；`missing_anchor/extra_anchor_not_in_op/missing_matrix/extra_matrix_not_in_op` 均为空。
- 当前结论：操作票与 SQL 模板、回填矩阵一致；这只是账本结构校验，不代表生产查询已执行，也不能填写 `S0/S1/S2/S3/S4`。

#### P4-B00C. 敏感输出扫描与脱敏收紧记录

- 扫描时间：2026-06-22。
- 扫描范围：第四阶段 `P4-B00/P4-B01/P4-B04/P4-B05/P4-B06/P4-B02/P4-B03` 区间内的生产查询模板和执行说明。
- 扫描关键词：`raw_resource/raw_payload/payload/openid/open_id/phone/mobile/id_card/identity/身份证/手机号/合同号/contract/name`。
- 扫描结论：
  - `P4-B05-2/P4-B05-3` 中 `payload`、`id_card`、OCR JSON 相关字段只作为 CTE 内部状态判断或 join 输入；最终输出仍为 `issue_type/dimension/row_count/oldest_signal_at/newest_signal_at/sample_ids`。
  - `P4-B05-5` 中 `epf.raw_resource::text ILIKE '%REFUND%'` 只作为 provider 语义筛选条件；最终输出不包含 raw payload。
  - `P4-B06-1` 中配置名、分类等字段只参与聚合分组/判定；最终样本输出仍使用对象 id。
  - `P4-B06-5` 原 `duplicate_active_group_name` 分支会把 `normalized_group_name` 放入 `sample_ids`，已收紧为 `group_name_hash:` + `md5(normalized_group_name)`，避免生产回填泄露名称文本。
- 本地校验：2026-06-22 对收紧后的 `P4-B06-5` 执行 `BEGIN READ ONLY` + `EXPLAIN (COSTS OFF)`，当前 `locallife_test` schema 下通过。
- 当前结论：第四阶段聚合模板未发现会直接输出 provider raw payload、openid、手机号、身份证或合同号的最终列；生产回填仍必须人工复核导出结果，发现敏感字段先脱敏再落账。

#### P4-B00D. 第四阶段输出面复核结果

- 复核范围：`P4-B00A` 30 条操作票对应的 P0/P1/P2/P3 聚合输出面，以及 `P4-B00B/P4-B00C` 的一致性与脱敏收紧结果。
- 复核结论：
  - 生产模板的最终输出列仍以 `issue_type/dimension/row_count/时间窗/样本 id` 或同类聚合摘要为主，没有发现会把 `raw provider payload`、`openid`、手机号、姓名、身份证或合同号直接落到最终回填列的模板。
  - `duplicate_active_group_name` 的样本字段已改成 `group_name_hash:` + `md5(normalized_group_name)`，避免把集团名称原文放进回填面。
  - `payload`、`id_card`、`raw_resource`、`contract` 等词在 P4 区域主要出现在 CTE 内部过滤或 join 条件，不作为最终输出列。
- 下一步：继续按 `P4-B00A` 执行/接收生产只读结果；在没有生产回填前，不把模板安全性误写成已确认生产安全。

### P4-B01. P0 资金链生产只读取证包

- 目标：用最少的只读查询确认 P0 资金链是否已有线上半状态、backlog、错账候选或人工不可见异常。
- 执行顺序：
  1. 公共底座：`P0-F03-1/2/3/4/5/6/7`，先看 payment fact application 与 payment domain outbox 是否存在长期 `processing`、failed/pending backlog、terminal fact 无 application、outbox payload drift。
  2. 退款裂缝：`P0-F05-1/2/3/4/5`，看本地 refund_order 与 provider success/fact/application 是否冲突，以及主动退款 pending 是否无恢复。
  3. 提现命令与事实：`P0-F08-1/2/3/4/5/6/7/8`，看 submitted/unknown command、processing withdrawal、provider fact amount/contract mismatch、同 owner 多 processing。
  4. late success 与 timeout：`P0-F04-1/2/3/4/5` + `P0-F02-1/2/3/4/5/6`，看本地取消/关闭/过期后是否存在 provider success、paid-unprocessed 或预约 late paid。
  5. active payment 唯一性：`P0-F01-1/2/3/4/5`，看主宝付链路是否真的有重复 active，以及 retained direct/no-prepay 占位规模。
  6. 人工可见性闸门：`P0-F12-1/2/5`，只在前五组命中后执行，用于判断异常是否已进入 outbox/alert/operator 可见面。
- 低成本预检聚合：执行明细 SQL 前，可先跑 `P4-B01A` 聚合包；若聚合为 0，则记录窗口为 `S0-clean-window`，暂不拉明细。
- 本地校验：2026-06-21 已在 `locallife_test` 对 `P4-B01A-1..5` 执行 `BEGIN READ ONLY` + `EXPLAIN (COSTS OFF)`；5 条均通过当前 schema/语法检查。校验中修正 PostgreSQL 数组切片写法为 `(ARRAY_AGG(...))[1:10]`。
- 明细查询本地校验：2026-06-21 已在 `locallife_test` 对第一批生产取证引用的 `P0-F03-1..7`、`P0-F05-1..5`、`P0-F08-1..8`、`P0-F04-1..5`、`P0-F02-1..6`、`P0-F01-1..5`、`P0-F12-1..6` 执行 `BEGIN READ ONLY` + `EXPLAIN (COSTS OFF)`；均通过当前 schema/语法检查。校验中修正 `P0-F04-1/2` 的退款金额列名：`refund_orders` 使用 `refund_amount`，不是 `amount`。
- 第二批定向取证本地校验：2026-06-22 已在 `locallife_test` 对 `P0-F06-1..5`、`P0-F07-1..6`、`P0-F09-1..8`、`P0-F10-1..8`、`P0-F11-1..5` 执行 `BEGIN READ ONLY` + `EXPLAIN (COSTS OFF)`；均通过当前 schema/语法检查。校验中修正三类生产取证模板漂移：不在回填字段中选择 `raw_resource`，改用 `external_object_key/external_secondary_key` 等 trace key；`external_payment_fact_applications` 错误列名从 `last_error_message` 改为 `last_error`；对 `payment_orders.attach`、`behavior_actions.detail`、`behavior_decisions.fact_snapshot` 的数字键提取改为 regex/guard 后再转 `bigint`，避免只读 SQL 因历史脏值中断。
- 第二批定向聚合预检：执行第二批明细 SQL 前，可先跑 `P4-B01B` 聚合包；若某个风险族聚合为 0，则该族明细暂不拉取，只记录窗口为 `S0-clean-window`。
- 第二批聚合本地校验：2026-06-22 已在 `locallife_test` 对 `P4-B01B-1..5` 执行 `BEGIN READ ONLY` + `EXPLAIN (COSTS OFF)`；5 条均通过当前 schema/语法检查。该聚合包只输出 issue_type、dimension、count、时间窗和样本 id，不输出 provider raw payload、合同号、openid、手机号、姓名或身份证。

```sql
-- P4-B01B-1: P0-F06 provider 语义/金额异常/主动 query 旁路聚合预检。
WITH provider_semantics AS (
  SELECT
    'amount_mismatch_refund_payment_still_paid_or_processed'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    ro.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  JOIN refund_orders ro ON ro.payment_order_id = po.id
  WHERE ro.refund_type = 'amount_mismatch'
    AND ro.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (po.processed_at IS NOT NULL OR po.status = 'paid' OR ro.status IN ('failed', 'closed'))

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'direct_query_applied_but_payment_not_paid'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    COALESCE(epfa.applied_at, epf.observed_at, epf.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
   AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
  JOIN external_payment_fact_applications epfa ON epfa.fact_id = epf.id
  WHERE po.payment_channel = 'direct'
    AND po.business_type IN ('rider_deposit', 'claim_recovery')
    AND epf.fact_source IN ('query', 'manual_reconciliation')
    AND epf.terminal_status = 'success'
    AND epfa.status = 'applied'
    AND po.status <> 'paid'
    AND epf.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'baofu_payment_refund_state_normalized_success'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    epf.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
   AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
  WHERE po.payment_channel = 'baofu_aggregate'
    AND epf.upstream_state = 'REFUND'
    AND epf.terminal_status = 'success'
    AND epf.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'baofu_refund_success_amount_mismatch'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    ro.id AS object_id,
    epf.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM refund_orders ro
  JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = ro.payment_order_id
  JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'refund_order'
   AND epf.business_object_id = ro.id
  WHERE epf.provider = 'baofu'
    AND epf.capability = 'baofu_refund'
    AND epf.terminal_status = 'success'
    AND epf.amount IS NOT NULL
    AND epf.amount <> ro.refund_amount
    AND epf.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'expired_pending_payment_order_provider_mismatch_candidate'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    po.expires_at AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  WHERE po.status = 'pending'
    AND po.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND po.expires_at < now()
    AND po.payment_channel IN ('direct', 'baofu_aggregate')
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM provider_semantics
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B01B-2: P0-F07 分账 command/fact/outbox/owner 口径聚合预检。
WITH profit_sharing_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'profit_sharing_processing_over_30m'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(po.business_type, 'unknown')::text AS dimension,
    pso.id AS object_id,
    pso.command_started_at AS signal_at
  FROM profit_sharing_orders pso
  JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = pso.payment_order_id
  WHERE pso.provider = 'baofu'
    AND pso.channel = 'baofu_aggregate'
    AND pso.status = 'processing'
    AND pso.command_started_at < now() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'profit_sharing_command_outcome_drift'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(pso.status, 'missing_order')::text AS dimension,
    epc.id AS object_id,
    epc.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM external_payment_commands epc
  LEFT JOIN profit_sharing_orders pso ON pso.id = epc.business_object_id
  WHERE epc.capability = 'baofu_profit_sharing'
    AND epc.command_type = 'create_profit_sharing'
    AND epc.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (
      (epc.command_status = 'accepted' AND (pso.sharing_order_id IS NULL OR pso.status = 'processing'))
      OR epc.command_status IN ('rejected', 'unknown')
    )

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'profit_sharing_success_fact_not_finished_or_not_applied'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(pso.status, 'missing_order')::text AS dimension,
    pso.id AS object_id,
    epf.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM profit_sharing_orders pso
  JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'profit_sharing_order'
   AND epf.business_object_id = pso.id
  LEFT JOIN external_payment_fact_applications epfa ON epfa.fact_id = epf.id
  WHERE epf.capability = 'baofu_profit_sharing'
    AND epf.terminal_status = 'success'
    AND epf.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (pso.status <> 'finished' OR epfa.status IS DISTINCT FROM 'applied')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'legacy_profit_sharing_return_not_closed'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(psr.status, 'unknown')::text AS dimension,
    psr.id AS object_id,
    psr.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM profit_sharing_returns psr
  LEFT JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'profit_sharing_return'
   AND epf.business_object_id = psr.id
  LEFT JOIN external_payment_fact_applications epfa ON epfa.fact_id = epf.id
  WHERE psr.status IN ('pending', 'processing')
     OR epfa.status IN ('pending', 'failed', 'processing')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'profit_sharing_result_outbox_payload_drift'::text AS issue_type,
    pdo.status::text AS dimension,
    pdo.id AS object_id,
    pdo.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM payment_domain_outbox pdo
  JOIN profit_sharing_orders pso ON pso.id = (pdo.payload ->> 'profit_sharing_order_id')::bigint
  WHERE pdo.event_type = 'profit_sharing_result_ready'
    AND pdo.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (
      (pdo.payload ->> 'result' = 'SUCCESS' AND pso.status <> 'finished')
      OR (pdo.payload ->> 'result' IN ('FAILED', 'CLOSED') AND pso.status <> 'failed')
    )

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'mixed_owner_or_unapplied_addon_candidate'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    po.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = po.order_id
  LEFT JOIN table_reservations r ON r.id = po.reservation_id
  WHERE po.payment_channel = 'baofu_aggregate'
    AND po.requires_profit_sharing = TRUE
    AND po.status = 'paid'
    AND (
      (po.business_type = 'order' AND po.reservation_id IS NOT NULL AND r.status = 'completed' AND COALESCE(o.status, '') <> 'completed')
      OR (po.business_type = 'reservation_addon' AND r.status = 'completed' AND po.processed_at IS NULL)
    )
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM profit_sharing_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B01B-3: P0-F09 retained direct 半状态聚合预检。
WITH retained_direct AS (
  SELECT
    'retained_direct_pending_no_prepay_or_expired'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    po.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  WHERE po.payment_channel = 'direct'
    AND po.business_type IN ('baofu_account_verify_fee', 'claim_recovery', 'rider_deposit')
    AND po.status = 'pending'
    AND (po.prepay_id IS NULL OR po.expires_at < now())

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'verify_fee_flow_points_to_bad_payment'::text AS issue_type,
    flow.state::text AS dimension,
    flow.id AS object_id,
    flow.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM baofu_account_opening_flows flow
  JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = flow.verify_fee_payment_order_id
  WHERE flow.state IN ('verify_fee_pending', 'verify_fee_processing')
    AND po.business_type = 'baofu_account_verify_fee'
    AND (po.status IN ('closed', 'failed') OR (po.status = 'pending' AND po.prepay_id IS NULL) OR (po.status = 'pending' AND po.expires_at < now()))

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'verify_fee_paid_processed_but_flow_not_advanced'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(flow.state, 'missing_flow')::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    po.processed_at AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  LEFT JOIN baofu_account_opening_flows flow ON flow.verify_fee_payment_order_id = po.id
  LEFT JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
   AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
   AND epf.capability = 'direct_jsapi_payment'
  LEFT JOIN external_payment_fact_applications epfa
    ON epfa.fact_id = epf.id
   AND epfa.consumer = 'baofu_account_verify_fee_domain'
  WHERE po.business_type = 'baofu_account_verify_fee'
    AND po.payment_channel = 'direct'
    AND po.status = 'paid'
    AND po.processed_at IS NOT NULL
    AND (flow.id IS NULL OR flow.state IN ('profile_pending', 'verify_fee_pending', 'verify_fee_processing') OR epfa.status IN ('pending', 'failed', 'processing'))

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'direct_query_applied_but_rider_claim_payment_not_paid'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    COALESCE(epfa.applied_at, epf.observed_at, epf.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
   AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
  JOIN external_payment_fact_applications epfa ON epfa.fact_id = epf.id
  WHERE po.payment_channel = 'direct'
    AND po.business_type IN ('rider_deposit', 'claim_recovery')
    AND epf.terminal_status = 'success'
    AND epf.fact_source IN ('query', 'manual_reconciliation')
    AND epfa.status = 'applied'
    AND po.status <> 'paid'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'rider_deposit_paid_or_applied_missing_ledger_or_credit'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    COALESCE(po.paid_at, po.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  LEFT JOIN rider_deposits rd ON rd.payment_order_id = po.id AND rd.type = 'deposit'
  LEFT JOIN rider_deposit_credits rdc ON rdc.payment_order_id = po.id
  LEFT JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
   AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
   AND epf.capability = 'direct_jsapi_payment'
  LEFT JOIN external_payment_fact_applications epfa
    ON epfa.fact_id = epf.id
   AND epfa.consumer = 'rider_deposit_domain'
  WHERE po.business_type = 'rider_deposit'
    AND po.payment_channel = 'direct'
    AND (po.status = 'paid' OR epfa.status = 'applied')
  GROUP BY po.id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT rd.id) = 0 OR COUNT(DISTINCT rdc.id) = 0

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'retained_direct_success_fact_amount_mismatch'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    epf.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
   AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
  WHERE po.payment_channel = 'direct'
    AND po.business_type IN ('baofu_account_verify_fee', 'claim_recovery', 'rider_deposit')
    AND epf.terminal_status = 'success'
    AND epf.amount IS NOT NULL
    AND epf.amount <> po.amount
    AND epf.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM retained_direct
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B01B-4: P0-F10 claim recovery / payout / behavior action 聚合预检。
WITH claim_money AS (
  SELECT
    'claim_recovery_paid_processed_but_recovery_not_paid_or_no_release'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(cr.status, 'missing_recovery')::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    po.processed_at AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  LEFT JOIN claim_recoveries cr
    ON cr.id = CASE
      WHEN substring(po.attach from '"recovery_id"\s*:\s*"?([0-9]+)"?') IS NOT NULL
      THEN substring(po.attach from '"recovery_id"\s*:\s*"?([0-9]+)"?')::bigint
      ELSE NULL
    END
  LEFT JOIN behavior_actions ba
    ON ba.action_type = 'release'
   AND ba.target_entity = cr.recovery_target
   AND CASE
     WHEN trim(ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
     THEN (ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id')::bigint
     ELSE NULL
   END = cr.id
  WHERE po.business_type = 'claim_recovery'
    AND po.payment_channel = 'direct'
    AND po.status = 'paid'
    AND po.processed_at IS NOT NULL
    AND po.paid_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (cr.id IS NULL OR cr.status <> 'paid' OR ba.id IS NULL)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'paid_claim_recovery_release_not_closed'::text AS issue_type,
    cr.recovery_target::text AS dimension,
    cr.id AS object_id,
    cr.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM claim_recoveries cr
  LEFT JOIN behavior_actions ba
    ON ba.action_type = 'release'
   AND ba.target_entity = cr.recovery_target
   AND CASE
     WHEN trim(ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
     THEN (ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id')::bigint
     ELSE NULL
   END = cr.id
  LEFT JOIN claim_recovery_events cre
    ON cre.recovery_id = cr.id
   AND cre.event_type = 'closed'
  WHERE cr.status = 'paid'
    AND cr.updated_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (ba.id IS NULL OR ba.status <> 'success' OR cre.id IS NULL)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'claim_payout_running_over_30m'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(ba.detail ->> 'transfer_state', 'no_transfer_state')::text AS dimension,
    ba.id AS object_id,
    ba.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM behavior_actions ba
  WHERE ba.action_type = 'payout'
    AND ba.target_entity = 'user'
    AND ba.status = 'running'
    AND ba.created_at < now() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'claim_behavior_non_payout_running_over_30m'::text AS issue_type,
    ba.action_type::text AS dimension,
    ba.id AS object_id,
    ba.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM behavior_actions ba
  WHERE ba.action_type IN ('block', 'recovery', 'release', 'notify')
    AND ba.status = 'running'
    AND ba.created_at < now() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'overdue_recovery_missing_successful_block'::text AS issue_type,
    cr.recovery_target::text AS dimension,
    cr.id AS object_id,
    cr.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM claim_recoveries cr
  LEFT JOIN behavior_actions ba
    ON ba.action_type = 'block'
   AND ba.target_entity = cr.recovery_target
   AND CASE
     WHEN trim(ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
     THEN (ba.detail ->> 'recovery_id')::bigint
     ELSE NULL
   END = cr.id
  WHERE cr.status = 'overdue'
    AND cr.updated_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (ba.id IS NULL OR ba.status <> 'success')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'reviewed_recovery_dispute_not_closed'::text AS issue_type,
    rd.status::text AS dimension,
    rd.id AS object_id,
    rd.reviewed_at AS signal_at
  FROM recovery_disputes rd
  LEFT JOIN claim_recoveries cr
    ON cr.claim_id = rd.claim_id
   AND cr.recovery_target = rd.appellant_type
  LEFT JOIN behavior_actions release_action
    ON release_action.action_type = 'release'
   AND CASE
     WHEN trim(release_action.detail ->> 'recovery_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
     THEN (release_action.detail ->> 'recovery_id')::bigint
     ELSE NULL
   END = cr.id
  LEFT JOIN behavior_actions payout_action
    ON payout_action.action_type = 'payout'
   AND CASE
     WHEN trim(payout_action.detail ->> 'recovery_dispute_id') ~ '^[0-9]+$'
     THEN (payout_action.detail ->> 'recovery_dispute_id')::bigint
     ELSE NULL
   END = rd.id
  WHERE rd.reviewed_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (
      (rd.status = 'approved' AND cr.id IS NOT NULL AND (cr.status <> 'waived' OR release_action.id IS NULL OR release_action.status <> 'success'))
      OR (rd.status = 'approved' AND rd.compensation_amount > 0 AND (payout_action.id IS NULL OR payout_action.status <> 'success' OR rd.compensated_at IS NULL))
      OR (rd.status = 'rejected' AND cr.id IS NOT NULL AND cr.status = 'disputed')
    )
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM claim_money
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B01B-5: P0-F11 rider deposit refund 聚合预检。
WITH rider_deposit_refunds AS (
  SELECT
    'rider_deposit_refund_pending_unknown_over_30m'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(epc.command_status, 'missing_command')::text AS dimension,
    ro.id AS object_id,
    ro.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM refund_orders ro
  JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = ro.payment_order_id
  LEFT JOIN external_payment_commands epc
    ON epc.business_object_type = 'refund_order'
   AND epc.business_object_id = ro.id
   AND epc.external_object_key = ro.out_refund_no
  WHERE po.business_type = 'rider_deposit'
    AND po.payment_channel = 'direct'
    AND ro.refund_type = 'rider_deposit'
    AND ro.status = 'pending'
    AND ro.created_at < now() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
    AND (epc.command_status = 'unknown' OR epc.id IS NULL)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'rider_deposit_success_fact_but_refund_not_success'::text AS issue_type,
    ro.status::text AS dimension,
    ro.id AS object_id,
    f.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM refund_orders ro
  JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = ro.payment_order_id
  JOIN external_payment_facts f
    ON f.external_object_type = 'refund'
   AND f.external_object_key = ro.out_refund_no
  WHERE po.business_type = 'rider_deposit'
    AND ro.refund_type = 'rider_deposit'
    AND f.provider = 'wechat'
    AND f.channel = 'direct'
    AND f.capability = 'direct_refund'
    AND f.terminal_status = 'success'
    AND ro.status <> 'success'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'rider_deposit_refund_success_payment_not_refunded'::text AS issue_type,
    po.status::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    MAX(ro.refunded_at) AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  JOIN refund_orders ro ON ro.payment_order_id = po.id
  WHERE po.business_type = 'rider_deposit'
    AND po.payment_channel = 'direct'
    AND ro.refund_type = 'rider_deposit'
  GROUP BY po.id, po.status, po.amount
  HAVING COALESCE(SUM(ro.refund_amount) FILTER (WHERE ro.status = 'success'), 0) >= po.amount
     AND po.status <> 'refunded'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'rider_deposit_refund_fact_amount_mismatch'::text AS issue_type,
    ro.status::text AS dimension,
    ro.id AS object_id,
    f.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM refund_orders ro
  JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = ro.payment_order_id
  JOIN external_payment_facts f
    ON f.external_object_type = 'refund'
   AND f.external_object_key = ro.out_refund_no
  WHERE po.business_type = 'rider_deposit'
    AND ro.refund_type = 'rider_deposit'
    AND f.provider = 'wechat'
    AND f.channel = 'direct'
    AND f.capability = 'direct_refund'
    AND f.amount IS NOT NULL
    AND f.amount <> ro.refund_amount

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'rider_deposit_active_refund_or_frozen_long_tail'::text AS issue_type,
    'rider_balance_shape'::text AS dimension,
    r.id AS object_id,
    MAX(COALESCE(ro.created_at, r.updated_at, r.created_at)) AS signal_at
  FROM riders r
  LEFT JOIN payment_orders po ON po.user_id = r.user_id AND po.business_type = 'rider_deposit'
  LEFT JOIN refund_orders ro ON ro.payment_order_id = po.id AND ro.refund_type = 'rider_deposit'
  LEFT JOIN rider_deposit_credits rdc ON rdc.rider_id = r.id
  GROUP BY r.id, r.frozen_deposit
  HAVING r.frozen_deposit > 0
      OR COALESCE(SUM(ro.refund_amount) FILTER (WHERE ro.status IN ('pending','processing')), 0) > 0
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM rider_deposit_refunds
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```


```sql
-- P4-B01A-1: payment fact application / domain outbox backlog 预检。
WITH app_backlog AS (
  SELECT
    'fact_application'::text AS surface,
    epfa.consumer::text AS dimension,
    epfa.status::text AS status,
    COUNT(*) AS row_count,
    MIN(epfa.updated_at) AS oldest_updated_at,
    MAX(epfa.updated_at) AS newest_updated_at,
    MAX(epfa.attempt_count) AS max_attempt_count
  FROM external_payment_fact_applications epfa
  WHERE epfa.status IN ('pending', 'failed')
     OR (epfa.status = 'processing' AND epfa.updated_at < now() - INTERVAL '15 minutes')
  GROUP BY epfa.consumer, epfa.status
),
outbox_backlog AS (
  SELECT
    'payment_domain_outbox'::text AS surface,
    pdo.event_type::text AS dimension,
    pdo.status::text AS status,
    COUNT(*) AS row_count,
    MIN(pdo.updated_at) AS oldest_updated_at,
    MAX(pdo.updated_at) AS newest_updated_at,
    MAX(pdo.attempt_count) AS max_attempt_count
  FROM payment_domain_outbox pdo
  WHERE pdo.status IN ('pending', 'failed')
     OR (pdo.status = 'processing' AND pdo.updated_at < now() - INTERVAL '15 minutes')
  GROUP BY pdo.event_type, pdo.status
)
SELECT * FROM app_backlog
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM outbox_backlog
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_updated_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B01A-2: refund 本地终态与 provider/fact success 冲突预检。
WITH refund_conflicts AS (
  SELECT
    'local_failed_or_closed_with_provider_success_or_refund_id'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    ro.id AS object_id,
    ro.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM refund_orders ro
  JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = ro.payment_order_id
  LEFT JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'refund_order'
   AND epf.business_object_id = ro.id
   AND epf.terminal_status = 'success'
  WHERE ro.status IN ('failed', 'closed')
    AND ro.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (epf.id IS NOT NULL OR ro.refund_id IS NOT NULL)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'pending_refund_older_than_30m'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    ro.id AS object_id,
    ro.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM refund_orders ro
  JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = ro.payment_order_id
  WHERE ro.status = 'pending'
    AND ro.created_at < now() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
    AND ro.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM refund_conflicts
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B01A-3: Baofu withdrawal command/order/fact 半状态预检。
WITH withdrawal_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'submitted_or_unknown_command_over_10m'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(bwo.owner_type, 'unknown')::text AS dimension,
    epc.id AS object_id,
    epc.submitted_at AS signal_at
  FROM external_payment_commands epc
  LEFT JOIN baofu_withdrawal_orders bwo
    ON bwo.id = epc.business_object_id
  WHERE epc.provider = 'baofu'
    AND epc.capability = 'baofu_withdraw'
    AND epc.command_type = 'create_baofu_withdraw'
    AND epc.command_status IN ('submitted', 'unknown')
    AND epc.submitted_at < now() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'withdrawal_processing_over_30m'::text AS issue_type,
    bwo.owner_type::text AS dimension,
    bwo.id AS object_id,
    bwo.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM baofu_withdrawal_orders bwo
  WHERE bwo.status = 'processing'
    AND bwo.created_at < now() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'terminal_fact_without_terminal_order'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(bwo.owner_type, 'unknown')::text AS dimension,
    epf.id AS object_id,
    epf.observed_at AS signal_at
  FROM external_payment_facts epf
  LEFT JOIN baofu_withdrawal_orders bwo
    ON bwo.id = epf.business_object_id
  WHERE epf.provider = 'baofu'
    AND epf.capability = 'baofu_withdraw'
    AND epf.is_terminal
    AND epf.observed_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (bwo.id IS NULL OR bwo.status NOT IN ('succeeded', 'failed', 'returned'))
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM withdrawal_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B01A-4: late success / timeout / cancelled business object 预检。
WITH late_success AS (
  SELECT
    'cancelled_order_with_paid_or_success_fact'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    GREATEST(
      COALESCE(po.paid_at, po.created_at),
      COALESCE(o.updated_at, o.created_at)
    ) AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = po.order_id
  LEFT JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
   AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
   AND epf.terminal_status = 'success'
  WHERE o.status = 'cancelled'
    AND po.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (po.status = 'paid' OR epf.id IS NOT NULL)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'cancelled_or_expired_reservation_with_paid_or_success_fact'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    GREATEST(
      COALESCE(po.paid_at, po.created_at),
      COALESCE(tr.updated_at, tr.created_at)
    ) AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  JOIN table_reservations tr ON tr.id = po.reservation_id
  LEFT JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
   AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
   AND epf.terminal_status = 'success'
  WHERE tr.status IN ('cancelled', 'expired')
    AND po.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (po.status = 'paid' OR epf.id IS NOT NULL)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'expired_pending_payment_order'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id AS object_id,
    po.expires_at AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  WHERE po.status = 'pending'
    AND po.expires_at < now()
    AND po.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM late_success
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B01A-5: active payment 重复和 no-prepay 占位预检。
WITH active_order_dupes AS (
  SELECT
    'order_active_payment_duplicate'::text AS issue_type,
    business_type::text AS dimension,
    order_id::text AS owner_key,
    COUNT(*) AS row_count,
    MIN(created_at) AS oldest_created_at,
    MAX(created_at) AS newest_created_at
  FROM payment_orders
  WHERE order_id IS NOT NULL
    AND status IN ('pending', 'paid')
    AND created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY business_type, order_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
active_reservation_dupes AS (
  SELECT
    'reservation_active_payment_duplicate'::text AS issue_type,
    business_type::text AS dimension,
    reservation_id::text AS owner_key,
    COUNT(*) AS row_count,
    MIN(created_at) AS oldest_created_at,
    MAX(created_at) AS newest_created_at
  FROM payment_orders
  WHERE reservation_id IS NOT NULL
    AND status IN ('pending', 'paid')
    AND created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY business_type, reservation_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
no_prepay AS (
  SELECT
    'pending_without_prepay_or_pay_params'::text AS issue_type,
    business_type::text AS dimension,
    id::text AS owner_key,
    1::bigint AS row_count,
    created_at AS oldest_created_at,
    created_at AS newest_created_at
  FROM payment_orders
  WHERE status = 'pending'
    AND created_at < now() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
    AND created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    AND (
      prepay_id IS NULL OR prepay_id = ''
    )
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS owner_count,
       SUM(row_count) AS payment_row_count,
       MIN(oldest_created_at) AS oldest_created_at,
       MAX(newest_created_at) AS newest_created_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(owner_key ORDER BY newest_created_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_owner_keys
FROM (
  SELECT * FROM active_order_dupes
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM active_reservation_dupes
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM no_prepay
) s
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY payment_row_count DESC, oldest_created_at ASC;
```

- 第二批定向取证：`P0-F06` provider 语义、`P0-F07` 分账 return/ORDER_NOT_EXIST、`P0-F09` retained direct 细分、`P0-F10` claim payout/recovery、`P0-F11` rider deposit refund 已完成本地 schema/语法校验。生产执行仍建议先跑 `P4-B01A` 聚合和第一批公共底座；若第一批无命中，可把第二批作为发布前专项抽样或按业务高峰后窗口补跑，而不是把它误认为已生产清零。
- 判定规则：
  - `S1-immediate`：出现资金成功但业务未应用、业务已终态但 command/fact/application 悬挂、failed/closed 与 provider success 冲突、提现金额/合同号不一致、outbox published 但 application 未 applied。进入复现与修复批次，不等全量扫描。
  - `S2-backlog`：只出现 pending/failed backlog 或长期 processing，但暂未证实业务对象错账。先查 scheduler/worker/asynq retry/dead 队列和日志，再决定是否修 stale reclaim。
  - `S3-data-quality`：只出现历史 retained/direct/no-prepay、重复 active 候选或人工/脚本样本。先标注数据治理/历史清理，不直接改核心事务。
  - `S0-clean-window`：当前窗口 0 命中。记录窗口、阈值和执行时间；后续在发布前或配置变化后重跑。
- 生产结果回填模板：

| 执行时间 | 查询 ID | 时间窗口/阈值 | 命中行数 | 最老样本 | 最新样本 | 样本对象 | 初步等级 | 下一步 |
| --- | --- | --- | ---: | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 待填 | P0-F03-1 | 15m processing | 待填 | 待填 | 待填 | application_id/fact_id | 待判定 | 待填 |

#### P4-B01C. 生产结果回填矩阵

- 用途：只记录生产只读查询的脱敏聚合输出和判级；本地 `EXPLAIN` 通过不能填写为 `S0`，没有生产输出时保持 `待填`。
- 回填约束：`样本对象/摘要` 只放 id、issue_type、dimension、必要 trace key 和时间；不要粘贴 provider raw payload、合同号、openid、手机号、姓名或身份证。
- 升级规则：任一查询出现 `S1-immediate` 时，先补同族明细 SQL 和日志联查，再进入 `P4-B02/P4-B03`；`S2-backlog` 需要结合 worker/asynq/scheduler 重试链路确认；`S3-data-quality` 只进数据治理清单，不直接修核心事务；`S0-clean-window` 必须记录执行时间和窗口。

| 执行时间 | 查询 ID | 覆盖风险族 | 窗口/阈值 | 命中行数 | 最老样本 | 最新样本 | 样本对象/摘要 | 初步等级 | 下一步 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | ---: | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 2026-06-22 12:39 CST | P4-B01A-1 | P0-F03/P0-F12 | backlog: pending/failed/processing>15m | 874 | 2026-04-25 08:45:49.587398+08 | 2026-06-21 16:37:47.91571+08 | `payment_domain_outbox/profit_sharing_result_ready/pending=630` + `payment_domain_outbox/rider_deposit_activated/pending=11` 等 235 组；最大组为 `profit_sharing_result_ready/pending=630` | `S2-backlog` | 先补 `P0-F03` 明细和 outbox/application 日志；当前更像堆积，不直接判错账 |
| 2026-06-22 12:38 CST | P4-B01A-2 | P0-F05 | refund 30d + pending>30m | 6492 | 2026-05-23 13:19:45.830129+08 | 2026-06-21 16:38:19.525934+08 | `pending_refund_older_than_30m/order=5249`、`rider_deposit=1097`、`reservation=146` | `S2-backlog` | 补 `P0-F05` 明细和 refund callback/query 日志；当前以长尾挂起为主 |
| 2026-06-22 12:38 CST | P4-B01A-3 | P0-F08 | command>10m / withdrawal>30m / fact 30d | 387 | 2026-05-03 20:00:00+08 | 2026-06-21 21:00:00+08 | `withdrawal_processing_over_30m/merchant=277`、`submitted_or_unknown_command_over_10m/merchant=110`、`submitted_or_unknown_command_over_10m/rider=21` | `S2-backlog` | 补 `P0-F08` 明细和 withdrawal recovery/dispatch 日志；仍像恢复链路堆积 |
| 2026-06-22 12:38 CST | P4-B01A-4 | P0-F04/P0-F02 | late success 30d / expired pending | 5608 | 2026-05-24 10:01:21.35586+08 | 2026-06-21 17:38:16.860763+08 | `expired_pending_payment_order/order=4858`、`cancelled_order_with_paid_or_success_fact/order=685`、`reservation_addon=763` | `S1-immediate` | 先补业务对象时间线和 payment timeout 日志；这里已出现 cancelled/paid 或 success fact 碰撞，按 immediate 处理 |
| 2026-06-22 12:38 CST | P4-B01A-5 | P0-F01/P0-F09 | active duplicate/no-prepay 30d | 5391 | 2026-05-24 10:01:15.83619+08 | 2026-06-21 16:38:16.860785+08 | `pending_without_prepay_or_pay_params/order=4858`、`reservation_addon=763`、`baofu_account_verify_fee=353`、`order_active_payment_duplicate/order=334` | `S3-data-quality` | 区分真实重复、历史 direct 和无 prepay 占位；这里以数据/形状问题为主 |
| 2026-06-22 | P4-B01B-1 | P0-F06 | provider semantics 30d / expired pending | 188 | 待补 | 待补 | `amount_mismatch_refund_payment_still_paid_or_processed/pending=188`；expired pending 候选含 `order=4858`、`reservation_addon=758`、`baofu_account_verify_fee=353`、`reservation=2` | `S2-backlog` | `amount_mismatch` 子项已确认是 provider 语义冲突；expired pending 子项仍偏 compensating refund/backlog，不直接判核心 bug |
| 2026-06-22 | P4-B01B-2 | P0-F07 | profit sharing 30d / processing>30m | 1226 | 待补 | 待补 | `profit_sharing_processing_over_30m/order=804`、`profit_sharing_processing_over_30m/reservation=150`、`profit_sharing_command_outcome_drift/missing_order=272` | `S2-backlog` | 先校 join key；当前更像 backlog/数据形状，不直接判 orphan bug |
| 2026-06-22 | P4-B01B-3 | P0-F09 | retained direct 30d / active half-state | 1751 | 待补 | 待补 | `rider_deposit_refund_pending_unknown_over_30m/missing_command=1751`；其余 long-tail 仍以 pending/processing 形状为主 | `S2-backlog` | 这是恢复缺口候选，需补 pending 退扫 |
| 2026-06-22 | P4-B01B-4 | P0-F10 | claim money 30d / running>30m | 1500 | 待补 | 待补 | `paid_claim_recovery_release_not_closed/merchant=677`、`paid_claim_recovery_release_not_closed/rider=125`、`overdue_recovery_missing_successful_block/merchant=176`、`reviewed_recovery_dispute_not_closed/approved=522` | `S2-backlog` | 主要是 recovery/action backlog；其中 payout running 有独立恢复器，non-payout running 才是明确 stuck action 缺口 |
| 2026-06-22 | P4-B01B-5 | P0-F11 | rider deposit refund / frozen long tail | 5030 | 待补 | 待补 | 长尾以 rider deposit refund 形状为主；核心信号仍是 `pending_unknown_over_30m/missing_command` | `S2-backlog` | 该族存在真实 pending 退扫缺口，后续应优先修恢复逻辑 |

#### P4-B01D. 生产执行顺序与停止条件

- 执行顺序：
  1. 记录执行环境：生产库/只读副本、执行人、执行时间、时间窗口、`statement_timeout`、`lock_timeout`。
  2. 先执行 `P4-B01A-1..5`，每条执行完立即回填 `P4-B01C`；不要等全部跑完后凭记忆补。
  3. `P4-B01A` 任一命中 `S1-immediate` 候选时，先补同族明细 SQL 与日志联查；可以继续跑剩余聚合，但不要批量拉取低优先级明细。
  4. `P4-B01A` 全部 0 命中或只出现 `S3-data-quality` 后，再执行 `P4-B01B-1..5`；若业务上正处于分账、索赔、骑手押金退款高峰，也可把对应 `P4-B01B-*` 提前作为专项抽样，但必须在回填表备注。
  5. 明细 SQL 只在对应聚合命中后执行；明细输出只保留脱敏字段和少量样本 id，不复制 raw payload。
- 停止条件：
  - 任一查询触发 timeout，不要放大超时时间硬跑；先把窗口缩短到 7 天/1 天或按 `dimension` 分片，并把“查询超时/未完成”写入 `P4-B01C` 下一步。
  - 任一聚合命中数量过大，先记录总量、时间边界、最新 10 个样本 id；不要把全量明细贴入账本。
  - 任一结果包含敏感字段，先脱敏再回填；已经误导出的 raw payload、openid、手机号、姓名、身份证、合同号不得进入主账本。
  - 任一 SQL 因生产 schema 差异失败，先回填为 `query-failed-schema` 并记录错误摘要；不要现场运行未落账的改写版查询。
  - 任一 `S1-immediate` 与日志/provider 后台交叉确认后，停止继续扩展低优先级排查，转入 `P4-B02` 复现设计和 `P4-B03` 修复批次草案。
- 判读顺序：
  - `0 行` 只能表示该窗口 `S0-clean-window`，不能抹掉代码风险族。
  - `pending/failed/processing` backlog 优先判为 `S2-backlog`，除非同时看到业务终态冲突或 provider success。
  - provider success、本地 failed/closed、金额不一致、业务未应用、outbox/application 已发布但 owner 未推进，优先判为 `S1-immediate`。
  - retained direct、no-prepay、历史重复 active、人工脚本痕迹优先判为 `S3-data-quality`，除非能接到当前可达生产写路径。

- 日志联查模板：
  - `P0-F03` 命中后查：`payment fact application applied`、`mark external payment fact application failed`、`payment domain outbox published`、`process payment domain outbox failed`、asynq retry/dead 队列。
  - `P0-F05` 命中后查：`reservation refund validation failed`、`create reservation refund order tx failed`、`process refund fact application`、provider refund callback/query raw 摘要。
  - `P0-F08` 命中后查：`baofu withdrawal create result unknown after command dispatch`、`repaired claimed baofu withdrawal command outcome from order state`、`query baofu withdrawal status failed`、`update baofu withdrawal order status`。
  - `P0-F04/P0-F02` 命中后查：payment timeout worker、DataCleanup cleanup、provider callback/query 到达时间、业务对象取消/过期日志。
  - `P0-F12` 命中后查：platform alert 创建日志、notification task、operator dashboard 读取时间线。

### P4-B04. P1 主业务状态机生产聚合预检包

- 目标：在不等待 P0 生产输出的同时，先给 P1 主业务状态机准备低成本只读聚合预检；这不改变修复优先级，P0 资金链仍是第一判级闸门。
- 本地校验：2026-06-22 已在 `locallife_test` 对 `P4-B04-1..8` 执行 `BEGIN READ ONLY` + `EXPLAIN (COSTS OFF)`；其中 `P4-B04-7` 曾因 `jsonb_each` 作用于非对象 `customizations` 报错，已改为 `CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof(...)='object' THEN ... ELSE '{}'::jsonb END` 的安全输入后通过，余下 7 条直接通过当前 schema/语法检查。
- 模板修正：本轮本地校验发现既有 `P1-F01-3` 明细模板误用不存在的 `payment_orders.updated_at`，已改为 `COALESCE(processed_at, paid_at, created_at)` 作为支付时间信号。
- 执行顺序：先跑 `P4-B04-1`、`P4-B04-2`、`P4-B04-3`、`P4-B04-4`，它们覆盖预约/堂食/订单/配送主状态；再跑 `P4-B04-5`、`P4-B04-6`、`P4-B04-7`、`P4-B04-8`，它们覆盖索赔/权限/下单快照/宝付开户。
- 判读边界：P1 命中不直接等于资金错账；涉及 payment/refund/profit sharing/payout 的样本必须回跳 P0 族。`P1-F07` 多数 current-state drift 是弱信号，需结合配置更新时间和产品是否允许交易快照锁价判定。
- 回填矩阵：

| 执行时间 | 查询 ID | 覆盖风险族 | 窗口/阈值 | 命中行数 | 最老样本 | 最新样本 | 样本对象/摘要 | 初步等级 | 下一步 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | ---: | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 2026-06-22 12:44 CST | P4-B04-1 | P1-F01 | 30d / pending expired / adjustment>2h | 3605 | 2026-02-23 19:48:01.76703+08 | 2026-06-21 17:08:19.44168+08 | `active_adjustment_stale_or_terminal_owner/creating_payment=1135`、`expired_pending_reservation/deposit=1114`、`reserved_adjustment_hold=145` | `S2-backlog` | 命中后补 P1-F01 明细与 reservation/table/inventory 日志；当前以过期/卡住状态为主 |
| 2026-06-22 12:45 CST | P4-B04-2 | P1-F02 | open/closed session 投影 | 5731 | 2026-02-23 19:18:01.587515+08 | 2026-06-21 16:38:19.435604+08 | `open_session_table_mismatch/available=2655`、`open_session_no_active_order_but_linked_orders=1372`、`closed_session_open_group_or_member/open=366` | `S2-backlog` | 命中后补 P1-F02 明细与 close/checkout/active_order 日志；更像投影滞后和会话未闭合 |
| 2026-06-22 12:47 CST | P4-B04-3 | P1-F03 | takeout 30d / 食安/取消投影 | 0 | - | - | 空窗 | `S0-clean-window` | 该窗口未命中；暂不下钻，保留风险族 |

```sql
-- P4-B04-1: P1-F01 reservation 主状态/库存/桌台/adjustment 聚合预检。
WITH reservation_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'reservation_status_timestamp_conflict'::text AS issue_type,
    tr.status::text AS dimension,
    tr.id::text AS object_id,
    tr.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM table_reservations tr
  WHERE tr.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND (
      (tr.status = 'paid' AND tr.cancelled_at IS NOT NULL)
      OR (tr.status = 'paid' AND tr.completed_at IS NOT NULL)
      OR (tr.status = 'checked_in' AND tr.cancelled_at IS NOT NULL)
      OR (tr.status = 'completed' AND tr.cancelled_at IS NOT NULL)
      OR (tr.status IN ('cancelled','no_show','expired') AND tr.paid_at IS NOT NULL AND tr.updated_at > tr.paid_at)
    )

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'expired_pending_reservation'::text AS issue_type,
    tr.payment_mode::text AS dimension,
    tr.id::text AS object_id,
    tr.payment_deadline AS signal_at
  FROM table_reservations tr
  WHERE tr.status = 'pending'
    AND tr.payment_deadline < now()

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'paid_payment_bad_reservation_state'::text AS issue_type,
    po.business_type::text AS dimension,
    po.id::text AS object_id,
    GREATEST(COALESCE(po.processed_at, po.paid_at, po.created_at), COALESCE(tr.updated_at, tr.created_at)) AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  JOIN table_reservations tr ON tr.id = po.reservation_id
  WHERE po.business_type IN ('reservation','reservation_addon')
    AND po.status = 'paid'
    AND po.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND tr.status IN ('pending','cancelled','expired','no_show')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'terminal_reservation_holds_inventory'::text AS issue_type,
    tr.status::text AS dimension,
    tr.id::text AS object_id,
    GREATEST(COALESCE(tr.updated_at, tr.created_at), COALESCE(ri.updated_at, ri.created_at)) AS signal_at
  FROM table_reservations tr
  JOIN reservation_inventory ri ON ri.reservation_id = tr.id
  WHERE tr.status IN ('cancelled','expired','no_show','completed')
    AND ri.quantity > 0

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'table_current_reservation_terminal_or_missing'::text AS issue_type,
    tb.status::text AS dimension,
    tb.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(tb.updated_at, tr.updated_at, now()) AS signal_at
  FROM tables tb
  LEFT JOIN table_reservations tr ON tr.id = tb.current_reservation_id
  WHERE tb.current_reservation_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (tr.id IS NULL OR tr.status IN ('cancelled','expired','no_show','completed'))

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'active_adjustment_stale_or_terminal_owner'::text AS issue_type,
    ra.status::text AS dimension,
    ra.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(ra.updated_at, ra.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM reservation_adjustments ra
  JOIN table_reservations tr ON tr.id = ra.reservation_id
  WHERE ra.status IN ('creating_payment','pending_payment','applying')
    AND (ra.created_at < now() - interval '2 hours' OR tr.status IN ('cancelled','expired','no_show','completed'))

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'expired_adjustment_hold'::text AS issue_type,
    ra.status::text AS dimension,
    h.id::text AS object_id,
    h.expires_at AS signal_at
  FROM reservation_adjustment_inventory_holds h
  JOIN reservation_adjustments ra ON ra.id = h.adjustment_id
  WHERE h.status = 'held'
    AND h.expires_at < now()
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM reservation_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B04-2: P1-F02 dining session/table/billing/active_order 聚合预检。
WITH dinein_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'open_session_table_mismatch'::text AS issue_type,
    tb.status::text AS dimension,
    ds.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(ds.updated_at, ds.opened_at, ds.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM dining_sessions ds
  JOIN tables tb ON tb.id = ds.table_id
  WHERE ds.status = 'open'
    AND (tb.status <> 'occupied' OR (ds.reservation_id IS NOT NULL AND tb.current_reservation_id IS DISTINCT FROM ds.reservation_id))

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'closed_session_open_group_or_member'::text AS issue_type,
    bg.status::text AS dimension,
    ds.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(ds.closed_at, ds.updated_at, ds.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM dining_sessions ds
  JOIN billing_groups bg ON bg.dining_session_id = ds.id
  LEFT JOIN billing_group_members bgm ON bgm.billing_group_id = bg.id
  WHERE ds.status = 'closed'
    AND (bg.status <> 'closed' OR bgm.left_at IS NULL)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'closed_session_active_order'::text AS issue_type,
    o.status::text AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(o.updated_at, o.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM dining_sessions ds
  JOIN billing_groups bg ON bg.dining_session_id = ds.id
  JOIN billing_group_orders bgo ON bgo.billing_group_id = bg.id
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = bgo.order_id
  WHERE ds.status = 'closed'
    AND o.status IN ('pending','paid','preparing','ready')
    AND o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'open_session_bad_active_order'::text AS issue_type,
    o.status::text AS dimension,
    ds.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(o.updated_at, ds.updated_at, ds.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM dining_sessions ds
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = ds.active_order_id
  WHERE ds.status = 'open'
    AND (
      o.status IN ('cancelled','refunded')
      OR o.replaced_by_order_id IS NOT NULL
      OR o.order_type <> 'dine_in'
      OR o.table_id IS DISTINCT FROM ds.table_id
      OR o.user_id <> ds.user_id
      OR o.merchant_id <> ds.merchant_id
    )

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'open_session_no_active_order_but_linked_orders'::text AS issue_type,
    'linked_orders'::text AS dimension,
    ds.id::text AS object_id,
    MAX(o.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM dining_sessions ds
  JOIN billing_groups bg ON bg.dining_session_id = ds.id
  JOIN billing_group_orders bgo ON bgo.billing_group_id = bg.id
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = bgo.order_id
  WHERE ds.status = 'open'
    AND ds.active_order_id IS NULL
    AND o.status <> 'cancelled'
  GROUP BY ds.id

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'billing_order_table_mismatch'::text AS issue_type,
    o.status::text AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    GREATEST(COALESCE(o.updated_at, o.created_at), COALESCE(ds.updated_at, ds.created_at)) AS signal_at
  FROM dining_sessions ds
  JOIN billing_groups bg ON bg.dining_session_id = ds.id
  JOIN billing_group_orders bgo ON bgo.billing_group_id = bg.id
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = bgo.order_id
  WHERE ds.status = 'open'
    AND o.table_id IS DISTINCT FROM ds.table_id
    AND o.status <> 'cancelled'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'reservation_completed_session_or_order_not_closed'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(ds.status, 'missing_session')::text AS dimension,
    tr.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(tr.completed_at, tr.updated_at, tr.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM table_reservations tr
  LEFT JOIN dining_sessions ds ON ds.reservation_id = tr.id
  LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = ds.active_order_id
  WHERE tr.status = 'completed'
    AND ds.id IS NOT NULL
    AND (ds.status <> 'closed' OR o.status IS DISTINCT FROM 'completed')
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM dinein_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B04-3: P1-F03 takeout 订单/食安/取消投影聚合预检。
WITH order_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'terminal_takeout_keeps_exception_projection'::text AS issue_type,
    o.exception_state::text AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(o.completed_at, o.cancelled_at, o.updated_at, o.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM orders o
  WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
    AND o.exception_state IN ('cancel_requested','food_safety_paused')
    AND o.status IN ('rider_delivered','user_delivered','completed','cancelled')
    AND o.updated_at >= now() - interval '30 days'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'food_safety_paused_without_merchant_suspension'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(mp.takeout_suspend_reason, 'missing_or_not_suspended')::text AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(o.updated_at, o.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM orders o
  LEFT JOIN merchant_profiles mp ON mp.merchant_id = o.merchant_id
  WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
    AND o.exception_state = 'food_safety_paused'
    AND (mp.merchant_id IS NULL OR mp.is_takeout_suspended = false OR mp.takeout_suspend_reason IS NULL OR mp.takeout_suspend_reason NOT LIKE '同商户1小时内多名顾客食安举报触发熔断%')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'food_safety_paused_delivered_or_completed'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(d.status, o.status)::text AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    GREATEST(COALESCE(d.delivered_at, d.created_at), COALESCE(o.updated_at, o.created_at)) AS signal_at
  FROM orders o
  JOIN deliveries d ON d.order_id = o.id
  WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
    AND o.exception_state = 'food_safety_paused'
    AND (o.status IN ('rider_delivered','user_delivered','completed') OR d.status IN ('delivered','completed'))

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'completed_takeout_missing_completed_log'::text AS issue_type,
    CASE WHEN o.auto_user_delivered_at IS NULL THEN 'user_or_manual' ELSE 'auto' END AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(o.completed_at, o.updated_at) AS signal_at
  FROM orders o
  LEFT JOIN order_status_logs osl ON osl.order_id = o.id AND osl.to_status = 'completed'
  WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
    AND o.status = 'completed'
    AND o.completed_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND osl.id IS NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'cancel_requested_missing_log'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(o.claim_channel, 'no_claim_channel')::text AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(o.updated_at, o.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM orders o
  LEFT JOIN order_status_logs osl ON osl.order_id = o.id AND osl.notes LIKE '%用户申请取消%'
  WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
    AND o.exception_state = 'cancel_requested'
    AND o.updated_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND osl.id IS NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'auto_completed_order_has_claim'::text AS issue_type,
    c.status::text AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(o.completed_at, c.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM orders o
  JOIN claims c ON c.order_id = o.id
  WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
    AND o.status = 'completed'
    AND o.auto_user_delivered_at IS NOT NULL
    AND o.completed_at >= now() - interval '30 days'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'resolved_food_safety_still_paused_order'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(fsc.status, fsi.status, 'unknown')::text AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(fsc.resolved_at, fsi.resolved_at, o.updated_at) AS signal_at
  FROM orders o
  LEFT JOIN food_safety_incidents fsi ON fsi.order_id = o.id
  LEFT JOIN food_safety_cases fsc ON fsc.id = fsi.case_id
  WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
    AND o.exception_state = 'food_safety_paused'
    AND (fsi.status = 'resolved' OR fsc.status = 'resolved' OR fsi.resolved_at IS NOT NULL OR fsc.resolved_at IS NOT NULL)
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM order_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B04-4: P1-F04 delivery/pool/location/geofence/alert 聚合预检。
WITH delivery_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'expired_pool_still_active'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(o.status, 'missing_order')::text AS dimension,
    dp.id::text AS object_id,
    dp.expires_at AS signal_at
  FROM delivery_pool dp
  LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = dp.order_id
  LEFT JOIN deliveries d ON d.order_id = dp.order_id
  WHERE dp.expires_at < now()
    AND (o.id IS NULL OR o.status NOT IN ('cancelled','completed'))
    AND (d.id IS NULL OR d.status NOT IN ('cancelled','delivered','completed'))

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'delivery_order_status_incompatible'::text AS issue_type,
    d.status || '/' || o.status AS dimension,
    d.id::text AS object_id,
    GREATEST(COALESCE(o.updated_at, o.created_at), d.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM deliveries d
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = d.order_id
  WHERE d.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND (
      (d.status IN ('assigned','picking','picked','delivering') AND o.status IN ('cancelled','completed'))
      OR (d.status = 'pending' AND o.status NOT IN ('ready','preparing'))
      OR (d.status IN ('delivered','completed') AND o.status NOT IN ('rider_delivered','user_delivered','completed'))
      OR (d.status = 'cancelled' AND o.status IN ('courier_accepted','picked','delivering','rider_delivered'))
    )

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'rider_multiple_active_deliveries'::text AS issue_type,
    active_delivery_count::text AS dimension,
    rider_id::text AS object_id,
    latest_active_created_at AS signal_at
  FROM (
    SELECT rider_id, COUNT(*) AS active_delivery_count, MAX(created_at) AS latest_active_created_at
    FROM deliveries
    WHERE rider_id IS NOT NULL AND status IN ('assigned','picking','picked','delivering')
    GROUP BY rider_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  ) s

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'location_bound_to_wrong_or_terminal_delivery'::text AS issue_type,
    d.status::text AS dimension,
    rl.id::text AS object_id,
    rl.recorded_at AS signal_at
  FROM rider_locations rl
  JOIN deliveries d ON d.id = rl.delivery_id
  WHERE rl.recorded_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND (d.rider_id IS DISTINCT FROM rl.rider_id OR d.status IN ('cancelled','delivered','completed'))

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'dwell_event_not_advanced'::text AS issue_type,
    e.event_type::text AS dimension,
    e.id::text AS object_id,
    e.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM delivery_location_events e
  JOIN deliveries d ON d.id = e.delivery_id
  WHERE e.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND ((e.event_type = 'dwell_pickup' AND d.status IN ('assigned','picking')) OR (e.event_type = 'dwell_dropoff' AND d.status = 'delivering'))
    AND e.created_at < now() - interval '5 minutes'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'terminal_delivery_future_eta'::text AS issue_type,
    d.status::text AS dimension,
    d.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(d.completed_at, d.delivered_at, d.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM deliveries d
  WHERE d.status IN ('cancelled','delivered','completed')
    AND d.estimated_delivery_at IS NOT NULL
    AND ((d.delivered_at IS NOT NULL AND d.estimated_delivery_at > d.delivered_at + interval '5 minutes') OR (d.completed_at IS NOT NULL AND d.estimated_delivery_at > d.completed_at + interval '5 minutes') OR (d.status = 'cancelled' AND d.estimated_delivery_at > now()))

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'delayed_delivery_missing_notification'::text AS issue_type,
    d.status::text AS dimension,
    d.id::text AS object_id,
    d.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM deliveries d
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = d.order_id
  LEFT JOIN notifications n ON n.related_type = 'delivery' AND n.related_id = d.id AND n.type = 'delivery' AND n.title = '代取超时告警'
  WHERE d.is_delayed = true
    AND d.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY d.id, d.status, d.created_at
  HAVING COUNT(n.id) = 0

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'operator_timeout_alert_missing_notification'::text AS issue_type,
    d.status::text AS dimension,
    a.delivery_id::text AS object_id,
    a.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM delivery_timeout_alerts a
  JOIN deliveries d ON d.id = a.delivery_id
  LEFT JOIN notifications n ON n.related_type = 'delivery' AND n.related_id = a.delivery_id AND n.type = 'delivery' AND n.extra_data->>'alert_key' = a.alert_key
  WHERE a.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY a.delivery_id, a.alert_key, a.created_at, d.status
  HAVING COUNT(n.id) = 0
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM delivery_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B04-5: P1-F05 claim/recovery/dispute/action 聚合预检。
WITH claim_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'claim_bad_order_snapshot'::text AS issue_type,
    o.status::text AS dimension,
    c.id::text AS object_id,
    c.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM claims c
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = c.order_id
  WHERE c.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND (o.status <> 'completed' OR o.user_id <> c.user_id OR o.replaced_by_order_id IS NOT NULL OR c.claim_amount > o.total_amount)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'submitted_dispute_without_disputed_recovery'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(cr.status, 'missing_recovery')::text AS dimension,
    rd.id::text AS object_id,
    rd.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM recovery_disputes rd
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT * FROM claim_recoveries cr
    WHERE cr.claim_id = rd.claim_id AND cr.recovery_target = rd.appellant_type
    ORDER BY cr.id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) cr ON TRUE
  WHERE rd.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND rd.status = 'submitted'
    AND (cr.id IS NULL OR cr.status <> 'disputed')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'approved_dispute_not_waived_or_released'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(cr.status, 'missing_recovery')::text AS dimension,
    rd.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(rd.reviewed_at, rd.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM recovery_disputes rd
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT * FROM claim_recoveries cr
    WHERE cr.claim_id = rd.claim_id AND cr.recovery_target = rd.appellant_type
    ORDER BY cr.id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) cr ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN behavior_actions rel ON rel.action_type = 'release' AND rel.target_entity = rd.appellant_type AND rel.detail->>'recovery_id' = cr.id::text
  WHERE rd.status = 'approved'
    AND COALESCE(rd.reviewed_at, rd.created_at) >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND (cr.id IS NULL OR cr.status <> 'waived' OR rel.id IS NULL OR rel.status <> 'success')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'blocking_recovery_without_success_block_action'::text AS issue_type,
    cr.status::text AS dimension,
    cr.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(cr.updated_at, cr.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM claim_recoveries cr
  LEFT JOIN behavior_actions ba ON ba.action_type = 'block' AND ba.target_entity = cr.recovery_target AND ba.detail->>'recovery_id' = cr.id::text AND ba.status = 'success'
  WHERE cr.created_at >= now() - interval '60 days'
    AND (cr.status = 'overdue' OR (cr.status = 'disputed' AND cr.due_at <= now()))
    AND ba.id IS NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'release_success_recovery_not_closed_state'::text AS issue_type,
    cr.status::text AS dimension,
    ba.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(ba.executed_at, ba.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM behavior_actions ba
  JOIN claim_recoveries cr ON cr.id::text = ba.detail->>'recovery_id'
  WHERE ba.action_type = 'release'
    AND ba.status = 'success'
    AND ba.created_at >= now() - interval '60 days'
    AND cr.status NOT IN ('paid', 'waived')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'claim_recovery_event_duplicate'::text AS issue_type,
    event_type::text AS dimension,
    recovery_id::text AS object_id,
    MAX(created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM claim_recovery_events
  GROUP BY recovery_id, event_type
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'claim_behavior_action_running_over_15m'::text AS issue_type,
    action_type::text AS dimension,
    id::text AS object_id,
    created_at AS signal_at
  FROM behavior_actions
  WHERE status = 'running'
    AND action_type IN ('block','recovery','release','notify')
    AND created_at < now() - interval '15 minutes'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'recovery_dispute_result_missing_notification'::text AS issue_type,
    rd.status::text AS dimension,
    rd.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(rd.reviewed_at, rd.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM recovery_disputes rd
  LEFT JOIN notifications n ON n.related_type = 'recovery_dispute' AND n.related_id = rd.id AND n.type = 'recovery_dispute'
  WHERE rd.status IN ('approved','rejected')
    AND COALESCE(rd.reviewed_at, rd.created_at) >= now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY rd.id, rd.status, rd.reviewed_at, rd.created_at
  HAVING COUNT(n.id) = 0
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM claim_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B04-6: P1-F06 onboarding/credential/operator 权限状态聚合预检。
WITH governance_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'latest_review_summary_run_drift'::text AS issue_type,
    application_type AS dimension,
    application_id AS object_id,
    run_created_at AS signal_at
  FROM (
    SELECT 'merchant'::text AS application_type, ma.id::text AS application_id, ma.review_summary->>'run_id' AS summary_run_id, r.id::text AS latest_completed_run_id, r.created_at AS run_created_at
    FROM merchant_applications ma
    JOIN LATERAL (
      SELECT * FROM onboarding_review_runs r
      WHERE r.application_type = 'merchant' AND r.merchant_application_id = ma.id AND r.run_status = 'completed'
      ORDER BY r.finished_at DESC NULLS LAST, r.id DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ) r ON TRUE
    WHERE COALESCE(r.finished_at, r.created_at) >= now() - interval '90 days'
      AND (ma.review_summary->>'run_id') IS DISTINCT FROM r.id::text
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'rider'::text AS application_type, ra.id::text AS application_id, ra.review_summary->>'run_id' AS summary_run_id, r.id::text AS latest_completed_run_id, r.created_at AS run_created_at
    FROM rider_applications ra
    JOIN LATERAL (
      SELECT * FROM onboarding_review_runs r
      WHERE r.application_type = 'rider' AND r.rider_application_id = ra.id AND r.run_status = 'completed'
      ORDER BY r.finished_at DESC NULLS LAST, r.id DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ) r ON TRUE
    WHERE COALESCE(r.finished_at, r.created_at) >= now() - interval '90 days'
      AND (ra.review_summary->>'run_id') IS DISTINCT FROM r.id::text
  ) drift

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'review_run_active_over_15m'::text AS issue_type,
    application_type::text AS dimension,
    id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(started_at, queued_at, created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM onboarding_review_runs
  WHERE run_status IN ('queued','processing')
    AND COALESCE(started_at, queued_at, created_at) < now() - interval '15 minutes'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'approved_application_missing_active_credential'::text AS issue_type,
    'merchant'::text AS dimension,
    ma.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(ma.reviewed_at, ma.updated_at, ma.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM merchant_applications ma
  LEFT JOIN credential_ledgers cl ON cl.subject_type = 'merchant' AND cl.merchant_application_id = ma.id AND cl.active = true
  WHERE ma.status = 'approved'
    AND COALESCE(ma.reviewed_at, ma.updated_at, ma.created_at) >= now() - interval '90 days'
  GROUP BY ma.id, ma.reviewed_at, ma.updated_at, ma.created_at
  HAVING COUNT(cl.id) = 0

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'approved_application_missing_active_credential'::text AS issue_type,
    'rider'::text AS dimension,
    ra.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(ra.reviewed_at, ra.updated_at, ra.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM rider_applications ra
  LEFT JOIN credential_ledgers cl ON cl.subject_type = 'rider' AND cl.rider_application_id = ra.id AND cl.active = true AND cl.document_type = 'health_cert'
  WHERE ra.status = 'approved'
    AND COALESCE(ra.reviewed_at, ra.updated_at, ra.created_at) >= now() - interval '90 days'
  GROUP BY ra.id, ra.reviewed_at, ra.updated_at, ra.created_at
  HAVING COUNT(cl.id) = 0

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'document_expired_suspension_without_active_expired_credential'::text AS issue_type,
    'merchant'::text AS dimension,
    mp.merchant_id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(mp.takeout_suspended_at, mp.updated_at) AS signal_at
  FROM merchant_profiles mp
  LEFT JOIN credential_ledgers cl ON cl.subject_type = 'merchant' AND cl.merchant_id = mp.merchant_id AND cl.active = true AND cl.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND cl.expires_at <= now()
  WHERE mp.is_takeout_suspended = true AND mp.takeout_suspend_reason = 'document_expired'
  GROUP BY mp.merchant_id, mp.takeout_suspended_at, mp.updated_at
  HAVING COUNT(cl.id) = 0

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'document_expired_suspension_without_active_expired_credential'::text AS issue_type,
    'rider'::text AS dimension,
    rp.rider_id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(rp.suspended_at, rp.updated_at) AS signal_at
  FROM rider_profiles rp
  LEFT JOIN credential_ledgers cl ON cl.subject_type = 'rider' AND cl.rider_id = rp.rider_id AND cl.active = true AND cl.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND cl.expires_at <= now()
  WHERE rp.is_suspended = true AND rp.suspend_reason = 'document_expired'
  GROUP BY rp.rider_id, rp.suspended_at, rp.updated_at
  HAVING COUNT(cl.id) = 0

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'inactive_credential_late_suspended'::text AS issue_type,
    subject_type::text AS dimension,
    id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(suspended_at, updated_at, created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM credential_ledgers
  WHERE active = false
    AND suspended_at IS NOT NULL
    AND (deactivated_at IS NULL OR suspended_at >= deactivated_at OR resumed_at IS NOT NULL)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
```
