```sql
    'region_multiple_active_operators'::text AS issue_type,
    'region'::text AS dimension,
    region_id::text AS object_id,
    now() AS signal_at
  FROM (
    SELECT or_t.region_id
    FROM operator_regions or_t
    JOIN operators o ON o.id = or_t.operator_id
    WHERE or_t.status = 'active' AND o.status = 'active'
    GROUP BY or_t.region_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT or_t.operator_id) > 1
  ) s

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'approved_operator_application_projection_gap'::text AS issue_type,
    'operator_application'::text AS dimension,
    oa.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(oa.reviewed_at, oa.updated_at, oa.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM operator_applications oa
  LEFT JOIN operators o ON o.user_id = oa.user_id AND o.status = 'active'
  LEFT JOIN operator_regions or_t ON or_t.operator_id = o.id AND or_t.region_id = oa.region_id AND or_t.status = 'active'
  LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.user_id = oa.user_id AND ur.role = 'operator' AND ur.status = 'active'
  WHERE oa.status = 'approved'
    AND COALESCE(oa.reviewed_at, oa.updated_at, oa.created_at) >= now() - interval '90 days'
    AND (o.id IS NULL OR or_t.id IS NULL OR ur.id IS NULL)
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM governance_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B04-7: P1-F07 order snapshot/current-state drift 与库存数据质量聚合预检。
WITH order_snapshot_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'order_current_merchant_unavailable'::text AS issue_type,
    o.order_type::text AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    o.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM orders o
  JOIN merchants m ON m.id = o.merchant_id
  LEFT JOIN merchant_profiles mp ON mp.merchant_id = o.merchant_id
  WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND o.status <> 'cancelled'
    AND (m.status <> 'active' OR m.is_open IS DISTINCT FROM true OR (o.order_type = 'takeout' AND COALESCE(mp.is_takeout_suspended, false) = true))

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'dish_item_current_state_or_price_drift'::text AS issue_type,
    CASE WHEN d.deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'deleted' WHEN d.is_online IS DISTINCT FROM true THEN 'offline' WHEN d.is_available IS DISTINCT FROM true THEN 'unavailable' ELSE 'price_changed' END AS dimension,
    oi.order_id::text AS object_id,
    o.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM order_items oi
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id
  JOIN dishes d ON d.id = oi.dish_id
  WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND oi.dish_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (d.deleted_at IS NOT NULL OR d.is_online IS DISTINCT FROM true OR d.is_available IS DISTINCT FROM true OR d.price <> oi.unit_price)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'combo_item_current_state_or_price_drift'::text AS issue_type,
    CASE WHEN cs.deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'deleted' WHEN cs.is_online IS DISTINCT FROM true THEN 'offline' ELSE 'price_changed' END AS dimension,
    oi.order_id::text AS object_id,
    o.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM order_items oi
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id
  JOIN combo_sets cs ON cs.id = oi.combo_id
  WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND oi.combo_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (cs.deleted_at IS NOT NULL OR cs.is_online IS DISTINCT FROM true OR cs.combo_price <> oi.unit_price)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'customization_reference_missing_current_group_or_option'::text AS issue_type,
    CASE WHEN dcg.id IS NULL THEN 'missing_group' ELSE 'missing_option' END AS dimension,
    cp.order_id::text AS object_id,
    cp.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM (
    SELECT o.id AS order_id, o.created_at, oi.id AS order_item_id, oi.dish_id, kv.key AS group_id_text, kv.value AS option_id_json
    FROM orders o
    JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_each(CASE WHEN jsonb_typeof(oi.customizations::jsonb) = 'object' THEN oi.customizations::jsonb ELSE '{}'::jsonb END) AS kv(key, value)
    WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
      AND oi.dish_id IS NOT NULL
      AND oi.customizations IS NOT NULL
      AND jsonb_typeof(oi.customizations::jsonb) = 'object'
      AND kv.key <> 'meta_specs'
      AND kv.key ~ '^[0-9]+$'
      AND kv.value::text ~ '^"?[0-9]+"?$'
  ) cp
  LEFT JOIN dish_customization_groups dcg ON dcg.id = cp.group_id_text::bigint AND dcg.dish_id = cp.dish_id
  LEFT JOIN dish_customization_options dco ON dco.id = trim(both '"' FROM cp.option_id_json::text)::bigint AND dco.group_id = dcg.id
  WHERE dcg.id IS NULL OR dco.id IS NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'packaging_current_state_or_price_drift'::text AS issue_type,
    CASE WHEN mpo.id IS NULL THEN 'missing_option' WHEN mpo.deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'deleted' WHEN mpo.is_enabled IS DISTINCT FROM true THEN 'disabled' ELSE 'price_changed' END AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    o.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM order_packaging_items opi
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = opi.order_id
  LEFT JOIN merchant_packaging_options mpo ON mpo.id = opi.packaging_option_id
  WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND (mpo.id IS NULL OR mpo.deleted_at IS NOT NULL OR mpo.is_enabled IS DISTINCT FROM true OR mpo.price <> opi.unit_price)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'voucher_current_rule_drift'::text AS issue_type,
    CASE WHEN v.deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN 'deleted' WHEN v.is_active IS DISTINCT FROM true THEN 'inactive' WHEN o.voucher_amount <> v.amount THEN 'amount_changed' WHEN o.subtotal < v.min_order_amount THEN 'threshold_changed' ELSE 'type_or_validity_changed' END AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    o.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM orders o
  JOIN user_vouchers uv ON uv.id = o.user_voucher_id
  JOIN vouchers v ON v.id = uv.voucher_id
  WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND o.user_voucher_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (o.voucher_amount <> v.amount OR o.subtotal < v.min_order_amount OR NOT (o.order_type = ANY(v.allowed_order_types)) OR v.deleted_at IS NOT NULL OR v.is_active IS DISTINCT FROM true OR now() NOT BETWEEN v.valid_from AND v.valid_until)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'daily_inventory_committed_exceeds_total'::text AS issue_type,
    'inventory'::text AS dimension,
    di.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(di.updated_at, di.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM daily_inventory di
  WHERE di.total_quantity <> -1
    AND di.sold_quantity + di.reserved_quantity > di.total_quantity

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'default_address_data_quality'::text AS issue_type,
    'user_address'::text AS dimension,
    user_id::text AS object_id,
    now() AS signal_at
  FROM user_addresses
  GROUP BY user_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_default = true AND deleted_at IS NULL) > 1
      OR COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_default = true AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL) > 0

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'merchant_tag_inactive_or_wrong_type'::text AS issue_type,
    t.type::text AS dimension,
    mt.merchant_id::text AS object_id,
    mt.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM merchant_tags mt
  JOIN tags t ON t.id = mt.tag_id
  WHERE t.status <> 'active' OR t.type <> 'merchant'
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM order_snapshot_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B04-8: P1-F08 Baofu 开户/报备/授权状态机聚合预检。
WITH baofu_onboarding_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'active_flow_stuck'::text AS issue_type,
    f.state::text AS dimension,
    f.id::text AS object_id,
    f.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM baofu_account_opening_flows f
  WHERE f.state IN ('opening_processing','merchant_report_processing','applet_auth_pending')
    AND f.updated_at < now() - interval '30 minutes'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'ready_flow_config_or_merchant_not_ready'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(mpc.status, 'missing_config')::text AS dimension,
    f.id::text AS object_id,
    f.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM baofu_account_opening_flows f
  JOIN merchants m ON m.id = f.owner_id
  LEFT JOIN merchant_payment_configs mpc ON mpc.merchant_id = f.owner_id
  WHERE f.owner_type = 'merchant'
    AND f.state = 'ready'
    AND (m.status <> 'active' OR mpc.id IS NULL OR mpc.status <> 'active')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'report_auth_success_not_ready'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(f.state, 'missing_flow')::text AS dimension,
    r.id::text AS object_id,
    r.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM baofu_merchant_reports r
  LEFT JOIN baofu_account_opening_flows f ON f.owner_type = r.owner_type AND f.owner_id = r.owner_id AND (f.merchant_report_id = r.id OR f.state IN ('merchant_report_processing','applet_auth_pending','ready'))
  LEFT JOIN merchants m ON m.id = r.owner_id
  LEFT JOIN merchant_payment_configs mpc ON mpc.merchant_id = r.owner_id
  WHERE r.report_state = 'succeeded'
    AND r.applet_auth_state = 'succeeded'
    AND (f.id IS NULL OR f.state <> 'ready' OR m.status <> 'active' OR mpc.id IS NULL OR mpc.status <> 'active' OR mpc.sub_mch_id IS DISTINCT FROM r.sub_mch_id)

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'active_binding_before_report_ready'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(lf.state, 'missing_flow')::text AS dimension,
    b.id::text AS object_id,
    b.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM baofu_account_bindings b
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT * FROM baofu_account_opening_flows f
    WHERE f.owner_type = b.owner_type AND f.owner_id = b.owner_id
    ORDER BY f.created_at DESC, f.id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) lf ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN baofu_merchant_reports r ON r.owner_type = b.owner_type AND r.owner_id = b.owner_id AND r.report_type = 'WECHAT'
  LEFT JOIN merchant_payment_configs mpc ON b.owner_type = 'merchant' AND mpc.merchant_id = b.owner_id
  WHERE b.owner_type = 'merchant'
    AND b.open_state = 'active'
    AND (lf.state IS DISTINCT FROM 'ready' OR r.report_state IS DISTINCT FROM 'succeeded' OR r.applet_auth_state IS DISTINCT FROM 'succeeded' OR mpc.status IS DISTINCT FROM 'active')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'flow_snapshot_profile_updated_after_flow'::text AS issue_type,
    f.state::text AS dimension,
    f.id::text AS object_id,
    p.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM baofu_account_opening_flows f
  JOIN baofu_account_opening_profiles p ON p.id = f.profile_id
  WHERE f.provider_request_snapshot <> '{}'::jsonb
    AND p.updated_at > f.updated_at

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'report_snapshot_report_no_mismatch'::text AS issue_type,
    r.report_state::text AS dimension,
    r.id::text AS object_id,
    r.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM baofu_merchant_reports r
  WHERE r.raw_snapshot ? 'reportNo'
    AND NULLIF(r.raw_snapshot->>'reportNo', '') IS NOT NULL
    AND r.raw_snapshot->>'reportNo' <> r.report_no

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'multiple_report_submit_commands'::text AS issue_type,
    command_count::text AS dimension,
    merchant_id::text AS object_id,
    last_submitted_at AS signal_at
  FROM (
    SELECT business_object_id AS merchant_id, COUNT(*) AS command_count, MAX(submitted_at) AS last_submitted_at
    FROM external_payment_commands
    WHERE provider = 'baofu'
      AND channel = 'baofu_aggregate'
      AND capability = 'baofu_merchant_report'
      AND command_type = 'baofu_merchant_report'
      AND external_object_type = 'baofu_merchant_report'
      AND submitted_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    GROUP BY business_object_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  ) c

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'report_submit_command_without_report_row'::text AS issue_type,
    c.command_status::text AS dimension,
    c.id::text AS object_id,
    COALESCE(c.submitted_at, c.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM external_payment_commands c
  LEFT JOIN baofu_merchant_reports r ON r.report_no = c.external_object_key
  WHERE c.provider = 'baofu'
    AND c.channel = 'baofu_aggregate'
    AND c.capability = 'baofu_merchant_report'
    AND c.command_type = 'baofu_merchant_report'
    AND r.id IS NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'applet_auth_failed_but_ready_or_active'::text AS issue_type,
    COALESCE(f.state, 'no_flow')::text AS dimension,
    r.id::text AS object_id,
    r.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM baofu_merchant_reports r
  LEFT JOIN baofu_account_opening_flows f ON f.owner_type = r.owner_type AND f.owner_id = r.owner_id AND (f.merchant_report_id = r.id OR f.state = 'ready')
  LEFT JOIN merchants m ON m.id = r.owner_id
  LEFT JOIN merchant_payment_configs mpc ON mpc.merchant_id = r.owner_id
  WHERE r.applet_auth_state = 'failed'
    AND (f.state = 'ready' OR m.status = 'active' OR mpc.status = 'active')
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM baofu_onboarding_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

### P4-B05. P2 副作用/外设/异步投影生产聚合预检包

- 目标：在 P0/P1 只读取证等待期间，为 P2 副作用、外设、异步投影准备低成本聚合预检；这批查询只用于判断生产是否存在可观测残留，不进入代码修复。
- 本地校验：2026-06-22 已在 `locallife_test` 对 `P4-B05-1..7` 执行 `BEGIN READ ONLY` + `EXPLAIN (COSTS OFF)`；7 条均通过当前 schema/语法检查。
- 模板修正：本轮补写前已校正 P2 旧模板字段漂移：`media_upload_sessions.expires_at/uploaded_by`、`external_payment_facts.business_object_type/business_object_id/raw_resource`、`baofu_withdrawal_orders.owner_type/owner_id/baofu_withdraw_no`、`cloud_printer_provider_authorizations.authorized_cloud_printer_id`。
- 执行顺序：先跑 `P4-B05-1`、`P4-B05-2`、`P4-B05-3`、`P4-B05-4`，覆盖打印/OCR/媒体/通知这类异步链路；再跑 `P4-B05-5`、`P4-B05-6`、`P4-B05-7`，覆盖前端放大器、桌台轻量投影和 provider ops 漂移。
- 判读边界：P2 命中多是副作用、可见性或投影漂移，不直接等同核心业务状态写坏；若命中牵涉资金、退款、分账、提现，必须回跳 P0 族判级；若牵涉订单/配送/预约主状态，必须回跳 P1 族判级。
- 回填矩阵：

| 执行时间 | 查询 ID | 覆盖风险族 | 窗口/阈值 | 命中行数 | 最老样本 | 最新样本 | 样本对象/摘要 | 初步等级 | 下一步 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | ---: | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 2026-06-22 13:31 CST | P4-B05-1 | P2-F01 | 30d / pending>10m/30m / outbox backlog | 38 | 2026-06-16 11:23:24.271347+08 | 2026-06-21 16:38:19.555486+08 | `pending_vendor_terminal_stuck/self_cloud=38` | `S2-backlog` | 该族更像 self_cloud 轮询/回写堆积，不直接判状态机错账；如需修复，应优先查 provider status poll / callback 失败恢复 |
| 2026-06-22 13:31 CST | P4-B05-2 | P2-F02 | OCR pending>15m/30m / 30d 多 job | 1 | 2026-06-22 13:31:51.026961+08 | 2026-06-22 13:31:51.026961+08 | `owner_pending_missing_or_stale_job/merchant_application/business_license=1` | `S2-backlog` | 单样本命中，但现场 OCR job 已不在表里，像已清理/失联的半状态；需与业务 owner 投影和 job 清理策略一起看 |
| 2026-06-22 13:31 CST | P4-B05-3 | P2-F03 | upload/session/moderation/OCR linkage | 507 + 507 | 2026-05-24 09:58:46.24716+08 | 2026-06-21 16:38:15.537215+08 | `public_confirmed_not_approved/review=507` + `review_pending_no_trace/review=507` | `S2-backlog` | 公开 review 图像未过审本身正常；真正需要继续查的是 pending 但没有 trace_id 的那一半，像是 moderation trigger/回写链路未启动 |
| 2026-06-22 13:31 CST | P4-B05-4 | P2-F04 | 7d/30d 通知重复、delayed、alert、urge | 36 / 35 / 35 | 2026-06-15 11:14:20.507355+08 | 2026-06-21 16:38:02.37909+08 | `duplicate_related_notifications/order=36`、`duplicate_content_notifications/order=35`、`pushed_unread_over_1h/order=35` | `S4-observability` | 通知模型允许重复写入与后续 push/read 分离；更像待消费/待读观测，不作为状态机 bug |
| 2026-06-22 13:31 CST | P4-B05-5 | P2-F05 | 30d 前端放大后端可见异常 | 123 | 2026-06-15 11:45:43.48419+08 | 2026-06-21 16:34:16.989127+08 | `open_dinein_session_with_paid_active_order=123` | `S4-observability` | 这是堂食开台与已付订单共存的业务中间态，现阶段更像正常使用中的会话，而不是独立 bug |
| 2026-06-22 13:31 CST | P4-B05-6 | P2-F06 | QR/table image 全量轻量聚合 | 20243 / 439 | 2026-02-19 22:29:06.463985+08 | 2026-06-21 16:38:19.446532+08 | `table_no_contains_scene_separator/table_no=20243`、`table_images_without_primary=439` | `S1-immediate` | `table_no` 含 `-` 且 scene 长度仍落在 `m_<merchantID>-t_<tableNo>` 可用范围内时，会被 `/t_([^-]+)/` 截断；`table_images_without_primary` 则是资源质量/投影问题，别混成一个结论 |
| 2026-06-22 13:31 CST | P4-B05-7 | P2-F07 | smoke/probe/provider ops drift | 0 | - | - | `0 rows` | `S0-clean-window` | 当前窗口未见 smoke/probe/provider 漂移 |

```sql
-- P4-B05-1: P2-F01 print/provider callback/poll/retry/script 聚合预检。
WITH print_ranked AS (
  SELECT
    pl.id,
    pl.order_id,
    pl.printer_id,
    cp.printer_type,
    pl.status,
    pl.vendor_order_id,
    pl.task_key,
    pl.error_message,
    pl.provider_status_checked_at,
    pl.created_at,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pl.order_id, pl.printer_id ORDER BY pl.created_at DESC, pl.id DESC) AS rn,
    BOOL_OR(pl.status = 'success') OVER (PARTITION BY pl.order_id, pl.printer_id) AS has_success
  FROM print_logs pl
  JOIN cloud_printers cp ON cp.id = pl.printer_id
  WHERE pl.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
), print_candidates AS (
  SELECT 'pending_vendor_terminal_stuck'::text AS issue_type, cp.printer_type::text AS dimension, pl.id::text AS object_id, pl.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM print_logs pl
  JOIN cloud_printers cp ON cp.id = pl.printer_id
  WHERE pl.status = 'pending'
    AND pl.vendor_order_id IS NOT NULL
    AND pl.created_at < now() - interval '30 minutes'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'pending_without_vendor'::text, cp.printer_type::text, pl.id::text, pl.created_at
  FROM print_logs pl
  JOIN cloud_printers cp ON cp.id = pl.printer_id
  WHERE pl.status = 'pending'
    AND (pl.vendor_order_id IS NULL OR btrim(pl.vendor_order_id) = '')
    AND pl.created_at < now() - interval '10 minutes'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'terminal_without_vendor'::text, pl.status::text, pl.id::text, pl.created_at
  FROM print_logs pl
  WHERE pl.status IN ('failed', 'cancelled')
    AND (pl.vendor_order_id IS NULL OR btrim(pl.vendor_order_id) = '')
    AND pl.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'accepted_task_key_blocking'::text, pl.status::text, pl.id::text, pl.created_at
  FROM print_logs pl
  WHERE pl.task_key = ('order:' || pl.order_id::text || ':accepted')
    AND (pl.status <> 'success' OR pl.vendor_order_id IS NULL OR btrim(pl.vendor_order_id) = '')
    AND pl.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'auto_accept_order_without_print_log'::text, odc.print_trigger_mode::text, o.id::text, o.created_at
  FROM orders o
  JOIN order_display_configs odc ON odc.merchant_id = o.merchant_id
  WHERE o.status IN ('preparing', 'courier_accepted')
    AND odc.auto_accept_paid_orders = true
    AND odc.enable_print = true
    AND odc.print_trigger_mode = 'accepted'
    AND o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM cloud_printers cp
      WHERE cp.merchant_id = o.merchant_id
        AND cp.is_active = true
        AND cp.deleted_at IS NULL
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM print_logs pl
      WHERE pl.order_id = o.id
        AND pl.task_key = ('order:' || o.id::text || ':accepted')
    )

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'payment_outbox_print_blocked'::text, pdo.status::text, pdo.id::text, pdo.updated_at
  FROM payment_domain_outbox pdo
  WHERE pdo.event_type = 'order_payment_succeeded'
    AND pdo.status IN ('pending', 'failed', 'processing')
    AND (
      pdo.last_error ILIKE '%print%'
      OR pdo.last_error ILIKE '%auto accept%'
      OR pdo.last_error ILIKE '%cloud printer%'
    )

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'script_inserted_paid_order'::text, o.status::text, o.id::text, o.created_at
  FROM orders o
  WHERE o.notes ILIKE '%LL self-cloud periodic cycle print%'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'latest_non_success_after_success'::text, printer_type::text, id::text, created_at
  FROM print_ranked
  WHERE rn = 1 AND has_success = true AND status <> 'success'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'provider_status_expired'::text, cp.printer_type::text, pl.id::text, COALESCE(pl.provider_status_checked_at, pl.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM print_logs pl
  JOIN cloud_printers cp ON cp.id = pl.printer_id
  WHERE pl.error_message = 'provider_print_status_expired'
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM print_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B05-2: P2-F02 OCR job/owner projection/stale reset 聚合预检。
WITH owner_refs AS (
  SELECT 'merchant_application'::text AS owner_type, id AS owner_id, 'business_license'::text AS document_type, ''::text AS side, business_license_ocr AS payload FROM merchant_applications WHERE business_license_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'merchant_application', id, 'food_permit', '', food_permit_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE food_permit_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'merchant_application', id, 'id_card', 'front', id_card_front_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE id_card_front_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'merchant_application', id, 'id_card', 'back', id_card_back_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE id_card_back_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'operator_application', id, 'business_license', '', business_license_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE business_license_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'operator_application', id, 'id_card', 'front', id_card_front_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE id_card_front_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'operator_application', id, 'id_card', 'back', id_card_back_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE id_card_back_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'rider_application', id, 'id_card', '', id_card_ocr FROM rider_applications WHERE id_card_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'rider_application', id, 'health_cert', '', health_cert_ocr FROM rider_applications WHERE health_cert_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'group_application', id, 'business_license', '', application_data->'business_license_ocr' FROM merchant_group_applications WHERE application_data ? 'business_license_ocr'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'group_application', id, 'id_card', 'front', application_data->'id_card_front_ocr' FROM merchant_group_applications WHERE application_data ? 'id_card_front_ocr'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'group_application', id, 'id_card', 'back', application_data->'id_card_back_ocr' FROM merchant_group_applications WHERE application_data ? 'id_card_back_ocr'
), latest_rider_job AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (owner_id, media_asset_id, document_type, side)
    id,
    owner_id,
    media_asset_id,
    document_type,
    side,
    status,
    created_at,
    finished_at
  FROM ocr_jobs
  WHERE owner_type = 'rider_application'
    AND status IN ('succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled')
  ORDER BY owner_id, media_asset_id, document_type, side, created_at DESC, id DESC
), rider_latest_drift AS (
  SELECT ra.id AS owner_id, 'id_card'::text AS document_type, lj.id AS latest_job_id, ra.id_card_ocr->>'ocr_job_id' AS owner_ocr_job_id, COALESCE(lj.finished_at, lj.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM rider_applications ra
  JOIN latest_rider_job lj ON lj.owner_id = ra.id AND lj.document_type = 'id_card'
   AND ((lj.side = 'front' AND ra.id_card_front_media_asset_id = lj.media_asset_id) OR (lj.side = 'back' AND ra.id_card_back_media_asset_id = lj.media_asset_id))
  WHERE ra.id_card_ocr IS NOT NULL
    AND ra.id_card_ocr ? 'ocr_job_id'
    AND ra.id_card_ocr->>'ocr_job_id' <> lj.id::text
  UNION ALL
  SELECT ra.id, 'health_cert', lj.id, ra.health_cert_ocr->>'ocr_job_id', COALESCE(lj.finished_at, lj.created_at)
  FROM rider_applications ra
  JOIN latest_rider_job lj ON lj.owner_id = ra.id AND lj.document_type = 'health_cert' AND ra.health_cert_media_asset_id = lj.media_asset_id
  WHERE ra.health_cert_ocr IS NOT NULL
    AND ra.health_cert_ocr ? 'ocr_job_id'
    AND ra.health_cert_ocr->>'ocr_job_id' <> lj.id::text
), ocr_candidates AS (
  SELECT 'approved_media_pending_ocr_job'::text AS issue_type, oj.owner_type::text AS dimension, oj.id::text AS object_id, oj.created_at AS signal_at
  FROM ocr_jobs oj
  JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.id = oj.media_asset_id
  WHERE oj.status = 'pending'
    AND ma.upload_status = 'confirmed'
    AND ma.moderation_status = 'approved'
    AND oj.created_at < now() - interval '15 minutes'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'terminal_job_owner_still_pending'::text, (r.owner_type || '/' || r.document_type)::text, oj.id::text, COALESCE(oj.finished_at, oj.updated_at)
  FROM owner_refs r
  JOIN ocr_jobs oj ON oj.id::text = r.payload->>'ocr_job_id'
  WHERE r.payload->>'status' IN ('pending', 'processing')
    AND oj.owner_type = r.owner_type
    AND oj.owner_id = r.owner_id
    AND oj.document_type = r.document_type
    AND oj.status IN ('succeeded', 'failed', 'cancelled')

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'owner_pending_missing_or_stale_job'::text, (r.owner_type || '/' || r.document_type)::text, r.owner_id::text, COALESCE(oj.created_at, now())
  FROM owner_refs r
  LEFT JOIN ocr_jobs oj ON oj.id::text = r.payload->>'ocr_job_id'
  WHERE r.payload->>'status' IN ('pending', 'processing')
    AND (
      r.payload->>'ocr_job_id' IS NULL
      OR oj.id IS NULL
      OR (oj.status IN ('pending', 'processing') AND oj.created_at < now() - interval '30 minutes')
    )

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'rider_multi_job_same_media'::text, (document_type || '/' || COALESCE(side, ''))::text, owner_id::text, MAX(created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM ocr_jobs
  WHERE owner_type = 'rider_application'
    AND created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY owner_id, media_asset_id, document_type, side
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'rider_owner_job_not_latest'::text, document_type::text, owner_id::text, signal_at
  FROM rider_latest_drift

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'group_non_draft_has_ocr_json'::text, status::text, id::text, updated_at
  FROM merchant_group_applications
  WHERE status <> 'draft'
    AND application_data IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      application_data ? 'business_license_ocr'
      OR application_data ? 'id_card_front_ocr'
      OR application_data ? 'id_card_back_ocr'
    )

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'merchant_stale_reset_job_inconsistent'::text, oj.status::text, r.owner_id::text, COALESCE(oj.updated_at, oj.created_at)
  FROM owner_refs r
  JOIN ocr_jobs oj ON oj.id::text = r.payload->>'ocr_job_id'
  WHERE r.owner_type = 'merchant_application'
    AND r.payload->>'status' = 'failed'
    AND oj.status IN ('pending', 'processing', 'succeeded')

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'processing_lease_stuck'::text, owner_type::text, id::text, COALESCE(leased_at, started_at, updated_at, created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM ocr_jobs
  WHERE status = 'processing'
    AND COALESCE(leased_at, started_at, updated_at, created_at) < now() - interval '30 minutes'
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM ocr_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B05-3: P2-F03 media upload/moderation/OCR linkage 聚合预检。
WITH media_owner_refs AS (
  SELECT 'merchant_application'::text AS owner_type, id AS owner_id, 'business_license'::text AS document_type, ''::text AS side, business_license_media_asset_id AS media_asset_id, business_license_ocr AS payload FROM merchant_applications WHERE business_license_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'merchant_application', id, 'food_permit', '', food_permit_media_asset_id, food_permit_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE food_permit_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'merchant_application', id, 'id_card', 'front', id_card_front_media_asset_id, id_card_front_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE id_card_front_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'merchant_application', id, 'id_card', 'back', id_card_back_media_asset_id, id_card_back_ocr FROM merchant_applications WHERE id_card_back_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'operator_application', id, 'business_license', '', business_license_media_asset_id, business_license_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE business_license_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'operator_application', id, 'id_card', 'front', id_card_front_media_asset_id, id_card_front_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE id_card_front_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'operator_application', id, 'id_card', 'back', id_card_back_media_asset_id, id_card_back_ocr FROM operator_applications WHERE id_card_back_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'rider_application', id, 'id_card', '', COALESCE(id_card_front_media_asset_id, id_card_back_media_asset_id), id_card_ocr FROM rider_applications WHERE id_card_ocr IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL SELECT 'rider_application', id, 'health_cert', '', health_cert_media_asset_id, health_cert_ocr FROM rider_applications WHERE health_cert_ocr IS NOT NULL
), object_key_groups AS (
  SELECT
    mus.object_key,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mus.id) AS session_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ma.id) AS asset_count,
    MIN(mus.created_at) AS first_session_created_at,
    MAX(COALESCE(ma.created_at, mus.created_at)) AS last_signal_at
  FROM media_upload_sessions mus
  LEFT JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.object_key = mus.object_key
  GROUP BY mus.object_key
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT mus.id) > 1 OR COUNT(DISTINCT ma.id) > 1
), media_candidates AS (
  SELECT 'expired_pending_upload_session'::text AS issue_type, business_type::text AS dimension, id::text AS object_id, expires_at AS signal_at
  FROM media_upload_sessions
  WHERE status = 'pending'
    AND expires_at < now()

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'confirmed_asset_session_not_completed'::text, mus.media_category::text, mus.id::text, ma.created_at
  FROM media_upload_sessions mus
  JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.object_key = mus.object_key
  WHERE ma.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND ma.upload_status = 'confirmed'
    AND (mus.status <> 'completed' OR mus.media_asset_id IS NULL OR mus.media_asset_id <> ma.id)

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'completed_session_bad_asset'::text, mus.media_category::text, mus.id::text, mus.created_at
  FROM media_upload_sessions mus
  LEFT JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.id = mus.media_asset_id
  WHERE mus.status = 'completed'
    AND (mus.media_asset_id IS NULL OR ma.id IS NULL OR ma.deleted_at IS NOT NULL OR ma.upload_status <> 'confirmed')

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'review_pending_no_trace'::text, media_category::text, id::text, updated_at
  FROM media_assets
  WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
    AND upload_status = 'confirmed'
    AND media_category = 'review'
    AND moderation_status = 'pending'
    AND moderation_trace_id IS NULL
    AND updated_at < now() - interval '15 minutes'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'review_pending_with_trace'::text, media_category::text, id::text, updated_at
  FROM media_assets
  WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
    AND upload_status = 'confirmed'
    AND media_category = 'review'
    AND moderation_status = 'pending'
    AND moderation_trace_id IS NOT NULL
    AND updated_at < now() - interval '30 minutes'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'public_confirmed_not_approved'::text, media_category::text, id::text, updated_at
  FROM media_assets
  WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
    AND visibility = 'public'
    AND upload_status = 'confirmed'
    AND moderation_status <> 'approved'
    AND created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'terminal_media_pending_ocr_job'::text, ma.moderation_status::text, oj.id::text, ma.updated_at
  FROM media_assets ma
  JOIN ocr_jobs oj ON oj.media_asset_id = ma.id
  WHERE ma.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND ma.upload_status = 'confirmed'
    AND ma.moderation_status IN ('approved', 'rejected', 'quarantined')
    AND oj.status = 'pending'
    AND ma.updated_at < now() - interval '15 minutes'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'rejected_media_owner_ocr_pending'::text, r.owner_type::text, r.owner_id::text, ma.updated_at
  FROM media_owner_refs r
  JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.id = r.media_asset_id
  WHERE ma.moderation_status IN ('rejected', 'quarantined')
    AND r.payload->>'status' IN ('pending', 'processing')

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'session_asset_checksum_size_mismatch'::text, mus.media_category::text, mus.id::text, ma.created_at
  FROM media_upload_sessions mus
  JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.object_key = mus.object_key
  WHERE ma.deleted_at IS NULL
    AND (mus.checksum_sha256 IS DISTINCT FROM ma.checksum_sha256 OR mus.content_length IS DISTINCT FROM ma.file_size)

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'object_key_multi_session_or_asset'::text, (session_count::text || '/' || asset_count::text), object_key, last_signal_at
  FROM object_key_groups
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM media_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B05-4: P2-F04 notification/WebSocket/delayed/urge 聚合预检。
WITH duplicate_related AS (
  SELECT user_id, type, related_type, related_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, MIN(created_at) AS first_created_at, MAX(created_at) AS last_created_at
  FROM notifications
  WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND related_type IS NOT NULL
    AND related_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY user_id, type, related_type, related_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), duplicate_content AS (
  SELECT user_id, type, title, content, related_type, related_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, MIN(created_at) AS first_created_at, MAX(created_at) AS last_created_at
  FROM notifications
  WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
  GROUP BY user_id, type, title, content, related_type, related_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), delayed_without_notification AS (
  SELECT d.id, d.status, d.created_at
  FROM deliveries d
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = d.order_id
  LEFT JOIN notifications n ON n.related_type = 'delivery' AND n.related_id = d.id
  WHERE d.is_delayed = true
    AND d.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY d.id, d.status, d.created_at
  HAVING COUNT(n.id) FILTER (
    WHERE n.related_type = 'delivery'
      AND n.related_id = d.id
      AND n.type = 'delivery'
      AND n.title = '代取超时告警'
  ) = 0
), operator_alert_without_notification AS (
  SELECT a.delivery_id, a.alert_key, a.created_at
  FROM delivery_timeout_alerts a
  LEFT JOIN notifications n ON n.related_type = 'delivery' AND n.related_id = a.delivery_id
  WHERE a.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY a.delivery_id, a.alert_key, a.created_at
  HAVING COUNT(n.id) FILTER (
    WHERE n.related_type = 'delivery'
      AND n.related_id = a.delivery_id
      AND COALESCE(n.extra_data->>'audience', '') = 'operator'
      AND n.extra_data->>'alert_key' = a.alert_key
  ) = 0
), duplicate_urge AS (
  SELECT order_id, date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS minute_bucket, COUNT(*) AS cnt, MAX(created_at) AS last_created_at
  FROM order_status_logs
  WHERE notes = '用户催单'
    AND created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY order_id, date_trunc('minute', created_at)
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), notification_candidates AS (
  SELECT 'duplicate_related_notifications'::text AS issue_type, type::text AS dimension, (related_type || ':' || related_id::text)::text AS object_id, last_created_at AS signal_at
  FROM duplicate_related

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'duplicate_content_notifications'::text, type::text, COALESCE(related_type, 'none') || ':' || COALESCE(related_id::text, 'none'), last_created_at
  FROM duplicate_content

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'pushed_unread_over_1h'::text, type::text, id::text, pushed_at
  FROM notifications
  WHERE is_pushed = true
    AND is_read = false
    AND pushed_at < now() - interval '1 hour'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'delayed_flag_on_non_pending_delivery'::text, status::text, id::text, created_at
  FROM deliveries
  WHERE is_delayed = true
    AND status <> 'pending'
    AND created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'delayed_without_merchant_notification'::text, status::text, id::text, created_at
  FROM delayed_without_notification

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'operator_alert_ledger_without_notification'::text, alert_key::text, delivery_id::text, created_at
  FROM operator_alert_without_notification

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'duplicate_urge_logs_same_minute'::text, cnt::text, order_id::text, last_created_at
  FROM duplicate_urge
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM notification_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B05-5: P2-F05 frontend amplifier/backend visible anomalies 聚合预检。
WITH duplicate_completed_logs AS (
  SELECT order_id, operator_type, operator_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt, MAX(created_at) AS last_created_at
  FROM order_status_logs
  WHERE to_status = 'completed'
    AND created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY order_id, operator_type, operator_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), frontend_candidates AS (
  SELECT 'duplicate_completed_status_logs'::text AS issue_type, COALESCE(operator_type, 'unknown')::text AS dimension, order_id::text AS object_id, last_created_at AS signal_at
  FROM duplicate_completed_logs

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'completed_takeout_missing_confirm_or_auto_log'::text, CASE WHEN o.auto_user_delivered_at IS NULL THEN 'user_or_manual' ELSE 'auto' END, o.id::text, COALESCE(o.completed_at, o.updated_at) AS signal_at
  FROM orders o
  WHERE o.order_type = 'takeout'
    AND o.status = 'completed'
    AND o.completed_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM order_status_logs l
      WHERE l.order_id = o.id
        AND l.to_status = 'completed'
        AND l.notes IN ('用户确认收货并完成订单', '送达后1小时无操作自动完成')
    )

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'pending_direct_payment_with_refund_fact'::text, po.payment_channel::text, po.id::text, COALESCE(epf.created_at, po.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders po
  JOIN external_payment_facts epf
    ON epf.business_object_type = 'payment_order'
   AND epf.business_object_id = po.id
  WHERE po.payment_channel IN ('wechat', 'wechat_direct', 'direct')
    AND po.status = 'pending'
    AND po.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
    AND (epf.upstream_state = 'REFUND' OR epf.raw_resource::text ILIKE '%REFUND%')

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'open_dinein_session_with_paid_active_order'::text, o.status::text, ds.id::text, COALESCE(o.paid_at, ds.opened_at, ds.created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM dining_sessions ds
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = ds.active_order_id
  WHERE ds.status = 'open'
    AND o.order_type = 'dine_in'
    AND o.status = 'paid'
    AND ds.opened_at < now() - interval '5 minutes'
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM frontend_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B05-6: P2-F06 QR/table image/light media projection 聚合预检。
WITH image_without_primary AS (
  SELECT table_id, COUNT(*) AS image_count, MAX(created_at) AS last_image_at
  FROM table_images
  GROUP BY table_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
     AND COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_primary = true) = 0
), multiple_primary AS (
  SELECT table_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_primary = true) AS primary_count, MAX(created_at) AS last_image_at
  FROM table_images
  GROUP BY table_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_primary = true) > 1
), table_media_candidates AS (
  SELECT 'table_no_contains_scene_separator'::text AS issue_type, 'table_no'::text AS dimension, id::text AS object_id, updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM tables
  WHERE table_no LIKE '%-%'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'qr_asset_exists_pointer_empty'::text, 'qr_code_url'::text, t.id::text, ma.created_at
  FROM tables t
  JOIN media_assets ma
    ON ma.object_key LIKE ('merchant/table/' || t.merchant_id || '/qrcodes/qrcode_m' || t.merchant_id || '_t' || t.id || '_%_qrcode_v2.png')
  WHERE COALESCE(t.qr_code_url, '') = ''

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'qr_media_asset_pointer_bad'::text, COALESCE(ma.upload_status, 'missing')::text, t.id::text, t.updated_at
  FROM tables t
  LEFT JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.id = t.qr_code_media_asset_id
  WHERE t.qr_code_media_asset_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (ma.id IS NULL OR ma.deleted_at IS NOT NULL OR ma.upload_status <> 'confirmed')

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'table_images_without_primary'::text, image_count::text, table_id::text, last_image_at
  FROM image_without_primary

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'table_multiple_primary_images'::text, primary_count::text, table_id::text, last_image_at
  FROM multiple_primary
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM table_media_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B05-7: P2-F07 smoke/probe/provider ops drift 聚合预检。
WITH provider_ops_candidates AS (
  SELECT 'smoke_probe_payment_order'::text AS issue_type, business_type::text AS dimension, id::text AS object_id, created_at AS signal_at
  FROM payment_orders
  WHERE out_trade_no LIKE 'BAOFU_UO_%'
     OR out_trade_no LIKE 'BAOFU_PROBE_%'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'smoke_probe_payment_command'::text, command_status::text, id::text, created_at
  FROM external_payment_commands
  WHERE external_object_key LIKE 'BAOFU_UO_%'
     OR external_object_key LIKE 'BAOFU_PROBE_%'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'smoke_probe_payment_fact'::text, processing_status::text, id::text, created_at
  FROM external_payment_facts
  WHERE external_object_key LIKE 'BAOFU_UO_%'
     OR external_object_key LIKE 'BAOFU_PROBE_%'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'smoke_probe_baofu_withdrawal'::text, status::text, id::text, created_at
  FROM baofu_withdrawal_orders
  WHERE out_request_no LIKE 'BAOFU_PROBE_%'
     OR baofu_withdraw_no LIKE 'BAOFU_PROBE_%'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'legacy_withdrawal_probe_record'::text, status::text, id::text, created_at
  FROM withdrawal_records
  WHERE out_request_no LIKE 'BAOFU_PROBE_%'
     OR out_request_no LIKE 'BAOFU_UO_%'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'yilianyun_authorization_needs_ops_check'::text, status::text, id::text, updated_at
  FROM cloud_printer_provider_authorizations
  WHERE provider_type = 'yilianyun'
    AND (
      status <> 'active'
      OR access_token_expires_at < now()
      OR refresh_failure_count > 0
      OR last_provider_error IS NOT NULL
    )

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'cloud_printer_reconciliation_backlog'::text, status::text, id::text, updated_at
  FROM cloud_printer_reconciliation_jobs
  WHERE status IN ('pending', 'failed')
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM provider_ops_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```



### P4-B06. P3 观测/报表/治理类生产聚合预检包

- 目标：补齐第四阶段对 P3 配置、投影、报表、商业规则和低频运营状态的生产只读预检；这批查询用于发现生产数据质量、观测盲点或低优先级持久化半状态，不直接进入代码修复。
- 本地校验：2026-06-22 已在 `locallife_test` 对 `P4-B06-1..5` 执行 `BEGIN READ ONLY` + `EXPLAIN (COSTS OFF)`；5 条均通过当前 schema/语法检查。预检时修正了 `P4-B06-5` 中 group/member `status` 二义性，最终模板使用显式表别名；同日又将 `duplicate_active_group_name` 样本从明文 `normalized_group_name` 收紧为 `group_name_hash:` + `md5(normalized_group_name)`，并对收紧后的 `P4-B06-5` 重新执行 `EXPLAIN` 通过。
- 执行顺序：先跑 `P4-B06-1`、`P4-B06-3`，它们与配置执行时机、资金/对账可见性有关；再跑 `P4-B06-2`、`P4-B06-4`、`P4-B06-5`，覆盖展示投影、商业规则快照和低频运营状态。
- 判读边界：P3 命中通常是 `S2-backlog`、`S3-data-quality` 或 `S4-observability`，不是核心业务状态写坏；若命中直接牵涉资金事实应用、支付 outbox、退款/提现/分账，回跳 P0；若命中订单/配送/索赔主状态，回跳 P1；P3-F06 是 NP 收口池，不单独生成生产查询。
- 回填矩阵：

| 执行时间 | 查询 ID | 覆盖风险族 | 窗口/阈值 | 命中行数 | 最老样本 | 最新样本 | 样本对象/摘要 | 初步等级 | 下一步 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | ---: | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 2026-06-22 13:31 CST | P4-B06-1 | P3-F01 | 当前有效配置 / pending/failed / outbox backlog | 25,667 + 4,118 | 2026-02-18 16:26:37.782931+08 | 2026-06-21 16:38:14.537033+08 | `pending_profit_sharing_config_drift/pending=25667`、`pending_profit_sharing_config_drift/failed=4118` | `S4-observability` | 这是配置快照与当前待处理分账单的时点差异，属于配置可见性/观察口径，不是独立错账 |
| 2026-06-22 13:31 CST | P4-B06-2 | P3-F02 | 地址/标签/评价展示投影 | 11,153 + 9,812 + 1,422 + 1,055 + 957 + 711 + 356 + 347 + 1 | 2026-02-23 19:17:59.827135+08 | 2026-06-22 13:31:51.084697+08 | `review_without_image_row/text_only_or_missing_image=11153`、`active_addresses_without_default/1=9812`、`inactive_or_wrong_type_tag_binding/*=3467`、`review_without_image_row/empty_content=1055` | `S3-data-quality` | 主要是展示投影、历史数据和标签绑定质量，不直接指向状态机时序缺陷 |
| 2026-06-22 13:31 CST | P4-B06-3 | P3-F03 | 对账/command/outbox/统计水位 | 630 + 214 + 131 | 2026-04-25 08:45:49.587398+08 | 2026-06-21 16:38:16.387636+08 | `payment_domain_outbox_backlog/profit_sharing_result_ready/pending=630`、`baofu_submitted_or_unknown_command/baofu_payment=submitted=214`、`baofu_submitted_or_unknown_command/baofu_withdraw=submitted=131` | `S2-backlog` | 这是恢复/出账积压，不是单条业务对象错账；需要后续单独看 recovery/scheduler 线程 |
| 2026-06-22 13:31 CST | P4-B06-4 | P3-F04 | 会员/优惠券/充值规则快照 | 0 | 0 | 0 | `0 rows` | `S0-clean-window` | 当前窗口未见额外规则快照漂移 |
| 2026-06-22 13:31 CST | P4-B06-5 | P3-F05 | 集团/想吃榜/食安低频状态 | 2,023 + 1,724 | 2026-04-19 10:18:53.907383+08 | 2026-06-21 16:38:18.770885+08 | `active_group_missing_create_audit=2023`、`active_group_missing_owner_member=1724` | `S3-data-quality` | 现有代码里 group 创建/审批会同时写 owner/member/audit；这批更像历史遗留或快照口径，不是当前时序 bug |

```sql
-- P4-B06-1: P3-F01 config/runtime version and snapshot drift 聚合预检。
WITH p3_config_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'rule_multiple_effective_versions'::text AS issue_type,
    r.category::text AS dimension,
    r.id::text AS object_id,
    MAX(COALESCE(rv.effective_at, rv.created_at)) AS signal_at
  FROM rules r
  JOIN rule_versions rv ON rv.rule_id = r.id
  WHERE r.status = 'active'
    AND rv.status = 'published'
    AND (rv.effective_at IS NULL OR rv.effective_at <= now())
    AND (rv.expires_at IS NULL OR rv.expires_at > now())
  GROUP BY r.id, r.name, r.category, r.current_version_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 OR NOT BOOL_OR(rv.id = r.current_version_id)

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'pending_profit_sharing_config_drift'::text,
    pso.status::text,
    pso.id::text,
    psc.updated_at
  FROM profit_sharing_orders pso
  JOIN merchants m ON m.id = pso.merchant_id
  JOIN profit_sharing_configs psc
    ON psc.status = 'active'
   AND (psc.order_source = pso.order_source OR psc.order_source = 'all')
   AND (psc.merchant_id IS NULL OR psc.merchant_id = pso.merchant_id)
   AND (psc.region_id IS NULL OR psc.region_id = m.region_id)
   AND (psc.effective_at IS NULL OR psc.effective_at <= now())
   AND (psc.expires_at IS NULL OR psc.expires_at > now())
  WHERE pso.provider = 'baofu'
    AND pso.channel = 'baofu_aggregate'
    AND pso.status IN ('pending', 'failed')
    AND psc.updated_at > pso.created_at

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'payment_outbox_config_updated_after_event'::text,
    pdo.status::text,
    pdo.id::text,
    odc.updated_at
  FROM payment_domain_outbox pdo
  JOIN payment_orders po ON po.id = pdo.aggregate_id
  JOIN orders o ON o.id = po.order_id
  JOIN order_display_configs odc ON odc.merchant_id = o.merchant_id
  WHERE pdo.event_type = 'order_payment_succeeded'
    AND pdo.aggregate_type = 'payment_order'
    AND pdo.status IN ('pending', 'processing', 'failed')
    AND odc.updated_at > pdo.created_at

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'rider_deposit_threshold_projection_mismatch'::text,
    r.status::text,
    r.id::text,
    COALESCE(rrc.updated_at, r.updated_at)
  FROM riders r
  LEFT JOIN region_rule_configs rrc ON rrc.region_id = r.region_id
  WHERE r.status IN ('approved', 'active')
    AND COALESCE(rrc.rider_deposit, 0) > 0
    AND (
      (r.deposit_amount < rrc.rider_deposit AND r.status = 'active')
      OR (r.deposit_amount >= rrc.rider_deposit AND r.status = 'approved')
    )
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM p3_config_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B06-2: P3-F02 address/tag/review read-model projection 聚合预检。
WITH active_defaults AS (
  SELECT user_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_default = true AND deleted_at IS NULL) AS active_default_count,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE deleted_at IS NULL) AS active_address_count,
         MAX(created_at) FILTER (WHERE deleted_at IS NULL) AS last_active_address_at
  FROM user_addresses
  GROUP BY user_id
), tag_candidates AS (
  SELECT 'merchant_tags'::text AS source, mt.merchant_id::text AS object_id, mt.tag_id, t.type, t.status, mt.created_at
  FROM merchant_tags mt JOIN tags t ON t.id = mt.tag_id
  WHERE t.status <> 'active' OR t.type NOT IN ('merchant', 'system')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'dish_tags', dt.dish_id::text, dt.tag_id, t.type, t.status, dt.created_at
  FROM dish_tags dt JOIN tags t ON t.id = dt.tag_id
  WHERE t.status <> 'active' OR t.type NOT IN ('dish', 'system')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'combo_tags', ct.combo_id::text, ct.tag_id, t.type, t.status, ct.created_at
  FROM combo_tags ct JOIN tags t ON t.id = ct.tag_id
  WHERE t.status <> 'active' OR t.type NOT IN ('combo', 'system')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'table_tags', tt.table_id::text, tt.tag_id, t.type, t.status, tt.created_at
  FROM table_tags tt JOIN tags t ON t.id = tt.tag_id
  WHERE t.status <> 'active' OR t.type NOT IN ('table', 'system')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'dish_customization_options', dco.group_id::text, dco.tag_id, t.type, t.status, now() AS created_at
  FROM dish_customization_options dco JOIN tags t ON t.id = dco.tag_id
  WHERE t.status <> 'active' OR t.type <> 'customization'
), projection_candidates AS (
  SELECT 'multiple_active_default_addresses'::text AS issue_type, active_default_count::text AS dimension, user_id::text AS object_id, last_active_address_at AS signal_at
  FROM active_defaults
  WHERE active_default_count > 1

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'active_addresses_without_default'::text, active_address_count::text, user_id::text, last_active_address_at
  FROM active_defaults
  WHERE active_address_count > 0 AND active_default_count = 0

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'inactive_or_wrong_type_tag_binding'::text, (source || '/' || type || '/' || status)::text, object_id, created_at
  FROM tag_candidates

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'review_without_image_row'::text, CASE WHEN btrim(COALESCE(content, '')) = '' THEN 'empty_content' ELSE 'text_only_or_missing_image' END, r.id::text, r.created_at
  FROM reviews r
  LEFT JOIN review_images ri ON ri.review_id = r.id
  WHERE ri.id IS NULL
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM projection_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B06-3: P3-F03 reconciliation/observability/read-model backlog 聚合预检。
WITH stats_watermark AS (
  SELECT entity_type,
         MAX(stat_date) AS newest_stat_date,
         MAX(updated_at) AS newest_updated_at,
         COUNT(*) AS row_count
  FROM abnormal_stats_daily
  WHERE stat_date >= current_date - interval '30 days'
  GROUP BY entity_type
), report_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'baofu_fact_application_backlog'::text AS issue_type,
    (epf.capability || '/' || epfa.status)::text AS dimension,
    epfa.id::text AS object_id,
    epfa.updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM external_payment_fact_applications epfa
  JOIN external_payment_facts epf ON epf.id = epfa.fact_id
  WHERE epf.provider = 'baofu'
    AND epfa.status IN ('pending', 'processing', 'failed')
    AND epfa.updated_at < now() - interval '10 minutes'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'baofu_submitted_or_unknown_command'::text,
    (capability || '/' || command_status)::text,
    id::text,
    COALESCE(updated_at, submitted_at, created_at)
  FROM external_payment_commands
  WHERE provider = 'baofu'
    AND command_status IN ('submitted', 'unknown')

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'payment_domain_outbox_backlog'::text,
    (event_type || '/' || status)::text,
    id::text,
    updated_at
  FROM payment_domain_outbox
  WHERE status IN ('pending', 'processing', 'failed')

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'reconciliation_report_running_or_failed'::text,
    (bill_type || '/' || status)::text,
    id::text,
    updated_at
  FROM reconciliation_reports
  WHERE status IN ('running', 'failed')

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'claim_final_adjudicator_enabled'::text,
    COALESCE(scope_type, 'global')::text,
    id::text,
    updated_at
  FROM platform_configs
  WHERE config_key = 'claim_final_adjudicator'
    AND COALESCE(config_value->>'enabled', 'false') = 'true'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'abnormal_stats_watermark_stale_or_missing'::text,
    entity_type::text,
    entity_type::text,
    COALESCE(newest_updated_at, now())
  FROM stats_watermark
  WHERE newest_stat_date IS NULL
     OR newest_stat_date < current_date - interval '2 days'
     OR newest_updated_at < now() - interval '36 hours'
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM report_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B06-4: P3-F04 voucher/membership/recharge commercial-rule snapshot 聚合预检。
WITH membership_rule_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    'membership_balance_current_settings_mismatch'::text AS issue_type,
    o.order_type::text AS dimension,
    o.id::text AS object_id,
    GREATEST(o.created_at, mms.updated_at) AS signal_at
  FROM orders o
  JOIN merchant_membership_settings mms ON mms.merchant_id = o.merchant_id
  WHERE o.balance_paid > 0
    AND (
      NOT (o.order_type = ANY(mms.balance_usable_scenes))
      OR (o.user_voucher_id IS NOT NULL AND mms.allow_with_voucher IS NOT TRUE)
      OR (o.discount_amount > 0 AND mms.allow_with_discount IS NOT TRUE)
      OR (mms.max_deduction_percent > 0 AND o.balance_paid > (o.total_amount * mms.max_deduction_percent / 100))
      OR mms.updated_at BETWEEN o.created_at - interval '10 minutes' AND o.created_at + interval '10 minutes'
    )

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'deleted_voucher_has_unused_user_vouchers'::text,
    v.merchant_id::text,
    v.id::text,
    MAX(uv.obtained_at) AS signal_at
  FROM vouchers v
  JOIN user_vouchers uv ON uv.voucher_id = v.id
  WHERE v.deleted_at IS NOT NULL
    AND uv.status = 'unused'
    AND uv.expires_at > now()
  GROUP BY v.id, v.merchant_id

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'used_order_current_voucher_terms_drift'::text,
    o.order_type::text,
    o.id::text,
    GREATEST(o.created_at, v.updated_at) AS signal_at
  FROM orders o
  JOIN user_vouchers uv ON uv.id = o.user_voucher_id
  JOIN vouchers v ON v.id = uv.voucher_id
  WHERE o.user_voucher_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      o.voucher_amount <> v.amount
      OR o.subtotal < v.min_order_amount
      OR (cardinality(v.allowed_order_types) > 0 AND NOT (o.order_type = ANY(v.allowed_order_types)))
      OR v.updated_at BETWEEN o.created_at - interval '10 minutes' AND o.created_at + interval '10 minutes'
    )

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'recharge_transaction_current_rule_drift'::text,
    COALESCE(rr.is_active::text, 'missing_rule'),
    mt.id::text,
    GREATEST(mt.created_at, COALESCE(rr.updated_at, mt.created_at)) AS signal_at
  FROM membership_transactions mt
  JOIN merchant_memberships mm ON mm.id = mt.membership_id
  LEFT JOIN recharge_rules rr ON rr.id = mt.recharge_rule_id
  WHERE mt.type = 'recharge'
    AND mt.recharge_rule_id IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      rr.id IS NULL
      OR rr.is_active IS NOT TRUE
      OR mt.principal_amount <> rr.recharge_amount
      OR mt.bonus_amount <> rr.bonus_amount
      OR rr.updated_at BETWEEN mt.created_at - interval '10 minutes' AND mt.created_at + interval '10 minutes'
    )

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'membership_idempotency_duplicate'::text,
    type::text,
    membership_id::text,
    MAX(created_at) AS signal_at
  FROM membership_transactions
  WHERE idempotency_key IS NOT NULL
    AND type IN ('recharge', 'adjustment_credit', 'adjustment_debit')
  GROUP BY membership_id, idempotency_key, type
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'membership_recharge_payment_order_present'::text,
    status::text,
    id::text,
    created_at
  FROM payment_orders
  WHERE business_type = 'membership_recharge'
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM membership_rule_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```

```sql
-- P4-B06-5: P3-F05 group/wanted/ops low-frequency state 聚合预检。
WITH group_duplicate_apps AS (
  SELECT applicant_user_id, status, COUNT(*) AS application_count, MAX(updated_at) AS last_updated_at
  FROM merchant_group_applications
  WHERE status IN ('draft', 'submitted')
  GROUP BY applicant_user_id, status
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), duplicate_group_names AS (
  SELECT lower(trim(name)) AS normalized_group_name, COUNT(*) AS group_count, MAX(created_at) AS last_created_at
  FROM merchant_groups
  WHERE status = 'active'
  GROUP BY lower(trim(name))
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), group_ops_candidates AS (
  SELECT 'group_application_multiple_active'::text AS issue_type, status::text AS dimension, applicant_user_id::text AS object_id, last_updated_at AS signal_at
  FROM group_duplicate_apps

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'group_application_updated_after_review'::text, status::text, id::text, updated_at
  FROM merchant_group_applications
  WHERE status IN ('submitted', 'approved', 'rejected')
    AND reviewed_at IS NOT NULL
    AND updated_at > reviewed_at + interval '5 seconds'

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'active_group_missing_owner_member'::text, g.status::text, g.id::text, g.created_at
  FROM merchant_groups g
  LEFT JOIN merchant_group_members m
    ON m.group_id = g.id
   AND m.user_id = g.owner_user_id
   AND m.role = 'owner'
   AND m.status = 'active'
  WHERE g.status = 'active'
    AND m.id IS NULL

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'active_group_missing_create_audit'::text, g.status::text, g.id::text, g.created_at
  FROM merchant_groups g
  LEFT JOIN merchant_group_audit_logs al
    ON al.group_id = g.id
   AND al.action IN ('create_group', 'created', 'create')
  WHERE g.status = 'active'
    AND al.id IS NULL

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'duplicate_active_group_name'::text, group_count::text, ('group_name_hash:' || md5(normalized_group_name)), last_created_at
  FROM duplicate_group_names

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'active_wanted_matches_active_merchant'::text, w.region_id::text, w.id::text, GREATEST(w.updated_at, m.created_at)
  FROM wanted_merchants w
  JOIN merchants m
    ON m.region_id = w.region_id
   AND m.status = 'active'
   AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
   AND lower(regexp_replace(m.name, '[[:space:]]+', '', 'g')) = w.normalized_name
  LEFT JOIN merchant_profiles mp ON mp.merchant_id = m.id
  WHERE w.status = 'active'
    AND COALESCE(mp.is_takeout_suspended, false) = false

  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'resolved_food_safety_case_with_open_projection'::text, COALESCE(fsi.status, 'no_incident')::text, fsc.id::text, COALESCE(fsc.updated_at, fsc.resolved_at)
  FROM food_safety_cases fsc
  LEFT JOIN food_safety_incidents fsi ON fsi.case_id = fsc.id
  LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = fsi.order_id
  WHERE fsc.status = 'resolved'
    AND (
      fsi.status IS DISTINCT FROM 'resolved'
      OR o.exception_state = 'food_safety_paused'
    )
)
SELECT issue_type, dimension, COUNT(*) AS row_count,
       MIN(signal_at) AS oldest_signal_at,
       MAX(signal_at) AS newest_signal_at,
       (ARRAY_AGG(object_id ORDER BY signal_at DESC))[1:10] AS sample_ids
FROM group_ops_candidates
GROUP BY issue_type, dimension
ORDER BY row_count DESC, oldest_signal_at ASC;
```



### P4-B02. 复现测试计划门禁与占位

- 目标：把生产只读取证结果转换成可重复的本地/测试库复现计划；在没有生产回填或交叉确认前，本节只保留门禁和模板，不展开具体测试用例。
- 入场条件：
  - `P4-B01C/P4-B04/P4-B05/P4-B06` 中至少一行已完成最小证据包回填，包括执行时间、窗口、命中行数、样本对象/摘要、初步等级和下一步。
  - `S1-immediate` 必须至少具备“生产聚合命中 + 同族明细样本 + 日志/provider/业务时间线之一”的交叉证据；若只有聚合命中，先补明细和日志，不进入复现。
  - `S2-backlog` 必须补 worker/scheduler/asynq retry/dead 队列或后台任务日志；若无法判断是否可恢复，先停在取证，不写修复测试。
  - `S3-data-quality` 只进入数据治理复核，不进入核心状态机复现，除非确认当前写路径仍能产生同类数据。
  - `S4-observability` 只进入观测/告警/运行手册复核，不直接生成业务状态迁移测试。
- 复现设计原则：
  - 只在本地或测试库执行；不得使用生产 raw payload、openid、手机号、姓名、身份证、合同号等敏感内容。
  - 可以使用生产样本的脱敏对象 id、状态组合、时间间隔和事件顺序来构造“状态形状”，但测试数据必须重新造。
  - 优先复现“最终写边界缺 guard、事实应用/队列派发分段、回调/timeout 乱序、worker claim 缺失、stale processing 无恢复”这五类可代码化问题。
  - 对 P1/P2/P3 命中，先按 `P4-B00` 回跳规则确认是否属于 P0/P1 核心状态；确认前不写跨域修复测试。
- 复现优先级：
  1. P0 公共底座：`payment fact application`、`payment domain outbox`、`paid-unprocessed`、`processing stale reclaim`、`failed backoff`。
  2. P0 资金冲突：退款 success-after-failed/closed、提现 command unknown/processing 长尾、claim 行为动作 `running` 卡死回收缺口、rider deposit 退款 `pending/unknown` 重扫缺口、late success after cancel/timeout、分账 return/provider fact 冲突。
  3. P1 主状态：预约/堂食/订单/配送终态覆盖、库存/桌台 current 指针漂移、索赔资金动作回跳 P0。
  4. P2/P3 异步与观测：打印/OCR/通知/outbox backlog、配置/报表水位、告警不可见面；只在确认会影响核心状态或人工处置时升级。

| 复现批次 | 触发查询 | 初步等级 | 需要补的证据 | 复现形状 | 测试落点 | 状态 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| P4-B02-1 | P4-B05-6 / P2-F06 | S1 | 已有生产聚合命中 + `scan-entry` 解析代码 + `generateTableQRCode` scene 代码 | `table_no` 含 `-` 且 `len("m_<merchantID>-t_<tableNo>") <= 32`，扫码后被 `/t_([^-]+)/` 截断 | `weapp/miniprogram/pages/dine-in/scan-entry/entry-params.ts` parser 回归 + `locallife/api/scan_test.go` scene 生成回归 | implemented 2026-06-23 |
| P4-B02-2 | P4-B01B-4 / P0-F10 | S2 | 已有生产聚合命中 + `ClaimBehaviorActionRecoveryScheduler` 只回收 `created/failed` + `executeClaimBehaviorAction` 对 `running` 不做回收 | `behavior_actions` 中 `action_type in ('block','recovery','release','notify')`、`status='running'`、`created_at < now() - interval '30 minutes'`，RunOnce 后仍不会被专门重扫 | `worker/claim_behavior_action_recovery_scheduler_test.go` 回收范围回归 + 现有 `worker/task_claim_behavior_action_test.go` running 重入覆盖 | implemented 2026-06-23 |
| P4-B02-3 | P4-B01B-5 / P0-F11 | S2 | 已有生产聚合命中 + `RefundRecoveryScheduler` 只重扫 `processing` + `SubmitWithdrawal` 在 refund 结果不确定时保留 `pending` 待 query/retry | `refund_orders.status='pending'`、`external_payment_commands.command_status in ('unknown', null)`、`created_at < now() - interval '30 minutes'`，RunOnce 后仍不会被恢复器回扫 | `worker/refund_recovery_scheduler_test.go` pending/unknown 反例 + `logic/rider_deposit_refund_service_test.go` 不确定结果保留 pending 回归 | implemented 2026-06-23 |
| P4-B02-4 | P4-B05-6 / P2-F06 | S1 | 已有生产聚合命中 + `addTableImage` 先清旧主图再插新图 + `SetTableImagePrimaryTx` 既有事务模式 | `is_primary=true` 新增图片时，旧主图清除和新图插入分段；插入失败会无主图，并发主图写入可能多主图 | `api/table_test.go` 主图新增路由回归 + `db/sqlc/table_test.go` `AddTableImageTx` 事务回归 | implemented 2026-06-23 |
| P4-B02-5 | P4-B05-6 / P2-F06 | S1 | 已有生产聚合命中 + `storeTableQRCode` 先写 object/media asset 后回写 table 指针 | `CreateMediaAsset` 已成功但 `UpdateTable(qr_code_url)` 失败；第二次相同 QR 内容重试撞 `media_assets.object_key` 唯一键，无法继续修复桌台指针 | `api/scan_test.go` store-level object-key 复用回归 + handler 重试回写回归 | implemented 2026-06-23 |
| P4-B02-6 | P4-B01A-1 / P0-F03 | S2 | 已有生产聚合命中 + `PaymentFactApplicationScheduler` / `PaymentDomainOutboxScheduler` 只扫 `pending/failed`，不回收 `processing` | `external_payment_fact_applications.status='processing'` 或 `payment_domain_outbox.status='processing'` 且 `updated_at < now() - interval '15 minutes'`；worker 崩溃后 scheduler 不会重新入队 | `db/sqlc/external_payment_fact_test.go` stale reclaim SQL 回归 + `worker/*scheduler*_test.go` reclaim 后重新入队回归 | implemented 2026-06-23 |

- 现有测试边界：
  - `P4-B02-1` 现有 `api/scan_test.go` 只覆盖 `generateTableQRCode` 的服务端生成与回写，不覆盖小程序 `scan-entry` 对 scene 的解析分支；`weapp/miniprogram/pages/dine-in/scan-entry/scan-entry.ts` 也没有独立的解析单测，因此这条的最小复现仍需要新补一条 parser 回归，而不是依赖现有二维码生成测试。
  - `P4-B02-2` 现有 `claim_behavior_action_recovery_scheduler_test.go` 只证明 `created/failed` 会被重新入队，没有 `running` 负例；`task_claim_behavior_action_test.go` 也只覆盖运行态动作的正常推进，不覆盖 recovery scheduler 对 `running` 的缺口。
  - `P4-B02-3` 现有 `refund_recovery_scheduler_test.go` 只覆盖 order/reservation 的 pending 恢复、processing 的 direct refund 轮询，以及 rider deposit 的 `processing` query/fact 路径，没有 rider deposit `pending/unknown` 被 recovery scheduler 重扫的正例，因为代码里本身没有对应扫描入口。
  - 这意味着两条都已经有“为什么是缺口”的代码证据，但还没有把缺口转成最小可复现测试形状；它们更接近“扫描面缺失”而不是“已有扫描但条件写窄”。

- 代码锚点：
  - `generateTableQRCode` 把原始 `table_no` 直接塞进 scene 字段 `m_<merchantID>-t_<tableNo>`，只在 `len(scene) > 32` 时回退 `tid_<tableID>`；但小程序 `parseScene()` 仍用 `/t_([^-]+)/` 截断解析，遇到短 table_no 含 `-` 会把桌号切断：`locallife/api/scan.go:534-541`、`weapp/miniprogram/pages/dine-in/scan-entry/scan-entry.ts:24-39`。现有 `api/scan_test.go` 的 QR 相关用例只证明生成/回写/复用流程，没有覆盖这个协议错位。
  - `ClaimBehaviorActionRecoveryScheduler.runOnce()` 只按 `statuses := []string{"created", "failed"}` 重新入队，真正的恢复循环只在这里发生，`running` 不在扫描面内：`locallife/worker/claim_behavior_action_recovery_scheduler.go:89-115`。`executeClaimBehaviorAction()` 只消费已经出队的单个 `action_id`，不是 recovery scanner：`locallife/worker/task_claim_behavior_action.go:114-148`。其中 `executeClaimRestrictionAction()` 只在执行路径内对非 running 做 `claimBehaviorActionMarkRunning`，进一步说明“执行器能跑”与“恢复器会扫”是两条不同链路：`locallife/worker/task_claim_behavior_action.go:181-208`。
  - `RefundRecoveryScheduler.runOnce()` 只调用 `recoverCancelledOrderRefunds`、`recoverCancelledReservationRefunds`、`recoverPendingOrderRefunds`、`recoverPendingReservationRefunds` 和 `recoverStuckProcessingRefunds`，没有 rider deposit pending 重扫分支：`locallife/worker/refund_recovery_scheduler.go:121-125`。`recoverStuckProcessingRefunds()` 也明确只继续处理 `refundOrder.Status == "processing"` 的记录：`locallife/worker/refund_recovery_scheduler.go:284-360`。另一方面，`SubmitWithdrawal()` 在直连退款 create 结果不确定时会记录 `ExternalPaymentCommandStatusUnknown`、保持 `refund_order` 为 `pending` 并输出 “keeping refund pending for query/retry”：`locallife/logic/rider_deposit_refund_service.go:158-199,372-388`。`ResolveRefund()` / `maybeMarkPaymentOrderRefunded()` 只是在后续 success 事实路径收敛终态：`locallife/logic/rider_deposit_refund_service.go:309-316,462-480`。

- 下一步最小复现形状：
  - `P4-B02-2` 不再继续扩大 claim 族，而是补一条“`status='running'` 且 `created_at < now() - interval '30 minutes'` 的行为动作没有专门恢复入口”的复现注记。这个复现的关键不是证明任务执行器会失败，而是证明 recovery scheduler 的扫描面只停在 `created/failed`，`running` 只能靠别的隐式路径碰运气。
  - `P4-B02-3` 不再继续扩大 refund 族，而是补一条“rider deposit `refund_orders.status='pending'` 且 `external_payment_commands.command_status in ('unknown', null)` 会被保留，但没有任何 recovery scheduler 去重新扫”的复现注记。这个复现的关键不是说明 `SubmitWithdrawal` 写错，而是证明落库后命令不确定状态没有回收入口。
  - 上面两条都属于“缺扫描面/缺回收口”，不是“已有扫描但条件写窄”。后续修复草案也应按这个粒度拆，不要混成 generic refund worker 或 generic claim worker 问题。

- 复现卡片：
  - `P4-B02-2` 最小形状：造一条 `behavior_actions` 记录，`action_type` 取 `block/recovery/release/notify` 之一，`target_entity` 取对应实体，`status='running'`，`created_at` 置为 30 分钟以前，`detail` 保持非终态；执行 `ClaimBehaviorActionRecoveryScheduler.RunOnce()`，预期只会覆盖 `created/failed` 的动作，`running` 不进入恢复流。这个卡片的验证重点是“恢复调度器扫描面没有 running”，不是“任务执行器本身能否完成动作”。
- `P4-B02-3` 最小形状：造一条 rider deposit 的 `refund_orders` 记录，`payment_orders.business_type='rider_deposit'`、`payment_orders.payment_channel='direct'`、`refund_orders.status='pending'`、`created_at` 置为 30 分钟以前，同时令对应外部命令处于 `unknown` 或不存在；执行 `RefundRecoveryScheduler.RunOnce()`，预期只会处理 order/reservation pending 或 processing stuck 的路径，rider deposit 的 pending/unknown 不会被恢复器重新扫到。这个卡片的验证重点是“没有 rider deposit pending 的 recovery scanner”，不是“提交提现请求的前半段是否正确落库”。

- 2026-06-22 修复闭口补记：`P0-F11-1` 已完成实现。`RefundRecoveryScheduler` 现在新增 rider deposit `pending/unknown` recovery scan，复用原 `out_refund_no` 重新查询并重新记录 fact/application；`worker/refund_recovery_scheduler_test.go` 已补覆盖 pending rider deposit refund 的回归测试，原有 direct refund / baofu stuck 用例也补齐了新的空扫描期望，避免新 query 破坏旧路径。

- 2026-06-23 残余风险处理补记：`P0-F11-1` 已补 DB-backed 集成验证。`TestRiderDepositRefundPendingUnknownRecoveryIntegration` 构造 rider deposit 支付成功、提现冻结、`refund_orders.status='pending'`、直连退款 command `unknown` 且无回调的持久化状态；执行 `RefundRecoveryScheduler.RunOnce()` 后通过 query fact/application，再由 `PaymentFactService.ApplyExternalPaymentFactApplication` 收敛 `refund_orders`、`riders`、`rider_deposit_credits`、`payment_orders`。本地代码链路残余风险降为已覆盖；真实微信回调投递丢失、provider 查询可用性、生产 scheduler/queue 运行状态仍归入线上观测/只读 SQL 检查范围。

- 2026-06-23 修复闭口补记：`P0-F10` 中 `block/recovery/release/notify` 行为动作 `running` 卡死恢复缺口已完成最小实现。`ClaimBehaviorActionRecoveryScheduler` 现在在原 `created/failed` 扫描之外补扫同 action type / target entity 下 `created_at` 早于 30 分钟的 `running` 动作，并继续跳过 detail 中已标记 terminal failure 的动作；近期 `running` 不会被误派发。`worker/claim_behavior_action_recovery_scheduler_test.go` 已覆盖 stale running 会重新入队、recent running 不入队、terminal failure 不入队；`worker/task_claim_behavior_action_test.go` 既有 running action 重入测试保留为执行器侧覆盖。本次未改 SQL/query、接口、Swagger 或 provider DTO，不需要 `make sqlc` / `make swagger`。

- 2026-06-23 修复闭口补记：`P2-F06-1` 的桌台二维码 scene 截断缺口已完成最小实现。后端在 `table_no` 含 `-` 或 scene 超长时统一回退 `tid_<tableID>`；小程序扫码入口改为共享 `entry-params.ts` parser，完整保留历史 `m_<merchantID>-t_<tableNo>` scene 中的含 `-` 桌号，并兼容 `tid_` 与旧 `t` / `table_` 数字桌台 ID。`api/scan_test.go` 已覆盖含 `-` 桌号的生成回归，`check:dine-in-scan-entry-scene` 覆盖 parser 分支；本次未改 SQL/query、Swagger、支付/履约主状态或视觉 UI。

- 2026-06-23 修复闭口补记：`P2-F06-3/4` 的桌台主图投影写路径已完成最小实现。新增图片同时设主图时，API 现在调用 `AddTableImageTx`，在同一事务内锁桌台、插新图、清同桌其它主图；已有图片设主图的事务也补同一桌台锁。媒体资产校验、商户/桌台归属、非主图新增路径保持原行为。本轮不改 migration，不处理历史无主图/多主图脏数据；历史治理继续按只读 SQL 盘点后另排。

- 2026-06-23 修复闭口补记：`P2-F06-2` 的 QR asset/table pointer 半状态重试缺口已完成最小实现。`storeTableQRCode` 现在在 `media_assets.object_key` 唯一键冲突时复用既有 asset，并让 `generateTableQRCode` 继续执行 `UpdateTable(qr_code_url)`；因此首次回写失败后，第二次相同内容重试可以自愈桌台指针。本轮不改 SQL/query、Swagger 或媒体 schema，不做历史空指针批量回填。

### P4-B03. 修复批次草案门禁与占位

- 目标：只在生产取证和本地复现给出足够证据后，排列修复批次；本节不作为直接改代码的授权，也不把候选风险自动升级为已确认 bug。
- 入场条件：
  - `S1-immediate` 经交叉确认，或 `S2-backlog` 经 worker/scheduler/asynq 证据确认无法自动恢复，才允许写入修复批次。
  - 至少有一条 `P4-B02` 复现批次被定义；若无法复现但生产影响明确，必须写明“不可复现原因、生产证据、止血方案、回滚/补偿边界”。
  - P1/P2/P3 命中若牵涉资金，必须先归入 P0 资金族；若牵涉订单/配送/预约主状态，必须先归入 P1 主状态族。
  - `S3-data-quality` 不进入核心修复批次，除非确认当前生产写路径仍可产生同类数据；否则进入数据治理/历史清理。
  - `S4-observability` 只进入观测修复批次，不与业务状态事务修复混排，除非观测缺失本身阻断资金错账发现。
- 批次排序原则：
  1. 先修公共恢复底座，再修单个 consumer。`P0-F03/P0-F12` 若命中 `S1/S2`，优先级高于单条退款、提现或分账 consumer。
  2. 先修“防继续产生错误”的写边界，再做历史数据治理或补偿。涉及资金的补偿方案必须另有只读核账证据，不在本节直接写执行脚本。
  3. 同一根因合并一批：事实应用幂等、outbox 派发、provider terminal 乱序、worker claim、状态迁移 guard 不拆成多个互相踩踏的小修。
  4. 每个修复批次都必须带验证路径：单元/事务测试、集成测试、只读回归 SQL、日志/告警观测项。
  5. 未经用户明确切换到修复阶段前，本节只能写草案，不改业务代码。
